E: Amphoreus

C: 「{NICKNAME}，到此一游。」
E: "{NICKNAME} was here."

C: 空间站「黑塔」•控制中心
E: Herta Space Station: Control Center

C: 获得开拓券时，基础收益为<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1%</unbreak></color>。
E: When obtaining Trailblaze Funds, the base revenue is <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1%</unbreak></color>.

C: 还记得洛奇创作的《再见黑塔》吗？「群星依旧在头顶赏乐，沿途将是它们优雅的倦容。」不知道他离开之后还顺利吗？你也许可以用*银河电波中继器*给他发个消息——
E: Remember Bye, Herta, the poem composed by Rocky? "And with that, the stars continue their enjoyment above as their elegant smiles fill the way forward." Wonder if things are well with him after he left. Maybe you can use the Cosmic Airwave Repeater to send him a message...

C: 就算加入云骑军，素裳也没能逃了文化课！好姑娘成绩上不去，只好找你补习「云骑军科学综合知识」…你敏锐地发现素裳注意力不集中，她太爱凑热闹了。临近测试还剩两天，她下狠誓要集中精神，你看着她苦读书的样子——
E: Even after joining the Cloud Knights, Sushang still can't escape academic classes! The little lady can't get her grades up, and has no choice but to seek you out to tutor her on "Cloud Knights General Scientific Knowledge"... You acutely notice that Sushang gets distracted easily due to her love for hubbubs and crowds. There are only two days left to the test — she vows to maintain her focus, and as you look upon her arduously studying...

C: 可获得土地收益
E: Obtain land revenue

C: 顺理成章地蹭了一顿饭。
E: You very naturally earn a well-deserved free meal.

C: 你熟练地将晕倒的科员救起，全站通报表扬了你。
E: You deftly resuscitate the unconscious researcher. The station lauds your efforts.

C: 大家被你震住了，你们快止血。
E: Everyone is stunned by you. You folks, quickly stop the bleeding.

C: 雷金会帮华劳斯找朋友，华劳斯会帮雷金答题——
E: Regin will help Wallace find friends, Wallace will help Regin answer questions...

C: 这真的是你认识的素裳吗？
E: Is this really the Sushang you know?

C: 成功下车！
E: Successfully gotten off!

C: 你假扮成铁卫，带走调查人员。
E: You pose as a Silvermane Guard and lead the investigator away.

C: 也许彦卿不喜欢云璃！
E: Maybe Yanqing doesn't like Yunli!

C: 他转身去找有钱人了。
E: He turns around and goes looking for someone else to swindle.

C: 假装不知道。
E: Pretend not to know.

C: 运势极佳，诸事可成。
E: Your fortune is brimming, and you will accomplish anything you want.

C: 贝洛伯格的垃圾桶…
E: Belobog's trashcans...

C: 用电影的方式诠释它。
E: Interpret it as a movie.

C: 让它留下帮你做事。
E: Make it stay and work for you.

C: 来打吧，你也是为了钱。
E: Let's fight. You're also after the cash anyway.

C: 别去，小心埋伏！
E: Don't go, it's an ambush!

C: 用于在枰上奇遇中反悔的特殊道具，可以重新再掷骰一次。
E: A special item used to backtrack in Board Encounters. It allows you to re-roll the die again.

C: 重抛硬币×2
E: Reroll Coin ×2

C: 经典苏乐达
E: Classic SoulGlad

C: 青雀
E: Qingque

C: 彦卿
E: Yanqing

C: 最适合组织进攻节奏的中场是谁？
E: Who is the best midfielder suited to organize and time attacks?

C: 第二阶段时，<color=#f29e38ff>所有的召唤物</color>都会被强化为【灵魂释放】状态。
E: In Phase II, <color=#f29e38ff>all summons</color> will be enhanced to "Soulfreed" state.

C: 首领幻影<color=#f29e38ff>失去第一层韧性</color>时，立即进入<color=#f29e38ff>【镣铐崩解】</color>状态。首领幻影在不处于【镣铐崩解】状态的情况下行动一定次数后，也会进入【镣铐崩解】状态。
E: When Boss Mirage <color=#f29e38ff>loses their first layer of Toughness</color>, it immediately enters the <color=#f29e38ff>"Shackle Shatter"</color> state. Boss Mirage will also enter the "Shackle Shatter" state after taking a certain number of actions while not in that state.

C: 应对首领幻影不断施放【创世绝响】
E: Counters Boss Mirage's constant Last Choir of Genesis usage

C: 阵地转移
E: Battlefield Transfer

C: 困居于下层区的人们为了生存，往往会不惜铤而走险深入裂界寻找任何可用的物资，其中被他们掘出的古代机器成了他们最好的帮手。
E: In order to survive, some Underworlders are desperate enough to venture deep into the Fragmentum in search of anything salvageable. Ancient machinery that they dug up has become their best helper.

C: 以旧世界遗留的科技拼凑制造的自动机器单元，形如某种载具，然而人们似乎早就忘却了它载具的用途。\n战斗中自动机兵「战犬」能提供支援，回复战友的生命。
E: An automaton pieced together with Old World technology. It looks like a transportation vehicle whose purpose has long been forgotten.\nIn combat, Automaton Hounds can provide support and restore HP to its allies.

C: 「星际和平公司」的资深员工，级别至少是项目组的小组长。驾驶的机甲属于公有资产，一旦损坏需要自费赔偿。工资尚可，足够在公司旗下的企业舰上租下一室一厅的单间。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation senior staff member with a minimal rank of project team leader. The mech they drive belongs to the IPC. If damaged, its repair fees have to be paid out-of-pocket. With a half-decent salary, they can at least afford to rent a one-bedroom apartment on one of the IPC's enterprise ships.

C: 代码受到影响后的完整投影。参照本体为美梦剧团中演奏谐乐的琴师。本应于「谐乐大典」之中献奏，如今却被「秩序」所缚，上演着关于「未来」的剧目。来日是永恒的长歌，幸福的愿景汇于弦上，以琴声呼唤谱曲的君王。
E: A complete projection produced by compromised codes. The referent entity is a musician responsible for playing the harmonious tune in the Sweet Dreams Troupe. It should be playing in the Charmony Festival, but it is now bound by Order and keeps performing scenes of the "Future." The future is an eternal ballad, a vision of happiness strung together, calling to the composing sovereign with the melody of a harp.

C: 蕴含特定认知的实体，由忆域中的潜意识碎片堆积而成。\n坚不可摧的障壁包裹起生命，阻拦异己。但在那坚硬的躯壳下，却是脆弱不堪的无名地带。
E: An entity imbued with specific cognition, formed by the accumulation of subconscious fragments in the Memory Zone.\nLife is parceled in impenetrable barriers, obstructing the intrusion of the alien. But beneath that ironclad shell, there is a region both nameless and fragile.

C: 「星核猎手」的一员，身着沉重装甲的神秘战士。他的铁甲能够释放炽焰，点燃战场，发动烈火般的攻势。
E: One of the Stellaron Hunters, a mysterious warrior donning formidable armor. The mech suit wields the power to unleash fiery onslaughts, engulfing the battlefield in flames.

C: 迷失在群星中的跨维度生物，性温，味甘，不可食用。一生中大部分时间花在进食和逃跑上。偶遇它的旅行者视之为吉兆。
E: An interdimensional creature lost in the stars. Docile in nature. Sweet in taste. Inedible. Spends most of its life feeding and fleeing. Travelers who encounter these creatures see them as good omens.

C: 无根自开、凭空生就的幻花。幻胧托体「建木」，炼成肉身，却不曾放下毁灭的权柄。
E: A phantom flower that blooms without root and forms out of thin air. Phantylia used the Ambrosial Arbor as her host to forge a physical body, yet never let go of Destruction's authority.

C: 真蛰虫幼体；「真蛰虫」幼体依据生长程度可被划分为「幼蛰虫」与「次蛰虫」。
E: The youngling of a True Sting. Based on their growth stage, young True Stings can be further divided into Juvenile Stings and Lesser Stings.

C: 自动机兵•灰熊（完整）
E: Automaton Grizzly (Complete)

C: 云骑骁卫•彦卿（污染）
E: Cloud Knight Lieutenant: Yanqing (Corrupted)

C: 肃风之杪
E: Twig of Wintry Wind

C: 「齐响诗班」神主日
E: "Harmonious Choir" The Great Septimus

C: 正阳狮鹫
E: Noontide Gryphon

C: 商务扑满
E: Commerce Trotter

C: 序列扑满（稀有）
E: Sequence Trotter (Rare)

C: 外宇宙之炎
E: Blaze Out of Space

C: 虚卒•篡改者
E: Voidranger: Distorter

C: 遮天蔽日的噬星蠹
E: Sky-Shrouding Stardevourer Swarm

C: 对指定我方单体造成冰属性伤害。
E: Deals Ice DMG to a single target.

C: 对冻结状态下的我方目标及相邻目标造成冰属性伤害，同时解除主目标的冻结状态。若相邻目标处于冻结状态，则再次对主目标施放本技能。
E: Deals Ice DMG to Frozen targets and units adjacent to the target. This also removes the primary target's Frozen state. If the adjacent units are frozen, then this ability is used again on the primary target.

C: 辅助机械臂发生爆炸，对指定我方单体造成大量物理属性伤害。
E: The Auxiliary Robot Arm explodes, dealing massive Physical DMG to a single target.

C: 召唤【辅助机械臂单元】。
E: Summons Auxiliary Robot Arm Unit.

C: 对我方全体造成大量冰属性伤害。
E: Deals massive Ice DMG to all targets.

C: 消耗自身生命值，召唤【魔阴身士卒】。
E: Consumes HP to summon Mara-Struck Soldiers

C: 提高防御力，且使自身韧性无法被削减。
E: Increases DEF. Toughness cannot be reduced.

C: 使敌方全体立即行动，同时提高速度。
E: Causes all friendly units to immediately take action and increases SPD.

C: 处于共鸣状态时施放，对指定我方单体及其相邻目标造成大量风属性伤害。
E: Unleashed while in the Resonance state. Deals massive Wind DMG to a designated target and any adjacent targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成雷属性伤害。
E: Deals Lightning DMG to one designated target.

C: 将【惊喜频道】状态转变为【惊吓频道】状态。
E: Switches the Surprise Channel status to the Fright Channel status.

C: 对我方全体造成少量量子属性伤害，并使我方全体能量减少。只能在【狂乱】状态下使用。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG to all targets and causes all targets' Energy to be reduced. This ability can only be used while in the "Rabid" state.

C: 召唤2只【气泡锂犬】。
E: Summons 2 Bubble Hounds.

C: 进入战斗时，选择一名「秩序的傀儡」成为【司律】，每回合可再次行动，并小幅提高其速度。当目标的弱点被击破时，使其行动延后，并重新选择一名「秩序的傀儡」成为【司律】；如果此时所有「秩序的傀儡」都处于弱点击破状态，则会对自身造成伤害、额外延后所有「秩序的傀儡」的行动，并使其受到的伤害提高。当任意一名「秩序的傀儡」从弱点击破状态恢复时，会重新被选为【司律】。
E: When entering battle, chooses a Puppet of the Order to become "Impresario," granting them an extra action each turn and a small increase to their SPD. When that friendly unit's Weakness is Broken, causes their action to be delayed and re-selects another Puppet of the Order to become "Impresario." If all Puppets of the Order are Weakness Broken at this time, this unit will receive DMG and delay all Puppets of the Order's actions while also increasing the DMG they receive. When any Puppet of the Order recovers from being Weakness Broken, they will be designated as the new "Impresario."

C: 进入【守备】状态，弱点未被击破时受到的伤害降低，被击破时行动额外延后，被击破后受到的伤害提高。
E: Enters the Safeguard state. When not Weakness Broken, reduces DMG received. Once Weakness is Broken, action will be additionally delayed. After Weakness is Broken, increases DMG received.

C: 连续对我方随机单体造成少量量子属性伤害。每层【无明火】额外造成1段伤害。
E: Deals minor successive Quantum DMG to a random target. Each stack of Obscure Blaze additionally deals DMG 1 time.

C: 提升自身造成的伤害，持续1回合，陷入弱点击破状态后解除。每次释放时获得1层伤害提高，并使后续召唤的【永眠墓碣】生命值增加1格。
E: Increases the DMG dealt by this unit for 1 turn. This effect is removed when this unit becomes Weakness Broken. Every time this ability is used, gains 1 stack of DMG Boost, and increases the HP of any subsequently summoned Sombrous Sepulcher by 1 bar.

C: 召唤4个【授勋】的雕塑。
E: Summon 4 statues of The Honored.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量火属性伤害。
E: Deals minor Fire DMG to a single target.

C: 对我方全体造成火属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入灼烧状态。
E: Deals Fire DMG to all targets, with a high chance to Burn them.

C: 【巴特鲁斯】提出谜题，进入【出谜】状态。我方可施放【战技】、【终结技】回应谜题。
E: "Bartholos" presents a brainteaser, entering the "Brainteaser" state. Targets can respond with "Skill" or "Ultimate."

C: 对我方单体及其相邻目标造成少量量子属性伤害和量子属性<u>【衰亡伤害】</u>。
E: Deals minor Quantum DMG and Quantum <u>"Atrophy DMG"</u> to one target and adjacent targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量物理属性伤害。随后被【末日歧途的盗火者】吸收，使其获得1层<u>【灾难之力】</u>。
E: Deals minor Physical DMG to one designated target and is then absorbed by "Flame Reaver of Doomsday Led Astray," allowing them to gain 1 stack of <u>"Calamity Power"</u>.

C: 处于【镣锁】状态下受到致命攻击，若【黑斗篷魔王】的<u>【灾难之力】</u>层数不为0，立即被其重新召唤并进入【镣锁】状态，但会使【黑斗篷魔王】失去1层<u>【灾难之力】</u>和一定比例的生命值。【黑斗篷魔王】施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】时，被其吸收，回复转化为<u>【苦痛缠绕】</u>的生命值。
E: Receives the killing blow when "Enfettered" is active. If "Black Cloak Demon King"'s <u>"Calamity Power"</u> stacks are not 0, this unit is immediately resummoned and enters "Enfettered" state, but will cause "Black Cloak Demon King" to lose 1 <u>"Calamity Power"</u> stack and a certain proportion of HP. When "Black Cloak Demon King" uses "Cry Not for the Discarded," it is absorbed, and restores HP that was converted to <u>"Entangled By Agony"</u>.

C: 自身陷入【重创】状态时，下次行动回复所有生命值并解除【重创】状态。
E: When this unit enters the "Grave Wound" state, restore all HP and dispel the "Grave Wound" state on next action.

C: 获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>并进入【沉默的悲叹】状态，下次行动时施放【莫因舍弃而哭泣】。
E: Obtains <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and enters the "Silent Sorrow" state. Uses "Cry Not for the Discarded" in the next action.

C: 获得<u>【灾难之力】</u>并进入【垂死的哽咽】状态，下次行动时施放【却是必要的苦难】。
E: Obtains <u>"Calamity Power"</u> and enters the "Dying Sobs" state. Uses "But Suffering is Essential" in the next action.

C: 对锁定目标造成虚数属性伤害，并使目标陷入【<u>行动锁定</u>】状态。
E: Deals Imaginary DMG to the locked-on target and inflicts the "<u>Action Lock</u>" state.

C: 根据【绩效点】数量大幅提高伤害。获得【绩效点】时，获得可叠加的护盾，无【绩效点】时会移除该护盾。护盾被击破或陷入无法战斗状态时【绩效点】会被夺取。
E: Greatly increases DMG in accordance with the number of Performance Points. A stackable Shield will be obtained when receiving Performance Points, and the Shield will be removed when there are no Performance Points. When the Shield is broken or the character is downed, the Performance Points will be seized.

C: 自身进入蓄力状态。下次行动施放【企业文化冲击】。
E: Enters the Charging state. Uses Work Culture Shock for the next action.

C: 扑满陷入恐慌，即将在1个回合后逃离。
E: The Treasure Trotter is panicking and will flee in 1 turn.

C: 扑满陷入恐慌，即将在1个回合后逃离。
E: The Treasure Trotter is panicking and will flee in 1 turn.

C: 【绽放】状态下，下次行动施放【破灭】。当【破灭玄莲】处于【绽放】状态下被弱点击破、消灭或【绽放】状态被解除时，【不死神实•幻胧】受到的伤害提高并且行动延后。
E: When in the Bloom status, uses Havoc during the next action. When the Destruction Lotus is Weakness Broken, defeated, or having the Bloom dispelled while in Bloom, Phantylia the Undying receives increased DMG and have their action delayed.

C: 对我方全体造成量子属性伤害。
E: Deals Quantum DMG to all targets.

C: 对指定我方单体造成少量风属性伤害，并大概率使受到攻击的我方目标陷入风化状态。
E: Deals minor Wind DMG to one designated ally target, with a high chance to inflict Wind Shear.

C: 击败区域内的强敌，完成挑战
E: Defeat the formidable foe in the area and complete the challenge

E: Look for a weight that conforms to the request of the Titan and rebalance the scale

C: 使用泡泡弹堵住排水口
E: Use bubble shots to block the drain

C: dev_推雪球测试

「呜！呜！排排坐，莫站立，瓦普跳跃要小心。呜！呜！安全带，随时系，餐车不是打牌地！」 ——《星穹列车安全指示（帕姆版）》 「开拓」的星神阿基维利陨落之后，祂的开拓意志被追随者「无名客」们继承，其中就包括祂曾搭乘的星穹列车。然而「万界之癌」恣肆蔓延，列车所枕银轨也未能幸免。疾疫未至时，列车就已步履维艰；道阻且塞时，便不得不悄然搁浅。 如此经年累月，不知过了多久，一位红发少女与荒废的列车相遇了。她被遗落在引擎和银轨之间无言故事所吸引，花费时间填补了裂隙、抚平了磨损，将列车上下修葺一新。于是，好奇尚异的少女踏入列车的车厢，开始了丈量宇宙的开拓之旅。 星穹列车逐站停靠，乘客也来往匆匆，不断有人加入列车的旅途，又不断有人离去。旅者们来自不同的世界，背负不同的过往，奔赴不同的终点，但只要身处列车之中，他们便共享同一段旅程。因此，即便旅客们各怀心思，甚至心怀鬼胎，列车和姬子对此也毫不介意——只要有人愿意共赴奇旅，车门便慷慨地为其开启。
E: "Choo! Choo! Sit tight, no one fight, warp jump watch your head. Choo! Choo! Seat belt, fasten-up, buffet car speeding up!" — Astral Express Safety Instructions (Pom-Pom version) After the fall of Akivili, the Aeon of Trailblaze, THEIR trailblazing will was inherited by THEIR followers, the Nameless, including the Astral Express that the Aeon once rode on. However, as the Cancer of All Worlds continues to spread, the star rails that the Express runs on also fell victim. The Express could barely run before the blight descended, and had no choice but to run aground when the rails became overly obstructed. It remained so for many years until a girl with red hair discovered the desolate Express. She was fascinated by the wordless stories the engine and the star rails had in store. She spent countless hours repairing the cracks and evening the dents, restoring the Express to its original form. The curious girl then set foot into the Express and began her trailblazing voyage that surveys the cosmos. The Astral Express made stops at every station, with passengers boarding and exiting along the way. Many join and leave the Express' journey. The travelers come from different worlds, shoulder different burdens, and head to different destinations. However, while they are on the Astral Express, they would share the same voyage. That is why Himeko and the Express do not hesitate to open the doors to anyone willing to share this magical experience, regardless of their agendas and intentions.

C: 星际和平公司 - 存护
E: Interastral Peace Corporation — Preservation

C: 完成比赛并进入前#1名
E: Complete the race and place in the top #1

C: 「穷人哪怕到了梦里也还是穷人——因为这帮可怜虫压根就没见过什么世面！」
E: "Poor people are still poor even in their dreams because these poor souls have never seen the world!"

C: 了解朝露公馆的安保队长里奥悲观的一面
E: Learn about the pessimistic side of Leo, head guard at Dewlight Pavilion

C: 在朝露公馆调查苜蓿草的徽记
E: Investigate the Alfalfa Family Crest at Dewlight Pavilion

C: 流萤变身萨姆，以赴死的决心带着炸弹娃娃飞向高空。倒计时结束，却只在夜空中绽开盛大的焰火。花火将你自晖长石号上推下，流萤接住坠落中的你。人们为何选择沉睡？流萤认为或许就像你说的一样，最后都要从梦中醒来。至此。匹诺康尼的故事迎来圆满落幕。
E: Firefly transformed into SAM and, ready to sacrifice herself, flew high into the sky with the bomb doll. As the countdown ended, only magnificent fireworks bloomed in the night sky. Sparkle pushed you off the Radiant Feldspar, and Firefly caught you as you fell. "Why do people choose to sleep?" Firefly thought that perhaps, just as you said, they're afraid to awaken from the dream. And with that, the story of Penacony came to a perfect close.

C: 在赛飞儿失去硬币的瞬间，盗火行者将其重创，并从赛飞儿体内剥离出火种。然而「火种」再度化为陶罐，赛飞儿的诡计得逞。
E: The moment Cipher lost the coin, the Flame Reaver struck, ripping the Coreflame from her body. But the Coreflame turned back into a dolium, and Cipher's trick succeeded.

C: 万敌背后负创而死，缇宁耗尽自身力量，赛飞儿长眠于冥流浅滩，丹恒全力阻止盗火行者。「众人将与一人离别，惟其人将觐见奇迹。」
E: Mydei died with wounds on his back. Trinnon used up all her strength. Cipher lay still on the Stream of Souls. Dan Heng gave everything he had to stop the Flame Reaver. "All shall bid farewell to one, and that person alone will witness the miracle."

C: 在创世涡心，来古士向你和海瑟音展现出他的完整形态。「以神礼观众之名，我将亲自参演，世界的终幕。」
E: Within the Vortex of Genesis, Lygus revealed his complete form to you and Hysilens. "As the Theoros, I will personally participate in performing this world's end."

C: 庞大数据涌向《如我所书》，翁法罗斯的命运翻开新页。名为「黄金裔」的人子归还众神火种，再度支撑起天地。英雄逐火而行，只为镌写下创世史诗的开篇启笔。而在新世界的麦田中，你与昔涟再次相遇。「这一定是个不同以往的浪漫故事。你也是这么想的，对吧♪」
E: Vast data flows into As I've Written, turning a new page in the destiny of Amphoreus. The children of humanity called Chrysos Heirs return the divine Coreflame to the gods, once again supporting heaven and earth. Heroes chase the fire, all to inscribe the opening lines of this creation epic. And in the wheat fields of the new world, you meet Cyrene once again. "This will be a romantic story like none that has come before. You think so too, right? ♪"

C: 为完成自我加冕，「铁墓」令群星陷入死寂。在十三次心跳后，博识尊将重启对寰宇的数算，以「毁灭」为唯一解。
E: To crown itself, Irontomb plunged the stars into silence. After thirteen heartbeats, Nous would restart its calculation of the cosmos, with Destruction as the only solution.

C: 在被你触碰到的瞬间，灵火猛烈挣扎。灵火打开传送门，将大量怪物传送到黑塔空间站。
E: The moment you touched it, the Phase Flame thrashed violently. It opened a teleporter, flooding the Herta Space Station with a lot of monsters.

C: 你们在监控室找到负伤的阿兰。阿兰称为阻隔敌人，电梯的权限暂时封锁。在阿兰的提示下，三月七找到了带在身上的电梯密钥。
E: You found Arlan injured in the monitoring room. Arlan explained that the elevator was temporarily under lockdown to stop the enemies' advance. With Arlan's hint, March 7th found the elevator's encryption key.

C: 鬼鬼祟祟的<color=#f29e38ff>桑博</color>自雪堆中现身，你们得知他正在躲避「银鬃铁卫」。在桑博的带领下，你们前往星球上最后的人类聚落——<color=#f29e38ff>贝洛伯格</color>。
E: The sneaky <color=#f29e38ff>Sampo</color> emerged from the snow drift, and you found out that he was hiding from the Silvermane Guards. With Sampo's guidance, you head toward the last human settlement on the planet — <color=#f29e38ff>Belobog</color>.

C: 名为<color=#f29e38ff>停云</color>的狐人少女自称是罗浮天舶司商团接渡使，感谢你们仗义相助。出于安全考虑，停云提议带你们觐见天舶司司舵<color=#f29e38ff>驭空</color>。
E: The foxian girl named <color=#f29e38ff>Tingyun</color> introduced herself as a merchant guild Amicassador of the Sky-Faring Commission on the Xianzhou Luofu. She thanked you for your brave assistance. For safety reasons, Tingyun proposed taking you to meet <color=#f29e38ff>Yukong</color>, the Sky-Faring Helm Master.

C: 一位少女向你寻求帮助，她遭到身后的猎犬家系成员追捕，被指控为「偷渡犯」。你被认为是共犯而被迫进入战斗。
E: A young lady asked you for your help since she was being pursued by the Bloodhound Family Member and accused as a "stowaway." You were mistakenly judged as a conspirator and found yourself drawn into battle.

C: 黑天鹅前去确认姬子与三月七的安危，黄泉安抚惊魂未定的你。黄泉向你道歉，如果当时拔刀，她或许能救下流萤，但她别无选择。
E: Black Swan went forth to confirm Himeko and March 7th's safety while Acheron comforted you as you suffered from your state of shock. She said that if she only drew her blade, perhaps she could have saved Firefly, but she had no other choice.

C: 星期日返回大剧院，意在告别「昨日的自己」，即万维克。
E: Sunday returned to the Grand Theater to farewell his "past self" — In other words, Wonweek.

C: 来古士称只要中止协助逐火之旅，他能将你与丹恒送离翁法罗斯。丹恒认为不能抛弃黄金裔们，与此同时，元老院的刺客们将丹恒包围。
E: Lygus stated that as long as you and Dan Heng stopped helping the Flame-Chase Journey, he could send you and Dan Heng away from Amphoreus. However, Dan Heng refused to abandon the Chrysos Heirs. At this moment, assassins from the Council of Elders surrounded Dan Heng.

C: 命运的箴言为荒笛揭示：<color=#f29e38ff>「汝将自掘坟墓，焚毁于叛逆的熔炉。」</color>丹恒接过火种，成为「大地」半神。
E: Destiny's oracle revealed to Terravox: <color=#f29e38ff>"You shall dig your own grave and burn in the furnace of rebellion."</color> Dan Heng received the Coreflame and became the Demigod of Earth.

C: 阮•梅解释称，她所创造的「复制体」与令使相差甚远，无法维持自身存在。她感谢你为研究作出的贡献，以及你带来的「意外之喜」。
E: Ruan Mei explained that the "replicas" she created were vastly different from the Emanator and could not maintain their own existence. She thanked you for your contribution to her research, as well as for the "pleasant surprise" you brought.

C: 战斗以后，小机器人失去了行动能力。你与克拉拉决定回收零件，并将小机器人带回去维修。
E: After the combat, the Little Robot lost its ability to move. You and Clara decided to salvage the parts and take the Little Robot back for repairs.

C: 只要接纳「赤月」，成为战首，飞霄将不再被「月狂」困扰。然而飞霄拒绝呼雷给出的道路，选择坚守本心。
E: By accepting the Crimson Moon and becoming the Warhead, Feixiao would no longer be troubled by "Moon Rage." However, Feixiao rejected Hoolay's offered path, choosing to remain true to herself.

C: 采翼濒死时告诉驭空，不要让晴霓成为飞行士。驭空绝望地试图唤回采翼，她活了下来，但心已死去。
E: Before dying, Caiyi had begged Yukong not to let Qingni become a pilot. Yukong had desperately tried to call her back. Though her body survived, Yukong's spirit did not.

C: 仍是少女的可可利亚聆听星核之声。可可利亚怀疑星核许诺的未来是否太过残忍，星核称「死亡正是新世界的襁褓」。
E: The still-young Cocolia continued to hear the Voice of the Stellaron. Though she questioned whether the future promised by the Stellaron was too cruel, it replied that "death is the infancy of a new world."

C: 停云感觉到附近有些不对劲。为避免落入陷阱，你们使用「谛听」探查周围环境。
E: Tingyun felt something was wrong around your location. To avoid falling into a trap, you used the Diting to investigate the surroundings.

C: 描绘龙尊形象的石雕早已历尽风蚀沧桑，过去的记忆却如蕴潮暗涌。丹恒靠近龙尊雕像，尝试感应此地的力量。
E: The statue of the High Elder has been greatly changed by years of weathering. Yet, memories of the past continued to stir. Dan Heng approached the High Elder Statue and attempted to sense the energy there.

C: 「慰灵奠仪」结束后，景元召见列车组的各位，称要在神策府将两样东西送给星穹列车。
E: After the soul-soothing ceremony ended, Jing Yuan called for everyone in the Express Crew, as he wanted to give two items at the Seat of Divine Foresight to the Astral Express.

C: 三月七认出知更鸟的歌星身份。知更鸟与其兄长、「谐乐大典」主办人星期日前来协助你解决入住问题，并为列车组升级房型作为补偿。
E: March 7th managed to recognize Robin, as she was a renowned songstress. Robin and her brother, the lead organizer of the Charmony Festival, Sunday, came forth to help you with issues relating to checking in, and upgraded the Express Crew's rooms as compensation.

C: 砂金与真理医生交谈，获得对方赠予的一个纸条。砂金称所有基石已被放上该在的位置，自己还拿回了礼金，距离胜利只有一步之遥。
E: Aventurine talked to Dr. Ratio and obtained a note from him. He said that all the Cornerstones had been placed where they should be, and he even recovered his prize. He was only a step away from victory.

C: 星期日回忆曾庇护逐梦客，却因善意酿成更大悲剧。
E: Sunday recalled once sheltering a Dreamchaser, only for that kindness to spiral into greater tragedy.

C: 你调制了甜美特饮，追忆英魂精神，传达对未来的温柔向往。
E: You mixed a sweet special drink to remember the spirit of the heroes, passing along your gentle wishes towards the future.

C: 舒翁赠送特饮作为告别礼物，叮嘱你们将这份回忆珍藏于心，接下来该走向各自的明天了。
E: Siobhan gave you a special drink as a parting gift, telling your group to store this memory well in your hearts. Now, it was time for you all to head to your own tomorrows.

C: 翡翠强势反击老奥帝，揭露公司的底牌，迫使其放弃上市计划并接受合作提案。
E: Jade gave a strong counterattack against Old Oti, revealing the IPC's trump card and forcing him to give up his plans to make Penacony go public, accepting the collaboration proposal instead.

C: 你找到「导演」娃娃，它询问你作为匹诺康尼正常闹剧主演的感受。根据需要，「导演」告诉你这里根本没有炸弹的事实。
E: You found the "Director" Doll, who asked about your experience starring in the regular farce of Penacony. As needed, the "Director" informed you that there was never any bomb here in the first place.

C: 波提欧的世界中唯余灰白黯色。助蕉声称，失去 ▇ ▇ 色彩，你也不会 ▇ ▇ ▇ ▇不幸。
E: Only shades of gray remained in Boothill's world. Assistanana claimed that forgetting ▇▇▇▇▇ colors will not ▇▇▇▇ you any worse off.

C: 一记直击灵魂的手刀使你自疼痛中清醒，你看到面前的猴子们面露凶相。乱破称它们在呼唤邪猿•伙伴，请你躲到她身后。
E: The karate chop hit with surprising force, jolting you fully awake. You saw the monkeys before you now looked menacing. Rappa said they were summoning ape fiendling and asked you to hide behind her.

C: 你们来到恰丽卡的甜品摊位，在此体验甜品制作流程。你负责设计，丹恒负责制作，三月七则负责品鉴。
E: You visited Chaletka's dessert stand and experienced the dessert-making process. You were tasked with design, Dan Heng with production, and March 7th with tasting.

C: 米凯称，「转变」仍在继续，由居民变成的猴子越来越多。米凯认为，知更鸟是解决危机的关键，但这意味着流梦礁将与家族有所牵涉。
E: Micah said that the conversion was still continuing, with more and more residents turning into monkeys. Micah believed Robin was the key to solving the Crisis, but this meant Dreamflux Reef would become involved with The Family.

C: 「纷争」泰坦陨落后，你们取得其火种。你们商议决定，由白厄携带火种返回创世涡心，遐蝶则尝试与尼卡多利的残魂交流。
E: After the Strife Titan fell, you obtained their Coreflame. After some discussion, you decided that Phainon should carry the Coreflame back to the Vortex of Genesis. Meanwhile, Castorice would try to commune with Nikador's fading soul.

C: 万敌认识被击败的奥赫玛士兵，感慨其在「纷争」的试炼中被杀意捏造成这般扭曲模样。万敌看了一眼倒下的帕狄卡斯，但并未言语。
E: Mydei recognized the fallen soldiers, lamenting how killing intent had warped them into these twisted forms in the trial of Strife. He glanced briefly at Perdikkas's body, but said nothing.

C: 你与遐蝶向商人询问情况，得知缇安所看中的是一块火山玻璃。遐蝶当即决定将其买下，打算将其缝装到羊毛毡里，作为给缇安的礼物。
E: You and Castorice asked the merchant about the item, learning that what Trianne wanted was a piece of volcanic glass. Without hesitation, Castorice bought it, intending to stitch the piece into felted wool as a gift for Trianne.

C: 你与丹恒汇总消息。丹恒称翁法罗斯的天空被「天空」泰坦艾格勒封锁，而风堇的先祖正是天空祭司，她或许能提供更多关于此的线索。
E: You regrouped with Dan Heng to consolidate information. He reported that the sky above Amphoreus was sealed by the Sky Titan Aquila, and that Hyacine's ancestor was once the Sky Priest. She may hold the key to further clues about this.

C: 白厄得以面见刻律德菈，二人在谈判后达成同盟。刻律德菈同意将所有火种交由白厄封印，前提是白厄参与对「大地」泰坦的征伐。
E: Phainon was able to meet Cerydra face to face and formed an alliance after a negotiation. Cerydra agreed to give all the Coreflames to Phainon, so he could seal them, provided that he would participate in the campaign against the Earth Titan.

C: 斯科特通过葛瑞迪的宝具来观看其他参赛者，发现了巡海游侠波提欧。
E: Using Grady's Noble Phantasm, Skott observed the other participants and spotted Boothill, the Galaxy Ranger.

C: Lancer追踪圣杯力量来到剧院，与老奥帝对峙，得知其将圣杯战争打造为一场娱乐节目。作为老奥帝的盟友，音符小姐赫然出现。
E: Lancer had followed the Holy Grail's energy trail to the Theater, confronting Old Oti and learning that the merchant had turned the entire Holy Grail War into a giant entertainment show. As Old Oti's ally, Miss Note suddenly appeared.

C: 你与科员「A」交谈，他鼓励你勇敢地追逐愿望。即使没有列车，如果你真觉得自己是无名客，那你要做的只有一件事——踏上旅途。
E: You spoke with Researcher "A." He encouraged you to bravely chase your wish. Even if there was no Express, if you truly believed you were a Nameless, then there was only one thing left for you to do — take the journey.

C: 你曾在「黑塔」空间站苏醒，得到纳努克的瞥视。你尝试与「毁灭」同调，最终只得在陷入万劫不复的狂乱前被迫放弃。
E: You once woke up at the Herta Space Station and received Nanook's gaze. You tried to resonate with the Destruction, but were forced to let go before falling into eternal madness.

C: 那刻夏与赛飞儿联手设计，将来古士封印于创世涡心。赛飞儿将自身作为有去无回的诱饵，而囚禁来古士的术式则由那刻夏的生命炼成。
E: Anaxa and Cipher worked together to seal Lygus in the Vortex of Genesis. Cipher offered herself as a lure on a journey with no return, while the sealing formula was forged from Anaxa's very life.

C: 丹枫与丹恒道别。至此，丹枫留下的一切将尽数消散，而丹恒也将迈向属于他的「不朽」。
E: Dan Feng bid farewell to Dan Heng. From this moment on, everything Dan Feng left behind would fade away, while Dan Heng stepped forward into his own "Permanence."

C: 天将会谈，景元请缨出战「铁墓」，但仙舟联盟只许罗浮一舰出兵。爻光相信即使「铁墓」出世博识尊也不会坐以待毙，飞霄认为必须谨慎应对「绝灭大君」。
E: At the Arbiter-Generals meeting, Jing Yuan volunteered to fight against Irontomb, but the Xianzhou Alliance only permitted the Luofu to send troops. Yao Guang believed that even if Irontomb emerged, Nous won't sit idly by, while Feixiao insisted they must handle Lord Ravagers with caution.

C: 姬子尝试与巡海游侠代表联系，然而并未得到回应。游侠们向来神龙见首不见尾，这也理所应当。
E: Himeko attempted to contact the Galaxy Ranger representative, but received no response. It was expected, given that the Rangers had always been an elusive bunch.

C: 黑塔宣布将攻克「铁墓」作为个人课题。一旦正面战场失利，黑塔将代替铁墓完成「自我加冕」，与博识尊接轨并改写「第四时刻」。
E: Herta declared that conquering Irontomb would be her personal research project. Should the frontal assault fail, Herta will complete the "Self-Coronation" in place of Irontomb, interface with Nous, and rewrite the "Fourth Instant."

C: 在三月七进入翁法罗斯之后，昔涟领会了精湛的弓箭技术。而那支承载金焰的箭矢，将会在未来划过星空，成为银河的曙光。
E: After March 7th entered Amphoreus, Cyrene mastered the art of archery. And that arrow bearing golden flames would streak across the stars in the future, becoming a glimmer of hope for the cosmos.

C: 为让翁法罗斯被群星眷顾，昔涟向银河求援，这一瞬被黑天鹅捕捉。黑天鹅感谢昔涟，让她加深了对自己所行命途的理解。
E: To gain the favor of the stars for Amphoreus, Cyrene sent a call for help to the cosmos, which was caught by Black Swan. Black Swan thanked Cyrene for helping her gain greater understanding of the Path she walked.

C: 昔涟将仪式剑钉在祝祭庭院，至此，「记忆」的旅途抵达终点。昔涟的身体不自觉地颤抖，「往昔的涟漪」提议找个温暖的地方休息下。
E: Cyrene planted the ceremonial blade in the Sacrament Courtyard. With that, the journey of these "memories" reached its end. As Cyrene trembled unconsciously, the "ripples of past reverie" suggested finding a warm place to rest.

C: 你与白厄重逢，白厄称现在维系黄金裔们意识和身形的力量来自别处。你邀请白厄一起去旅行，在漫天银河中，一定也有类似哀丽秘榭的小村庄。
E: You reunited with Phainon, who revealed that the power sustaining the Chrysos Heirs' consciousness and forms now came from elsewhere. You invited Phainon to travel together, believing that there must be small villages just like Aedes Elysiae somewhere in the vast cosmos.

C: 黑塔宣示大获全胜，声称对于敢挑衅她的人，必当百倍奉还。黑塔估计，游戏账号冻结之后，银狼正抱着电脑痛哭流涕呢。
E: Herta declared a sweeping victory, stating that anyone who dared provoke her would pay a hundredfold price. Herta guessed Silver Wolf was probably bawling over her computer now that her gaming accounts had been frozen.

C: 帕姆听到了「不应存在于列车上的声音」，其来源似乎是客房车厢或列车长室。三月七提议各自回房间检查一下。
E: Pom-Pom had heard a "sound that shouldn't exist on the Express," possibly coming from the Passenger Cabins or the conductor's cabin. March 7th proposed that everyone return to their rooms and take a look.

C: 你们向希儿征询对合同的看法。希儿选择弃权，不想让自己的看法干扰布洛妮娅的判断，但她会坚定追随布洛妮娅的决定。
E: You asked Seele for her stance on the contract. She chose to abstain, not wanting her voice to sway Bronya's decision, but she promised to stand by whatever choice Bronya made.

C: 云璃取得比试的胜利，认为彦卿的剑术不过如此。云璃给彦卿一个凭实力夺回飞剑的机会，彦卿选择奉陪到底。
E: After winning the duel, Yunli believed Yanqing's swordplay rather disappointing. She offered Yanqing a chance to prove his strength and reclaim the Flying Sword. Yanqing accepted the challenge head-on.

C: 你们回到长乐天。三月七赞叹飞霄武艺高强，丹恒则劝彦卿不要将对阵时的挫折放在心上。彦卿邀请诸位前往神策府，称有要事相商。
E: You returned to the Exalting Sanctum. March 7th praised Feixiao's impressive martial prowess, while Dan Heng consoled Yanqing not to dwell on his setback during the duel. Yanqing invited everyone to the Seat of Divine Foresight, saying there was something important to discuss.

C: 椒丘告诉呼雷，步离人族群已经在飞霄的巡猎下四分五裂，而云骑军将封锁所有港口以阻止呼雷出逃。呼雷放椒丘亲往探视港口情况。
E: Jiaoqiu told Hoolay that the borisin tribes had been scattered by Feixiao's hunt, and the Cloud Knights would blockade all ports to prevent his escape. Hoolay permitted Jiaoqiu to personally verify the situation.

C: 三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰。云璃鼓励三月七打起精神，好好代替彦卿师父守擂。云璃则负责确保演武仪典安全。
E: March 7th and Yunli boarded the Skysplitter. Yunli encouraged March 7th to stay positive and to stand in for Yanqing to defend the ring. Meanwhile, Yunli would ensure the safety of the Wardance.

C: 云璃向云骑士兵询问情况。云骑士兵称没有发现异常，但目前缺乏识别步离人的手段。就在刚才，竞锋舰收到一个紧急登舰请求。
E: Yunli asked a Cloud Knights Soldier about the situation. The soldier reported no unusual findings but mentioned they lacked means to identify borisin. Just moments ago, the Skysplitter had received an emergency boarding request.

C: 灵砂向涛然诘问幽囚劫狱与药王秘传之事。涛然坦然认罪，称自己所为皆是为了「持明的存续」。灵砂察觉到，此地焚香的气味有问题。
E: Lingsha interrogated Taoran about the jailbreak and the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. Taoran openly admitted guilt, claiming all his actions were for the "the survival of the Vidyadhara." Lingsha noticed something suspicious about the incense burning there.

C: 浮烟交代自己欺骗了藿藿，利用尾巴的消息将她指引到了流云渡，并已在那处布下岁阳埋伏。
E: Cirrus confessed that they had deceived Huohuo, using news of Tail to lure her to Cloudford, where they had already laid down an ambush with other heliobi.

C: 景元虽已获胜，却不失对浮烟的尊重。而浮烟随就此认输，接受永罚，却仍心怀斗志，期望重获自由，再战仙舟将军。
E: Though he had won, Jing Yuan still showed Cirrus the respect of a worthy opponent. Cirrus accepted defeat and the eternal punishment, yet they kept their fighting spirit, hoping to one day break free and face the Xianzhou General once again.

C:
「冰湖之主」栉生独特的鳞片，在日光下能反射出炫目强光，潜入水中便能隐藏身形。很少有猎人能够掌握与无形巨物之间的对决。

多日后，猎人协会的注册猎人们找到被剥去鳞甲的冰龙遗体，那一瞬间，恐惧胜过了惊讶。

休格狩猎过成百上千头雪原上的野兽，每一次对手都独一无二，都弥足珍贵。对猎人来说，只有将猎物的个性与习性琢磨透彻，狩猎才能算是完成…「冰湖之主」对休格来说就像是雪原上的最后一块拼图，他必须完成狩猎，完成他的猎人之魂。

原赏金榜最高位的「冰湖之主」被「猎人休格」所替换， 丑陋的全面猎捕开始了。

所有猎人都必须做好成为猎物的觉悟，休格如此，背叛者更应该如此。
E:
The Lord of the Ice Lake, whose body was fully covered in unique scales that dazzlingly reflected the sunlight, could easily render itself invisible by diving underwater. Few hunters could handle a battle with such an invisible monstrosity.

Days later, the registered hunters of the association stumbled upon the Ice Dragon's carcass with its scales already peeled off. At that moment, their horror surpassed their shock.

The beasts that Hugh had hunted down numbered in the thousands, each and every one of which was uniquely precious. Only by reaching a thorough understanding of the prey's traits and habits would a hunter truly achieve the full completion of a hunt... For Hugh, the Lord of the Ice Lake was the last piece in the puzzle that was the Snow Plains. Hence, he must finish the hunt, to bring his Hunter's Soul to completion.

And now, the highest prized bounty was put on the head of Hugh the Hunter, instead of the Lord of the Ice Lake, marking the beginning of a hideous all-out hunt.

All hunters should be prepared to become the prey. It was so for Hugh, and even more so for those traitors.

C:
塔利亚的悍匪们大多没期待过救赎，更不知道什么是修士。他们只觉得这长袍子看上去中用，可以拿回去擦灰。

「『无知为王的时代还没结束』？这是什么狗屁不通的句子！」

废土客们发现了早已荒无人烟的修道院，甚至翻出了旧文明的典籍。他们近乎直觉地察觉到文明记录的珍贵价值，在一番虚情假意的感慨之后，欢快地付之一炬。废土客们带走的只有修士们剩下的长袍，除此以外的破东西在钉壳镇可是一文不值。

废土客大多都没有文化，再多有关文明的资料都比不上一顿饱餐更有用，这也不应该指责他们。

至少修士们的长袍留了下来，这也是一种文明存在的形式。
E:
Most of the gangsters in Talia have never expected salvation, nor do they know about friars. All they knew was that their robes looked useful enough as cleaning rags.

"'Ignorance is still king'? What a load of nonsense!"

Wastelanders found a monastery that had long since lain desolate and discovered some ancient volumes from an old civilization. Their gut feeling was that the recordings were precious. After hypocritically feigning appreciation, they happily burned those books to ashes, only taking along the robes left by the friars. After all, the other things wouldn't be worth a penny in Nailscrap Town.

Most Wastelanders were illiterate. No amount of records of civilization would be more useful to them than a hot meal. And they were not the ones to blame.

At least, the robes of friars remained, contributing to the continued existence of a long-forgotten civilization.

C:
曾有好事的愚氓向哀地里亚的信者发难，质疑翁法罗斯竟有敬爱死亡的信仰——「你们这般热爱{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，何不直接用尖矛刺穿自己的胸膛？」

哀地里亚人鄙夷地乜他一眼，「冥河从不往渡贫瘠的灵魂。」

哀地里亚自城邦建起，便是翁法罗斯全域最珍视生命的圣地。{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}信徒坚信冥河之水冰冷灼骨，非常人可渡，唯有在世间行走磨砺足够长久，才能凭借坚韧的英魂横穿寒溟、面见{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。追寻「死亡」的祝福，并非意味着轻视生命。

正因如此，尽管视死如归的哀地里亚人不乏可怖的勇士，却始终未曾侵夺过南边的富饶之地——那并非是能磨砺英魂的土地，哀地里亚人不屑溺于舒适。

苦行是哀地里亚人独有的文化。每年飞雪稍息、不蔽视线的那几个晴日被称为采骨节，哀地里亚的祭司们会结队出城，寻觅沉眠于荒原与沼泽的兽骨。死于数光历年前的史前巨兽骨骸自是最佳祭礼，敲击其骨，沉闷回声中似伴有{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的轻喃。仿若浸满冥河寒意的兽骨被挨次运回城中——些微破损者会被加工为饰物流入居民手中、日夜佩戴；而品相优良者则会被祭司亲手打磨制成葬仪骨剑，作为节日献礼。

某次采骨节礼时日，哀地里亚人在荒原中遭遇少女。随后，「其抚触能使人跨越冥河之阻、直面死亡」的流言不胫而走。

信仰「死亡」人们争先恐后来到圣殿，只为与{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的代行者相见。哀地里亚的祭司们敏锐察觉到少女对信仰的摧折，将少女奉为督战圣女，严禁平民与她接触。唯有饱经世间磨砺、敬爱生与死的苦行者才有资格在少女的怀抱中魂归冥土。少女穿上祭司准备的长袍，以双手行刑，以拥抱入殓。

哀地里亚人将「冥河从不往渡贫瘠的灵魂」奉若真理。然而冥河从不追问灵魂的重量，它只是静静地流淌着，通向所有生者的终点，在彼处交汇。
E:
Once, an aggressive fool questioned the believers in Aidonia, unbelieving as to how there could be a religion in Amphoreus that reveres death. "If you love {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} so much, why not just pierce your own chest with a spear?"

The Aidonians regarded the man with disdain, saying, "The River of Souls never ferries souls that are barren."

Since its founding, Aidonia has been a holy site that valued life the most out of all Amphoreus. The followers of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} believe that the River of Souls' waters are cold enough to chill the bones — only those who have walked the earth long enough and have endured countless hardships can cross its icy abyss and face {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. To seek the blessing of Death is not to disregard life.

For this reason, though the Aidonians considered death as a homecoming and gave birth to many fearsome warriors, they have never sought to conquer the fertile lands to the south — For those lands do not forge strong souls, and the Aidonians disdain the softness of comfort.

Asceticism is a unique cultural hallmark of the Aidonians. Every year, when the snow subsides and the rare days of clear skies appear, they celebrate the Bone Collection Festival. Priests of Aidonia leave the city in search of animal bones buried in the wastelands and swamps. The most sacred offerings come from the remains of prehistoric beasts, long dead since many Light Calendar years ago. When their bones are struck, a deep echo seems to carry the faint whisper of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. The animal bones, cold as if soaked in the freezing ice of the River of Souls, are transported back to the city one by one. The slightly broken ones get processed and become ornaments, to be worn by the people day and night. The best-preserved bones, on the other hand, are carefully polished by the priests into ceremonial bone swords for burials, offered as gifts during the festival.

One year, during the Bone Collection Festival, the Aidonians encountered that girl in the wasteland. Soon, rumors spread that "her touch could allow one to cross the barrier of the River of Souls and directly face death."

Devotees of Death flocked to the temple to meet the emissary of {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}. The Aidonian priests, sensing that the girl threatened their faith, consecrated her as the Maiden of War, forbidding commoners from approaching her. Only those ascetics who had endured the trials of the world and revered both life and death were allowed to be embraced by her, and through her hand return their souls to the afterlife. The girl donned the long robes prepared by the priests, executed her ritual with her bare hands, and buried humankind with her embrace.

The Aidonians genuinely believe that "The River of Souls never ferries souls that are barren." Yet, the River of Souls does not question the weight of the soul. It simply flows, leading all life to its inevitable end, where all souls converge.

C: 阿哈
E: Aha

C: ……阿哈，不会吧？祂真的十分急于看见宇宙着火：这家伙必然会再往上浇一把油。自「欢愉」的笑声响彻寰宇后，事态就急转直下，怎会有三位星神在同一纪中介入对「繁育」的讨伐？想想就令人毛骨悚然。没人知道阿哈做了什么，毕竟假面愚者的夸赞不可信——智库中记载了那艘贡多拉的故事，但想想也知，凡人怎么可能影响神明？说真的，眼下最重要的是，我和螺丝咕姆已经开始头痛了——怎样才能阻止模拟阿哈反过来影响模拟宇宙？
E: ...Aha, no way! THEY are really eager to watch the universe burn — this one is bound to pour more fuel on the fire. Things have taken a turn for the worse since the laughter of the Elation resounded in the universe. How can three Aeons participate in a crusade against the Propagation in the same Amber Era? It's terrifying even to think about. No one knew what Aha had done. After all, the Masked Fools' praises are not to be trusted. The story of that gondola was recorded in the data bank. But come to think of it, how could a mortal possibly influence a god? Seriously, right now, the most important thing is that Screwllum and I are already getting a headache — how can we stop the simulated Aha from reversely affecting the Simulated Universe?

C: 关联条目 - 「欢愉」
E: Related Entry — The Elation

C: ……宇宙中神秘的星神多了去了，这个浮黎更是高深莫测。整个俱乐部加上公司加上博识学会，居然没人知道祂是什么时候诞生的。「记忆」的星神悄悄地出现在宇宙史里，自然而然顺理成章，就好像祂修改了所有人的记忆一样。浮黎在凡人面前现身的次数屈指可数，根据影像资料记载，祂的形象就如同水晶雕琢的人像，面容模糊不清，头戴一顶珠帘垂落的冠冕。如果「记忆」浮黎现身，一定会发生什么令人终生难忘的大事。但我觉得因果关系应当颠倒一下：或许浮黎是为了将那一瞬铭刻在宇宙的记忆之中，才来到那里呢？……
E: ...There are plenty of mysterious Aeons in the universe, and Fuli is particularly enigmatic. Nobody in the entire Genius Society and the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild knows when THEY were even born. The Aeon of Remembrance had quietly appeared in the annals of the universe as if THEY were meant to be here, as if THEY had altered everyone's memory. Fuli rarely presents THEMSELF before mortals. According to video evidence, THEY visually look like a humanoid figure carved out of crystal, with indistinguishable facial features and wearing a diadem with a curtain of pearls covering THEIR face. The appearance of Fuli the Remembrance always signals an important event is about to happen, but I think maybe the cause and effect should be flipped — Perhaps Fuli only shows up to record that event in the universe's memories...?

C: 物质是积木，能量是拼图，从粒子开始拼凑，最后是整个宇宙。在纯粹造物学派影响力最盛的时代，你能在银河的各个角落听到这样的益智儿歌。 走进星空以前，长鸣星的咕噜多教授一度认为，仅需四种基本作用力，人类就能掌握宇宙。后来，学者们将这一模型戏称为「天国」。正如琥珀王所做的一般，虚数能量与命途的不可观测及不可复现性，为大一统方程的建立树起一道无法逾越的高墙。纯粹造物学派，他们解析命途的实验被信徒视作渎神，但以最小单位为起点，重组整个宇宙，这不正是「智识」的体现吗？ 纯粹造物学派的学者就像烟花，他们转瞬即逝，却将无数星火留给了后世的求知者。 ——《学派战争全史》烛墨史学家，科尔哈桑
E: The physical is the building block, and the energy is the puzzle. Piecing them together from particles, and finally the entire universe. In the age when the School of Pure Creation's wielded its influence at its grandest, you could have heard such an intelligent children's song across all corners of the Cosmos. Before embarking unto the starry skies, Professor Groudo of Longchime once opined that humanity could master the universe using only four fundamental forces. Scholars would later mockingly call this model the "Heavenly Kingdom." Just like everything else the Amber Lord did, the unobservability and irreproducibility of Imaginary energy and the Paths raised an insurmountable wall against the establishment of the grand unified equation. The experiments in analyzing the Paths by the School of Pure Creation are seen as blasphemous by the devout, but to reconstruct the entire cosmos with the smallest unit as its building block, is that not the true manifestation of the Erudition? Scholars of the School of Pure Creation are like fireworks — ephemeral, yet leaving behind myriad sparks for future seekers of knowledge. — Chronicles of the Scholars' Strife Candelagraph Historian, Kerhasan

When attacking, applies to the target "Delay: Possession": For every <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> enemy target(s) defeated, take <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of Quantum Ultimate DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> base DMG, effective for no more than <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> time(s), lasting for <unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak> turn(s).

E: Increases Shield Effect gained by ally targets. After ally targets are attacked and if they did not take DMG in this attack, they will only lose a small amount of "<u>Critical Boost</u>."

C: 疯王卡利喜欢孩子，因为他们最接近「神秘」本身。一个孩子合上他的故事书，高举起手中的木棍，自称那是骑士的宝剑，而骑士将要前往山的那边，讨伐邪恶的王，夺走他的领土与宝藏。卡利缔造谜语，编织故事，虚构出一个只有孩子的王国。他的目的不得而知，但时至今日，仍有不少孩子高举手中的宝剑，等待王国的大门为骑士敞开。
E: The Mad King Qhaley adores children because they are closest to the essence of the Enigmata THEMSELF. A child closes their storybook and raises the wooden stick in their hand, proclaiming it to be the knight's sword, destined to venture beyond the mountains to vanquish the evil king and seize his territory and treasures. Qhaley concocts riddles, weaves tales, and fabricates a kingdom made only of children. His purpose remains unknown, but to this day, many children still hold high their swords, awaiting the kingdom's gates to swing open for the knights.

C: 在琥珀王的锤音中，有筑城者解读出另类的启示：祂的伟力并不是替宇宙修筑堤防，而是在为墙外的事物打造监狱。同理，无休止地在每颗星球修筑墙基，无异于抱薪救火，筑城者真正的使命，应当是将灾难提前封进高墙的阻隔。尴尬的是，没有任何怪物会傻傻呆在原地，等待牢笼的完成，直到现在，被封进巨型琥珀的囚徒，也仅有两头渴血巨兽而已。
E: Some Architects have come to an alternative interpretation about the sound of the Amber Lord's hammering sounds: THEIR greatness lies not in THEIR ability to build defenses for the universe, but in creating prisons for those outside the walls. Following this logic, restlessly constructing the foundation of walls on the surface of every planet is counter-productive, and the true calling of an Architect is to seal any potential disasters within high walls for protection preemptively. The awkward thing is that no monsters are foolish enough to simply stand in place and wait for a cage to be constructed. To this day, only two bloodthirsty behemoths have been sealed in gigantic amber prisons.

C: 星际和平公司业务巩固部推出的谢债发行机，打开外壳后会通过电子波粒聚象成天使计数器，公司同时推出了多种型号，包括腕戴型号与助眠抱枕型号，客户使用它时需定期投喂金币，谢债周期结束后将获得数倍收益，本质上是个投资产品。
E: A debt dispenser distributed by the Business Consolidation Department of the Interastral Peace Corporation. Once the outer shell is opened, it will condense into an angel-shaped counter through electron particle-wave projection. The IPC simultaneously produced many types of this item, including ones that can be worn on the wrist or in the shape of hug pillows that act as sleep aids. When using it, the client needs to periodically feed it Gold Coins, and will receive returns many times higher than the principal at the end of the debt cycle. In essence, it is an investment product.

C: 灌注自我思维的智械孕育之壳，斯蒂芬•劳艾德的得意之作。\n输出：第103818次尝试构造自我认知。\n输出：尝试失败。

C: 觐见之骰•丰饶
E: Audience Die: Abundance

C:
庆幸你有健康的身体，祝福你免受恶疾的侵袭，
若是你偶遇身发枯枝的可怜人，千万不要贸然靠近，
名为枯萎诅咒的怪病，正在雷埃佛斯城内横行。
有人说患者获得了瑟希斯的启迪，
也有人说这是塞纳托斯的神迹。
可苦主们既不会口吐真言，也不见生命气息消匿，
他们只是彼此靠近，仿佛枯木想要组成一座丛林。
无人能听懂病人的低语，正如我们不理解林间的风吟。
好奇的你可能会问，已经枯萎的人生有何意义？
可仔细想来，你我的生命又何尝不是一种慢性枯萎？
E:
Be grateful for your healthy body, and may you be safe from disease.
If you happen to encounter someone burdened with branch-like protrusions, do not approach rashly.
The strange disease known as the Withering Curse is rampant in the city of Raelvis.
Some say the afflicted have received enlightenment from Cerces,
whilehile others claim it as a miracle of Thanatos.
Yet, the sufferers neither speak the truth nor show signs of life ebbing away.
They merely gravitate towards each other, like withered trees seeking to form a forest.
No one can understand the whispers of the patients, just as no one can comprehend the murmurs of the forest breeze.
You may wonder what meaning remains in an already-withered life.
But upon reflection, isn't your life and mine withering all the same?

C: 「哎，你还记得那个人吗？常来我们家光顾，背着个大箱子的……」  「您是说罗刹？」  「对，罗刹…应该是化外民？但感觉这人说话办事的作风，都特别像老派的仙舟人，应该在这生活了挺久吧？但他偏偏一直穿着风格那么独特的域外服饰…」  「谁知道呢？大概是因为他那头金发和仙舟的服饰有些不搭吧。」  他偶尔会想起故乡。  恶魔、教会、疯病…那不是什么美好的回忆。  人们成群结队地攀上高处，以便更清楚地观看自己的城市是如何毁灭的。  如果一切必须终结，那至少需要目击者，需要一双眼睛。  「你为何还穿着故乡的服饰？」谁人问道。  「它提醒我应保守的道路，仅此而已。」罗刹答道。
E: "Hey, do you still remember that guy? Came here often, carries a huge box..." "You mean Luocha?" "Yeah, Luocha... He's an Outworlder, right? But from the way he works and speaks, he feels like those older Xianzhou natives. Has he lived here for long? But then again, he had kept his unique and exotic fashion style..." "Who knows? Maybe it's because his blond hair doesn't match the clothing of Xianzhou." He would sometimes think of home. The devils, the church, the insanity... None of those are good memories. People would clamber to high places in groups just so they could witness their city's demise. If everything were to end, then there shall be at least one witness. "Why do you still wear the clothes of your home world?" Someone asked. "It reminds me of the path I must keep treading. That is all," Luocha answered.

C: 饮下的酒液汇成一丸沉甸甸的水银，一路行经四肢百骸。那些不愿回顾的秘密，所有属于千百年前身为人类的一切被唤起，随后又渐渐淡去颜色—— 她看见那颗被称为「罗睺」的赤红星辰高悬在苍城仙舟的云巅上，如心脏般搏动不休。随后它缓缓裂开岩石、肌腱、枝蔓构成的外壳，吞吐无数子嗣，既像是永不餍足的猎食之兽反复进食，又像是即将分娩的母亲。 梦魇般的月色下，她看见曜青的狐人们徒劳地驾驭星槎，如同扰人的蚊蚋叮啄不可撼动的巨神，随后在步离人的兽舰驱逐下化为空中一闪即灭的星火。 一棵行走的巨树向身处战场中的她缓缓靠近。那树舒展百臂，刺穿所有挡路的人，那些和她并肩战斗的朋友。她恐惧地握紧断剑，但树上突然绽开一张笑脸——那是姐姐的脸。 「小妹，是我啊！你不认得我啦？」 枝叶婆娑作响，战友们的脸似树梢结出的果实般一个个长成，发出尖利的笑声。「不要屈服于死亡，不要习惯于死亡，加入我，拥抱我——」 她的剑上开出花来，数个心跳间碎成一地锈末。灵巧的枝条将一枚花环戴在了她的头上。她任由枝叶和花香环抱住她，就像那双温暖的手曾经做过的那样…… 一柄燃烧的巨剑穿透了她的幻觉，烧尽了空气中甜腻的腐臭味，几乎令她无法呼吸。身着重甲的魁伟男子如同流星般坠入战场，怒啸着冲向巨树，其勇武正如他的名字。然而即便是他也挣不开巨树令人窒息的纠缠…… 是了，又是这段梦，无论饮下多少次忘川酒，她也无法从这段梦境里逃离。 她努力吞咽，拼命吞咽，梦境终于成了不可捉摸的烟云，消散不见。终于能睡个好觉了，这是她告别清醒时仅剩的念头。
E: The wine she imbibes transforms into a dense pill of mercury, coursing through her limbs and bones. Memories she refuses to recall, fragments of her human existence from millennia past, resurface momentarily before gradually fading away... She saw the crimson star known as "Rahu" suspended high amidst the clouds atop the Xianzhou Cangcheng, pulsating like a beating heart. Slowly, it cracked open, revealing a core composed of rocks, tendons, and branches. It voraciously consumed and gave birth to countless offspring, resembling a ravenous predator feasting or a mother on the verge of delivering. Beneath the nightmarish moonlight, she witnessed the foxians of the Xianzhou Yaoqing futilely maneuvering their starskiffs, resembling powerless flies attempting to take down an invincible behemoth, only to be crushed and reduced to flickering sparks in the air by borisin beast ships. A colossal, walking tree approached her amidst the chaos of the battlefield. Extending its myriad branches, it impaled all who stood in its path, including her comrades. As she gripped her fractured sword for a desperate struggle, she suddenly saw a smiling face blossoming upon the tree — a reflection of her sister's face. "It's me, my dear sister. Don't you recognize me?" The branches and leaves rustled, and the faces of her companions sprouted like fruits from the treetops, emanating raucous laughter. "Do not succumb to death. Do not grow accustomed to it. Embrace me... become a part of me..." Flowers burst forth upon her sword, which then disintegrated into rust within a few heartbeats. Nimble branches gently crowned her head with a wreath. She allowed the foliage, leaves, and fragrant blooms to encircle her, just as the tender hands had embraced her... A colossal, blazing sword pierced through her visions, scorching away the sweet yet putrid atmosphere, almost suffocating her. A towering figure in formidable armor crashed onto the battlefield like a meteor, bellowing at the towering tree with the valor that defined his name. However, not even that valorous warrior could sever the suffocating entanglement wrought by the colossal tree... Yes, it's that dream again, that recurring dream. No matter how many drafts of the Wine of Oblivion she consumes, she simply cannot escape the nightmare. She gulps down the wine with visible effort, desperately, until the dream finally transforms into an enigmatic wisp of smoke. All that remains is the solitary thought of a restful slumber, bidding farewell to wakefulness.

C: 在父母的葬礼上，她穿一身全黑的丧服。她依旧把头发束得很好，如墨的发丝遮掩着她的神情。 她没有掉一滴眼泪。 直到夜色降临，在实验室的屏幕上，数据螺旋制成的层层几何花纹在戏声中变换、舒展、流动，而将那花纹层层剥去后，是她万般呵护、小心制作的秘密——阖眼的父亲与母亲，二者冰冷如沉睡般的面容。 「是辜负。他们没能遵守和外婆的约定。」 「我也没能履行保护父母的承诺，同样辜负了他们。」 「唯有科学…不会辜负。」她说。 少女希望父母平等，便将自己从前的昵称抹去，将名字从二人姓氏中各取一。 自那以后，每当有人问及「家」，她的眼中总是闪过一丝迷茫，她似乎把一切都忘了。 在这样的状态中，她开始了忽视时间规律的演算。由于沉迷科研，她的进食毫不规律，兴致起来便研究几日几夜，到了极限便昏昏睡去。 很快，她只借着火萤微弱的光，在每个夜晚收获研究的进展。她愈对已有的生命法则置若罔闻，她的前进就愈加迅速；她完全不在乎公式，接着她漠视了生命的意义。她只去观察、用双手揣摩，将数据握在手里感受，接着就编纂出新的物种规律。 于是，在她的实验室中，那些蕨类植物与花愈发生长地茂盛，它们以肉眼可见的速度长高，接着充斥了所有空间。在那花叶开合的缝隙中——笼罩着父母清冷而素净的、由「数据」汇聚而成的面庞。 在沉睡的「父母」将要睁开双眼的时刻——她几乎摧毁了整个星球原本的物种衍变规律，但她仍然在向着自己的目标前进。 直到她从研究中抬起头，猛烈地望向天空：「智识」的瞥视降临到了她的身上。
E: She was dressed all in black in a mourning attire at her parents' funeral. As usual, she still tied her hair neatly. Her expression was hidden behind her ink-black strands of hair. She did not shed a single tear. As the night fell, layers of geometric patterns formed by data spirals appeared on the screen in the lab. They shifted, expanded, and flowed along with the sound of traditional theater songs. After peeling away the layers of the patterns, the secret she meticulously crafted and protected with care was revealed — her parents with their eyes closed. Their faces were as impassive as if they were asleep. "This is a let-down. They failed to keep their promise with Grandma." "And I, too, let them down for failing to protect them as promised." "Only science... never lets anyone down," she said. Wanting her parents to be equal, she stopped using her previous nickname and gave herself a new name by combining each of her parents' surnames. Since then, whenever someone asked her about her "home," there would be a flash of confusion in her eyes. She seems to have forgotten everything. In such a state, she started working around the clock on her calculations. She was so engrossed in her research that she never ate regularly. When she was on a roll, she could spend entire days and nights working on research without sleeping, and only dozed off when she hit her limit. Soon, she was only relying on the faint glow of fyreflies to gather her research results every night. The more dismissive she was of the existing laws of life, the quicker she progressed. She totally disregarded formulas, then moved on to ignoring the meaning of life. She simply observed, assessed with her hands, held the data in her palm to feel it, then proceeded to concoct new laws for species. As a result, the ferns and flowers in her lab flourished ever more. They grew at a speed visible to the human eye, and ultimately filled every space in the lab. In the space between the flowers and leaves lay the serene and emotionless countenances of her parents, formed by the aggregation of "data." The moment her sleeping "parents" were about to open their eyes — By then, she had nearly destroyed the existing laws of biological evolution on the entire planet, yet she still marched on toward her goal. It wasn't until she looked up from her research and stared at the sky did she notice that the gaze of the Erudition had descended upon her.

C: 「她将自己的生活形容为一首歌，而那首歌的开始阴沉而苦涩。 在她尚在襁褓之中时，星核落入她的故乡。 『哀哭，叹息，祈求——那就是我记忆中最初的声音。我们以哀歌祈祷拯救，却始终未能等来神的垂目……』 这位始终保持微笑的歌者罕见地陷入了沉默。 『所以，那算是你的音乐启蒙吗？』 『那时候我太小，大部分的歌我都不记得了。但我依然记得，当星核开始吞噬梦境的时候，母亲将我和兄长抱在怀中，企图用歌声安抚我们的恐惧……』 『你还记得母亲唱的是什么吗？』 看着她露出痛苦的神色，我本想将这个问题跳过，但片刻之后她依然做出了回答。 『我听不见…耳边都是恐怖的巨响，我只能看见母亲翕动着嘴唇，她抱紧我们，胸口起伏着，兄长在一旁紧紧抓住我的手。冰冷的星星在母亲的身后急速下落，然后…她消融在忆域的漩涡之中，我们就像折翅的鸟儿一般坠落…… 如果鸟儿注定要坠落的话，为何它们还要飞向天空？』 我没有回答，也无法回答。这并不是一个向我提出的问题，而答案，只在她的心中。」  ——摘自《鸟儿与天空：知更鸟独家专访》
E: "She describes her life as a song. The beginning of this song is dark and solemn. When she was but an infant, a Stellaron descended upon her hometown. 'Grief, lamentation, prayer... Those are the first sounds in my memory. We prayed for salvation through mournful songs, yet the eye of the Gods never fell upon us...' The ever-smiling songstress falls into a rare moment of silence. 'So, would you say that is your musical inspiration?' 'I was far too young back then, I don't remember the majority of the songs we sang. But I still remember when the Stellaron began to devour the Dreamscape... My mother held my brother and myself in her arms and tried to use her song to ease our fears...' 'Do you still remember the song your mother sang?' Seeing the suffering in her expression, I planned to skip this question. However, she gave me an answer after a brief pause. 'I couldn't hear... Every other sound around me was so loud and terrifying. I could only see my mother's lips moving. She held us tight as her chest raised and fell. My brother was next to me, holding my hand tight. Behind my mother, frozen stars came falling down quickly, then... She melted into the vortex of the Memory Zone. My brother and I fell to the ground like birds with broken wings... If birds are destined to fall to the ground, why do they still insist on flying into the sky?' I did not reply. There was nothing I could say. This was not a question meant for me. What's more, the answer is already inside her heart." Excerpt from Birds and the Sky: Exclusive Interview with Robin

C: 银河忍法帖之缭乱破魔传•试炼节点：忍者之心大肚牛肠 >>系统初始化>> >>用户缭乱•忍侠接入完成>> >>忍者等级验证中>> >>欢迎进入属于你自己的忍者•游戏！>> 试炼系统：破除了御猿屋邪阵后，你立誓要消灭御猿•邪忍。 试炼系统：你正在游历于一个陌生村庄，顺道救下一位被战斗猿追杀的「旅者」。 试炼系统：你发现，他居然是曾隶属于御猿屋的记录员。毫无疑问，御猿•邪忍也要对他赶尽杀绝。 重伤的记录员：「太可笑了，没想到是被你救了。」 重伤的记录员：「你还在践行忍者那一套，你知道吧？那只是『模因病毒』。」 重伤的记录员：「什么超人类、什么忍者、什么游侠…无论哪一个未来，都由别人决定。你永远没法回到真实的『世界』。」 系统消息：忍者正在思考记录员的观点。 系统消息：大岚神在上！忍者的士气开始下降。 试炼系统：哎噫噫！多么残酷的真相。你早就知晓，只是不愿面对。 试炼系统：但此时此刻，你必须做出抉择——邪忍的部下再次追来，你是否还要救下这个以怨报德的无恩无义之人？ 选择：        1、救人一命。        试炼系统：「我的未来大道无垠，邪忍不过岸边的足印，唯一选择是正义的猎巡！」         试炼系统：你吟唱忍•真言，轻松解决了邪恶猴子。你不在意「忍者」之名是否为真，因为你知道自己所为之事源于真实所想。        2、我不管了。          试炼系统：「又是邪忍的独断•狂言！」你对他的话嗤之以鼻。可你实在讨厌身后那些猴子，于是你一边冷落他，一边解决了追上来的人。 系统消息：忍者选择了【救人一命】。 系统消息：忍者的士气快速上升！ 系统消息：用户【缭乱•忍侠】经验+20000，获得可提升士气上限的【忍•心】！ 试炼系统：你不再怀疑，甚至不再关心这些妄图宣判你的独断•狂言。 试炼系统：他们说你是个沉浸在自己世界的可怜虫。 试炼系统：但他们自己又何尝不是呢？
E: Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions, Tale of Dazzling Evilbreaker – Trial Node: A Ninja's Big Heart >>Initializing system...>> >>User Dazzling Ninja has logged in!>> >>Verifying ninja level...>> >>Welcome to your unique ninja game!>> Trial System: After destroying the evil matrix of Osaru's house, you vow to take down Evil Ninja Osaru. Trial System: You are traveling through an unfamiliar village and save a traveler who is being chased by a combat ape. Trial System: Turns out the traveler is actually an archiver who used to be working for Osaru. Obviously, Evil Ninja Osaru intends to silence him for good. Seriously Injured Archiver: "How ironic. I didn't expect you to save me." Seriously Injured Archiver: "Still sticking to your ninja thing, huh? But it's just a 'memetic virus,' you know?" Seriously Injured Archiver: "Super-Homonid, Ninja, or Rangers... Every future open to you was decided by someone else. You'll never return to the 'real' world." System Message: The ninja is pondering the archiver's words. System Message: Great Lan above! The ninja's morale begins to drop. Trial System: Yikes! The harsh truth stings, yet you've known it for a long time — you simply didn't want to face it. Trial System: But at this moment, you must make your choice. The Evil Ninja's henchmen are approaching. Will you save this ungrateful man, who is repaying your kindness with sarcasm? Your Decision: 1. Save him. Trial System: "The path to my futures knows no bounds. The Evil Ninja is nothing but fleeting footprints, and to hunt for justice is my only choice!" Trial System: You chant the ninja mantra and easily eliminate the incoming evil monkeys. You no longer care whether your title as "ninja" is true, because you know everything you did came from genuine feelings. 2. Ignore him. Trial System: "A Evil Ninja wicked words are nothing but nonsense!" You brush aside his sarcastic remarks, but the monkeys chasing you are getting under your skin. Ignoring him, you take down all the pursuing enemies. System Message: The ninja has decided to "Save a life." System Message: The ninja's morale is rising rapidly! System Message: User "Dazzling Ninja" has gained 20,000 XP and obtained "Ninja Soul," which raises the maximum morale! Trial System: You no longer doubt yourself, even dismissing the nonsense intended to judge you. Trial System: They all say you are pathetic for indulging in your own delusions. Trial System: But are they truly any different?

C: 阳光穿透进来时，大海的呼吸会变得五彩斑斓，这是海妖们一天中最为欢悦的时刻。 「♫啪嗒♫」「♫皮咔♫」「♫波砰♫」 海妖的公主雀跃地追逐着泡泡，她最喜欢它们在鼻尖短暂停留然后碎裂的片刻，此时水波会荡漾出七彩的光。 在那万顷的珊瑚丛中，海妖们歌唱着，那里的珠贝熠熠生光，正适合装点于琴弓之上。 乐音从海列屈拉的指尖流淌，如同和缓的水流，拂过惬意畅饮蜜酿的伙伴。 「♫瞧，那辉煌热闹的航船上，人类该有多么欢畅♫」 「♫你思念救起的那人，他的声音定然在你心中回荡♫」 「♫尊贵的公主，无忧无虑的海列屈拉，你会去向何方？是那北境寒冷的冰海，还是人世的苍茫？♫」 饮醉了的海妖们围在她身旁，好奇心就像摇曳的海草缠住她。 「♫尘世嘈杂，极地冰凉……♫」 她轻轻拂过泡泡，微笑着摇头回答： 「♫我愿栖身，在那能欢唱的……♫」 然而警戒的号角很快自深海传出，终止了欢宴。 海妖们随海列屈拉游向深处，海洋的女王向子民宣告—— 「♫黑色的潮水将污染那清澈的洋流，我们要调动灵水的波涛，将污水涌引入巨杯，直至『纷争』抵御黑潮的光芒……♫ 「♫海洋的宠儿，你可有心之所向？等到黑潮退尽，去往斯缇科西亚，自有陆上的人们为尔等设宴歌唱！♫」 日复一日，海列屈拉带领海妖穿梭在那逐渐昏黑的海洋，清洗污浊的暗流。 「♫伙伴们，别放弃，那不醉不归的辉煌♫ 「♫伙伴们，别忘记，我们将要游向远方♫ 「♫伙伴们，向前啊，斑斓的希望正荡漾♫」 日复一日，海列屈拉歌唱着。身为眷属，她深知守护这片大海是自己生来的使命—— 海列屈拉向深渊游去，那歌声逐渐化作漆黑深海中，唯一的一束光。
E: When sunlight filtered down through the surface, the sea's breath shimmered with a kaleidoscope of colors. That was the merriest time of day for the sirens. "♫ Plop ♫" "♫ Pika ♫" "♫ Bo-pom ♫" The siren princess chased bubbles in delight. Her favorite moment was when one paused on her nose, just before it popped and rippled a burst of color across the water. Amid coral stretching for miles, the sea sirens sang. The pearls there sparkled like stars, perfect ornaments for a bowstring. Music flowed from Helektra's fingers like a gentle current, brushing past companions basking in the joy of honey brew. "♫ Look, on that bright and bustling ship, how happy the humans must be. ♫" "♫ You long for the one you saved as his voice still echoes in your soul. ♫" "♫ Noble princess, carefree Helektra, where will you go? To the frigid northern sea, or the boundless world of men? ♫" The drunken sirens gathered around her, curiosity swaying and curling like seaweed. "♫ The world above is loud, the pole too cold... ♫" She brushed a bubble and shook her head with a smile: "♫ I'll stay where songs still carry... ♫" But soon, a horn of warning echoed from the deep, cutting the revelry short. The sirens followed Helektra into the depths, as the Queen of the Ocean addressed her people... "♫ Dark tides will taint our crystal currents, so we shall summon the sacred waves, draw the filth into the Grand Chalice, until Strife shines back against the black tide... ♫" "♫ Children of the sea, have you chosen your course? When the black tide recedes, go to Styxia. There, people on the land will raise their glasses in your honor! ♫" Day after day, Helektra led the sirens through the darkening sea, washing away the corrupted undercurrents. "♫ Don't give up, my friends, not until we've drowned ourselves in triumph. ♫" "♫ Don't forget, my friends, we'll swim toward the distant place. ♫" "♫ Onward, my friends, vibrant hope is stirring the air. ♫" And day after day, Helektra sang. As a Titankin, she knew guarding these waters was the fate written into her very soul... Helektra dove into the abyss, her song fading until it became the lone light left in the dark ocean.

C:
第<unbreak>33550335</unbreak>个故事，我还在找寻那个答案。

其中一个故事里，金发的织者放弃了制衣师的工作，和猫儿一起成为了自由的侠盗。
在另一个故事里，狮子般的王子健康地长大，他战无不胜，从来没人能增添他的伤痕。
也有几次，红发的女孩们会被好心的王者保护，奥赫玛满是她们的欢声笑语。
我还见过，海洋的歌者与那位凯撒一同回到了无人居住的海滨，阿那克萨戈拉斯担任逐火的首领，带领众人向前……

可每一个故事的结尾，都像徒劳燃烧的书页，化作一个漆黑的怪物。
你说，它有很多个名字——
「铁墓」，「毁灭」，或者…「命运」。

桃子，你总是微笑着，但你讲述时的每一次颤抖，我都能感受到呀。
那就是「逐火」的结局吗？
每一个故事里，都写着「逐火是不断失却的旅途」。
你说，那也是「爱」。
所以，「爱」是一次次的失却，也是一次次的等待吗？

桃子，我不懂。
但我感受到了，你说的那颗「流星」。
我的「心」在和它一同跳动。

奔向它，可能会跌落，碎成万千个碎片。
嘻，反过来想，碎片就像水晶花一样，会倒映出更多美丽的眼眸吧？

在这一次的故事里，涟漪将为流星而荡开…三千万世浇灌的花朵，也终于要飘向远方。
我知道的，接下来，我会失去好多的记忆，就像花瓣片片落下。但只有这样，我才能更加轻盈地、乘着风儿去追逐流星呀♪

那么，就让人家成为桃子故事中的小妖精吧，人家会用粉色的绒毛打扮自己，以最可爱的样子，接过每一个「昔涟」的嘱托，去人们心中栽种「爱」的水晶花——

然后，以「昔涟」的名字，和流星一起，写下不同以往的浪漫故事♪
<align="right">——「昔涟」的回忆</align>
E:
In the <unbreak>33,550,335</unbreak>th story, I'm still searching for that answer.

In one story, the blonde weaver gave up her work as a tailor to become a free-spirited bandit alongside her cat.
In another story, the lion-like prince grew up strong and healthy, remaining undefeated with not a single scar left on his body.
And sometimes, the red-haired girls would find protection under a kind ruler, filling Okhema with their laughter and joy.
I've also seen the songstress of the Ocean return to the uninhabited shore with the Imperator, while Anaxagoras took up the mantle as the head of the Flame-Chase, leading everyone forward...

But at the end of every story, like pages burning in vain, a pitch-black monster emerges.
You say it has many names.
"Irontomb," "Destruction," or... "Destiny."

Peach, you're always smiling, but I can feel every tremor in your voice when you tell the story.
Is that how the Flame-Chase ends?
Every story writes that "Losses are a constant on the Flame-Chase journey."
You say that's also "love."
So, is "love" a series of losses, and also a series of waiting?

Peach, I don't understand.
But I felt it, that "shooting star" you mentioned.
My "heart" is beating in sync with it.

If you run toward it, you might fall and shatter into countless pieces.
Heh, but from a different perspective, those fragments are like crystal flowers, reflecting even more beautiful eyes, right?

In this story, ripples will spread for the shooting star... The flower nourished through thirty million lifetimes will finally drift into the distance.
I know that soon, I'll lose many memories, like petals falling one by one. But only then can I become light enough to ride on the wind and chase after the shooting star ♪

Then, let me be the little fairy in Peach's story~ I'll dress myself up in pink fluff. In my most adorable form, I'll accept every request from "Cyrene" and plant crystal flowers of "love" in people's hearts.

Then, in the name of "Cyrene," together with the shooting star, let's write a romantic story like none that has come before ♪
<align="right">—— "Cyrene's" Memory</align>

C: 迷离人心的虚言
E: Confusing Lies

C: 波提欧：恶梦慢调
E: Boothill: Nightmare Adagio

C: 缇宝：门帷的涟漪
E: Tribbie: Passages' Ripples

C: 新的危机——末日兽已经袭来，而你似乎成为了某种「关键」。\n想要摆脱这样的困境，让空间站免于毁灭的命运，或许只有前往月台，与列车、与那个被称为「瓦尔特」的男人会合后，才有解法。\n离开月台已经越来越近了，加快脚步吧。
E: New crisis — the Doomsday Beast is coming, and it seems that you've become some sort of "key element."\nIf you want to get out of this predicament and save the space station from destruction, the only way may be to head to the railway platform and meet up with the Express and the man named Welt.\nYou're getting closer to the railway platform, hurry.

C:
在和同伴充分交换意见之后，你们很快得出结论：当下最要紧之事务应是回到旅店房间好好睡一觉，回头再去请教「地火」的想法。
这听起来确实是有点扯，但你如何能拒绝长途跋涉和艰苦战斗之后的柔软床垫呢？
之前的你还对眼前的铺位有所嫌弃，可它现在简直是全世界最舒适的地方，没有之一。
晚安，也愿你不再从噩梦中惊醒。
E:
Having had a thorough discussion, you quickly conclude that the priority is to return to the hotel and get a good night's sleep. You will ask what Wildfire makes of this later.
It may sound outlandish, but how can one say no to a soft mattress after a long journey and harsh battle?
You toss all the complaints about your bed behind, thinking it must be the nicest thing this world has to offer.
Nighty-night. May you no longer be troubled by nightmares.

C: 故事尘埃落定，布洛妮娅继任成为大守护者，上下层区再次交融，组建成了完整的贝洛伯格。\n你在歌德宾馆渡过了安稳的一晚，虽然做了个有些晦气的梦，但总体的睡眠质量足以令你满意。\n去跟三月和丹恒会合吧，这下真的该回列车了。
E: The story ended, and Bronya succeeded as the Supreme Guardian. The Overworld and Underworld reunited to create a complete Belobog.\nYou spent a calm night at the Goethe Hotel. Though you had an ominous dream, the overall quality of sleep was quite satisfactory.\nGo meet up with March 7th and Dan Heng. Now you really should get back to the Express.

C: 列车之上，遥望不容踏足的故土，你曾以为此生再也不会见到罗浮「玉界门」的景色。\n然而翻看卡芙卡所留下的通讯影像，你意识到她的邀请中潜藏着致命的危险——她的同伴，名为「刃」的男子，与你之间曾有刻骨宿怨。\n你决心违犯禁令，再踏罗浮。
E: As you cast your gaze from the Express toward a home you can never return to, you recall a time when the prospect of looking upon the Jade Gate of the Luofu seemed utterly unbelievable.\nAs you review the video communication sent by Kafka, you realize there is a hidden and lethal danger in her invitation — Her companion, the man named Blade, has an ancient and indelible feud with you.\nYou decide to go against the ban and set foot on the Luofu once again.

C: 在同卡芙卡缠斗时，太卜司之首符玄出现，奉景元的命令将犯人带往太卜司。\n在筹备审问事宜前，你们被暂时留在「长乐天」静候太卜司引路人的消息。
E: Fu Xuan, head of the Divination Commission, appears while you are engaged in combat with Kafka. She then takes Kafka back to the Divination Commission as per Jing Yuan's orders.\nYou are temporarily left in the Exalting Sanctum as Kafka's interrogation is being prepared and are told to wait for the guide from the Divination Commission.

C: 丹鼎司深处，古老的丹炉被重新启动，喷吐烟云。此处曾因这些丹炉而得名「云霞紫府」。但如今这些炉鼎释放的烟气已被药王秘传施加毒物，能令长生种更迅速地堕入魔阴身状态。\n既然只有你们能破解困局，当然没有推脱的理由。关闭丹炉后，你们随即前往迎战药王秘传。
E: Deep in the bowels of the Alchemy Commission, the ancient elixir crucibles have been reactivated and smoke wafts out from them. This area was once named Evemist Mansion due to the mist generated by the elixir crucibles. Now these mists have been poisoned by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and can quickly induce mara in long-life species.\nSince you are the only ones who can break through the stalemate, you don't have a reason to refuse. You immediately prepare to fight the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus after turning off the elixir crucibles.

C: 流萤向你解释了此处是为何地：黄金时刻的边境，梦境的更深处，家族的建设改造地（换句话说，梦中的工地），她还补充说，自己的「秘密据点」就在深处…只是「家族」眼线密布，两人得偷偷溜进去才行。\n通向深处的道路扑朔迷离，恐怕你得开动脑筋，活用梦境的性质才能继续前进。
E: Firefly explains this place to you: It is the edge of the Golden Hour, the inner depths of the Dreamscape, and The Family's construction and remodeling zone (in other words, a construction site within the dream). She adds that her "secret stronghold" is further on... The only problem is that "The Family" has eyes everywhere, and you will have to sneak in to get inside.\nThe path into the depths is complicated and confusing. You may have to think outside of the box and creatively utilize the characteristics of the Dreamscape to continue onwards.

C: 筑梦拼图在匹诺康尼无处不在。通常来说，看到筑梦拼图就等于看到了一扇大门…不知是有意还是无意，这种诡异的设计在匹诺康尼简直泛滥成灾，让你深感家族是不是没有新活可以整了。\n无论如何，还是按照流程集齐筑梦碎片吧，你知道教授朋友向来没什么耐心。
E: Dream Jigsaws are ubiquitous in Penacony. Generally speaking, seeing a Dream Jigsaw is the same as seeing a door... Intentional or not, this creepy design is so common in Penacony that it makes you wonder whether The Family has run out of creative ideas.\nAnyway, you might as well go through the procedure and collect all the jigsaw fragments. You know how your professor friend isn't known for his patience.

C: 加拉赫示意各位择地继续讨论。他将你们带到了「惊梦酒吧」，浮华美梦中一处毫不起眼的清冷角落。
E: Gallagher gestures for everyone to adjourn the discussion to somewhere else. He brings you to the Dreamjolt Hostelry — A quiet and ordinary corner in this frolicking dream.

C: 匹诺康尼的故事再次告一段落——剧目很快就会迎来最高潮了。
E: Once again, the story of Penacony has come to an end. The play will soon reach its climax.

C: 第一次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•动作派挑战」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将在这里接受「动作」的考验……\n你可太熟悉「动作」了——但在这样一个人人都无法欢跳的世界里，你真的能够施展真正的「动作」吗？
E: The first choice! Firefly and you arrive at the stage for Dreamplay Fantasia: Action Challenge. According to the guide, you'll face the trial of "action" here...\nYou can't possibly be more familiar with "action" — However, in a world where no one can jump, can you really perform real "action"?

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n去找三月七与丹恒——你未来的好同学打个招呼吧。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nGo say hello to Dan Heng and March 7th, your future classmates.

C: 放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放弃放。\n放弃，放弃，放弃。
E: Give up. Give up, give up. Give up, give up, give up, give up... give up, give... give up now.\nGive up. Give up. Give up.

C: 没有任何告别能一帆风顺——按照猎犬家系成员的说法，这里似乎发生了一些异常，并且，很可能与某种被扭曲过的余音有关…\n就让他们给万维克一个面子，进入艾迪恩公园调查此事吧。
E: No farewell ever goes smoothly... According to the Bloodhound Family members, something unusual has occurred here. What's more, it is likely connected to some kind of distorted Afterechoes...\nLet's have Wonweek pull some strings and head to Aideen Park to investigate.

C: 只有坠落于地，才能习得如何飞翔，而一个人若想谢幕，就必须再一次站上台前。\n向瓦尔特表明万维克的正身。
E: Only when one has fallen to the ground can they learn how to fly. If one wants to take a curtain call, they must stand on the stage once more.\nExplain Wonweek's true identity to Welt.

C: 在我们准备返回浴宫之时，三月七的照片意外流出，还被奥赫玛的居民们传颂为「粉霞天女」，闹出了不小的风波。
E: As we prepared to return to the bath chamber, March 7th's photographs were unexpectedly leaked, and she was celebrated by the residents of Okhema as the "Rosy Celestial Maiden," causing quite a stir.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 你主动抛出橄榄枝寻求庇护，成功取得凯妮斯信任，并与元老院结盟。\n「寻求庇护」多么完美的理由，足以让你、元老院、黄金裔都相信它的正当性，可惜…你费劲来到达这里是另有所寻——\n这需要「神礼观众」来古士的帮助。
E: You reached out for protection and successfully gained Caenis's trust, forming an alliance with the Council of Elders.\n"Seeking protection" — what a perfect excuse, enough to convince you, the Council, and the Chrysos Heir of its legitimacy. Unfortunately... the real reason you came here was something else entirely—\nThis requires the help of "Theoros" Lygus.

C: 你记得「长老」阿蒙内特，也记得这座信仰塞纳托斯的城邦哀地里亚，这是你回忆开始的地方。\n「长老」并非希望你成为一名「杀人不眨眼的刽子手」，而是希望你能充分理解生与死的重量后，再饱含敬意地完成你那与生俱来的使命。
E: You remember "Elder" Amunet as well as Aidonia, the city-state that worshiped Thanatos. This is where your memory begins.\nThe "Elder" does not wish that you become a merciless executioner, but that you would fully understand the weight of life and death, then carry out with utmost respect the duty with which you were born.

C: 天空一族的传说、风堇所在意的历史空白，「那段往事」。我们思索着翼兽们诉说的未知，不断追逐着艾格勒，试图利用天象画壁将其逼出。
E: The legends of the Sky people, the historical gaps that concern Hyacine — "the past." We pondered the unknown tales shared by the winged beasts, relentlessly tracking Aquila down, trying to force them out using the celestial mural.

C: 砍左腿还是砍右腿，这是个问题。
E: To chop the left leg, or to chop the right — that is the question.

C: 鱼在在藻，有颁其首。王在在镐，岂乐饮酒。\n鱼在在藻，有莘其尾。王在在镐，饮酒乐岂。\n鱼在在藻，依于其蒲。王在在镐，有那其居。
E: Where are the fish? Among green weeds, nodding heads in gentle streams. Where is the king? In capital bright, wine brings joy and pure delight.\nWhere are the fish? In waters deep, long tails sway in graceful sweep. Where is the king? In capital grand, feasting peaceful through the land.\nWhere are the fish? By cattails serene, resting calm in waters green. Where is the king? In capital's halls, dwelling where tranquility calls.

C:
于天地境界之海完成征服，长眠于涛声中。长眠于涛声中，于天地境界之海完成征服。
她们从未恐惧这预言，甚至，还有几分期盼。
那时，她们站在吕奎亚的海岸边，看着还未熄灭的太阳沉入海中，想着预言兑现的那日。
但她不知道，她所梦的海，并非方寸大的池。她不知道，她所愿的海，并非空无人的岸。
她不知道，她其实无心长眠。她不知道，她其实不恋征服。
她们想着错位的光景，一起看太阳慢慢、慢慢沉进海里，像是永远不会再升起。
E:
Complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world, and eternally slumber in the sound of tides. Eternally slumber in the sound of tides, and complete your conquest in the ocean at the boundaries of this world.
They were never terrified of this prophecy. Rather, they somewhat looked forward to it.
Back then, they stood on the shores of Loukas, watching the yet-unextinguished sun sink into the sea, imagining the day when the prophecy would come true.
But she didn't know that the sea she dreamed of wasn't just a small pond. Nor was it just an empty shore.
She didn't know that she had no desire for eternal rest. And what she truly yearned for was never a conquest.
Thinking of the scenes that were so out of place, they watched together as the sun slowly, ever so slowly, sank into the sea, as if it would never rise again.
