C:
丹恒，你最信任的列车护卫，「开拓」之旅中最靠谱的伙伴。
他接受了「大地」的神权，只为与你，与黄金裔的伙伴们一起，并肩面对新世界，以及即将到来的决战——仅仅是知道他回到了翁法罗斯，就让你多了一份、不，一百份的安心感。

当他的神识深入无人可及的忆潮中时，他既是层岩，他也是海浪，他还是霜风…
他是大地，亦是其上的万物。
他为你而来，现在你们要为小三月而去。

烈阳已经指明了方向，继续前进吧。
E:
Dan Heng, your most trusted Express Guard, and the most reliable companion on your Trailblaze journey.
He accepted Earth's divine authority, solely to stand alongside you and the Chrysos Heir friends, facing the new world and the impending final clash together. Just knowing he's back in Amphoreus gives you not just one, but a hundred times more peace of mind.

When his consciousness delves into the memoria tide where no one else can reach, he is the bedrock, the waves, and the frosty gales...
He is the Earth and all that exists upon it.
He came for you, and now you will both go for March.

The blazing sun has shown the way. Press onward.

C: 临近「最后的再创世」之前，各方势力皆需做好准备。\n「赞达尔」并非不知道德谬歌的存在……
E: As the final Era Nova approaches, all factions must be prepared.\nZandar was well aware of the Demiurge's existence...

C: 昔日存放种种奇物的收容舱段已成立应急安全区。冰冷不瞑的亡影尚未消退，怪物仍在银光闪烁的舱室内巡回，一段提振人心的「复兴宣言」将在此处上演。\n拾柴者啊，请勿踟躇，复兴之火正在等待。
E: The Storage Zone that once held a variety of Curios has been turned into an emergency safe zone. The chilling shadows of death still linger, and the monsters continue to roam free in the silvery cabin. An exhilarating declaration of revival will be taking place here.\nThere's no time to waste! Your efforts are the firewood that will fuel the flames of revival!

C: 成功挫败「异星水魈」顶替成为「另一个我」的阴谋后，拉明娜吐露了与「水魈」合谋的苦衷。\n如今，该如何处置他们二人——主动权无疑已来到你的手中。
E: After thwarting the Xenohydro's plan to replace you, Lamina tells you why she conspired with it.\nNow you need to decide what to do with the two of them.

C: 已收集到足够的信标数据了，赶紧将它们交调查人员吧。
E: You've collected enough data from the beacons. Hurry and hand them over to the investigators.

C: 根据三月七的指引，阿兰应该正在独自调查可疑晶体。\n深入探索可疑晶体，寻找阿兰吧。
E: Based on what March 7th said, Arlan should be investigating some suspicious crystals alone.\nGo deeper amongst the suspicious crystals, and look for Arlan.

C: 空间站的网络安全工程师认为军团入侵事件的背后另有隐情。你回想起自己苏醒时的遭遇，决定与他一同追踪星核猎手「银狼」的行迹。
E: The network security engineer of the space station thinks there is something else behind the invasion of the Legion. You recall what happened to you when you woke up and decide to join him in tracking down the Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf.

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 阮•梅，培育生命的大师，让你去回收在空间站乱跑的「小生命」…她为了让你不透露此事，甚至喂你吃下「反吐真剂」。\n她究竟在想些什么？
E: Ruan Mei, the master nurturer of life, asks you to recover the "little lifeforms" that are running amok on the space station. She even goes so far as to feed you an "Anti-Truth Serum" to ensure you don't reveal this matter.\nWhat could she be thinking?

C: 你已经做出了自己的判断，接下来就是要去验证它。跟紧虎克，别让真正的犯人逃走了。\n你也不清楚裁缝是否就是真正的小偷，
E: You've made a clear deduction, and now it's time to prove it. Follow Hook, and don't let the criminal run away.\nYou're not sure if the tailor is the thief, but one cannot waver in the search for the truth.

C: 擅自把计划泄露给尤利安就算了，还要帮尤利安找东西来封住他的嘴。哎，虎克大人啊……\n从铆钉镇离开的时候，这里的居民有太多的东西没来得及带走了，你在力所能及的范围内，能帮一点是一点吧。
E: Hook gives your plan away to Julian, and now you have to help Julian find his stuff so that he won't tell anybody else about it. Well, thanks Hook... \nWhen the inhabitants of Rivet Town left, they left many things behind. You'll try your best to help them.

C: 虎克正在召集她的鼹鼠党小伙伴，找到小寿星，一起去过生日吧。\n虽然这磐岩镇物资匮乏，但是住在这里的人们总是会想尽办法收获幸福。这对父女的生日宴会便是这样的幸福瞬间。
E: Hook is calling her friends in the Moles. Find her so you can celebrate her birthday with them.\nAlthough people in Boulder Town live in scarcity, they always know how to enjoy life. Hook and her father's birthday party will be another happy moment for them.

C: 交涉过后，你们才明白布洛妮娅的真实意图——她将可可利亚的某样遗物转交给了希露瓦。\n这把看起来十分浮夸的电吉他似乎与希露瓦和可可利亚的过去有关。至于具体的联系，只有回到机械屋再听她娓娓道来了。
E: You finally understood Bronya's true intentions after communicating with her — She passed a certain heirloom from Cocolia to Serval.\nThis rather flamboyant electric guitar seems to be connected to Serval and Cocolia's past. You'll need to return to the workshop and listen to Serval talking about it to know the details.

C: 卢卡的一连串反常行为引起了你和希儿的怀疑。\n为了一探事情的究竟，你们尾随他来到了铆钉镇。\n悄悄地跟在卢卡身后，看看他究竟在隐藏什么不可告人的秘密。
E: Luka's string of weird behaviors have made you and Seele quite suspicious.\nYou follow him to Rivet Town in order to find out the truth of the matter.\nFollow Luka quietly and see what kind of secret he is hiding.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n布洛妮娅已经表态，她会全力支持案件的后续搜查工作。\n到行政区的广场上调查一下行人，看看有没有谁掌握了相关的线索吧。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nBronya had stated that she will wholeheartedly support further investigations of these cases.\nHead to the Administrative District Plaza to assess the passers-by, and see whether some of them have relevant clues.

C: 用于投影展示的「微缩胶卷」失窃了，没有了这带胶卷，历史区将无法顺利开放。\n你和佩拉来到了没落的商业街，追查嫌疑人诺尔伯特公子的下落。\n诺尔伯特和他的买家就站在你的眼前——拿出相机，捕捉他们违法交易的瞬间吧。
E: The microfilm used to display projections was stolen. Without this film, the History Exhibit cannot open to the public.\nYou and Pela arrive at the desolate shopping street to chase down Norbert, the suspect.\nNorbert and the buyer are standing right in front of you. Take out your Camera and capture the moment they strike the illegal deal.

C: 陶德向你透露了其中隐情，这竟然和他老师的失踪有关。你答应帮他收集他老师留下的标记，他将查到的坐标发给你，你来到丹鼎司，在这里收集着破碎的学会秘密标识。只要将标识拼合而成，便可用相机记录下光印拓迹。
E: Todd revealed the secret to you, which is actually related to his teacher's disappearance. You agree to help him collect the markings left by his teacher. He sends you the coordinates he discovered, and you arrive at the Alchemy Commission, where you will collect the shattered secret Guild markings and record them down. As long as the markings can be pieced together, you can use the camera to record the Optical Markings.

C: 受不了打击的铖杰师傅陷入到了自暴自弃的状态里，好心的青雀和你决心带铖杰师傅去散散心。\n星槎海游人如织，是个散心的好去处…不过，你要是一个社恐的话，在这里散心，反而会增加不少压力。
E: Unable to deal with the loss, Chengjie sank into a state of despair. You and Qingque, being the good-natured people that you are, decided to bring Chengjie to have a walk.\nMany people walk through Starskiff Haven daily. It can be a good place to calm down a bit... Then again, if you have social anxiety, being here may actually make you more anxious.

C: 铖杰老师需要星槎的影像资料用作参考，帮他拍一张对应阶段的培养舱照片应该就可以了。\n青雀管照片叫作「绘影图形」，仙舟上还有很多这样熟悉又陌生的说法，你得学会适应它。
E: Chengjie requires a visual reference of a starskiff. Take a picture of an incubator in its corresponding phase.\nQingque calls these pictures "visiographs." There are probably more of these familiar-yet-foreign terminology used all over the Xianzhou, you should get used to them.

C: 带着可爱的小谛听，你踏上属于自己的寻羊冒险记。
E: With the cute little Diting, you embark on your sheep-hunting adventure.

C: 挨个听听大善人们的诉求吧。放个生还能让他们放生出食物链来，可真是一群人才。
E: Listen to the requests of the Benevolent Ones one by one. Who knew they could manage to create a food chain just from releasing living creatures? What a group of geniuses.

C: 该回鳞渊境与钟珊汇合了。希望你们能成功说服那三位大善人……
E: You should return to Scalegorge Waterscape and meet with Zhongshan. Hopefully you can successfully convince those Three Benevolent Ones...

C: 竟然当着客人和爷爷的面说赠剑仪式上的宝剑是魔剑…某种程度上来说，算是小孩子童言无忌的特权了。被怀炎将军叱喝时，她那个表情完全就是不服气嘛。\n总该是要找到她，魔剑到底是什么意思呢？
E: Who would've expected Yunli to call the repatriated sword a cursed sword, in the presence of her grandfather and guests, no less... She's lucky her objection could be downplayed as the harmless words of a child, though the tongue-lashing from General Huaiyan clearly left her indignant.\nYou'll have to find her sooner or later anyway. But why did she call it a cursed sword?

C: 事实是没有人偷走了孤云，是孤云自己偷走了孤云。无论是作为犯人还是受害者，孤云应该向你们解释清楚。\n了解孤云与无名的剑士共同的回忆。
E: The mystery's solved: Nobody stole Guyun. It just made itself "gone with the wind." Culprit or victim, Guyun owes everyone an explanation for what happened.\nLearn about the memories shared between Guyun and the Nameless Swordsmaster.

C: 神策府中，景元邀请你们与怀炎将军一番恳谈，并剖陈曜青与朱明将军的来意。\n此刻你们意识到，在解决建木危机的同时，星穹列车已然进入了仙舟联盟的视野之中。令你们颇为意外的，则是怀炎将军那若有似无，推波助澜的态度。
E: In the Seat of Divine Foresight, Jing Yuan invited all of you to commune with General Huaiyan and scrutinize the reason of the Yaoqing and Zhuming generals' presences.\nAt this moment, you realized that, in the midst of quelling the Ambrosial Arbor crisis, the Astral Express had already caught the attention of the Xianzhou Alliance. What surprised you even more was General Huaiyan's attitude in pressing the issue subtly.

C: 高天之上，竞锋舰中，群狼环伺，猎手弯弓。罗浮仙舟的演武擂台上终于展开一场血之角逐……
E: Aboard the Skysplitter in the sky, a hunter draws their bow amid prowling wolves. The Xianzhou Luofu's Wardance arena finally plays host to a bloody contest...

C: 在剑锋及体的瞬间，凭着往日淬炼与历次惨败所得之剑艺，年轻的剑士终于胜出。该是将狼重新囚禁起来的时候了。
E: When steel finally touches flesh, the young swordmaster emerges victorious at last, thanks to the swordsmanship skills that she has gained through diligent training and countless defeats. It is time to put the wolves behind bars once more.

C: 钟表小子对莱斯利•迪恩的状况表现出了忧虑，去和他聊聊吧。
E: Clockie expresses concern about Lesley Dean's state. Maybe you should have a talk with him.

C: 你遇到了一个奇怪的好心人。此人古道热肠、乐于助人，却不知为什么自称为「匹诺康尼皇帝」。更奇怪的是，匹诺康尼的人们似乎也认可她的帝位。\n追随你的皇帝陛下，和她一起帮助其他逐梦客吧。
E: You meet a strange but kindhearted person. She is considerate, warmhearted, and helpful — you don't know why she calls herself "Emperor of Penacony." What's more puzzling is the people of Penacony recognize her as the Emperor.\nFollow your Emperor, and join her in helping other Dreamchasers.

C: 我应该从来没亲手杀过人。\n母亲死前对我说，宫廷斗争是一场零和游戏，想要自己活下去，就必须要让别人活不下去。但是——她补充道——绝对不要亲自动手杀人，那会使你感受到生命的重量，而那重量是你承受不住的。\n当我发现自己只要说上几句话，就能让一个人从世界上消失以后，事情对我来说就变得越来越简单了。
E: I don't think I've ever killed anyone with my own hands.\nBefore my mother died, she told me — the battles of the court are zero-sum games. If you want to survive, you have to ensure others cannot. However, she emphasized that you should never kill anyone with your own hands. You will bear the weight of the life you took, and it will be more than you could ever bear.\nOnce I realized that I could erase someone's existence from the world with just a few words, things became much easier for me.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 通过见证「湛蓝爵士」的过去，你修正了关于那几位筑梦师的记录，把知道的消息都告诉惠特克爵士吧。
E: You fixed the records for those Dreamweavers by witnessing Dr. Blues' past. Go tell everything you know to Sir Whittaker.

C: 阿格莱雅发来消息称，大地兽工坊附近有骚乱发生。在这关键时刻可容不得闪失——你知道，圣城的墙垣并不稳固。\n一位名叫苏克提瑞斯的老者为那外邦人撑了腰。他邀请你去浴场聊聊，当下发生的事与每个人息息相关。
E: Aglaea has sent word that there has been a disturbance in the Dromas Workshop. There is no room for error at this critical moment. You know that the walls of the holy city are not stable.\nAn old man named Soctires has shown support for the outlanders. He has invited you to the baths for a chat. The matters unfolding currently affect everyone.

C: 呜呜，呜呜，找不到路了呜……
E: Wub-boohoo, wub-boohoo... I can't find my way back...

C: 总感觉「幸运签」背后还另有隐情，但已经没有办法追问出更多线索了。还是先将目前知晓的信息先告诉阿德勒吧！
E: It feels like there's something deeper behind the Legend of the Fortune Leaf, but there's no way to find out more information currently. Inform Adler of the current situation.

C: 出乎你的意料，拉雯妮很想和华劳斯做朋友。\n罕见的好消息！回去和华劳斯说明情况吧。
E: Surprisingly, Lavonne does want to be Wallace's friend.\nWhat a rare piece of good news! Go back to Wallace to explain the situation.

C: 行政区的华劳斯似乎在为某件事烦恼……\n作为热心的开拓者，你准备去打听一下他的近况。
E: Wallace in the Administrative District seems to be worried about something...\nAs one helpful Trailblazer, you plan to ask how he has been lately.

C: 华劳斯烦恼的原因是因为缺少真心朋友。\n你帮华劳斯拍了一张照片——真不错。拿去给他看看吧。
E: Wallace is worried because he does not have many good friends.\nYou helped Wallace take a photo — It looks good. Show it to him.

C: 前往磐岩镇，调查奇怪的地方，也许你能找到马克西姆丢失的记忆……
E: Head to Boulder Town to investigate the strange place. Maybe you'll be able to find Maxime's lost memories...

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n没想到，教育部的官员居然出了一道难题来阻拦递交流程。\n那道题可真是太难了，聪颖如你居然都选错了答案——事已至此，把这个坏消息告诉雷金吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist Regin hopes to submit his thesis on the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nHowever, the Ministry of Education officer tries to interrupt the submission process by demanding you to pass a quiz.\nThe question is so difficult that even someone as clever as you chose the wrong answer. Since it has come to this, tell Regin the bad news.

C: 你从「正当权益会社」发布的公告中得知查威发布了委托，想要行使他的正当权益。帮帮查威！
E: You see that Chavez has issued a commission on the Rightful Rights Society's noticeboard and wants to exercise his rightful rights. Go help Chavez!

C: 「仲裁官」的试炼再度到来。它的内容、形式、好处和损害你已经很清楚了，不是吗？去吧，为了「均衡」……
E: The Arbitrator's trial is here once again. You are already well aware of its content, format, pros, and cons, aren't you? Go then. For the sake of Equilibrium...

C: 确认「凝滞虚影」的存在后请将其破坏。
E: Confirm the existence of the Stagnant Shadow, then destroy it.

C: 翁法罗斯的世界残留着一些常理难以解释的遗存，所谓「黄金替罪羊」就是其中之一。一时兴起，你试图破解其中的奥秘，然而它似乎很快就变成了某种闹剧……
E: The world of Amphoreus left behind a number of relics that seem to defy common sense — "The Golden Scapegoat" being one of them. Curious, you attempted to unravel its secret, but it seems this has quickly become a whole separate issue...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 试着向娜塔莎讨教一些管理学经验。
E: Ask Natasha about her managerial experiences.

C: 地衡司已经判明「模拟云吟术」并非是次元扑满个体行为，接下来你和地衡司决定展开「牧场行动」。\n接下来就是抓扑满、抓很多扑满，直到完成行动、彻底收官……
E: The Realm-Keeping Commission has ascertained that the "imitated cloudhymn magic" isn't something caused by one Warp Trotter alone. Following this, you and the Realm-Keeping Commission have decided to begin a "Herding Operation."\nWhat you need to do next is capturing Trotters. Lots and lots of Trotters. Capture them until the operation concludes and the whole thing comes to a close...

C: 向守卫迴星港的云骑兵复命，领取清理污染的酬劳。
E: Report back to the Cloud Knights guarding Stargazer Navalia and claim the rewards for cleansing the contamination.

C: 根据梓桥的记录，这艘星槎应该丢失在流云渡货道了，去那里仔细找找看吧。
E: Ziqiao's records say this starskiff was lost in the Cloudford cargo lane. Go there to have a closer look.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 昔涟似乎丢失了什么重要的东西，她需要你的帮忙......
E: Cyrene seems to have lost something important. She needs your help...

C: 原来这女孩并非爱财，而是为了实现一个愿望…但现在都无所谓了。
E: It turns out that she was not doing this for money, but to fulfill a wish... Nothing that can be done about it now, though.

C: 实验助手工作正式开始！去问问看温世玲本次实验还缺少什么素材吧。
E: The work of a lab assistant has officially begun! Go ask Wen Shiling what materials are still missing in this experiment.

C: 随着故事的推进，事情也变得越来越离谱。现在龙尊造像竟然让你…为新任龙尊接生？\n你开始觉得，这个故事和你的冒险传奇已经没什么关系了，但西衍先生却认为，这是为了商业化所必须的妥协。
E: As the story progresses, the plot gets more and more outrageous. Now, the Statue of the High Elder is even asking you to... act as a midwife for the next high elder?\nYou are starting to feel this story has nothing to do with your own adventures anymore, but Mr. Xiyan thinks this is the compromise necessary for commercial success.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说杜氏茶庄和商会建立合作关系。但杜老板此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Du's Teahouse to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boss Du has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「清玩斋」与商会建立合作关系。但「清玩斋」的老板泊阳此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Elegance Pagoda to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boyang has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 阿克赛挖掘出了新的古代遗迹，继续你的探宝之旅吧！
E: Aksay has excavated a new ancient ruin. Continue your treasure hunting journey!

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n一位名叫桂乃芬的姑娘主动帮你们介绍了这里的试炼规则，先试着解密看看吧。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nA girl named Guinaifen offered to explain the trial rules at this place. Let's try to solve a puzzle first.

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n有些玩家在通关之余会忍不住怀疑，如此简单的谜题真能难得住人？而另一些玩家...他们就是被难住的人。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nSome players can't help but wonder whether such simple puzzles can really stop anyone. Meanwhile, players who don't wonder about this question... are the ones who got stopped by these puzzles.

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n空间站的规则仿佛洞窟寻宝。在冒险开始之前，你们需要先得到藏宝图。
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe space station's rules seem akin to hunting for treasures in a dungeon. You must obtain the treasure map before you begin your adventure.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 镇伏岁阳和所有日常生活技能一样，都需要练习。冥差向你发出邀请，前来镇妖塔这儿进行一些悉心准备的伏魔训练。
E: Capturing heliobi requires practice like any other skill. The spiritfarer extends an invitation to you to participate in some well-prepared heliobi training at the Suppression Tower.

C: 十妖在林，不如一妖在手。岁阳唯一该去的地方，就是绥园中的镇妖塔。
E: The only good heliobus is a captured heliobus. The only place they should go is the Suppression Towers in Fyxestroll Garden.

C: 你见到了坠入自己野心中的青雀。她让你感到有些…陌生。但没关系，她决定给你一个发财的机会，可别说做朋友的不关照你啊。
E: You meet Qingque, who has been consumed by her own ambitions. She feels rather... alien to you, but regardless, she decides to offer you a chance to get rich. You certainly can't say that she didn't look after you as a friend.

C: 自从你们到达金人巷之后，就一直有人在悄悄跟随你们。\n「某家神秘当铺」固然可疑，但是没有这人可疑，赶紧去问问吧。\n你们很有经验，这种事不应该一直发生。
E: Someone has been quietly following you ever since you arrived at Aurum Alley.\nThe mysterious pawnshop is suspicious, but this person is even more so. Hurry and question them.\nYou are experienced enough to know these things shouldn't keep happening.

C: 来到绥园，一支「捉鬼小队」已然成立，竟是出自十王司的授意。桂乃芬打算借用罗浮仙舟上最大的灵异网站搜集情报，找到逃逸岁阳的踪迹。这会不会是另一场混乱冒险的开始呢？
E: When you arrive at Fyxestroll Garden, a ghost-hunting squad is already assembled — organized under the grace of the Ten-Lords Commission, no less. Guinaifen intends to find information about escaped heliobi using the most prominent website on supernatural phenomena on the Xianzhou Luofu. Could this be the beginning of yet another tumultuous adventure?

C: 这个空间中的「证据」已经被搜刮完了。离开这片错乱的梦境空间，和辛格勒聊聊你们的发现。
E: You have collected all the "evidence" in this place. Leave this chaotic and disturbed dreamscape and discuss your findings with Singler.

C: 在修好奇怪的钟表之后，你收到了几条不知所云的骚扰短信。短信中似乎提到了「白日梦」酒店的「桌球室」，去找找符合描述的地方找找看吧。
E: After repairing the peculiar clock, you receive several strange spam messages that mention a "pool room" at The Reverie. Find and investigate the place that matches the description.

C: 铁皮人希望向你展示它理想中的酒吧，就去看看究竟是什么模样吧。\n原来舒翁和那群怪物对铁皮人的服从都是装出来的，那你也得好好把这场戏演完。
E: Tin Man wants to show you its dream lounge. Go and take a look at the lounge.\nIt turns out that Siobhan and the group of monsters were pretending to obey Tin Man. It seems like you'll need to put on a convincing performance to resolve this situation as well.

C: 因为与「钟表匠」的关系，你成为了克劳克影业的特邀导演，开始剪辑《美梦往事》的影片…\n影片的剪辑工作正在继续，帮助克劳克影业完成更多影片吧！
E: Thanks to your relationship with the Watchmaker, you have been made a special guest director for Clock Studios and have begun editing the Dreamjoy Memoir movie...\nEditing is still going on. Help Clock Studios complete more films!

C: 《美梦往事》剧组接受了匹诺康尼商贩的合作方案，筹备了一部名为《哈努兄弟大劫案》的广告片，去帮帮忙吧！
E: The Dreamjoy Memoir crew accepted the collaboration from Penacony merchants and planned a commercial named Brother Hanu's Great Heist. Go help them!

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄已经完成，去交差吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has concluded. Go show it to the client!

C: 《爱汽水的钟表小子》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！\n找到宝箱了，快去打开它吧！
E: Filming for Bubbly Clockie has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nYou've found a treasure chest. Open it!

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 青雀认定斯科特是「过度喜欢上班给他人造成麻烦的人」，她主动请缨，要会会这斯科特。\n青雀应该不会剑术吧…难不成去讲道理去了？出发吧，先到金人巷再说。
E: Qingque believes Skott is only causing this much trouble for others because he's a diehard workaholic. And so, she volunteers to meet with Skott.\nBut Qingque isn't versed in swordplay, is she...? Could she be planning to reason with him instead? Whatever it is, let's head to Aurum Alley first.

C: 几场叩关赛过后，卢卡终于赢得了足够多的积分。\n接下来，就要面对真正的强敌了。
E: Luka finally wins enough points after a few rounds of Knockout Matches.\nNow he'll face the truly formidable foes.

C: 托帕——一个和贝洛伯格颇有因缘的人物。\n能有机会和她对决，卢卡心中充满了期待。\n「也许让她成为我面对的第一个强敌，也算是一种贝洛伯格人的宿命。」卢卡不由得想到。
E: Topaz — someone who has quite the history with Belobog.\nLuka is very much looking forward to this chance to fight her.\nLuka can't help but think "maybe it is the destiny of a Belobogian for me to fight her as my first powerful opponent."

C: 比赛突发变故，伪装成狐人的步离人，是善是恶，还要去幽囚狱一探究竟。
E: A sudden accident happened at the competition. Is the borisin disguised as a foxian friend or foe? You need to go to The Shackling Prison to seek the truth.

C: 查看最后的记忆，当杀戮者成而为「人」。
E: Review the final memory, when the killer became "human."

C: 完成「枘凿六合」简单模式I
E: Complete Hexanexus Easy Mode I

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n详细看看苏乐达音乐喷泉的具体情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nCarefully check the exact details about the SoulGlad music fountain.

C: 睡觉不一定需要床，但有张床总是更好的。就算不用来睡觉，也还可以当做枕头大战的舞台。
E: One need not a bed for sleeping, but a bed would make it better. Even if you don't sleep in it, you can use it as a stage for pillow fights.

C: 拍摄告一段落，和三月七就作品谈谈吧。
E: With the photography session wrapped up, have a chat with March 7th about the work

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 早应被消除的睡蕉小猴为何还有漏网之鱼？你们决定抓住它一探究竟。
E: Why are there still stray Slumbernana Monkeys when they should have been eliminated long ago? You decide to catch one and find out.

C: 「摄影展览」落下帷幕，听听三月七有何感想吧。
E: The Photography Exhibition is finally over. Listen to March 7th talk about her experience.

C: 越是顺利的时候，越不能松懈，是时候整顿你的团队了！
E: The smoother things go, the less room there is for slacking off. It is time to motivate your team!

C: 你将在淘汰赛第一场中迎击强敌——「十敌」和他的红温海豹。\n教教他「失败」两个字怎么写吧。
E: In the first match of the knockout stage, you'll face a formidable opponent — Yourdei and his Red Hot Seal.\nTeach him the meaning of the word "defeat."

C: 黑了你终端替你报名的黑客在这里埋伏你呢，不管这人是谁，冠军你拿定了！
E: The hacker who hacked your terminal and signed you up for this competition is waiting to ambush you here. Whoever they may be, the championship will be yours!

C: 迷其林美食评审会的举办时间推迟了，现在就安心经营餐馆，优先完成营业目标吧。
E: The Memchelin Food Review has been postponed. For now, let's focus on running the restaurant and prioritize meeting business goals.

C: 在托帕的帮助下，你完美调制出了「放松」配方的两种不同功效！这份配方已尝试完毕，回到临时吧台，准备接待下一位客人吧。
E: With Topaz's help, you've perfectly crafted two different effects for the "Relaxation" recipe! Now that you've finished testing this recipe, head back to the makeshift bar and get ready to serve the next customer.

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。在托帕的帮助下，你完成了第三份配方。接下来，又会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Mix Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. With Topaz's help, you've completed the third recipe. Now, what unexpected guests will walk through the door next?

C: 穿过长廊成功进入空间站内部
E: Go through the corridor and enter the interior of the space station

C: 使用密钥
E: Use the encryption key

C: 前往最上层乘坐电梯，到达主控舱段
E: Go to the upper level and take the elevator to the master control zone

C: 回到歌德宾馆休息
E: Return to Goethe Hotel and rest

C: 寻找裂界出口，逃脱追捕
E: Find a way to leave the Fragmentum and shake off the pursuers

C: 准备好后与杰帕德对话，开启大门
E: When you are ready, talk to Gepard to open the gate

C: 与姬子和瓦尔特交谈
E: Talk to Himeko and Welt

C: 说服丹恒，为你们的目的地投票
E: Convince Dan Heng to vote for your destination

C: 前往显龙大雩殿
E: Go to Dragonvista Rain Hall

C: （可选）与同伴们商议之后的计划
E: (Optional) Plan for the future after discussions with your companions

C: 前往酒店前台，重新办理入住
E: Go to the hotel front desk and check in again

C: 进入可疑的电梯
E: Enter the suspicious elevator

C: 利用梦境的特性打开大门
E: Use the characteristics of the Dreamscape to open the door

C: 调查大堂
E: Investigate the Lobby

C: 向前台询问状况
E: Inquire at the reception

C: 寻找姬子
E: Search for Himeko

C: 决定小谐乐鸽的命运
E: Decide the little Charmony Dove's destiny

C: 决定逐梦客的命运
E: Decide the Dreamchasers' destiny

C: 与三月七交谈，准备出发
E: Talk to March 7th and get ready to set off

C: 向米哈伊尔道别
E: Say goodbye to Mikhail

C: 和丹恒与三月七汇合
E: Reunite with Dan Heng and March 7th

C: 阻止谐乐蕉师的错误「蕉学」
E: Stop the Charmony BananAdvisor's misleading banacademic lecture

C: 唤醒昏迷的丹恒
E: Wake up the unconscious Dan Heng

C: 与阿格莱雅对话
E: Speak with Aglaea

C: 追上达米亚诺斯
E: Catch up with Damionis

C: 接受阿格莱雅的拷问，最好坦诚些吧
E: Submit to Aglaea's interrogation — it's better to speak the truth

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 继续前进，探索悬锋城
E: Continue onward and explore Castrum Kremnos

C: 开启万径之门
E: Open the Gate of Infinity

C: 使用欧洛尼斯宝珠恢复雕像
E: Use the Oronyx Orb to restore the statue

C: 抓回贼灵巴特鲁斯
E: Recapture Spirithief Bartholos

C: 跟随遐蝶，面见阿格莱雅
E: Follow Castorice to meet with Aglaea

C: 寻找欧洛尼斯
E: Look for Oronyx

C: 与缇宁交谈，回到过去
E: Speak with Trinnon and return to the past

C: 跟随黄金短矛
E: Follow the Golden Short Spear

C: 前往「命运重渊」雅努萨波利斯，继续冒险
E: Head to the "Abyss of Fate" Janusopolis and continue your adventure

C: 操作西风罗盘，创造道路
E: Use the West Wind Compass to create a path

C: 取得刻法勒的火种
E: Obtain Kephale's Coreflame

C: 逃离「盗火行者」的追捕
E: Escape the Flame Reaver's pursuit

C: 前往创世涡心，与白厄共同完成「再创世」
E: Head to the Vortex of Genesis and complete the Era Nova with Phainon

C: 见证卡厄斯兰那的应对
E: Witness Khaslana's response

C: 回忆圣杯战争的往事
E: Reminisce about the Holy Grail War

C: 与海瑟音享受宴会
E: Enjoy the banquet with Hysilens

C: 返回「神话之外」，继续冒险
E: Return to Exomyth and continue your adventure

C: 深入树庭，寻找荒笛
E: Venture into the Grove, seek out Terravox

C: 进入翁法罗斯，从世界内部定位「铁墓」
E: Enter Amphoreus and locate Irontomb from within the world

C: 登上「槲寄生」
E: Board the Mistletoe

C: 召集「最后的泰坦」们，准备迎战铁墓
E: Gather the "Last Titans" and prepare to face Irontomb

C: 前往「宝藏显影图」指示的房间
E: Go to the room marked on the developed treasure map

C: 破解水魈陷获追踪者的圈套
E: Disable the Xenohydro's trap

C: 与阿兰交谈了解详情
E: Talk to Arlan to find out more

C: 继续深入调查
E: Continue in-depth investigation

C: 与维修工程师对话，开启身份校验
E: Talk to the maintenance engineer and start the identity verification

C: 寻找阮•梅
E: Find Ruan Mei

C: 反对公司提议人数：{MCV#2010203#OldValue_1}
E: Disagreeing with the IPC's proposal: {MCV#2010203#OldValue_1}

C: 顺着镇上小路寻找托帕
E: Follow along the town's roads to find Topaz

C: 通过矿车工老师傅的测试
E: Pass the senior mine cart operator's test

C: 通过测试，找到史考特索要奖金
E: Pass the test and ask Scott for the prize money

C: 在孤儿院寻找别的宝贝
E: Find the other treasure in the orphanage

C: 将科鲁泽与包裹的事告知娜塔莎
E: Tell Natasha about Kluzer and his packages

C: 在「淬火工坊」调查
E: Investigate the Tempering Workshop

C: 寻找隐藏的冒险书页
E: Look for the hidden pages

C: 抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》3/<unbreak>500</unbreak>
E: Copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation 3/500 times

C: 在长乐天找到小女孩，将药品交给她
E: Find the little girl at the Exalting Sanctum and hand her the medicine

C: 在长乐天向丹枢回报
E: Report to Dan Shu at the Exalting Sanctum

C: 拍摄一张持明族历史壁画的照片
E: Take a photo of a Vidyadhara historical mural

C: 调查丹鼎司医士的身份，获取证物
E: Investigate the identity of the Alchemy Commission healer and obtain evidence of his involvement

C: 根据线索，前往下一处见面地点
E: Follow the clues and go to the next meet-up point

C: 修理金人的玉兆模块
E: Repair the jade abacus module of the aurumaton

E: Please select the assist you want Qingque to provide you today

C: 恰好撞见了收集稀有以太灵的银狼，却得知金人已经被处理……
E: You encounter Silver Wolf who just so happens to be collecting rare Aether Spirits, only to find the aurumaton has been handled...

C: 所以我赖在列车上，跟着它一站一站走下去。指望着哪天能够找到自己的过去……
E: Ever since then, I've been hanging out on this train and following it to whatever destination it decides to stop at. I'm hoping that one day, I can find my past...

C: 你怎么没和大家在一起？
E: Why aren't you with everyone else?

C: 我就说吧，{NICKNAME}，他肯定在睡懒觉。
E: What did I tell you, {NICKNAME}? He's definitely sleeping in.

C: 不能去仙舟。
E: We can't go to the Xianzhou.

C: 星核猎手往你身体里塞了颗星核，这一举动必然有长远的用意。人人都说艾利欧能够预见未来，他的每步谋划都是伏笔。
E: A Stellaron Hunter implanted you with a Stellaron — a move like that hints at a far-off purpose. Everyone says that Elio can foresee the future, and that every step of his schemes is a foreshadowing.

C: 你和罗浮有什么过节？
E: So you and the Luofu have history?

C: 一艘飞船抵达空无一人的太空港——许多恐怖电影都这么开头！
E: A vessel arrives at a deserted spaceport... Isn't that how, like, loads of horror movies start!?

C: （它真的开心吗……）
E: (Pom-Pom still seems a little sad...)

C: 列车有什么供应品吗？
E: What supplies are available on the Express?

C: ——虽然他没有公开发明，因此本人在此更正：这两项技术的版权属于「博识学会」。老实说，我不是很瞧得上学会，但她们能复刻以利亚萨拉斯的发明，也算成就斐然。
E: However, he did not disclose his inventions to the public, so I hereby certify that the rights of these two technologies belong to the Intelligentsia Guild. To be honest, I am not a big fan of the Guild, but it is impressive that they managed to reproduce Elias Salas' inventions.

C: 甚至于……那个奇物其实还在柜子中，并不为人所看见……？！
E: Or even... the Curio is actually still in the cabinet but it's just that no one can see it...!?

C: 但右下角似乎有什么东西在闪烁，任务栏好像还有个奇怪的图标……
E: Something is flashing at the bottom right corner and there is a strange icon in the taskbar...

C: 工作时间竟然玩游戏。
E: Gaming during working hours...?

C: 苦死了！
E: Too dang bitter!!!

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着佩拉：「<unbreak>93</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Pela: "<unbreak>93</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着丹恒：「<unbreak>88</unbreak>分？」
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Dan Heng: "<unbreak>88</unbreak> points?"

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着银枝：「<unbreak>91</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Argenti: "<unbreak>91</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 锥体黯淡无光，显然处于休眠状态。
E: The dull and lifeless cone is obviously in a dormant state.

C: （音乐）
E: (Music)

C: 「她自火中新生，她在火中微笑。」
E: "She was reborn in the fire. She was smiling in the fire."

C: 眼睛紧盯前方，流露出一丝不易察觉的傲气。僵持片刻，它垂低眼眸，在一场关乎气势的对决中败下阵来。
E: The eye keeps its gaze straight ahead, emitting a subtle and almost imperceptible pride. After a brief impasse, it lowers its gaze, admitting defeat in a duel of auras.

C: 托她的福，外面的反物质军团算不上什么威胁，空间站的修复重建工作也可以顺利启动，只是内部……
E: Thanks to her, the Antimatter Legion outside is not much of a threat anymore. The space station's repairs and reconstruction can also begin smoothly, but internally...

C: （喂——喂喂——）各位乘客请注意，各位乘客请注意。
E: Ahem, hi, hello~ Attention all passengers. Attention all passengers.

C: 那种东西根本捏不住吧！
E: You can't just grab something like that!

C: 关于命途…
E: About the Paths...

C: 这是一面使用雾玻璃的穿衣镜，它可能别有玄机。
E: This is a full-length mirror with frosted glass. It may have some kind of hidden meaning.

C: 谁有空等你？我一直在忙活。这具身体是我做的远程遥控人偶，空间站里多得是。哪里需要我就转接哪里。
E: Who's waiting for you? I've been busy. What you're seeing is one of my remote-controlled puppets. They're all over the station. I just connect to one wherever I am needed.

C: 星核带来的灾害，小小的加热器怕是无能为力。
E: Tiny heaters are no use against a Stellaron disaster.

C: 没有没有，我只是有点好奇这个加热器……
E: Oh, we're okay, I was just curious about the heater...

C: 是你们想多了…
E: You guys are overthinking things...

C: 你们到底犯了什么事儿啊，铁卫破天荒从前线调回一批，满城巡逻搜捕你们，整个上层区都人心惶惶的。
E: Just what crime did you commit exactly? They recalled a bunch of Guards from the front line to track you down — it's unprecedented. Now they're patrolling the whole city and everyone's in a panic.

C: 到底为什么…我只是想做好自己的本职工作啊！凭什么我就一定得受这样的羞辱？我到底做错了什么？！
E: Why... I was just doing my job! Why do I have to be humiliated? What did I do wrong!?

C: …这太危险了，我们要优先考虑你的人身安全。晚些时候，我会协调人员对你的住处进行修缮，现在还请你专注于保护自己，免遭进一步迫害。
E: ...It's just too risky. Your security must be our top priority. I'll arrange to have your house fixed later. For the time being, please just focus on protecting yourself in case of further reprisals.

C: 嘁！还是采访一下{NICKNAME}吧——有什么获奖感言吗？
E: Ugh! Anyway, we should be asking {NICKNAME}... Any thoughts you want to share?

C: …回列车再睡。
E: ...We can sleep when we're back on the Express.

C: 我还不太能理解你的感受。
E: I don't quite understand what you mean.

C: …啊？什么东西？
E: ...Huh? What orders?

C: 我理解，希露瓦。毕竟你和母亲……
E: I get it, Serval. After all, you and mother...

C: 这里面的故事…说来话长呀。
E: The story behind this guitar... huh, it'll take a while to tell.

C: 不打不相识嘛！
E: Sometimes fights lead to friendship!

C: 你忍不住看了丹恒一眼。似乎他默默为你扛下了所有。
E: You can't help looking at Dan Heng. He seems to be silently carrying everything on his shoulders for you.

C: 非常精致的罐子，不知道有什么用途。
E: A very delicate jar with an unknown purpose.

C: 喂…你要把这个都拼起来？
E: Huh...? You're gonna piece them all back together?

C: 广场上有两座小房子，一个是小卖部，另一个也是小卖部。
E: There are two huts in the plaza. One is a small shop, and the other is... also a small shop.

C: 你看见菜单上写着：「罗杰饮料，水的价格，面包的味道！——5元/瓶」
E: You see on the menu: "Roger's Drink — the taste of bread for the price of water! 5 shield per bottle."

C: 矿民和家属，都是来找挑事的地痞讨说法的。
E: Miners and their family members. They want an explanation from the instigators.

C: 你看，克拉拉。即使在极端恶劣的生存条件下，人类也无法避免分裂与争斗。
E: Observe, Clara. Even under abject conditions, humans are unable to avoid division and conflict.

C: 你的这几位同伴是……
E: And who are your friends here...

C: 可恶，你就不能捧个场吗！
E: Hey! Would it kill you to play along?

C: 我们一直想跟那家伙谈判，但每次都被拒之门外。他认定「地火」是个威胁。不过，如果是你们几个的话……
E: We've tried repeatedly to negotiate with Svarog, but he rejects every effort. He believes that Wildfire is a threat. Still, if it were you guys...

C: 明白了，我陪你吧。
E: I get it. Need a teammate?

C: 哼哼～准备好了吗？藏好尾巴，姐姐要来抓坏孩子咯……
E: Hehe~ Ready or not, here I come, naughty children...

C: 没错！任谁来看，我都是个成熟的大人。
E: That's because I'm tall... and old! I'm a grown man! Ask anyone!

C: 再多逛一会儿吧。
E: Let's explore a bit more.

C: 梦到虎克和帕姆在吵架。
E: I dreamed that Hook and Pom-Pom got into a squabble.

C: 别啊——咱们这么久的交情了，怎么还不相信我啊！
E: Please, don't be like that. We have so much history together, can't you have a little faith?

C: 什、什么话！这是来自鼹鼠党老大的命令，对，命令！
E: Wh—What nonsense! This is an order from the boss of The Moles. An order!

C: 请允许我拒绝！
E: Allow me to refuse.

C: 结果你也看见了，我现在每天琐事缠身，比在部队里的时候还更忙了。
E: But as things would have it, I ended up busier than ever.

C: 你既然这么自信，那正好，现在俱乐部里恰巧有几个拳手在训练。
E: You're so confident, huh? It just so happens that we have a few boxers in the club right now who are all eager for some hands-on practice.

C: 你穿了这套盔甲多久？
E: How long have you been wearing this armor?

C: 「怪物盔甲」现在怎么样了？
E: How is Monster Armor now?

C: {NICKNAME}，先别走。我这儿正好还有些事，想找你帮个忙。
E: {NICKNAME}, don't go yet. I need to ask you a favor.

C: 大概是从前不久开始，每隔几天就会有装满物资的包裹被送到诊所来。
E: A while ago, someone began sending a package full of supplies to the clinic every few days.

C: 那个，这几套衣服你打算怎么卖？我身上没多少钱，但如果是为了妹妹……
E: So how do you plan to sell these outfits? I don't have much money on me, but if it's for my sister...

C: 具体规则是什么？
E: What are the rules?

C: 如果您准备好了就请随时和我说，我来为您安排最后一场战斗。
E: Feel free to let me know if you're ready and I'll arrange the final battle for you.

C: 丹恒还真是面不改色呀…不愧是隐瞒了自己神秘过去的家伙。
E: "Sacrificed herself," huh... Sure. Yeah. That's the whole story...

C: 是的，胜利来之不易。
E: Yes, it was a hard-won victory.

C: 哈哈哈，这么客气干嘛？哦，{NICKNAME}还不知道吧？之前守护者继任典礼的时候，我跟这位戍卫官老弟聊了两句，也算互相认识了——但旁边这位姑娘是？
E: Hahaha, Oleg will do, son. Oh, {NICKNAME}, you probably won't know... Our young Silvermane friend here and I had the pleasure of speaking to each other at a certain guardian's succession ceremony — we're not complete strangers. But as for this young lady...

C: 没有没有，别担心！事情已经顺利解决啦。接下来，我们只要等他们回来……
E: I'm alright, don't worry! Everything worked out eventually. Let's wait for the rest of them to get back...

C: 很好，我要打开它看看。
E: Great, I will open it.

C: 预感并不作数，但你也许会为这个小小的恶作剧惴惴不安，悲哀的是，其后发生的事你无从见证。
E: This is merely your feeling, which does not represent reality, but you do feel a little uneasy because of your tiny prank. Regrettably, you cannot witness the consequences.

C: 玩个小游戏。你猜：贝洛伯格的地上有多少个垃圾桶？注意：并排放在一起的只算1个，而且，那些你看得见但够不着的不算。
E: Game time. Guess: How many trashcans are there in Belobog? Attention: Trashcans put side-by-side together are considered as one. But, those that you can see but cannot be reached do not count.

C: 我怎么知道？这不公平！
E: How would I know? This is not fair!

C: 经过这只可怜的邮筒时，你在余光中捕捉到了不属于它的一部分——那是泛黄信封的小小一角，有气无力地挂在了筒口边缘。
E: Passing by this pitiful mailbox, you catch a glimmer of what does not belong — the corner of a yellowing envelope hanging limply on the edge of its opening.

C: 这群年轻的无名客自称继承了阿基维利的意志，将重新开辟星与星之间的航线，再现九百九十纪前的「第一次繁荣」。
E: These young Nameless claim to have inherited the will of Akivili and will re-establish the access routes between the stars, recreating the First Prosperity from <unbreak>990</unbreak> Amber Eras ago.

C: 星穹列车怎么可能和星核猎手同盟呢，他们可是死对头呀。
E: It's very unlikely that the Express has joined forces with the Stellaron Hunters. They are mortal enemies, after all.

C: 一旦抓住星核猎手…
E: Once we catch the Stellaron Hunter...

C: 不过身为属下，我要替大人说句公道话：眼下的罗浮危机四伏，驭空大人率领的天舶司肩负着仙舟关口的安全，警惕戒备是她的天职所在。
E: But as her subordinate, I have to say that it's Madam Yukong's duty to keep her guard up. The Luofu is facing a crisis, and as head of the Sky-Faring Commission, she is responsible for the security of the Xianzhou's customs and borders.

C: 也不是，这么，不近人情？
E: Reasonable? Are we thinking of the same person?

C: 仙舟的景色，你眼熟吗？
E: Does the Xianzhou scenery seem familiar to you?

C: 您辛苦了。
E: Thanks for everything you're doing.

C: 是在哪里呢……
E: Where would that have been...

C: 再等等。
E: One second.

C: 不清楚，只是见多了几次吧。
E: Not really, I've just seen them before, that's all.

C: 谈谈你吧。
E: Let's talk about you.

C: 和「流云渡」一样，「迴星港」的穹仪也停转了，关哨失守。云骑军忙着排查星核的位置，无暇他顾。
E: Just like at Cloudford, Stargazer Navalia's meridian pin has malfunctioned. The checkpoint there is abandoned and the garrison is scrambling to locate the Stellaron.

C: 你是怎么听懂的？
E: How do you know what he's saying?

C: 今日实在不宜行商…
E: It's not a good day for flogging wares...

C: 不愧是星核猎手…
E: She sure is a Stellaron Hunter...

C: 呜汪！
E: Woof!

C: 时间不多了，快动手吧，不然就来不及啦。
E: We don't have much time. If I were you, I'd make a move before it's too late.

C: 总算来啦。
E: Finally.

C: 这不是什么线索，只是我喜欢喝的茶饮品牌…每天两杯，干活不累。
E: This isn't a clue, it's just a brand of tea I like...Two cups a day keeps the tiredness at bay.

C: 你们别故弄玄虚就好…
E: Please tell us the whole truth this time...

C: 话不投机半句也多。太卜大人，您已做出选择，您抛弃了力量…那是最愚蠢的选择。
E: I have nothing to say to you, Master diviner — you have already made your decision. You have discarded power... a most foolish choice.

C: 别管我了…
E: Just leave me...

C: 你们不是将军请来的客人吗？太卜算到了各位。她吩咐过，一定要等候几位到来。
E: Are you not the general's guests? The master diviner prophesied your arrival — we were ordered to wait for you under any circumstances.

C: 这和以前打的仗不一样！队长，这回连自己的战友都可能是敌人……
E: But this is different from all our previous battles! Captain, even our own comrades may become our enemies this time...

C: 情况已到了危如累卵的时刻，只能相信将军了……
E: The situation stands on the edge of a precipice. We must trust in the general...

C: 等行动结束，我们会派专人护送你们返回的。
E: We will send someone to escort you back once the operation is over.

C: 怪了，我看你有点眼熟…算了，最近变故太多，我脑子都乱了。
E: Strange, you seem oddly familiar to me... Never mind, too many misfortunes recently — I can hardly think straight.

C: 这太真鼎是以我持明族的云吟术驱动，汲饮古海之水，如鲸吞虹吸，炼化丹药……
E: This aureate cauldron is driven by the cloudhymn magic of our people — the Vidyadhara. It drinks the water of the ancient sea like a whale swallows the tide, and refines it into medicinal pellets...

C: 「波月古海，殊胜妙境」，这鳞渊境的景色同上次亲睹时一样，未曾变改。而如今站在这里的你我，却各自不同了。可见即使肉身不朽的长生种，也无法与天地并举。
E: Lunarescent Depths — a realm of singular beauty. Scalegorge Waterscape is the same as when I last laid eyes on it... and here we stand so different from one another. The flesh of long-life species may be immortal, but the constant of heaven and earth eludes them.

C: 是的，你说了，那又如何？若用一句话就能改变他人对自己的态度，世上也就没那么多争端了。你要我不再视你为<color=#dbc291ff>丹枫</color>，可以，为我做一件事。
E: You did... but to what effect? If words alone were enough to change the heart, this world would be without quarrel. If you wish to rid me of the illusion of <color=#dbc291ff>Dan Feng</color>, you must do something for me.

C: 据说绝灭大君幻胧的手段是令事物内乱自亡。她定是想要染指建木，广播寿瘟祸祖之力…将罗浮变成不死孽物横行的泥犁地狱。
E: Lord Ravager Phantylia's strategy was to create civil strife — then let it consume the Xianzhou from within. She wanted to use the Arbor to disseminate the power of the Plagues Author... and turn the Luofu into a hell of undying abominations.

C: 不是，你还真有隐藏的力量啊？！
E: So... you do have secret strength!?

C: 「建木」的封印关系重大，必须确保它的安全。
E: This is of vital importance to the Ambrosial Arbor's seals — safety must be guaranteed.

C: 你是什么人？！
E: Who are you!?

C: 看到这些，你想起了什么吗？
E: When you see this, do you remember anything?

C: 那东西…死了吧？
E: Is that thing... dead?

C: 感谢的话完了，我还有一事要和各位参详。请到这边来。
E: Now that thanks have been expressed, I still have something to discuss with you. Please, this way.

C: 瓦尔特先生的善意我们心领了。涉及「建木」…这般大事恐怕须得六御合议才能做出决定。
E: Thank you for your kind offer, Mr. Yang. But something as important and fundamental as the Ambrosial Arbor will require a meeting and deliberation from the Six Charioteers.

C: 这些人人都不想面对，却又不得不日日上演的交涉戏码才是将军宝座上让人坐立不安的棘刺啊。
E: None of it is easy to navigate, but it's a daily responsibility. The crown of a general sits heavy on the head indeed.

C: 仙舟好像也没怎么你呀。
E: It's not like the Xianzhou has done anything to you... yet.

C: 我想让那些逝去的人有个归处。用天舶司的方式，用狐人的奠仪。将逝者们的遗物放上星槎，送出仙舟，航入恒星，与之同辉。
E: By combining Sky-Faring Commission technology with foxian ceremony, we honor those who have passed on. We place items of the dead onto starskiffs, and send them out to sail between the stars — to shine brightly among them.

C: 一直以来，我和停云的「鸣火」都在争夺天舶司第一商团的名头，互相瞧对方不顺眼，送彼此的礼物都是些千奇百怪的东西：吃下会长腿毛的生发糖啊，一弹就发出尖叫震碎玻璃的六弦琴啊……
E: The rivalry between us and Whistling Flames to be the Sky-Faring Commission's top guild was always fierce. We would gift each other all kinds of bizarre oddities: Candy that made your leg hair grow, a violin that could shatter glass with its piercing shriek...

C: 三月七信手拨动弓弦，弦声铮琮。
E: March plucks the bowstring.

C: 我之前按她的提议，改良鳞渊春、荫山绿和朝露小芽的品种，新泡制了一种茶饮，滋味甘爽悠长。特意取了姐姐的名字，唤作「遏云歌」。
E: Based on her suggestion, I improved the Whale-Tide Spring, Emerald Hills, and Dawndew strains to make a new variety with a sweet, long-lasting taste. I called it "Tingyun's Blend."

C: 燕翠转身进了后厨，为你们端来了一碗热气腾腾的菜肴。
E: Yancui goes into the back kitchen and brings out a steaming bowl of food.

C: 祝你坦途畅通，履险如夷。
E: May your travels be fleeting of foot, and may your crises be effortlessly resolved.

C: 啊，小鱼明白了。炼制丹药一定是个很辛苦很辛苦的工作吧，咱们这些人可不能打扰到她。
E: Oh, I understand. Making pellets must be very hard work — we shouldn't bug her.

C: 帕姆也有卖关子的时候啊。
E: Pom-Pom knows how to keep people on the edge of their seats.

C: 虽然本列车长也知道，大家对那座闻名宇宙的星空酒店期待已久，但在出发前，有三件事得再提醒下各位。
E: I know everyone's eager to disembark and get to that famous stellar hotel, but before we set off, I should remind everyone of three things.

C: 别担心，很快你就会从这场梦中醒来，忘记此间发生的一切，只留下淡淡的怅然。
E: Worry not, for very quickly, you will awaken from this dream, forget everything that has transpired, with naught but a faint lingering of loss.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>…我们在哪里见过吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>...Have we met somewhere before?</color>

C: 我和家族的「星期日」先生有约，稍后会拜托他出面应付这事。放心，绝不给你添麻烦。
E: I have an appointment with The Family's Mr. Sunday. I will ask him to handle this matter later. Don't worry, I won't cause you any trouble.

C: 好好想想，能入住这里的都是些什么人物。要不是我出谋划策，家族哪敢得罪那些名流大咖，来给你这位「不速之客」开后门？
E: Think about the type of people who can even afford to stay here. If it wasn't for my brilliant plan, you think The Family would offend those bigwigs, just to sate the paltry whims of an unsought guest such as yourself?

C: 是的，我是丹恒先生。
E: And yes, I'm Mr. Dan Heng, reporting for duty.

C: 怎么回来了？
E: Why're you back?

C: 还有什么事？
E: Is there something else?

C: {NICKNAME}！你没事吧？
E: {NICKNAME}! Are you alright?

C: （这里就是…「梦想之地」？）
E: (So this is... the Dreamscape?)

C: 美梦…常驻……
E: Revel in... sweet dreams...

C: 那么，你，和其他乘客，是否承认对以下恶性事件负责——
E: Do you, as well as the other passengers, take responsibility for the following malicious conduct?

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 银河球棒侠，使命必达！
E: Galactic Baseballer, at your service!

C: 那就拜托你了。
E: I'm counting on you for a good tour then.

C: 嘿嘿，客气啦。
E: Hee-hee, you're welcome.

C: 是哦，你刚才跳起来了…很突然。
E: Really? You jumped just now — it was really sudden, too.

C: 据说，苏乐达起源于监狱时期流行的甜味药水，由苏萨先生发明，因此得名苏萨水。后来星际行商艾迪恩发现其中商机，便买下了苏萨水的配方。
E: SoulGlad is said to have originated from a sweet medicinal syrup popular during the Prison Era. Invented by a man named Sousa, it was thus called the Sousa Juice. Aideen, an interstellar traveling merchant, saw the potential in the beverage and purchased the formula.

C: 流萤，我们走。
E: Firefly, let's go.

C: 做什么？哈哈，姑娘这话有意思，在匹诺康尼还能做什么？无非就是到处转转，做做白日梦…度假呗。
E: My purpose? Haha, you're funny. What else can I do in Penacony? Well, I just hang around, daydream, and do the things that anyone on vacation would do.

C: 我说，{NICKNAME}，要不要试着碰一下它，看看会发生什么？
E: {NICKNAME}, how about you try touching it and see what happens?

C: 我可不会再相信你了。
E: I'm not going to take you at your word again.

C: 怎么都是熟人啊？！
E: How come they are all people I know!?

C: 会说话的钟表？
E: A clock that talks?

C: 嗐，毕竟要是对宾客动了粗，我们可要被猎犬家系重罚了。
E: We owe it to you — if we'd laid a finger on our guests just now, we would've faced severe punishment from the Bloodhound Family.

C: 你依旧能跑、能跳、能和他人交流。一切看起来都那么正常，只不过你总是比别人慢一点点……
E: You can still run, jump, and talk as usual. Everything seems normal, but then you'll start doing everything slightly slower than others...

C: 你接过手机，呼出相机应用，切换摄像头。一气呵成。然后，你伸直胳膊，将手机拿远，确保取景框中能够容纳你们二人。
E: You take the phone, launch the camera app, and switch to the front-facing camera effortlessly. Then, extending your arm, you hold the phone at a distance, ensuring both of you are captured in the frame.

C: 还有飘在空中的筑材…也可以利用下。
E: We can use the building materials that are floating around in the air.

C: 无论如何，我们一定还在梦里，而非别的什么地方，更不可能是现实…空气中有忆质独特的触感，我不会认错的。
E: In any case, we must still be in a dream. It can't be anywhere else, much less reality... I'm never wrong about the distinctive sense of memoria that's in the air.

C: （天啊…这太诡异了……）
E: (This is too weird...)

C: 米哈伊尔？
E: Mikhail?

C: 这里好暗…
E: It's so dark in here...

C: 不要走…
E: Don't go...

C: 别让他跑了！
E: Don't let him get away!

C: 深不见底的垃圾箱里有一个奇怪的垃圾袋，你注意到袋上的「封印」——几条鱼骨，将袋口牢牢卡住。
E: A strange trash bag sits in the bottomless trashcan. You notice the "seal" on the bag — A few fish bones have clipped the mouth of the bag shut.

C: 当然，这就是垃圾桶的价值。你用手指触碰它的桶壁，一阵巨响随之传来……
E: Of course. That's the value of a trashcan. When you used your finger to touch its sides, a burst of loud sounds followed.

C: 「繁育」的余孽，去死吧！
E: Die, remnants of Propagation!

C: 我们都认可你的智慧与公平。
E: We all approve of your intellect and justness.

C: 至于要不要和我合作，等看过那<color=#dbc291ff>事实</color>后再做决定…也不迟。
E: As for aligning with me, see the <color=#dbc291ff>truth</color> first, then decide... you'll still have time.

C: 如果家族问起，就如实告知列车组在追查星核猎手，相信能得到理解。根据对方的反应，我们再采取下一步行动。
E: If The Family asks, just tell them that the Express is investigating the Stellaron Hunters — I'm sure they'll understand. We'll plan our next move according to how they react.

C: 你看起来很紧张啊，{NICKNAME}。是在担心那个小姑娘吗？
E: You look anxious, {NICKNAME}. Worried about that girl?

C: 上锁了，我倒是可以随意穿行，但你们……
E: It's locked. I can travel through it freely, but you all...

C: 冷静，流萤…冷静一点……
E: Calm down, Firefly... Stay calm...

C: 忆庭想见证星穹列车开拓银河的未来，而我会将这些回忆一一珍藏。所以我没有伤害各位的理由，反而会继续帮助你们——前提是你们还愿意。
E: The Garden of Recollection wants to witness the future of the Astral Express Trailblazing the cosmos, and as for these memories — I will treasure them. I do not have reasons to hurt any of you. Instead, I will continue to assist you — provided you are willing to accept my assistance.

C: 快走，穿过这里。
E: Hurry, through here.

C: 看…离开大堂，结构就变得紊乱了。穿过那条走廊——小心，别惊动了迷因。
E: Look... Upon leaving the lobby, the structure has become chaotic. Phase through that corridor, and be careful — do not alert the meme.

C: …哎呀，朋友，我目睹这场面的时候，表情比你好不了多少。
E: ...Ah, friend. My expression wasn't much better than yours when I first saw this.

C: 那位领航员小姐是个聪明人，她一定明白这笔交易的价值。喏，我的联系方式，有结论了就联系我。
E: That navigator is really smart. She must understand the value of this deal. Look, here's my contact details. If you come to any conclusions, call me.

C: 可以扔个骰子吗？
E: Can I toss a die to let it decide for me?

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 他知道我的性格：命运只有一种，谁也无法绕开——而在那之前，我有选择的权利。
E: He knows my nature: There is but a single destiny, from which no one can escape... And until then, I hold the privilege of choice.

C: 与此同时，另一边……
E: At this moment, on the other side...

C: 砂金有别的打算？
E: Does Aventurine have other plans?

C: 或许，砂金的目的从一开始就不是博取信任，而是让你对黄泉心生芥蒂。这样会让局势更加混乱，是他乐见的结果。
E: Maybe Aventurine's goal was never to gain our trust. Maybe he wanted to foster a feeling of enmity toward Acheron and make the situation more volatile... Two birds, one stone.

C: …是个很神秘的人？
E: ...She's a very mysterious woman?

C: …是个很厉害的人？
E: ...She's a very powerful woman?

C: <color=#ff3a3e>奇怪…我好像记不清了。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Weird... I can't seem to remember.</color>

C: 有件事我很好奇，如果一个人在梦中死亡，那现实中的他呢？既然有家族授意，我们不如先返回现实，向酒店核实流萤小姐的情况…也可以顺便打探下知更鸟小姐的消息。
E: One thing I'm curious about is, if a person dies in a dream, what happens to them in real life? Seeing as we're at The Family's behest, why not pop back out to reality and verify Miss Firefly's situation back at the hotel... Perhaps we could also make a few inquiries about Miss Robin while we're out there.

C: 亮明真身，表明来意。否则，我得请你做好被引力撕裂的准备了。
E: Reveal your true identity and intentions... Otherwise, brace yourself for gravitational disintegration.

C: 「…十二刻度██十二梦境██父亲██我把它献予你…」
E: "...Gradation twelve ██ Dreamscape twelve ██ Father ██ I dedicate this to you..."

C: 「…嘘████行于██毁灭██的亡命徒██什么时候怕过死亡…」
E: Shh—████ when have those ██ on the Path of Destruction ██ feared death?

C: …怎么回事？
E: ...What happened?

C: 我和他们打了赌，赌沙漠里的两只小鸟，还有我，哪个会先死掉。我赢了。
E: I made a bet with them — the two birds in the desert and me, who will die first? I won.

C: 但说真心话，命案多半和她无关，我依旧是那个观点：肯定是家族内部出了问题。不然我们的星期日先生为何要安排私下会面？这不是一场审讯，而是一次秘密谈判。
E: But honestly, the murder case is likely unrelated to her. I believe my standpoint: There's a rat in The Family. Otherwise, why would Mr. Sunday arrange a private meeting with us? This isn't an interrogation, but a secret negotiation.

C: 你怀疑他会把别人的基石交给你？你把石心十人想的太团结了——那玩意可比他们的命重要得多。
E: You question whether he would entrust you with someone else's Cornerstone? The Ten Stonehearts aren't as united as you think — Cornerstones are significantly more precious to them than their very own lives.

C: 请放心。监控各位的生命体征是为了在紧急情况下进行强制唤醒，一切出发点都是客人们的安全。
E: Please rest assured. Your vitals are monitored in case of emergencies, allowing us to wake you if necessary. This is all for the safety of our guests.

C: 但我仍想知道，在那「巡猎」的表象下，黄泉小姐，究竟是*哪一种力量*驱使着你独行至今。
E: ...There's something I still wish to know, Miss Acheron. Under that representation of The Hunt, exactly what sort of power is it that has motivated your solitary journey thus far?

C: 「…星际和平公司宣布，战略投资部已全面完成对察夸卡德星链的回收及整治工作——」
E: The IPC has announced that its Strategic Investment Department has completed the recovery and remediation of the Chakwakad Chain...

C: 我的价格，你花了多少钱买我？
E: My price. How much did you pay for me?

C: 庸众院的「天才」是打算替我收尸？天啊…真是荣幸。
E: So, the "genius" of the Council of Mundanites wants to be my undertaker now? My... what an honor.

C: 大言不惭。你打算怎么在被「同谐」禁锢的情况下完成任务？
E: You've got a lot of nerve — how exactly do you plan on completing your task while your hands are tied by the Harmony?

C: 还是说，你在可怜我？算了，都无所谓…只要有…苏乐达，就够了。谁让这是梦境的真谛呢？哈哈……
E: Or are you just pitying me? Well, it doesn't really matter... As long as I have... SoulGlad... that's enough. This is just a dream after all... Haha...

C: 去吧，朋友。相信你会有更多收获。
E: Go ahead, my friend. I'm sure you'll find splendid ingredients.

C: 这个要是给人喝了肯定会出事的吧……
E: Drinking this stuff can't lead to anything good. That's for sure...

C: …找来了很有趣的东西啊，挑挑吧。
E: ...You've found some interesting ingredients there. Now, take your pick.

C: 是梦里出现过的名字…
E: I heard this name in my dream...

C: 转机…你想说那姑娘没有真的遇害？劝你清醒点，这案子的目击证人不就是你自己么？
E: Different...? Are you suggesting that girl wasn't actually killed? Come on, aren't you a witness in this case?

C: 这附近，好多猎犬家系的人啊……
E: There are so many members of the Bloodhound Family around here...

C: 押我的命。我赌你不会把我送上刑场。
E: My life. I bet you won't send me to the gallows.

C: 倘若我成功度过这道难关，接下来又是什么？在一场盛大的赌局后等待着我的…是另一场更盛大的赌局吗？
E: Even if I overcome this difficult trial, what would come next? What awaits me after this glorious gamble... an even more glorious one?

C: 当然！所以你才会把拉帝奥的「背叛」也列为计划中关键的一环。不得不说，那位教授的演技十分逼真。
E: Of course! That's why Ratio's betrayal was one of the keys to your plan. I have to say, that doctor's acting was superb.

C: 我早说过，三枚「筹码」足矣——所有，或者一无所有。
E: As I said before, three chips are sufficient — all, or nothing.

C: 你一直是这么说的——但其实你很后悔吧？没有卖掉它们？
E: That's what you always say, but you actually regret it, don't you? That you didn't sell them?

C: 我终于能明白你的想法了…哼，真是疯狂啊。
E: I think I finally get you. And *whew* you are nuts.

C: 他们知道埃维金人一定会在这天举办祭典。借着这场雨，他们会来摧毁我们的大篷车，抢走想要的一切。
E: They know the Avgin will surely hold a festival today. With the aid of this rain, they will come to destroy our wagons and take everything they want.

C: 宇宙中不会再有埃维金人了……
E: There AREN'T any Avgins left!

C: 美梦要结束了！美梦永远不会结束！
E: Beautiful dream's about to end! The beautiful dream will never end!

C: 原来你是演员…怪不得衣服那么漂亮。
E: So you're an actor... No wonder your clothes are so stylish.

C: 其实我是一名…商人。但我确实有场表演。
E: I'm actually a... merchant. But I do have a show to do.

C: 那我们就出发咯！不过…得上哪去找他？
E: Let's move out then! But... where do we start looking for him?

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 你也很狡猾，故意设计让我们站在彼此的对立面，不断在他人面前重复「令使」的说辞，令我退无可退，唯有拔刀相向。
E: You possess great cunning. Deliberately setting us up to be on opposing sides, constantly repeating the words of the Emanator in front of others, leaving me no choice but to draw my blade against you.

C: 而在那之前…一百三十七人，这是自成为梦主以来，我亲手流放的外邦人。他们中曾有人折断我的双翼，曾有人将我的身躯焚毁……
E: One hundred and thirty-seven individuals: That is how many heathens I have exiled since I became Dreammaster. Among them, were those who once severed my wings, and those who immolated my body...

C: 毕竟咱俩谁都不知道梦境里发生了什么，也同样不知道那忆者的话有几分是真……
E: We don't know what's happening in the Dreamscape, or how much of what the Memokeeper said is true...

C: 正式认识一下吧，我是流梦礁的「守墓人」，米凯。
E: Please allow me to formally introduce myself. I'm Micah, the Gravekeeper of Dreamflux Reef.

C: 米凯先生太谦虚了。每当有迷途的逐梦客被带入这里，一直是米凯先生担起守护者的责任，或是将他们送回美梦，或是教会他们如何在混沌的梦境中生存。
E: You're too modest, Micah. When lost Dreamchasers stumble upon this place, you're the one who takes care of them, guiding them back to the sweet dream or showing them how to survive the wild dream chaos.

C: 如果我是你，在这个节骨眼上会更关心自己…毕竟面前可站着个刚给你胸口来了一刀的混蛋。
E: If I were you, I'd be more worried about myself... After all, right in front of you is the guy who just stabbed you in the chest with a dagger.

C: 身为匹诺康尼的分家领袖，梦主背后恐怕是整个「同谐」势力…何况星核也在他手中，必须做好最坏的打算。
E: He's the leader of the Families of Penacony, and he has the entire power of the Harmony behind him... not to mention the Stellaron in his possession. We must proceed with great caution.

C: 这也不行。先不谈知更鸟小姐，我总觉得方才星期日先生的态度有些不对劲，但说不上来是为什么…至少得确保他不会临阵倒戈。
E: No, that won't do. Even if we count Robin as an ally, something felt off about Mr. Sunday just now, although I can't quite put my finger on it... I have to make sure he won't turn against us when things start to get dicey.

C: 这枚梦泡一定有内容，只是我们还没参透。加拉赫先生，在相信「钟表匠」这件事上，你也是一样的，不是吗？
E: There must be something contained in this dream bubble. It's just we haven't figured it out yet. You also have faith in the Watchmaker, don't you, Gallagher?

C: 家族愿意包容所有人。我会转达猎犬家系停止搜查。从此往后，你无需再过担惊受怕的日子。
E: The Family is ready to forgive all sinners. I'll ask the Bloodhound Family to cease their pursuit. You don't need to live in fear anymore.

C: 现在我的身体固定在入梦池中，依靠维生装置存活。你见到的我是完整的，神智清醒，和正常人没有区别…但酒店里的我不是这样。
E: My physical body is now in the Dreampool, sustained by life support. The me you see here is whole, rational, and no different from any other person... but I can't say the same for the "me" in the hotel room.

C: 你刚才说，那位先生以美梦维生算不得「生活」，其实不然。就算没有匹诺康尼，人们也会活在各自的幻觉中，这幻觉名为「自我价值」。
E: You think that man is not actually "living," but that's not quite accurate. Even without Penacony, people create their own illusions called "self-value."

C: 在那之前，你要知道…并非所有的人都能走向未来。
E: Well, don't forget this... not everyone really has a future.

C: …两个人？
E: ...Two guests?

C: 还有这种好事？
E: Say what now? I get to pair up with Firefly and there's no catch?

C: 「也、也许我们就是无法成功…对不对？」
E: "P—Perhaps we were never meant to succeed... Right?"

C: 武器和筑梦拼图有什么关系？
E: What do the weapon and Dream Jigsaw have to do with one another?

C: 全都搞定了…胜利在望，我们出发前往最后的关卡吧。
E: It's all done... Victory is in sight. Let's head to the final stage.

C: 哦？竟然还有如此令人发指的暴行……
E: Oh? To encounter deeds so vile they stir one's very soul...

C: ——这样我们也好知道，瓦尔特和知更鸟小姐究竟遭遇了什么，才没能如约而至。
E: ...This way, we'll at least know what Welt and Miss Robin are dealing with, and the reason why they failed to make our appointment.

C: 你难道是…纯美骑士？
E: Are you... a Knight of Beauty?

C: 你也来参加谐乐大典吗？
E: Will you be participating in the Charmony Festival as well?

C: 「她希望用歌声平复人们的痛苦，也愿意用自己的血肉之躯，为公司的救援物资输送提供援护…可惜，流弹无情。」
E: "She hoped to ease the people's suffering with song, and was willing to brave mortal danger to deliver the IPC's medical supplies... Unfortunately, stray bullets show no such compassion."

C: 每一次的「开拓」之旅都伴随着艰难险阻，但你真的会打退堂鼓吗？会阻止三月和丹恒前往下一站吗？我想你心中一定有属于自己的回答。
E: With each Trailblaze, dangers and tribulations will surely follow, but would you ever back away? Would you stop March and Dan Heng from reaching their next destination? I believe you have an answer of your own in your heart.

C: 在你看来…怎样才算是幸福地活着？
E: So, what is your definition of living a happy life?

C: 米哈伊尔——就是这个名字，现在我们都知道他是「钟表匠」了。
E: Mikhail, that's the name. Now we all know him as the Watchmaker.

C: 我已经走得够远了。是时候，稍微休息下了……
E: I've traveled far enough, and it's time for a little break...

C: 是哦，一个人都没有…你的关注点不对吧！
E: Yeah, I wonder how many tickets... Hey, that's not what we should be concerned about!

C: 「如此三十又一日，三个轮转为休止，复又敲击四个等程。」
E: "Thus, thirty-one days a cycle, three cycles a solstice, and four solstices marked the passage of time."

C: 你没事吧，听得清我说话吗？记不记得自己叫什么名字？
E: Are you all right? Can you hear me? Do you remember your name?

C: 还真是各有所图啊……
E: Everyone really has their own agenda after all...

C: {NICKNAME}，你已经是一个越来越优秀的开拓者了。能见证你的成长，我非常欣慰。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're fast becoming an excellent Trailblazer. It's an honor to be able to watch you grow.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>两起「死亡」</color>促使你们决定调查美梦背后的真相。你们想从二人的信息入手，却不得要领，反倒从加拉赫那里得知了有关「钟表匠」的情报。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The two cases of "death"</color> prompted you to investigate the truth behind the sweet dream. Despite your efforts to gather information about the two victims, you didn't make much progress. But you did learn about the Watchmaker from Gallagher.

C: 终于，故事来到了尾声。你们战胜了他，「开拓」压倒「秩序」，匹诺康尼也得以迎接光明与和平的未来……
E: Finally, the story reached its conclusion. You emerged victorious, with the Trailblaze triumphing over the Order and Penacony embracing a bright and peaceful future...

C: 看来我们已经得出结果了——下一站就是「琉璃光带」帕特雷维尼齐亚了帕！
E: Looks like we have a winner. Next stop: The Glass Belt, Patrevia!

C: 他参与讨伐绝灭大君「诛罗」，并成为那场惨烈战役的幸存者，从此销声匿迹。
E: He fought in the crusade against Lord Ravager Zulo and managed to survive that gruesome battle, then disappeared out of sight completely.

C: 我知道你现在一头雾水，我们会尽力为你说明。但讲清一切的来龙去脉之前，你必须明白一件事……
E: I understand you must be confused, and we'll do our best to shed light on the situation. However, before that, it's essential to know that...

C: 你能集结巡海游侠？
E: You can gather Galaxy Rangers?

C: 倘若这美梦注定支离破碎，任何事物都将离去：朋友，亲人、陌生人；然后是轻快的风、飞翔的鸟儿、群星…最后是你自己。
E: Imagine if this splendid dream were fated to fall apart: Friends, family, strangers... followed by the gentle breeze, soaring birds, the stars... and ultimately, yourself.

C: 我们追逐那最初的光。
E: We must pursue that primordial light.

C: 我相信，在我们的乐园里也会有这么一颗星星，绽放着同样的光芒。它照耀的时间会是「永恒」，而它的名字…叫做「幸福」。
E: In our paradise, I believe there will be a star like that, shining with the same light. Its radiance will last "forever," and its name... will be "happiness."

C: 被美梦囚禁的人们，正在为「自由」而觉醒。
E: Those imprisoned in their dreams are awakening for Freedom.

C: 具体她没讲，我猜是洋服、大衣，或墨镜什么的…反正你比我懂，平时都是你们在聊这些时尚的话题。
E: She didn't specify anything, but I guess she means a dress, coat, sunglasses, or something else... You know better about fashion than I do.

C: 但眼下这个气氛…啧，怎么看都不够严肃啊。
E: The atmosphere here... Tsk, it doesn't feel serious enough.

C: 啊对了，还有一件事——
E: Oh, and one more thing.

C: 您好，女士。有什么需要吗？
E: Greetings, madam. What can I do for you?

C: 列车不要紧吗？
E: But what about the Express?

C: 谈判结束之后……
E: After the negotiations...

C: 自己的一切？
E: Everything you have?

C: 然后，回到我这里来，我会让你理解「典押」意味着什么，也会让你明白自己还缺少什么。
E: Once you've done that, come back to me. I'll help you understand the true meaning of "pawn" and make you realize what you're missing.

C: 格拉默人为了不让共和国最强大的武器落入他人手中，就在战士们的基因编译中设下了这么一道「保险」。
E: The higher-ups in Glamoth implemented such a "fail-safe" within the genes of their warriors, just to make sure the Republic's most powerful weapons wouldn't fall into the wrong hands.

C: 星核猎手和公司打过许多交道，但「石心十人」…我们并无交集。你的提议我可以传达，但在那之前我有个疑问……
E: The Stellaron Hunters have interacted with the IPC, but not the Ten Stonehearts... Our paths have never crossed. As for your offer, I can pass it along to my partners, but I have a question...

C: ——我们愿将「晖长石号」的所有权移交给星穹列车！不腆之仪，还望笑纳。
E: ...We will transfer ownership of the Radiant Feldspar to the Astral Express! A meager appreciation that we hope you will accept with grace.

C: 我三呢？
E: Where's three?

C: 娃娃…？
E: The doll...?

C: 我能把你的炸弹拆掉吗？
E: Can I dismantle your bomb?

C: 黑天鹅，你怎么在这儿？
E: Black Swan, what are you doing here?

C: 如果我说你还有机会实现这份约定…你会愿意和我谈谈么？
E: If I told you there was still a chance to realize this vow... would you be willing to talk to me then?

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉~蕉蕉蕉蕉~
E: ♪ Ba na na na~ Ba na na na~ ♪

C: 我是银河球棒侠。
E: I am the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 哪怕已经咽了下去，甜美依旧挂在舌尖——太棒了！
E: I can still taste the sweetness on my tongue after eating it. Awesome!

C: 宝了个贝的，巡海游侠？
E: Fudge me, a Galaxy Ranger?

C: 偷听别人说话可不是什么正当之举。
E: It's not nice to eavesdrop on conversations.

C: 漂亮，旁敲侧击！
E: Loud, huh? How's that for soundin' em out?

C: 跟我来，大明星，接下来就看你够不够离经叛道了。
E: Come with me, singing queen! Whether it works or not depends on how much of a deviant you are.

C: 有人跳支舞就拯救了世界，有人哭一场就灭了对手，现在轮到我们了！
E: Some people saved their world by giving a dance, and some people defeated their enemies by crying... It's finally our turn now!

C: 「而七度音安慰道：生命能够持续——姑且一试，或未可知。」
E: "Those commiserating sevenths—'Life might last! we can but try!'"

C: 哦？
E: Oh?

C: 阁下不必弯弯绕绕，直言便是。
E: No need to beat around the bush, sir.

C: 怎么还带数字？
E: What does the number mean?

C: 「睡蕉社」是睡蕉小猴粉丝组成的社团，成员不止在校学生，还囊括了整个匹诺康尼的*蕉粉*。
E: The Slumbernana Association was founded by fans of Slumbernana Monkey. Our fan base stretches far beyond the campus and includes Ripe Bananas from all over Penacony!

C: 没问题，单独行动更不容易打草惊蛇嘛。学校这边也得有人看着，咱们就分头行动咯。
E: Yeah, it's less suspicious than all three of us joining the club together. Let's split up for now. This way, you two can keep an eye on what's going on in the campus.

C: 这么快就出货了？
E: They shipped it out already?

C: 「恶魔在陷阱前面摆满宝藏，把虚无的地狱扮成天堂的模样，猎人引诱的雏鸟坠入罗网，用虚伪的善意将欲望乔装。」
E: The path to hell is paved with heavenly treasure; devils trying to fool you, better get your head together. The hunters hide greed with a welcoming smile; don't be beguiled, it could be your last mile.

C: 芮克先生？有什么事吗？
E: Mr. Reca? Do you need our help with something?

C: 不及格！这又不是说唱课！
E: Fail! This isn't a rap class!

C: 不及格！再说脏话就算你违反校规！
E: Fail! If I hear one more swear word from you, you'll be penalized for breaking the school rules!

C: 蕉，蕉蕉……
E: Bana, bana...

C: 蕉…不对！卑劣的厉鬼，你的恶语没有打倒伎乐忍徒！忍者大胜利！
E: Bana—scratch that! Evil thing! Your vile words cannot bring Ninja Initiate Gigaku down! It's a victory for us ninjas, hurray!

C: 这位演员，你不是很想出演我的影片吗？来这里挑份剧本吧。
E: You're keen about appearing in my films, aren't you? Come over here and choose a script.

C: 这下事情闹大了…一下子来了好多看热闹的人。
E: Looks like things blew up real quick... Everyone's flocked here to see what's going on.

C: 所以…这位先生其实是在追查什么通缉犯吗？难怪穿得像个警长……
E: So... He's on the hunt for some kind of fugitive? That explains why he's dressed like a sheriff...

C: 等等，你想让我见证的就是这个？
E: Wait a minute... Is this what you wanted me to see?

C: 想来，你一定愿意将这种「最公平的爱护」播撒到宇宙的每一个角落去……
E: I suppose you're perfectly willing to apply the "fairest form of grace" to every corner of the universe?

C: 我理解。但解气向来能让人放松，而人在放松时，才更容易接受一些逆耳的忠言。
E: I understand, but venting your anger can help relieve the tension you built up. And when that happens, you'll be less averse to accepting unpalatable advice.

C: 不，你的狩猎已经完成了，这是属于我等的狩猎——
E: No, for your hunt is long complete. This is mine and mine alo—

C: 你是睡蕉小猴？
E: You're a Slumbernana Monkey?

C: 是邪祟…但这是同样憎恶御猿•邪忍，归于苦茶大师门外的缭乱•邪祟。
E: A fiendling... No, it is a Dazzling Fiendling under Master Kucha, though not directly. This fiendling harbors just as much hatred for Evil Ninja Osaru.

C: 不必对世人的苛责有所忌惮，一份伟业总要以凡人的梦想作为薪柴，但成为薪柴是幸福的，朽木只有在燃烧时才具有最高的价值。
E: Do not be concerned by the accusations and criticisms of others, for a grand cause must always use the dreams of the common masses as kindling. Yet, it is blissful for them to become kindling, for rotten wood only contributes the greatest value when it is set ablaze.

C: 十年苦行，一朝封名……
E: Ten years of suffering, one day of recognition...

C: CUT，先等一下蕉。
E: Cut! Hold on a sec, bana.

C: 算了，反正我也在你们看不到的地方大展身手了。你们能这么顺利地解决问题，可少不了本姑娘的功劳！
E: Forget it. Anyway, I was also able to showcase my capabilities while you guys weren't present. I definitely played a big part in your being able to resolve the situation so successfully.

C: 真是可怕，咱不会也被他拿走了什么记忆吧？我可不想再失忆了。
E: How scary, could he have taken our memories as well? I don't want to lose any more memories.

C: 一点也不！
E: It wasn't fun at all!

C: 我们不需要让睡蕉小猴被忍者故事取代，只需喊醒茫然自失的人们，模因病毒的力量就会被大幅削弱。
E: There's no need to replace Slumbernana Monkeys with ninjas. We just have to snap them back to their senses. That alone is enough to undermine the influence of the memetic virus.

C: 摄影机转向一个片场，另一组演员们的故事继续……
E: The camera shifts to a new scene, unveiling the story of another group of actors...

C: 研究猿M3
E: Research Ape M3

C: 蛮神，我唾弃你…！
E: Barbaric god, I despise you...!

C: 又是你，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, it's you again...

C: 不仅如此，还有其他疑点悬而未决。直觉告诉我，恐怕没那么简单……
E: There are several other unanswered questions, too. My gut feeling is that things here are not as simple as they seem...

C: 怎么，感到错愕么？
E: What's the matter? Surprised?

C: 你是…呵，野狗的首领竟自己送上门了？
E: You are...? Oh, so the alpha brute has found his way here?

C: 此人沉浸于杀戮的狂热中，对你熟视无睹。
E: This person is consumed by a frenzy of slaughter, oblivious to your presence.

C: 这我哪记得？！
E: How would I even remember that?!

C: 幸好遇见了好心人。我平日深居简出，虽说有点积蓄，但…确实不擅长与他人打交道，更遑论购物还价了。换作其他商贩，恐怕是要破费了。
E: We're lucky that she has a good heart. I'm not one to venture out often, and while I have some savings, it takes a lot out of me to even talk to people, let alone haggle... Had it been another merchant, I would've been set back plenty.

C: 发生什么事了吗，克莱门汀…啊，好重的伤！
E: Did something happen, Clementine? Ah... that's a serious injury!

C: 嗯…「妈妈~拿剑的娃娃~并肩作战~要勇敢！」之类的？
E: Something like... "Mommy! Doll with sword! Let's fight together! We'll be brave!"

C: 「{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}呵！以『引纬』封证誓约，我向你求愿——愿你的金丝与爱缠绕我身！」
E: "O {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}! With the Weft as my vow, I beseech you: Entwine my body with your golden thread and affection!"

C: 干、干掉了！小小灰，小小蝶，好厉害……
E: Y—You defeated it! Little Gray, Little Cas, you're so strong...
Ah...

C: 还有——务必确认<color=#dbc291ff>那刻夏</color>的下落。如无意外，他一定还活着。
E: Oh, and... find <color=#dbc291ff>Anaxa</color>. Unless something went terribly wrong, he should still be alive.

C: 嗯，因此我们和这些对人类抱有善意的泰坦达成协定：在逐火之旅中，它们会为我们提供支持，而我们也会只有在旅途的最后一刻，才会将它们的火种归位。
E: Yes, that is how we formed an agreement with these Titans who bear no harm toward humanity. If they agree to support us on our Flame-Chase Journey, we will wait till the final moments of the journey to restore their Coreflames.

C: 笑话。一扇门而已，第一时间竟想的是诉诸众神……
E: Are you serious? Just a mere door, and your first instinct is to call on the gods?

C: 我们得去「启蒙王座」一趟。
E: We have to go to the Luminary Throne.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>不是不愿，而是不能。而要吾以正身示人，还需汝等鼎力相助。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>It's an inability to do so rather than an unwillingness. For me to appear in my true form, I'll require your help.</color>

C: 但是，要找到小那刻夏，就得去到树冠吧？
E: But we have to go to the treetop to find Nax anyway, right?

C: 那是…缇宝大人和缇安大人？
E: Is that... Lady Tribbie and Lady Trianne?

C: 声音是从「逐星天井」传来的，我们快走。
E: The voice seems to be coming from the Star-Chase Atrium.

C: 可惜，完成试炼的关键不在于我。若想战胜那道恐惧，我需要其他悬锋族人的帮助。
E: Regrettably, I do not hold the key to completing the trial. If I wish to conquer that fear, I need the assistance of my fellow Kremnoans.

C: 哦？这奥赫玛吹的是什么风……
E: Oho, what in Okhema is happening?

C: 这几句表达了作者的思乡之情，正如奥赫玛离大部分人的故乡都很遥远。
E: These lines express the poet's yearning for their home, just as Okhema is distant from many people's homes.

C: 嚯…听你的意思，勇猛的迈德漠斯，悬锋王位的继承人，居然想打破一族延续千年的古老传统？
E: So... are you suggesting that you, the mighty Mydeimos and the heir to the throne of Kremnos, wish to defy the tradition that has endured among your people for millennia?

C: 它插翅难飞。
E: It had nowhere to escape.

C: 小…小敌？！
E: D-De!

C: 你…又是谁？
E: Who... are you?

C: 你不说我都想不起来这事。
E: I had totally forgotten about this until you brought it up.

C: 我…不记得了……
E: I don't... remember...

C: 「伟岸的刻法勒，全知的父，它身躯伟岸，却甘将眼睑垂低。」
E: "O great Kephale, all-knowing father of stature so tall, yet low does their gaze willingly fall."

C: 还有一柄古怪的匕首，如同一弯新月。
E: And a peculiar dagger resembling a crescent moon.

C: 未必。我们暂且将此人称为「盗火行者」。假设推测成立，此人的目标共有三处。
E: Not necessarily. Let's call that person the "Flame Reaver" for now. If my presumption holds, that person has three targets.

C: 还需要你的另一位同伴。
E: We need your other companion too.

C: 很激动的样子呢…看来是颇有信心。
E: Such enthusiasm. I'm glad to see you're confident.

C: 哈哈……
E: Haha...

C: 向前看。把你的过往嚼碎、咽下，勿让空虚与苦涩成为你唯一熟知的滋味。
E: Look forward. Chew up and swallow your past, then make sure emptiness and bitterness are not the only flavors you know.

C: 她的魂息乘着西风，提前飞向那个没有悲伤的世界了。
E: Her spirit is now riding the west wind, flying ahead to a world free of sorrow.

C: 不仅如此，这还是一道门锁——封印着*我们*儿时的住处。
E: Not only that. It also serves as a lock — our childhood abode lies sealed within.

C: 这位女士是妈妈的故交。小的时候，偶尔能吃到妈妈带回来的甜饼。
E: This lady is Mother's old friend. When we were little, we sometimes got to eat the sweet pastries she brought back.

C: 是{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}心脏所在，火种保管处，就在左边往里走……
E: It's where {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' heart lies and the Coreflame is kept. Just enter on the left...

C: 黑夜不可能降临在奥赫玛。
E: Nights do not fall upon Okhema.

C: 吾的意思是，在吾将火种注入汝的心脏前……
E: What I mean is, before I implanted the Coreflame into your heart...

C: 怎么不给我留个言呀？
E: Why didn't you leave me a message?

C: 既然接受了米凯的求助，我也要全力以赴，免得事情闹到收不了场。
E: But since I took Micah's request, I gotta see this through. Make sure things don't spiral out of control.

C: 奥帝先生，您…您能不能撤销他的资格？让通缉犯参与「圣杯战争」，实在太危险了…万一他许愿让公司员工全员暴毙，那不就完蛋了！
E: Mr. Oti, sir, c—can't you revoke his qualification? Letting a criminal join the Holy Grail War is way too dangerous! What if he wishes for every single IPC employee to drop dead? That'd be the end of us!

C: 该不会这家伙是你召来的从者吧！Assassin…快、快想想办法！
E: Don't tell me this guy's your Servant! Assassin, do something!

C: 你们经常被召唤到不属于自己的世界吗？
E: Are you guys often summoned into worlds that aren't your own?

C: 对不起……
E: I'm sorry...

C: 阿基维利在上，他骂得好脏！
E: For the love of Akivili, he's cursing up a storm!

C: 看来…「相互厮杀」已经开始了。
E: Looks like... the "mutual slaughter" has already begun.

C: 我会将圣杯积累的力量托付给你，给予你压倒他们的筹码。如此一来，这场盛大的仪式必将迎来圆满的收场！
E: I will give you the power the Holy Grail has accumulated so you can crush them all. Then, this grand spectacle will come to a glorious finale!

C: 是不是迷路了？
E: Or is he lost?

C: 超古代邪神手办！
E: Whoa, that figurine looks totally rad!

C: 你高声呼唤，但拖长的尾音并未传达到从者的耳中，当她在做出选择的刹那心生犹豫时，一切已经注定——
E: You called out, your voice echoing, but the drawn-out words never reached the Servant. In the moment she hesitated, fate had already been sealed—

C: 你发现自己总能随手掏出的球棒早已不在手边。话说回来，你真的曾拥有过那根球棒吗？
E: The bat you always have at your side... is no longer there. Then again, did you ever really have it in the first place?

C: 我这就举报你。
E: I'm reporting you!

C: 暂且无视这位吊儿郎当的防卫科科员，你低下头开始工作。加油，不要输给这种无所事事的大人！
E: For now, you ignore the Security Department staff's careless attitude and lower your head to resume your task. You've got this! You're not losing to some grown-up who's slacking all day!

C: 虽然你的精神已十分疲惫，但男人的神采仍打动了你。忙里偷闲的娱乐，一根钓竿，空间站的生活也没你想象中的那么不堪。
E: Although you are exhausted beyond measure, the man's expression moves you. Your entertainment during a momentary respite from work, a fishing rod. Life at the space station isn't as bleak as you thought.

C: 最近，星际和平公司的朋友建议我们去卡美洛一趟，那里应该早就被反物质军团摧毁了，但最近却传出了复数的求救信号。
E: Our friends from the Interastral Peace Corporation recently suggested we make a stop at Camelot. That planet should've been destroyed by the Antimatter Legion long ago, but we've been picking up multiple distress signals from there.

C: 我曾经是列车的开拓者。
E: I was once a Trailblazer on the Express.

C: 嚯嗬嗬嗬…各位执意要将矛头对准我，那我只好勉为其难充当这场节目的关底考验了。
E: Ohohoho... If you are all so keen to make me your enemy, I suppose I'll have to become the final challenge on this variety show.

C: 谈不上什么满意。但如果你敢说个不字，我会在消失前用尽全力掐住你那短到看不见的脖子，看着你咽气…虽然我明白，这样做根本杀不死你。
E: Happy? Never. But if you don't carry it through, I'll squeeze your puny neck with every ounce of my strength until I disappear... I'll watch you take your last breath, even if I know it won't actually kill you!

C: 不公平！为什么你有声音！
E: That's not fair! Why do you get to have a voice?

C: 林登•斯科特，你会化身一支庞大的恶灵军团，成为影史留名的经典恐怖形象。
E: Lyndon Skott, you'll become a legion of evil spirits, a horror icon etched in movie history!

C: 饶了我吧，这里的人就没一个正经的吗？
E: Give me a break! Are there no functioning adults around here?

C: 不，多踢几脚。
E: No. Give him a few more kicks.

C: 不如暂且收下他。若是能改邪归正，那固然好，如果不能，也能把它当作投掷武器对付他的从者。
E: How about we take him in for now? If he turns good, great. If not, we can always chuck him at his Servant as a projectile.

C: 既然受害者都这么发话了……
E: Well, since the victim herself said so...

C: 对魔力抵抗了精神攻击吗？
E: Was it your Magic Resistance that blocked the mental attack?

C: 太棒了，一下子多出两个举世难求的主演，我要给你们加戏！让你们成为无敌的怪物，把所有人都撕成碎片！
E: Fantastic! Two more exceptional leads at once! I'll give you bigger roles! Turn you into unstoppable monsters who tear everyone apart!

C: 又臭又长，兄弟！
E: Ugh, so loooong and boring!

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: ——烂片。
E: —And it was trash.

C: 别说去向，连生死都没人讲得清，多吓人。说不定…就像曾经的黑布林家系一样，我们不知不觉见证了历史啊。
E: Heck, forget his whereabouts — nobody even knows if he's still alive! Talk about scary. For all we know, we might have watched something go down in history — like what happened to the Blackplum Family back then — without even realizing it.

C: 怎么，觉得很失望？
E: What a shame, huh?

C: 像你这样的人我见过太多。经历一场失败，就巴不得所有人都来数落一番，只有这样心里才能踏实。好像有人批评，犯的错就有机会弥补。
E: I've seen plenty like you. Eager for everyone to take you to task after a setback because that's the only way you'll feel better. As though the more they condemn you, the more likely you can rectify your mistake.

C: 但那也是以后的事了。凡清算皆需时日，如今，先让我行使这自由的权利吧。
E: I'll cross that bridge when I get to it. For now, there's still some time before that payment is due, so why not exercise the right to freedom that I've just regained?

C: 显得亲切点呗，就跟这位狐人小姐的习惯一样。
E: Don't we sound chummier that way? I took a leaf out of this foxian girl's book.

C: 怎么会…为何还有这么多？
E: How can it be... Why are there still so many of them?

C: 不用了。万维克先生状况不佳，我们先去完成你的告别之行。
E: There's no need for that. Mr. Wonweek is in poor condition, so let's wrap up your farewells first.

C: 好吧。那咱们得抓紧时间啦。
E: Okay. We better hurry then.

C: 有二位相助，比预想中更顺利呢，算算时间，竟还剩下了些。
