E: Thanks to both your help, everything went smoother than I expected. And it looks like we still have some time to spare.

C: 如果可以，希望驭空大人将此事上呈将军，送我觐见元帅——这副身躯，也许能帮助联盟向着仙舟的敌人更近一步。
E: If possible, please inform the general and arrange for me to meet with the marshal. Maybe this body of mine can help the Alliance get one step closer to the Xianzhou's enemies.

C: 所以如今，停云也要当一粒狡猾的灰尘，让那些幕后大手……
E: So now, I'll become a cunning speck of dust and make those masterminds behind the curtains...

C: 您在这附近工作吗？
E: Do you work nearby?

C: 一张字迹潦草的纸条被留在这里。
E: A scrawled note was left here.

C: 如此一来，我才能将「同谐」与「秩序」的祝福尽数舍弃，生平初次，以凡人的身份踏入这美梦之中。
E: This is how I can cast aside all the blessings of the Harmony and the Order and, for the first time in my life, enter the sweet dream as an ordinary person.

C: 我认可你的理念。
E: I agree with what you stand for.

C: 只一眨眼的工夫，面前的冰激凌就进了万维克的肚子。
E: In the blink of an eye, the ice cream vanished into Wonweek's stomach.

C: 很遗憾，命运吝啬于展现它的底色，我也不知道第三重命途是什么。
E: Unfortunately, fate is keeping the third Path a mystery. I don't know what it is, either.

C: 更实际的问题是，现在没法进行降落选址。等待我们的可能是大海、没有氧气的真空带、甚至火山岩浆……
E: What's more pressing is finding a suitable landing site. We could end up over an ocean, in a vacuum without oxygen, or worse yet, in the middle of a lava field...

C: 地面小分队的成员到齐了，让列车长宣布「后备方案」吧。
E: Now that our ground exploration team is assembled, I'll let the conductor reveal our backup plan.

C: 您要不要也来听听？嘻嘻嘻……
E: Wanna listen in on them? Hyuk hyuk hyuk...

C: 哼，小菜一碟~
E: Hmph, a piece of cake!

C: 这里很危险，不宜久留。
E: It's dangerous here. We should leave.

C: 同感。能在瞬息间将你缴械，甚至一击斫断这柄长枪，此人绝非等闲之辈。
E: I agree. To disarm you in a flash and even snap my spear... He's no ordinary person.

C: 他们出现的时机太巧了。
E: Their appearance was suspiciously well-timed.

C: 还有，小白哪有胆子安排*我们*呀，反过来还差不多呢。
E: Also, Snowy wouldn't dare make plans for us. It's more like the other way around!

C: 大祭司大人，请再一次…带领我们启翅远行吧。
E: High priest, please guide us once again as we spread our wings on this long journey.

C: 就是字面意思，末日来临前的挣扎时代。
E: Just as the word implies, it's the time of strife before the world meets its end.

C: 各位，刚才的里拉琴，奏得还行吧？我们流亡多日，许久没碰过乐器，兴许手艺生疏，献丑了。
E: Everyone, how did you find our lyre performance earlier? We've been in exile for many days and haven't touched our instruments in a long time. I fear our skills have grown rusty, and we've made a spectacle of ourselves.

C: 感激不尽。幸亏奥赫玛也不是毫无准备，神谕早已警示我们。这是天灾，但并非死劫。
E: You have my gratitude. Thankfully, Okhema is not completely unprepared. The prophecy had warned us about this. This is a catastrophe, but it's not the end.

C: 我答应过他们，在时局安定后，要为我们的盟友解答翁法罗斯的一切。
E: I gave my word that after the situation stabilized, I would reveal all about Amphoreus to our allies.

C: {RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}将死寂作为他骄伉的战鼓，这片水幕之后…就是战场。
E: Deathly silence is the proud resonance of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s war drums. Behind this watery veil... awaits the arena of conflict.

C: 二位，摒弃杂念——
E: Cast aside all distracting thoughts—

C: 你们是？这身奇妙的衣服，还有没听过的口音……
E: You are...? What strange clothing and accent you have...

C: 视野极佳，还能望见那尊泰坦，把这一幕记录下来吧。
E: An excellent lookout over the city. We can even see that Titan statue. Let's get a photo of this view.

C: 没人质疑预言吗？
E: Hasn't anyone questioned the prophecy?

C: 这些黄金裔个个都性格迥异，相较之下，白厄大抵是最正常的那个了。
E: These Chrysos Heirs all have wildly different personalities. In comparison, Phainon seems like the most normal one.

C: …我们有约定在身，不能向你道出真相。
E: ...We are bound by a pact. I cannot reveal the truth to you.

C: 不买。
E: No, thanks.

C: 人们总会向往天空，你阻止不了。
E: Humanity has always longed for the sky... and this is something that you cannot prevent.

C: 蝶…下一次，我希望你能直抒胸襟。
E: Cas... Next time, I hope you will express your thoughts openly.

C: …站在这里，我以黄金裔的尊严起誓，你们的生命并未受到威胁。在审讯开始前，遐蝶小姐就把消息传达给了我，希望我能阻止阿格莱雅。
E: ...I swear by the honor of the Chrysos Heirs here that your lives were never in danger. Before the interrogation started, Miss Castorice already sent a message to me, hoping that I would stop Aglaea.

C: 可她连句道歉都没说…
E: But she didn't even apologize...

C: 听见了…
E: I did...

C: 怎么了，我脸上有什么东西吗？
E: What? Do I have something on my face?

C: …我原本的计划是以「流放」作为威胁，考验那二人的意志和决心。
E: ...Initially, my plan was to use the threat of "banishment" to test their resolve and perseverance.

C: 告诉我你是谁。
E: Tell me who you are.

C: 你说的没错，继续深入是我的坚持。而且{NICKNAME}也在，我们一定会完成使命，并全身而退。
E: You're right. It was my decision to keep pushing forward. And with {NICKNAME} here, we're sure to complete our mission and return safely.

C: 若要以同样的方式应对每桩危机，奥赫玛会终日不得安宁。于无声中抹去威胁，让他们不必活在恐惧的阴霾之下，才是黄金裔的职责。
E: Okhema would be in constant turmoil if we were to raise the alert each time danger befell us. Silently eliminating threats and sparing them from living under the shadow of fear — that is the duty of the Chrysos Heirs.

C: 「不会…不能…不允许你们继续前进。」
E: "No... You cannot... You must not come any closer."

C: 如果你打算接受邀请，{NICKNAME}…最好别让它等太久。
E: {NICKNAME}, if you do plan to accept their invitation... it's best that you don't let them wait for too long.

C: 当再次邂逅的那天到来，我想…我会假装我们素未谋面，再重新认识你一次，让一切都从头开始。
E: When the day we cross paths again arrives, I think... I'll pretend we've never met, and get to know you anew, as if starting all over.

C: 对，这个表情才是我熟悉的{NICKNAME}。
E: That's it, that look on your face is the {NICKNAME} that I know.

C: 希望那是一个有流星划过的美丽夜晚。
E: I hope that it'll be a beautiful night with shooting stars.

C: 很遗憾，我不是命运的奴隶，无法观测未来——我填补不了你记忆的空洞，也没法告诉你我们后来共同经历了些什么。
E: Unfortunately, I'm not Destiny's Slave. I can't peer into the future. I can neither fill the gaps in your memory nor tell you what we later experienced together.

C: …抱歉，我不想转译那些字眼。
E: ...Please pardon me. Words this vile should not be relayed.

C: 宠物，不是！
E: Pet, not!

C: …嗯？是谁？我正忙着取景，请别……
E: ...Hmm? Who's that? I'm busy working on a scene, please don't...

C: 当然，请拿去吧。如果可以，请把它当作我的补偿。
E: Sure, take it! Think of it as my way of making it up to you.

C: 走吧，{NICKNAME}阁下。我们一起发掘{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的秘密。
E: Let's go, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. We will unravel {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s secrets together.

C: 这些「异常」背后藏着腐败和疯狂。我必须亲手清理它们，以绝后患。
E: Corruption and madness are lurking behind these anomalies. I must deal with them myself to prevent further troubles.

C: 身边的女孩依旧无动于衷。
E: The girl beside you remains unresponsive.

C: 这竞赛听着挺费人啊…
E: This competition sounds pretty brutal...

C: 我们没有赴死的打算，阁下。想办法解开他们布置的难题吧。
E: Death is not part of our plan, Lord Gnaeus. We should work on solving the puzzle they've set for us.

C: …滚吧，狗鼠。你今天捡回了一条命。
E: ...Get lost, scum. Consider yourself lucky today.

C: 要是这世上没有死亡就好了。那样，他们就不必在这里彷徨…我也不必受此折磨。
E: If only death didn't exist in this world. That way, they wouldn't have to linger here... and I wouldn't have to suffer.

C: 「吾等，将神王的『牺牲』封藏于剑皿之中。」
E: "We shall hereby seal the god-king's Sacrifice within this sword vessel."

C: 束缚着神性的封印已经解除。只要在此完成铸魂，{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}就能重归完整。
E: The seal that binds their divinity is already broken. As long as we complete the soul-forging here, {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} will be whole once more.

C: （若虫找到的污秽都已经清理完了。）
E: (All the filth marked by the nymphs has been cleansed.)

C: 你或许…是悬锋城的救赎啊……
E: You could well be... Castrum Kremnos' salvation...

C: 那座雕像…是在呼唤我们吗？
E: Is that statue... beckoning to us?

C: （破碎的泰坦之声）
E: (Titan's fragmented voice)

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 原来缇宝大人也有这么严厉的一面……
E: So High Priest Tribbie can be strict too...

C: 你的噩梦会结束的。
E: Your nightmare will be over soon.

C: 嘿嘿，人家也借着你的光，从「小狗」变成「圣兽」啦。
E: Hehe, thanks to you, I've evolved from a little dog into a sacred beast!

C: 说起来，奥赫玛的浴场似乎没有橡皮鸭玩具。只有这些…海豹？
E: Speaking of which, I don't recall seeing any rubber duck toys in the baths of Okhema. It seems like they only have these... seals?

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

C: 「为肉身灌注黄金之血，为神谕甘愿枯竭干涸……」
E: "Fill our bodies with blood of gold, till we wither in willing service to the prophecy..."

C: 缺少之物…是什么？
E: Lacking something... What is it?

C: 从不原谅…从不选择……
E: Never forgives... never makes a choice...

C: 那是泰坦在开玩笑，对吧…？
E: The Titan must be joking, right...?

C: 还不是悲伤的时候，一定有办法救你。
E: It's not time for us to despair yet. There must be a way to save you.

C: 昏光庭院的医术，很神奇吧？
E: That's the medical prowess of the Twilight Courtyard. Amazing, isn't it?

C: 但还未到放弃的时候。至少，此刻我还能想到一线希望。
E: Nevertheless, now is not the time for us to give up. At the very least, we can still see a glimmer of hope.

C: 一岁、两岁……
E: One year old, two years old...

C: 虽然令人感到遗憾，但客观来说，树庭遭袭之后，学院的实际权力者变成了我。
E: Although the circumstances are rather unfortunate, from an objective point of view, it is an undeniable fact that ever since the Grove was attacked, I have become the de facto leader of the Grove.

C: 你用手指轻触囚犯的额头。他面色苍白，目光闪烁，眼中满是惊恐，身体止不住地痉挛。
E: You gently touch the prisoner's forehead with your finger. His face is pale, his eyes flicker with fear, and his body trembles uncontrollably.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>赛飞儿</color>阁下，阿格莱雅大人早先说过的，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}的半神，在翁法罗斯各地留下过神话传说的飞贼……
E: It's Lady <color=#dbc291ff>Cipher</color>, the demigod of {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#} whom Lady Aglaea had spoken of. She's a master thief who's left legendary tales all over Amphoreus.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们追。
E: {NICKNAME}, we must pursue her.

C: 她…主动提的？你没在诓我？
E: She... brought this up herself? You're not pulling my leg?

C: 呀，轻、轻点…！
E: Ah! Be careful with that...!

C: 你听到他说的话了。
E: You heard him.

C: 这…这是……
E: This... this...

C: 我不知道，这情景…闻所未闻。
E: I have no idea. This circumstance... is completely unprecedented.

C: …这里该怎么过去？
E: ...How are we supposed to get over there?

C: 一位祭司，一位战士，一位…咳，一只奇兽…和女王的形容完全一样，天赐的救星！
E: A priestess, a warrior, and a, um... a divine beast... You look identical to the blessed saviors that the queen described!

C: 都更…面熟。
E: More... familiar.

C: 你也来冥河探险啊？
E: You're adventuring in the River of Souls, too?

C: 需要人家帮助的时候，就大声叫我吧！
E: Just shout for me when you need my help!

C: 好了，我亲爱的玻吕茜亚……
E: Alright, my dear Polyxia...

C: 即便，我们尚不知道对方的名字……
E: ...Even if we do not know each other's names...

C: 搞定！这样就安全啦。
E: Done! Now it'll be safe for us to move on.

C: 你…会把票投给哪边？
E: Who... who'll you be voting for?

C: 凯妮斯大人为您留了特等席，请问要现在落座吗？
E: Lady Caenis has reserved a special seat for you. Shall I show you to it?
Huh...

C: 他会投给谁？
E: Who will he vote for?

C: <color=#ff3a3e>不要回头，向前看。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Don't turn around. Keep looking forward.</color>

C: 哎…我相信他。
E: Yes, I have faith in him.

C: 毕竟我是个打分公允的老师。
E: That's because I'm a teacher who grades everyone fairly.

C: （奇怪，总有一种违和感。这是什么…筛选机制么？）
E: (Wait, something about that feels off. Is this a... selection process of some sort?)

C: 我更好奇另一件事：这里提到，那刻夏在进行某种秘密实验？
E: There's something else that's caught my attention, though... This says that Anaxa is conducting secret experiments of some sort?

C: 这种锲而不舍的精神…但愿能帮助他从黑潮中幸存。
E: Impressive tenacity... Hopefully it helped him survive the black tide.

C: 显然话里有话。他的潜台词是，泰坦并不伟大。
E: What he didn't say — that the Titans are not noble — rings louder in this case.

C: 嗯…我不知道那场骚动是如何平息的，但老师最终还是留在了树庭。即便被视作异端，他也在继续自己的研究。
E: Yes... I'm not sure how that controversy was eventually resolved, but what's for certain at least is that Anaxa was allowed to stay in the Grove where he continued his research, despite being regarded as a heretic.

C: 连代价是什么都不过问么？
E: Don't you care to know what the price might be?

C: 可此三人从未在史诗中留下自己的名字。否则，吾断然不会毫无印象……
E: But these three people must not have left their names in the epics. Otherwise, I would have some recollection of this...

C: 这里封印着「牺牲」，不会错。
E: Sealed within this statue is undoubtedly his Sacrifice.

C: 聆听风堇的总结。
E: Listen to Hyacine's summary.

C: 给天空之子降下死刑的塞涅俄丝，抛弃了人性的塞涅俄丝——
E: Seliose, who passed fatal judgment on the Skyfolk, had turned her back on humanity —

C: 嗯，你说得对…我们都需要一些时间做好准备。
E: You're right... we all need some time to prepare.

C: 她对人子深远的爱，烧灼殆尽…徒留无边怒火。
E: Her deep love for humanity was reduced to ashes... leaving behind only endless fury.

C: 「揭开记忆的帷幕——」
E: "Lift the curtain of memory—"

C: 跟紧{NICKNAME}…一步都别落下！
E: Stay close to {NICKNAME}... Don't fall behind!

C: 嘿嘿…隔着这小盒子我都能闻到上等宝贝的香甜味儿了。什么为信仰奉献一切的大司铎，不还是充实了私人小金库嘛……
E: Heh, I can already catch the sweet scent of treasure seeping from this little box. So much for the Chaplain's devotion to faith — it turns out he's just been padding his secret stash...

C: （现在…*我就是阿提卡斯。*）
E: (Now... I am Atticus.)

C: 我们全知的天父{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}，它陷入沉默前的一刻…我于黎明云崖听见了它最后的话语……
E: The omniscient sky father, {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, before they fell silent... I heard their last words at Dawncloud...

C: 那家伙，该不会已经在楼上等我了吧？
E: Don't tell me that they might already be waiting for me upstairs...

C: 「灵水，揭露门扉吧。」
E: "Spirit water, reveal the way."

C: 在需要作出抉择的时候，切不可因为个人兴趣，分散了心神。
E: In moments when a choice needs to be made, one must not be distracted due to personal interests.

C: 这也是假的，快跑——
E: This Cipher must be fake too. Run!

C: 伪装？不不不，可不是这种骗小孩子的把戏，让我想想该怎么解释……
E: Disguise? No no no, it's not as simple as that. Lemme think about how to explain this...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「谎言」——这才是扎格列斯的招牌，只要人人信以为真，假象也能化作现实！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Lies" are what Zagreus is best at. If everyone believes in a lie, then it becomes reality!</color>

C: 你桀骜不驯的样子真可爱哪，小灰子~
E: I sure love your arrogance, Gray Mystery~

C: 哈，我就感觉身后有一阵阴风吹过。偷看可不礼貌啊，朋友。
E: I thought I felt a draft just now. Peeking isn't polite, my friend.

C: 我就是好奇你在看什么。
E: Just curious what you're reading.

C: 唔，但是每一张牌的解读都这么长？要全都背下来吗……
E: Hmm, but the interpretation for each card is so long. Do I have to memorize them all?

C: 那想必你也能猜到吧？我们出现在诸位面前的理由……
E: You've probably figured out why we've come before you...

C: 规矩也自那时定下。除了受到「金织」邀请的宾客，他人不得擅闯此处。
E: Rules were set then. No one was allowed to enter, apart from guests invited by the Goldweaver.

C: 大功告成！这下你就不用担心沾湿尾巴咯。
E: Mission accomplished! Now you don't have to worry about your tail getting wet.

C: 咱俩都认识多久了？没想到你居然还会上这种当！
E: How long have we known each other? I can't believe you still fall for this!

C: 在阴影中爬行的虫豸们，退下吧！阴谋到此为止了。
E: You pests crawling in the shadows, back off! Your plot ends here.

C: 但我奉劝你们永远别再靠近奥赫玛，否则，愤怒的民众将把你们撕成碎片。
E: Stay away from Okhema forever. If you set foot there again, the fury of its people will tear you apart.

C: 他们几个都还有气息。稍加照顾，几天以后应该就能恢复。
E: They're still alive. With proper care, they'll pull through in a few days.

C: 请他们告诉每个人，凡是对圣城的未来和逐火之旅心存顾虑的公民，都应该来参加这次集会。告诉他们，阿格莱雅将希望的种子留给了翁法罗斯。
E: Urge everyone who has concerns about the holy city's future and the Flame-Chase Journey to attend this gathering. Tell them Aglaea has left Amphoreus the seeds of hope.

C: 我的策略奏效了。它为我争取到了足够多的票数，让我达成了想要的目标。但事后？我没有感到分毫的喜悦。
E: The strategy worked. I secured enough votes to achieve my goal. But afterward? There wasn't even a flicker of joy.

C: 要记得，白厄…完成逐火以后，要把开启创世奇迹的决定交由翁法罗斯的人们。
E: Remember, Phainon... after completing the Flame-Chase, leave the decision to initiate the Miracle of Genesis to the Amphoreans.

C: 不愧是「列车护卫」，真可靠呀。那，我们走吧？
E: That's the dependable "Express Guard" for you. So, shall we get going?

C: 创世涡心…真是不可思议，丹宝果真深藏不露呢。
E: The Vortex of Genesis... unbelievable. Dannie is full of surprises.

C: 和我族相关的史料，我全都熟记在心——当然也包括您留下的亲笔。
E: Every record regarding my lineage is etched in my memory, including your words.

C: 我对祭典上的厮杀细节并没有什么考究， 只在书卷上读到「那是一场光荣的决斗」。
E: I've never looked too deeply into the details of such ritualistic violence. The scrolls simply described it as "a glorious duel."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「晨昏斗转，控驭浑象——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The turn of dawn and dusk, commanding the celestial globe..."</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「以天空百目之名，吾为世间降下天象。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"In the name of the Sky's Hundred Eyes, I bring celestial phenomena upon the world."</color>

C: …该离开了，雅辛忒丝。露奈比斯在等你们。
E: ...We should get going, Hyacinthia. Lunabis is waiting for you all.

C: 看啊，彩虹桥在引领我们前往下一个目的地。
E: Look, the rainbow bridge is leading us to our next destination.

C: 抓紧赶路吧。
E: Let's hurry.

C: 莫非，小伊卡是你的……
E: Is Little Ica your...

C: 嘟嘟…嘟？
E: Doot-Doot... Doot?

C: 你准备好了么，风堇？
E: Are you ready, Hyacine?

C: 嗯…这样应该就对啦？
E: Hmm... I think this should be right?

C: 呵…完成使命？
E: Heh... Fulfill your mission?

C: 冷静下来…仔细想想。
E: Calm down... and think carefully.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>赛法利娅那丫头，用一个伟大的谎言骗过了整个翁法罗斯——</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That girl, Cifera, spun a grand lie that deceived all of Amphoreus...</color>

C: 除此之外…桀桀桀，她还骗过了那个愚蠢的晋升试炼，<color=#dbc291ff>让本大爷，伟大的{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}扎格列斯{RUBY_E#}…活了下来！</color>
E: Not just that... Heeheehee, she even managed to fool that dumb ascension trial, <color=#dbc291ff>and allowed me, the great {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Zagreus{RUBY_E#}... to survive!</color>

C: 呵呵，阁下心中一定有许多疑问。不妨先跟上他的脚步吧。
E: Questions, questions... Let's follow along and find out, shall we?

C: 没想到…还是被海浪推了回来啊。
E: Never thought... the waves would end up pushing it back ashore.

C: …老爹和母亲的心愿很简单，只希望我平安长大，多帮村子里做些好事，少闯祸。
E: My parents... they only wished for me to grow up well, to help around the village, stay out of trouble...

C: 是啊。真的很难想象，凡人要怎么才能和泰坦相提并论？
E: Right... How could any human possibly measure up to a Titan?

C: 告诉你我现在的心愿吧：要是能有和他决斗的机会，我会要求他堂堂正正地与我正面厮杀，并且，我要亲手斩落他的面具。
E: My wish is simple: One honest duel. Face to face, blade to blade. Then I'll strip away that mask with my own hands.

C: 我只是偶尔幻想一下英雄故事罢了，可他居然幻想自己有朝一日会成为…泰坦？
E: I mean, I just daydream about hero stories, but he's fantasizing about becoming a... Titan?

C: 好伙伴，你也是认真的吗？我真的要被托付这种接近于天方夜谭的理想吗？
E: Come on, you're joking right? Am I really being burdened with a dream that feels more like a fantasy?

C: …我明白了。你们…要保重自己哪。
E: ...Very well. Make sure you protect yourselves.
Ah...

C: 圣女大人，我总觉得自己误入了一场政治游戏。
E: Holy Maiden, I can't help but feel like a pawn that has stumbled into some greater political game.

C: （楼上的风景，还没见过…上去看看吧？）
E: (I wonder what the view's like from up there... Worth checking out?)

C: 「救世主」的神谕，于我已无意义。它应当被交予更合适的人手中，也就是你。
E: The prophecy of the "Deliverer" means nothing to me now. It belongs in the hands of someone far more fitting. Someone like you.

C: 裂痕？呵……
E: Fracture? Heh...

C: 毁灭的太阳，已然成双……
E: The suns of destruction... now twinned...

C: 名为「英雄之旅」的进程循环至今，既不是为了「新世界」，也不是为了创造出完美的英雄或神明——
E: The cycles of the "Hero's Journey" that have played out until now were never about creating a new world or perfect heroes and gods—

C: 静静地，等待下一页被翻开的那天。
E: Quietly, waiting for the day when that next page is turned.

C: 怎么可能……
E: How is this possible...?

C: 是啊。可预言从未提及他的出现，至少…不属于这个时代。
E: Yes. But the prophecy never mentioned that he'd appear here. At least, not in this era.

C: 若当真如此，我们又为何会步入相同的结局？
E: If that's truly the case, why are we doomed to the same outcome?

C: 一千多颗火种，区区一个黄金裔…怎么可能？！
E: A thousand Coreflames, and just a single Chrysos Heir... How is that even possible!?

C: 但你的眼中仍有恻隐，实在可悲。
E: But there's still tenderness in your eyes. How pathetic.

C: 但即便在这悲哀的命运囚笼里，也总有幸运的事发生。因为……
E: But even in this wretched prison, luck is still sometimes on my side. Because...

C: 黑潮…正在吞没你。你已无力为继了…半神。
E: The black tide... it's consuming you. You can't hold out much longer... demigod.

C: 第一幕：「启程」
E: Act I: Departure

C: 你记得很清楚呢。
E: Your memory serves you well.

C: 但我还是想问，太卜大人，信使小姐，你们真的不是我梦里的人物吗？
E: I need to know... Master Diviner, Miss Messenger, this isn't just another dream, is it?

C: 简而言之，让一切科学和技术倒向「毁灭」——既然纳努克看向了这里，就说明祂是认真的。
E: Simply put, it will tilt all sciences and technologies towards the Destruction. And since Nanook glanced at this place, it means THEY are being dead serious.

C: 但大可放心：同为这条命途的行者，纳努克的注视早已在您的灵魂中刻下一道烙印，您体内寄宿着「毁灭」的种子……
E: Rest assured: As a fellow pathstrider of this Path, Nanook's gaze left a brand on your soul long ago. You harbor the seed of Destruction within you...

C: 该如何迎客，凯撒？
E: Your orders, Imperator?

C: 班师回朝。派斥候向各邦代表传急讯，逐火同盟会议提前召开。
E: We return triumphant. Send an urgent message to all delegates: The meeting of the Flame-Chase Alliance will convene early.

C: 记得史书上说，凯撒当年是靠着三门火炮，瞄准黎明云崖，让所有城邦代表乖乖听话的。不知在这个轮回，历史会不会重演呢？
E: The history books said that the Imperator aimed three cannons at Dawncloud to make all the delegates obey her. Will history repeat itself in this cycle?

C: 住口！简直是大逆不道。
E: Silence! That's treason!

C: 你们也是来浴场放松的？今日水温合适，务必尽情享受。为了下一场战役，好好养精蓄锐。
E: Are you here to relax in the baths as well? The temperature is just right today, so be sure to enjoy it. You should rest well for the next campaign.

C: 可是，海瑟音小姐……
E: But, Miss Hysilens...

C: 现在，交心先到此为止——又有鱼儿循着血腥游来了。
E: But for now, let's pause this heart-to-heart. Another fish has come, following the scent of blood.

C: 下次不许抢我台词。
E: Next time, don't steal my lines.

C: 放心吧。你们的物品，会由专人妥善保管。
E: Your belongings will remain safe. They will be looked after appropriately by dedicated staff.

C: 啊？不是还有那么多泰坦没讨伐吗？
E: Huh? But there are so many Titans we haven't fought yet!

C: 还是算了。他们来自「天空」，万一像艾格勒一样会打雷呢？
E: Ehh, maybe not. They're from the "Sky"... What if they can summon thunder like Aquila?

C: 最明智的决定，便是将{M#他}{F#她}交由我来处理。
E: Therefore, the wisest decision would be to hand {M#him}{F#her} over to me.

C: 他唯一在乎的，就是把翁法罗斯的实验推进到底，让「铁墓」降临于世，彻底摧毁银河的秩序。
E: The only thing he cares about is completing the Amphorean experiment, making sure Irontomb is born into this world, and using it to utterly destroy the cosmic order.

C: 大言不惭。倘若你能，何不早早杀之后快？
E: Shameless behavior. If that were true, you would have killed me long ago.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>执行：隔离指令。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>[Executing command: Isolation]</color>

C: 啧。时间不多了，直接说结论……
E: Tch. Time is running out. Here's the conclusion...

C: （对啊，无论是多么偏远的角落，只要潜藏商机，一定能引来公司关注，翁法罗斯不就是一片未被开发的商业蓝海吗？）
E: (That's right! No matter how far away a planet is, the IPC is guaranteed to pay attention as long as there's a business opportunity. Isn't Amphoreus a pristine and untapped market?)

C: 快点前去吧…记忆的孩子…在等候你……
E: Hurry and set off... The child of Remembrance... awaits you...

C: 刻法勒的火种身在何处？
E: Where is Kephale's Coreflame?
...Huh?

C: 快听，我听到了海列屈拉的歌声，她在呼唤我们！
E: Listen, I heard Helektra's voice! She's calling to us!

C: 凯撒已死！
E: The Imperator is dead!

C: 我会在世界的心脏等待你，但若要抵达此处……
E: I'll wait for you at the heart of the world. But to reach the place...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>一群自缚于洞穴中的囚徒自比英雄，以苦难为桂冠，与影子和回声同台共演的史诗。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>A group of prisoners bound themselves in a cave, crowning their suffering with heroism, an epic staged with shadows and echoes.</color>

C: ——也遮蔽了凯撒的罪行。
E: ...And so, the Imperator's crimes were veiled.

C: 万幸，你如约而至。人们的等待终究没有被辜负。
E: Thankfully, you arrived as promised, and everyone's wait was not in vain.

C: 在这千年间，这首曲目从未在斯缇科西亚停歇。
E: For a thousand years, this melody has never ceased in Styxia.

C: 若连人心都无法读懂，又何谈掌控帝国？
E: How can one rule an empire if one is incapable of understanding people's minds?

C: 大海啊。我的摇篮，我的故乡。
E: The ocean... My cradle. My home.

C: 已经有那么多人为你的野心，为「律法」付出了生命的代价，你却仍不满足？
E: Your ambitions have already made so many people give up their lives for the "Law"! And you're still not done!?

C: 我宁愿被遗忘，也不愿被定义。
E: I would rather be forgotten than be defined.

C: 「但，凯撒的承诺从不落空，所以，收下这篇记忆，那救世主之所见，天外的大海吧。」
E: "But the Imperator never makes empty promises. So, take this memory, this ocean beyond the sky, as witnessed by the Deliverer."

C: 也能够看向洞外，仰望星光。
E: Can still look outside the cave and see the stars.

C: 当然，我更愿称之为…论证方法。
E: Indeed. But I prefer to call it... a method of argument.

C: 波尔卡看见了这道涟漪，她无法阻止，便创立第IX机关；原始博士也已采取行动，但他选错了盟友，只能与野兽为伍。至于两位无机帝皇……
E: Polka saw these ripples but had no way of stopping them, so she founded Device IX. Dr. Primitive also took action, but he chose the wrong allies, and now only wild animals keep him company. As for the two inorganic emperors...

C: 翁法罗斯的心脏——<color=#dbc291ff>无名泰坦大墓。</color>
E: The heart of Amphoreus, <color=#dbc291ff>the great tomb of the nameless Titan</color>.

C: 所以早在启程之初，三月七就和这个世界的内幕擦肩而过。记忆中的警告声，想必是权杖的安全协议吧。
E: So March 7th had already brushed against the inner workings of this world at the beginning of her journey. That warning in her memories must have been the Scepter's safety protocol.

C: 很有可能。刚才，那道门也对它产生了反应。
E: That's very likely. That door reacted to the book as well.

C: 但昔涟不可能对权杖的真相了如指掌。她是从哪儿得到它的……
E: But Cyrene could never have known about the truth regarding the Scepter. So where did she get this key...?

C: 是啊。所以，我只能寄希望于童年的那场梦……
E: Yeah. So, I can only place my hopes on that childhood dream...

C: 昔涟成为了代行者？
E: Cyrene acted on their behalf instead?

C: 过去的昔涟，她到底在和谁对话？
E: Who exactly was the Cyrene of the past talking to?

C: 继续观察吧。「记忆」的每一丝涟漪，都可能为我们揭示「长夜月」的目的。
E: Let's keep observing. Every ripple of these "memories" could potentially reveal to us "Evernight's" true goal.

C: 昔涟，她的坚持果真没有尽头……
E: Cyrene... There really is no end to her perseverance...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析 █ ██</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyz███ ███</color>

C: （每一次轮回的牺牲都意味着沉重的决心…）
E: (Each sacrifice in every cycle represents a heavy resolve...)

C: 如此荒芜、破败，这座遗迹究竟是……
E: This ruin is so desolate... What exactly is it...?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>最初的智种，德谬歌。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The first Nouspore, Demiurge.</color>

C: 唯有舍弃，唯有「忘却」…灵魂才能在空无中走向新生。
E: Only through abandonment and "Oblivion"... can souls walk from emptiness towards rebirth.

C: 与此同时，我向丹恒提出了同样的问题。答案无关紧要，让我瞧瞧——「开拓」的精神，是否真如你们声称的那般一心同体。
E: I've just posed the same question to Dan Heng. The answer doesn't matter. Let me see... Is this Trailblaze spirit truly as unified as you all claim it to be?

C: 以后还是得注意安全。
E: We should still be careful in the future.

C: 纪念品都在房间里呢，不过没来得及收拾。回头整理好了，再给你好好炫耀吧。
E: All my souvenirs are in my room, but they're just... a bit of a mess right now. I'll tidy up later and give you the grand tour!

C: 简单来说，光拍照不行，相片总要有个地方供人展示嘛~
E: In other words, just taking photos isn't enough. They need a place to be displayed!

C: （对姬子的咖啡评价不错？那还真是口是心非……）
E: (Wait, everyone is saying great things about Himeko's coffee? Yeah, sure... lying liars.)

C: 又一次…久违了。
E: Here we are again... after so long.

C: 你怎么会知道……
E: How do you know about...

C: 记忆的诳语。你怎么看？
E: Memory's crazed ramblings. What do you think?

C: 延续你先前的尝试。
E: I'm going to continue where you left off.

C: 让我猜猜…你们还有同伴被困在更下面？
E: Lemme guess... You still have friends trapped even deeper below?

C: …你是怎么活到现在的？
E: ...How have you managed to stay alive up until now?

C: 掣地的伏龙啊，你将为弑主留名青史！
E: Seismic Walking Dragon, history shall remember you as a titan-slayer!

C: 终于……
E: Finally...

C: 漫长的时光里，我守护着斯缇科西亚与涡心的密道。当逆流的忆潮渗入冥河，即便深陷沉睡，我也能感受到那一丝温暖……
E: Through the endless flow of time, I guarded the secret passage between Styxia and the Vortex. When the memoria tide flowed backwards into the River of Souls, even in deep slumber, I could feel that warmth...

C: 「别担心。自从星穹列车的粉色姑娘闯入翁法罗斯后……」
E: "Don't worry. After the pink girl from the Astral Express broke into Amphoreus..."

C: 真是的。居然聚集了这么多…小家伙们，是知道我会来吗？未免有些太热情了呀。
E: Geez. So many little ones gathered here... Did you know I was coming? You're being a bit too enthusiastic, aren't you?

C: 难怪留影石机装不下更多回忆，是因为你一直躲在里面吗？
E: No wonder the photostone can't store more memories... Have you been hiding in there all along?

C: 您言语间的锋芒依旧。但切记，「偶然」才是万物运转的常态。那位「天渊万龙之祖」的消逝，便是前车之鉴。
E: Your words are as sharp as ever, but remember, "happenstance" is the only true constant in the universe. The demise of the Progenitor of All Dragons is a testament to that.

C: 多亏诸位的「努力」，这群人等到了机会。但他们不幸遇上了「三月小姐」，被逐一抽离心识，沦为空壳。
E: They finally got a chance thanks to your "efforts." Unfortunately, they ran into "Miss March" and their consciousnesses were plucked out one by one, reducing them to mere husks.

C: 在这座悬崖上，我见证了三千万次「徒劳」的终点。
E: I have witnessed thirty million "futile" ends atop this cliff.

C: 但我们曾为保护脚下这座圣城并肩而战，也曾在这座悬崖…见证过彼此的决心。
E: But we once fought together to protect this holy city beneath our feet... and we witnessed each other's resolve at this very cliff.

C: 至于我为何要将「德谬歌」尘封在记忆的角落，很遗憾，答案并非出于恐惧……
E: As for why I buried the "Demiurge" in a corner of my memory... Oh, regrettably, the answer wasn't about fear.

C: 真沉得住气啊，景元。对铁墓一役，联盟只准许罗浮一舰出兵……
E: You're quite calm, Jing Yuan. The Alliance only authorized the Luofu to be deployed for this Irontomb operation...

C: …忆质的流向，如此沉重。
E: ...The flow of memoria is so heavy here.

C: 这不是集会，而是一场朝圣。人们的神情坚定、虔诚…仿佛在等候一场奇迹降临。
E: This isn't just a gathering. It's a pilgrimage. The people's expressions are resolute, devout... as if waiting for a miracle to descend.

C: 「光线的终点，必须是一团寂静、确凿、纯粹的黑暗」。
E: "At the end of light, there must be silence. Certain, pure, and absolute darkness."

C: 无名泰坦并不存在。所谓的「倾听者」，只是「记忆」为窃取权杖，设下的一场骗局。
E: The Nameless Titan never existed. The so-called "listener" was just a trap set by the Remembrance to steal the Scepter.

C: 往后的道路，不再依靠冰冷的程序，而取决于人们的意志。
E: The path ahead will no longer rely on emotionless programs. It'll be decided by the will of humankind.

C: 我闭上眼睛，就能看见零星的碎片：那些与我们并肩的伙伴，已经奔向了各自的命运。
E: I can see fragments of it when I close my eyes... The friends who walked alongside us have all moved on toward their respective destinies.

C: 总算…到站了。
E: Finally... we're here.

C: 拿去吧。
E: Take this.

C: 带上这枚印戒，便是与我同行。用它开辟前路，写下「救世之因」。
E: Take this signet. With it, I'll be with you always. Use it to blaze the path ahead and inscribe the "Cause of Deliverance."

C: 遐蝶……
E: Castorice...

C: 我们会一起走向辽阔的星空。
E: We're bound for the vast, endless sky.

C: 嗯。我…不会忘记。
E: Mm. I... won't forget.

C: 「所以，扔掉悔恨吧，新兵。你已物尽其用，不再需要它了。」
E: "So, let go of your regret, comrade. Its purpose is served. You don't need it anymore."

C: 「如人那般死。」
E: "And die as one."

C: 「大家…在哪里……」
E: "Someone... anyone... where are you..."

C: 当然。*我们*准备好了。
E: Yeah, and we are ready.

C: 「没错。这条路，也必须靠你重走一回。」
E: "That's right. You'll have to walk this path too."

C: 那么，小白……
E: So, Snowy...

C: 我…想离开这里。
E: I... I want to leave this place.

C: 那真是，太好啦。
E: I'm glad to hear it.

C: 这枚晶体…很安静。
E: This crystal... is quiet.

C: 银河或许远比人们想象中更脆弱，命运有时只悬于一次小小的抉择。
E: Perhaps the cosmos is much more fragile than people think. Sometimes, destiny hinges on only a small choice.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「终于，{RUBY_B#「记忆」浮黎}那位星神{RUBY_E#}向翁法罗斯投来视线了呀。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"{RUBY_B#Fuli the Remembrance}That Aeon{RUBY_E#}... finally cast THEIR eyes toward Amphoreus."</color>

C: 「{NICKNAME}…已经陪伴在人家身边啦。」
E: "{NICKNAME}... You're already right next to me."

C: 「战争结束后，我要和粉霞天女一起，周游群星！」
E: "When the war is over, I'm gonna travel all over the stars with the Rosy Celestial Maiden!"

C: 但在祂的注视下，我得以汇聚被「毁灭」侵染的「记忆」，写下这永恒的一页。
E: But while THEY gazed at me, I was able to collect all the "memories" stained by the Destruction and write down this eternal page.

C: 为这个我们深爱的世界，写下不同以往的结局吧♪
E: And let's write an ending unlike any before for this world we so deeply love♪

C: 我们，是新世界的信使……
E: We are the messengers of the new world...

C: 无首的巨匠，若你不曾有机会左右命运。就把选择权交给我们吧？
E: Headless giant, if you never had a chance to be the master of your own destiny, why not give us that choice?

C: 有市无价，才是诈窃的艺术！找个机会，和我多讲讲你的故事吧。
E: Priceless treasures are the true art of thievery! When you get the chance, tell me more about your adventures.

C: 我有些担心列车组的各位…
E: I'm a bit worried about the Crew...

C: 可以想见，这局间的话题恐怕会越发…恣肆。别被我们难得的欢畅时光缠住了，{NICKNAME}。
E: I can imagine our conversations here will only get more... unrestrained. Don't let our rare moments of joy hold you back, {NICKNAME}.

C: 好好地睡了一觉，现在一定活力满满了吧，{NICKNAME}？
E: After such a good sleep, you must be bursting with energy now, right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 呵，那真要感谢你们捧场了。值此良机，我就将自己对世界真理的见解公之于众吧——
E: Heh, then I must thank you all for being such a captive audience. Now, with this golden opportunity, I shall reveal to the world my insights into the world's ultimate truth...

C: 再见啦，丹恒，三月~
E: See you later, Dan Heng, March...

C: 我不需要留下些什么吗？
E: Shouldn't I leave something behind?

C: 就连「岁月」的泰坦，都认错了你的面貌呀。
E: Even the Titan of Time mistook you for someone else.

C: 但我记得你说过，当神明落下眼泪，倒映在涟漪里的，一定是最为美丽的事物。
E: I remember what you once said. When a god sheds a tear, the thing reflected in the ripples must be the most beautiful thing in the world.

C: 有时候，只要换个角度看世界，惊喜就会诞生，对不对？
E: Sometimes, all it takes is a change in perspective to reveal something truly unexpected. Don't you agree?

C: 「同意。」
E: "Agreed."

C: 而现在，{RUBY_B#卡厄斯兰那}完美的容器{RUBY_E#}也与「翁法罗斯之身」完成融合。
E: Now, the {RUBY_B#Khaslana}perfect vessel{RUBY_E#} has already fused with "Amphoreus's Body."

C: 逗你的，那也太夸张啦。我想讲述的，只是一个很小很小的故事……
E: Just kidding. That would be too much. I just want to tell a teeny story...

C: 故乡的风吹拂着麦浪，还有秋千、风铃、海，和小妖精们跑调的清唱。
E: The wind from my hometown caressed the ears of wheat, and there were swings, windchimes, the sea, and the little fairies' off-tune a capella songs.

C: >>><color=#dbc291ff>PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> = 桃子</color>
E: >>> <color=#dbc291ff>PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak> = Peach</color>

C: >>>桃子。不哭。
E: >>> Peach. Don't cry.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>错误进程：解析中……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Process error: Analyzing...</color>

C: 不必为「我」感到遗憾，好朋友。
E: No need to feel sorry for "me," good friend.

C: 我还会讲故事。会讲故事才是「昔涟」。
E: Also, I can tell stories. Storytelling is what makes Cyrene... Cyrene.

C: 这个名字里有我，也有她…每一个她。
E: That name represents me and her. Every one of her.

C: 也许有办法和铁墓抗衡。
E: There may be a way to stand up against Irontomb.

C: 以上事实只待<color=#dbc291ff>「祂计算中的第四个时刻」</color>到来，在博识尊的见证中确立。
E: The facts above only await the arrival of the "<color=#dbc291ff>Fourth Instant THEY calculated</color>." Those words will be proved in the presence of Nous.

C: 叽里咕噜说什么呢？要是还有人想阻止我，搞快点，我赶时间。
E: What are you two going on about? If you want to stop me, be quick about it! I'm in a hurry!

C: 所以我才希望你能到场，好亲口告诉你——我不在乎！
E: That's why I wanted you to be in this meeting. Now, I can tell you: I don't care about all that!

C: 没错。此次银河联军的凯旋，为寰宇联合抵抗毁灭势力展现出宝贵的可能性。
E: Indeed. The Cosmic Alliance's victory this time has revealed something truly precious, a glimpse of what united civilizations can accomplish in the face of Destruction.

C: 不让你闲着。
E: So you won't get bored.

C: 温队长说你失踪了。
E: Mr. Wen said you were missing.

C: 你还年轻着呢，以后有的是机会。不是折腾这个世界，就是被这个世界折腾。
E: You are still young. There will be plenty of opportunities in the future. Either you run amok all over the world or it runs all over you.

C: 好吧，你能看到这段话，说明你听从了我的建议，具有百折不挠的宝贵品质。
E: Alright, if you can see this, it means you have followed my advice and that you possess the precious virtue of perseverance.

C: 有那么千分之一的可能，你是我何塞•拉萨罗在未来的卫道者、冉冉升起的精神接班人
E: There is a slim chance that maybe you are my future champion, my spiritual successor.

C: 其实我也只想看看乐子…
E: No, just eating popcorn on the sidelines...

C: …嗯…群聊的人数和内容…小号的自导自演？可这么做的目的到底是什么呢……
E: ...Hmm... Given the number of people in the group and its content... could this all stem from a few alt accounts? But why kick up a storm like this...

C: 嘶，还好有你在，这下够用了。稍等我去调试一下电梯。
E: Phew, thank goodness you're here. Give me a moment — I'll give the elevator a little shake-up.

C: 谣言制造者说他掌握的证据也许就是这个，{NICKNAME}，看来你得抓紧时间了。
E: That might be the whistleblower's so-called "evidence." Looks like you don't have much time to lose, {NICKNAME}.

C: 你。
E: You did.

C: …哼。其实我啊，也早就猜到了。
E: Hmph, I knew it from the very beginning.

C: 人总是要死的。
E: Life is but a path to death.

C: 没错！这口头禅在他的自言自语中，不出五句，必有一句。
E: That's right! He says this at least once out of every five sentences.

C: 付我多少钱？
E: How much will you pay me?

C: 也罢，你竟然还找到了录像带…看来是瞒不住了。没想到这么一个小小的实验，也会引来外人的兴趣。
E: Well, since you've found the video... I suppose I can't hide it anymore. Who would've thought this tiny experiment of mine could attract so much interest.

C: 她越来越像一个真正的人那样思考，意识到这世上曾有过一模一样的希拉，以至于开始怀疑自己的存在。
E: She started to think more and more like a real person. She even realized that another Sheila, who looked exactly like her, once existed in this world. That was when she began to doubt her own existence.

C: 我之所以制作原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>，只是为了弥补当初没有救下爱人的遗憾。
E: The reason I made prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> is that I wanted to make up for my regret of not saving my true love when I had the chance.

C: 不好！她的语言模块似乎出现了问题，各项机能指标正在急剧波动。
E: Oh no! There seems to be a problem with her language module. Her various functional indicators are fluctuating sharply.

C: 可我没用过终端机…
E: But I've never used a terminal...

C: 诶，你成天都胡思乱想些什么呢？我和你无冤无仇的，怎么会害你。
E: Jeez, is this the kind of nonsense you think about all day? I have nothing against you. Why would I set you up?

C: 噢噢，这个正常，终端机没坏，吓我一跳。
E: Oh, that's normal. The terminal is not broken. It's nothing to worry about.

C: 因为之前空间站被入侵过，本来终端机不止一台，联通的也远非现有规模的机组。
E: Because the station was invaded. Originally, we had more than one terminal, connecting units on a much larger scale.

C: 波少，波少他真的是太好了。此生无悔粉波少——
E: *sigh* Master Capote is so courageous... We're so lucky to be his fans...

C: 大哥是咱们防卫科出了名的人猛心细，如果你不理解他行为的目的，可能是你看问题的角度不够长远。
E: Brother Arlan is a fierce fighter with an eye for detail. If you don't understand his reason for doing things, maybe that's because you're too zoomed in.

C: 这双鞋是我买给你的，尺寸和款式我都记得很清楚。所以这是你留下的脚印，不会有问题。
E: I bought these shoes for you — I remember the size and the design. This is undoubtedly your footprint.

C: 这就是关键证据！
E: Your ID pass!

C: 你甚至将它的照片打印下来，时时刻刻警醒自己，不让自己松懈。
E: Y—You even printed out a photo of Peppy to constantly remind yourself to look after him! *sniff*

C: 这不是我拍的照片嘛！
E: Didn't I take that photo?

C: 大哥，我得提醒你一句，防卫科日常排险事务都满了，抽不出多余的人手。
E: I should remind you that everyone in the Security Department already has their hands full with routine danger elimination tasks. We simply don't have the people.

C: 但如果你们曾经听说过空间站通行的「阿德勒分级法」…那便是冠以家父与我之姓。
E: But if you've heard of the Adler's Tier System used station-wide, you would have known the surname my father and I bear.

C: 把事情办完，就快点回去。不要再多生事端，你们已经引起了防卫科的注意……
E: After completing your tasks, go back quickly. You already got the attention of the Security Department, so please stop trying to make more problems.

C: 这就是恐怖的「呜呜伯」？
E: So... That's the scary Wubbaboo?

C: 难为它们一片苦心。
E: They put a lot of effort into this.

C: 悲伤的…
E: Sad...

C: 不仅如此，在这座房间内，在它们所守卫的这座纪念碑之上，镌刻着「荣仓终」这个名字。刻痕很新，是不久前才手造的。
E: Not only that. The name Eikura Shuu is carved on the memorial stone they are guarding in this room. The carving looks new. It must have been built recently.

C: 而是为了——祭奠已经亡去的故人。
E: They were... mourning a late friend.

C: 呜呜伯们于纪念碑前齐聚的影像、超巨型呜呜伯一夫当关的影像、三两呜呜伯共享哀思的影像……
E: A picture of Wubbaboos gathering in front of the memorial, a picture of the giant Wubbaboo guarding the place by itself, and a picture of a couple of Wubbaboos sharing their grief...

C: 情谊永久封存，使之坚韧绵长…我想唯有做到这种程度，这些呜呜伯才会真正释怀。
E: Eternalizing their friendship to make it resilient and enduring... is what I think will truly leave Wubbaboos at peace.

C: 是星核猎手？
E: Stellaron Hunters?

C: 一滴汗。
E: A drop of sweat.

C: 这事听着就很离谱，对不对？我一直以为这是项，呃，酒吧科学，除了假面愚者，没人相信它真的存在。
E: Sounds unbelievable, doesn't it? I always thought it was fringe science, and that nobody other than the Masked Fools believed it really existed.

C: 现在看来，这个房间就是入侵的起点，我们继续追踪吧。
E: It looks like this room was the initial starting point of the invasion. Let's follow the trail.

C: 你还是别说话了…
E: Yeah, yeah...

C: （讲述事情经过）
E: (Explain what happened)

C: 既然如此，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，如果你不介意，请允许我为你们的调查献上绵薄之力。
E: As such, please allow me to offer my limited abilities to assist you with your investigation, {F#madam}{M#sir}.

C: 那写给宇宙的情书又是？
E: Then, what's the love letter for the universe?

C: 结论：那是模拟宇宙生成的全息记录。在这里，每一处变量都会被保存下来，巨细无遗，当然也包括外来者的足迹。
E: Conclusion: That is a holographic record that the Simulated Universe has created. In here, regardless of how large or small, all variables are saved, including outsider traces.

C: 银狼小姐？
E: ...Miss Silver Wolf?

C: 我可不会为了效率放弃进食的乐趣，当然，可能还需要一些小小的润滑。
E: I would never foresake the delights of the culinary world in the interests of efficiency. Now, it is possible that my joints may need a little lubricant every now and again...

C: 这家伙不好对付啊…听我说，借用下「等级」涂鸦的力量吧。
E: These guys are no pushovers... Let's borrow the power of the Level graffitis.

C: …怎么看都不可能啦！
E: ...Ugh, this is serious, y'know.

C: 听起来你似乎非常困扰。
E: You sound confused.

C: 原谅我扫兴的举动。二位，我刚与姬子商榷，现在的情况或许比想象中更加紧急。
E: Forgive the interruption, but I just spoke with Himeko. The situation is more urgent than we imagined.

C: 我是完整的三月七，拥有你全部忘却的记忆…
E: I'm the complete March 7th... with all of your forgotten memories.

C: 维利特可曾向各位提起？我们初见面时，他正被困于阴暗、巨大无比的「山洞」之中，难以脱身。
E: Did Velite mention that he was trapped in a dark and enormous cave when we first met?

C: 或许是我独行银河太久，难以理解这种感受究竟源自何处。但我知道身为骑士，我的职责便是守护蕴含「美」的种子，站在它身前，抵挡一切……
E: Perhaps my long solitude traversing the cosmos has made it difficult to discern where these sentiments originate. But as a knight, I realize my obligation is to safeguard the seed that embodies beauty, standing as a bulwark to defend it against all...

C: 反正我这命也是你捡的，哎唷，虽然我这力气帮不到什么，但多少也能打点下手……
E: If it weren't for you, I wouldn't be alive right now. I may not be as strong as you, but I'll do whatever I can.

C: 怎么了？{NICKNAME}，我正在「享受当下」。
E: {NICKNAME}, may I help you? I am currently enjoying the present moment.

C: 听说列车的大扫除要开始了。
E: I hear the Express's grand spring cleaning will start soon.

C: 准备好了，走吧。
E: Ready. Let's go.

C: 探索关联记忆【艾丝妲的烦恼】
E: Explore the related memory "Asta's troubles"

C: 不过，我倒是听说过类似的东西。听一位出外勤的同事说，仙舟联盟就有这种生命。
E: However, I've heard of such a species. A colleague who came back from a business trip said that the Xianzhou Alliance has lifeforms like that.

C: （艾丝妲好像提到了两个名字，分别是界种科和密卷科的科员……）
E: (Asta seems to have mentioned two names... two researchers from the Departments of Ecology and Insight...)

C: 唉，我跟你说这些做什么。这是我们自己该解决的事情，别在意。
E: *sigh* Never mind, I shouldn't be telling you this. It's something that we researchers need to resolve ourselves. Pretend I didn't say anything.

C: 最了解奇物的真的是你？
E: Are you really the one who knows the most about Curios?

C: 放心，我已经有头绪了。一会儿聊。
E: Don't worry, I think I figured something out. Catch you later.

C: 她说可能是呜呜伯。
E: She said it might be a Wubbaboo.

C: 今天先到此为止吧，你等我联系。
E: Let's call it a day. Wait for me, I'll be in touch.

C: 但终究在你的计算中，不是么？
E: But still behaving within your calculations, no?

C: 我听说阮•梅小姐爱吃糕点，就让科员们准备了湛蓝星的传统点心。她似乎每一种都很喜欢。
E: I heard Miss Ruan Mei likes snacks and pastries, so I asked the researchers to prepare some traditional desserts from the Blue. All of them seemed to tickle her fancy.

C: （为什么…说不出我想说的话？）
E: (Wh—Why can't I say what I want to say!?)

C: （……果然说不出任何和她有关的话了。）
E: (...So I really can't say anything about her.)

C: 你培育出了一个复制版相位灵火！
E: You have nurtured a copy of a Phase Flame!

C: 这，这得征求大人自己的意见……
E: Th—That depends on if the honorable Tart agrees to it...

C: 你也有自己的天才之处！
E: You are a genius in your own way!

C: 这些生命在各自的概念上走得十分遥远，甚至能引发通感的连锁反应…但这并不是我想要的。
E: These lifeforms are very advanced in their own concepts, and can even trigger chain reactions such as synesthesia... but that is not what I desire.

C: 选择以下服务：一，历史培育记录查询。二，无机生命陪伴谈话服务。
E: Select from the below services: 1. Check historical incubation records. 2. Inorganic lifeform companionship chat service.

C: 我没有除研究以外的生活。人们总认为这样的代价超乎想象，但对于我，它似乎可以接受。
E: I do not have a life outside of research. People always think this price is unimaginable, but it seems rather acceptable to me.

C: 哈哈，现在哪还有委托给你接啊。你要是再晚来几天，「正当权益会社」都要解散了。
E: Haha, you think I still have assignments for you at this age? If you were here a few days later, I think "The Rightful Rights Society" would have already been disbanded.

C: 那做公司的职工真辛苦啊。
E: Being an IPC employee must be really tough then.

C: 可她连买什么花都没说清楚，只说是送给一位年轻美丽的著名女演员。
E: But she didn't even state what kind of flowers she wanted. All she said was that they were for a famous and beautiful actress.

C: 当然啦，鉴于你为波月古海环境保护工作做出过卓越贡献，我为你向地衡司申请了一份特别奖励，应该很快就能通过审批。
E: Naturally, in recognition of your outstanding contributions to the environmental protection of the Lunarescent Depths, I have applied for you to receive a special reward from the Realm-Keeping Commission. The application should be approved soon.

C: 噢？你要回去啦？那好吧，以后想来海边玩的话我随时欢迎。
E: Oh? You're leaving? Alright, if you wish to come and visit me at the seaside, you are welcome any time.

C: 我是戍卫官，并非仲裁团。作为贝洛伯格的市民，你拥有辩护的权利，但那应该在筑城者的注视下进行，不是现在。
E: I'm a captain, not an adjudication panel. As a Belobog citizen, you have the right to defend yourself, but that can only take place under the scrutiny of the Architects, not now.

C: 但这几个人——
E: But these people are—

C: 应该继续死缠烂打。
E: We should keep pestering her.

C: 二位好，初次见面！我叫托帕，是星际和平公司的投资专家，这次是来雅利洛-Ⅵ谈特别业务的。
E: Glad to make your acquaintance — I'm Topaz, an investment expert from the Interastral Peace Corporation. I'm here on Jarilo-VI for a special business assignment.

C: 喔，没想到能在这里认识两位传奇人物，真走运！是吧，账账？
E: I never imagined I'd run into living legends here. Must be our lucky day, huh, Numby?

C: 他们的未来已经被买断了，我只能尽力让他们接受这个事实…用相对平和的态度。
E: Their future has already been purchased. All I can do is make them accept this fact, using a relatively peaceful approach.

C: …喔，原来如此。有关这个世界的传说越来越引人入胜了。
E: I see... The stories about this world are truly captivating.

C: 你的请假申请？
E: Your vacation time has been approved?

C: 除非……
E: Unless...

C: 从现在收集的结果来看…支持和公司签合同的声音好像要更大一些呢。
E: From what I've gathered, it seems like most people in the Overworld are leaning towards signing the IPC's contract.

C: 哎唷，这不是两位贝洛伯格的大救星吗？我之前就听说你们回来了，还合计你们啥时候能想起我这老头子呢！
E: None other than the saviors of Belobog! To what do I owe the pleasure? To be honest, I'm surprised you even remembered an old geezer like me!

C: 还以为又要和你当对手了。
E: I thought we might be facing off against each other for a moment.

C: {NICKNAME}，布洛妮娅小姐——很高兴能跟你们建立联系。希望以后我们还有合作的机会…当然啦，合作方式肯定要换一种！
E: {NICKNAME}, Miss Bronya, it's been great getting to know you both. I hope we can work together again in the future... only next time under better circumstances!

C: 但公司的手段从来都不止「交易」一种，这时就该我这类人出马了，对不？怎么样，千载难逢的机会，考虑一下吧，说不定能将功补过哦。
E: But as we both know, the IPC does more than just "business deals" — guess it's my time to shine. So, how about it? This is a rare opportunity. Consider it. You never know, you might even be able to make up for your blunder on Jarilo-VI.

C: （那个患者不让我把这件事告诉娜塔莎，该不该听他的呢？）
E: (That patient didn't want me to tell Natasha about this... Should I listen to him?)

C: 哦，对了，这里只收现金，概不赊账……
E: And we only take cash, this ain't a charity...

C: 据我所知，这下层区的病患之多，只靠那一家诊所早就容纳不下了吧？
E: The Underworld is full of sickness... What would happen if we left it all to that clinic to treat?

C: 我需要休息一下…
E: I need to take a rest...

C: 你说了很多不拉明娜的话。
E: You said a lot of things that are unlike the Lamina I know.

C: 空间站里谁不知道拉明娜是你波少最信任、最得力的秘书。她说的话，那一定不会假！
E: Everyone in the space station knows that Lamina is your most trusted secretary. What she said must be true!

C: 唉，没时间胡思乱想，这次一大堆的慰问信，还等着我自己写呢……
E: Alas, I don't have time to think about it. I still have a lot of consolation letters to write.

C: 太冒险了。
E: That was too risky.

C: 公开侮辱大守护者只会让你们罪加一等，放下武器投降吧！
E: Publicly insulting the supreme guardian only elevates the seriousness of your crimes. Throw down your arms and surrender!

C: 那什么…你倒是说句话啊？
E: Can you, like, say something?

C: 是啊。我之前经常陪同杰帕德来这里勘察地形——不过那是很久以前的事了。
E: Yeah. I used to come here with Gepard to survey the terrain — but that was a long time ago.

C: ——好，我已经全部忘光光了。哇，{NICKNAME}，你快看：巴拉金还在这幅肖像背后画了个<color=#dbc291ff>「顺时针旋转箭头」</color>的图案呢！
E: ...Okay, I've put all that behind me now. Wow, {NICKNAME}, look! Balakin has also painted a pattern of <color=#dbc291ff>a clockwise rotation arrow</color> on the back of this portrait!

C: …等等，不对，我忘了！你、你先把那张纸还给我…！
E: ... Wait, no, I forgot! Give me back that piece of paper now!

C: 总之，这个箭头图案应该就是进一步的线索——至于新的线索，大概是和这个<color=#dbc291ff>「拱门」</color>有关。我们就把它当做下一个目标吧。
E: So the arrow pattern must be a clue... and this <color=#dbc291ff>arch</color> is probably the next clue. Let's make this our next objective.

C: 原来桑博也是会干人事的啊…
E: Sampo being a gentleman... a rare occurrence...

C: …啊，你来啦。抱歉，刚才看得有些入神了。
E: ...Oh, there you are. Sorry, I got distracted watching the crowds.

C: 没关系，{NICKNAME}。我其实早有心理准备了…虽然从妈妈口中确认这个消息，我的心头还是会刺痛。
E: It's alright, {NICKNAME}. I was prepared... Although it still hurts to hear it from mom.

C: 当然，小姐，我不可能认错少爷的笔迹，您看过以后也会明白的。
E: Of course, Miss. I recognized his handwriting. You'll see what I mean when you read the letters yourself.

C: 「我寄宿在被遗弃的屋檐下，在风雪里不断实验、突破，再实验、再突破。我在颤抖，但不是因为寒冷，而是因为我正一步步接近成功……」
E: "I live in abandoned houses under broken roofs and continue my experiments. One step after another, I've made breakthroughs. I'm trembling, not because of the cold... but because I can feel I'm getting closer to the answer I seek..."

C: 瓦赫值得你为他做这么多吗？
E: Is Vache worth you doing all this for him?

C: 第二件事，我听说他们干活的风格非常粗犷，一点都不仔细，甚至有人看到他们搬着好几个大箱子临街交易，完全不把周围的矿工当外人。
E: Secondly, they're rash and careless in their work. They've been seen carrying large crates of illicit goods around the mines and selling them out in the open, without even trying to hide anything from the miners.

C: 斯薇塔给出的三条信息全部属实。
E: All three of the rumors Swetta mentioned are true.

C: 收入如何？
E: How's the compensation?

C: 幸会！
E: Nice to meet you, too.

C: 小声对机器人恐怕没用……
E: Whispering isn't going to stop a robot from detecting us...

C: …唔，数量还是不够呀，而且还差了不少。
E: *sigh* ...We still don't have anywhere near enough.

C: 我本该早些介入这起事件，但之前一直有其它要务缠身，没能及时响应——给你们徒增了很多工作量，实在抱歉。
E: I should have gotten involved earlier, but I was tied up with other responsibilities. My apologies for letting you take on the investigation without proper support.

C: 给，拿着！「寒腿叔叔」向来说话算话，很高兴能跟你做成这次生意！
E: Here, here, take it! Mr. Cold Feet always keeps his word. It's been a pleasure doing business with you!

C: 桑博从房间里消失了。脚步声、开窗声、开门声——你一概没有听见。
E: Sampo has vanished. No sound of hurried footsteps, no sound of a window or door opening...

C: 呵呵，没问题。上层区的仁爱医院在我这里派驻了许多助手，暂时把诊所交给他们就能放心了。
E: Hehe, it's fine. Charice Hospital sent us a lot of staff from the Overworld to help out, so the clinic's in good hands.

C: 你来了，{NICKNAME}。我们可以开始了吗？
E: And now you're back, {NICKNAME}. Can we begin the interview now?

C: 赫罗瓦…难道是仁爱医院以前那位院长吗？
E: Harrower... Wasn't that the surname of the old director at Charice Hospital?

C: 但自从可可利亚上任之后，战况愈演愈烈，野战医院的压力也渐渐增大。但那时的我已经回到了下层区……
E: But after Madame Cocolia took office, the fighting intensified and field hospitals were under more stress. But by that time, I'd already returned to the Underworld...

C: 佩拉小姐被其他事情缠住了……
E: She has other matters to attend to...

C: 不对不对，荣誉队员克拉拉！哪怕是在上层区，也要好好叫我漆黑的虎克大人才行啊！
E: Wait a minute, Clara! Even though we are in the Overworld, you should still address me properly as Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 想办法拿回主动权吧…
E: You should try to take back control of the interview...

C: 如果她确实没收到申请表的话，我再重新写一份便是。
E: If she doesn't have my application form, I'll just fill in a new one.

C: 怎么样，你觉得有哪里可以再调整调整吗？
E: Which part of the resume do you think can be improved?

C: 佩拉竟然也有如此阴沉的一面……
E: I'm surprised to see Pela get this serious...

C: 怎么想的就怎么说！
E: Just say whatever is on your mind!

C: 其实是{NICKNAME}给我出的主意——{F#她}{M#他}觉得这样更能显示自己的个性……
E: In fact, it's {NICKNAME}'s idea. {F#She}{M#He} thinks it's a good way to express my personality...

C: 行，下一问吧。
E: Okay. Next one, please.

C: 你逃不掉咯，希儿！
E: No way for you to escape now, Seele!

C: 首先是姓名…「希儿•没有姓」？贝洛伯格还有这种姓氏吗？
E: First of all, the name is "Seele No-Last-Name"? Is "No-Last-Name" an actual family name in Belobog?

C: 什么啊，这明显是{NICKNAME}的恶作剧，你干嘛道歉！
E: This is clearly a prank pulled by {NICKNAME}! What are you even apologizing for?

C: 连你也这样啊。嗐，这事办得可真是……
E: Even you are doing this to me. Tsk, looks like I'm gonna be stuck here...

C: 我、我们、得、得救啦？
E: Are we s—saved?

C: 哔嘟…哔嘟…不用谢。「星际和平家电」，你最可靠的伙伴。
E: Beep, beep, beep... It was nothing. Interastral Peace Appliances, your most trustworthy companion.

C: 那倒也不至于…不过这小玩意确实挺方便的。好了，快回去修矿车吧。
E: Well, not that long... But that little machine definitely made it a lot easier. Alright, let's go back and fix the mine cart.

C: 刚才的标签，对应的应该就是这个箱子！等一下——虎克好像闻到了什么味道！
E: The label must've been on this box! Wait a minute... What's that smell?

C: 嘁…你们给我等着！撤，我们先撤！
E: Tsk... Just you wait! Let's go for now!

C: 费斯曼大叔收养了虎克？
E: You adopted Hook?

C: 那个时候避难所里没有别人。
E: No one else was at the shelter during that time.

C: 不对？怎么不对，你倒是说说看啊！
E: Wrong? Why? Explain yourself!

C: 事先说好，我和这货可不是一伙的啊，你别误会——虎克小妹妹，你别拿那玩意指着我啊，怪吓人的！
E: I gotta make this clear: I have nothing to do with this fella! You have to trust me— Miss Hook, please don't point that thing at me, it's scary!

C: 探测器？哦…是我之前弄丢的那件吗？
E: Vein detector? The one I lost?

C: 嘿，东西你找到了？来来来，先给我，然后等我慢慢给你解释……
E: Hey, you found something? Come on, just hand it over and then I'll explain.

C: 别急，你看——我们{M#英俊潇洒}{F#美丽动人}的{NICKNAME}这不就给你送来了吗？
E: Relax! See— our {M#handsome}{F#beautiful} {NICKNAME} has brought this for you, hasn't {M#he}{F#she}?

C: 矿区后方已经净空稳固，足够支援前线作战了…铁卫和「地火」组成的临时战斗序列正在缓慢推进、搜救伤员。
E: The back of the mine has been secured, which gives us a forward base to send in supplies. The Silvermane-Wildfire combined regiment is conducting rescue missions as they advance.

C: 杰帕德，快看！前方似乎有矿民的临时阵地！
E: Gepard, look! The miners have put up a makeshift defensive line!

C: 他们有危险，我们快上！
E: They're in danger, let's go!

C: 但眼前这家伙看到我们后却无动于衷…我担心这其中有诈。
E: But this one doesn't seem concerned about us... This could be a trap.

C: 你看，这里还贴着纸条呢！「佩妮娅•谢尔盖耶夫娜」……
E: See, there's a piece of paper here! It says "Penya Sergeyevna"...

C: 玲宝～我来啦。
E: Lynxy~ I'm here!

C: 但四周都是山崖，如果遇到落石或者塌方就危险了。而且这里视野也不是很好……
E: But there are cliffs all around. We'll be in trouble if there's a landslide or rockfall. Also, there isn't much of a view...

C: 元件没找到，但是找到了这个…不知道能不能吃就是了。
E: I didn't find any components, but I got this... I don't know if we can still eat it...

C: …有了！
E: There!

C: 我也只是偶然看到过几次，但刚想认真拍个照的时候，就发现它已经消失不见了。
E: I've only chanced upon it a few times myself, but whenever I tried to take a photo of it, it had already run away.

C: 其实…没有那个炉具也能生火做饭的。
E: We... don't really need that stove to cook.

C: 总之，我们先清点下食材吧。
E: Anyways, let's take a look at what ingredients we have.

C: （根据经验，每种食材都有自己独特的功效，组合在一起更会有意想不到的功效出现……）
E: (Every ingredient has its own effect, and combining them will create unexpected results...)

C: 我明明已经长大了…已经有足够的能力去做自己想做的事了……
E: I'm already a grown-up... I have the capacity to do what I want to do...

C: 你们不会对她生气吧？
E: You're not gonna get angry at her, right?

C: 你不用把我当新手，我很熟悉裂界里的怪物。准备好了就动手吧！
E: Don't treat me like a new recruit. I'm all too familiar with the monsters of the Fragmentum. Let's get ready to fight!

C: 这段时间里，上下层区每个到了年纪的孩子都会接受测试，最终只有一个拥有「资格」的孩子会被选中。
E: During that time, all children of the appropriate age in both the Overworld and the Underworld will be tested. In the end, only one child deemed as "worthy" will be chosen.

C: （好像我来得不是时候，还是让那两个人独处一会儿吧……）
E: (I should let those two be alone for a bit...)

C: 希儿姐姐，这批药原来是娜塔莎姐姐的吗？那…可以给我一些吗？流浪者们也伤得很重。
E: Miss Seele, did this medicine belong to Miss Natasha? Then... can you give me some? The vagrants' injuries are quite serious.

C: 虎克给你说了这么多，你就这么点儿感想吗？还不如说给盐烧洞螈听呢。
E: After that epic story, that's all you have to say? Ugh... I would've been better off telling a stone-grilled olm instead.

C: 快，快来帮帮我！东西太高了，我够不着！
E: Quick, help! I can't reach it, it's too high!

C: 求求你了，荣誉队员！再帮我找一次吧！就这一次！
E: Honorary member, please! Please help me look for it! Just one more time!

C: 要是被她知道虎克又闯进了不该来的地方…呜，又要挨骂了……
E: If she finds out I went somewhere I shouldn't have gone... *whimper* Hook will get lectured all over again...

C: 都快忘了还有这俩人了。
E: I'd nearly forgotten about those two.

C: 走之前忘了跟他们打招呼了…
E: I forgot to say anything to them before I left...

C: 嘿！他们总算回来啦。
E: Hey, they're finally back!

C: …我说各位，不懂就别强行装懂啊，又没人会笑话你们！
E: ...Uh, y'know friends, if you don't know the answer, you don't have to pretend you do. No one's gonna laugh at you.

C: 战、战斗模组？是不是哪里出了问题……
E: Combat module? This thing's faulty, right...?

C: 不妙……
E: Not encouraging...

C: 桑博！果然是你这家伙——
E: Sampo! I knew you'd be involved somehow...

C: 趁现在，最后一击！
E: Now! One last assault!

C: 从我登上这个位置的那一刻起，那个声音…他们的声音就寄宿在我的脑海里，挥之不去。
E: From the moment I took up this mantle, that voice... their voice — has made its home in my mind. I cannot shake them.

C: 但为了城市的安定，他们选择隐藏真相。而试图摧毁星核的秘密研究也以失败告终。
E: But in order to maintain the peace, they decided to hide the truth. Secret research detailing a method for destroying a Stellaron ended in failure.

C: {NICKNAME}，谢谢你们，是你们的努力让下层区重新看到了希望。现在…现在我们只能祈祷，但愿这丝希望能通向一线生机。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. What you've done has brought new hope to the Underworld. Now we have to wait and see... But maybe this will lead to a new lease on life.

C: 何以见得？
E: You sure about that?

C: 虎克听老巫婆说过，有些人确实不擅长当着别人的面说话。干脆用写的吧！
E: According to the old witch, some people aren't good at talking in front of other people. Why not ask him to write his thoughts down?

C: 算了，咱们还装什么好人，看来根本没这个必要…现在就把钱拿出来！
E: Alright, enough mister nice guy... Give us the money, now!

C: 打劫？见者有份啊！
E: Robbing a child. New low?

C: 六百冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>600</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

C: 不甘心吗？
E: Don't wanna accept defeat, huh?

C: 等下我们一起去找老巫婆！一定要让她把探针包装成最好的礼物，送给老爹！
E: Let's go see the old witch later! I'll ask her to wrap this probe up as a beautiful gift for daddy!

C: 我们正在说有关生日聚会的事，你也想知道吗？
E: We were talking about the birthday party. You wanna hear about it too?

C: 我、我果然是个不称职的老爹，居然连这么重要的事都不知道……
E: I truly am an incompetent father. I had no idea...

C: 不过，我倒是有安排一个小学徒去参加拍卖，遗憾失手了。
E: I did arrange for a young apprentice to attend the auction, but he lost out in the bidding.

C: 这简直就像是…什么人胡乱组装出来的。小家伙的发明者…可能根本没考虑过系统能不能正常运行——
E: It really seems like something that was thrown together rather quickly. Its creator most likely didn't consider whether the system would function properly or not...

C: 导航已经完成，感谢您对托比的信任。
E: Your trip has concluded. I appreciate you putting your trust in Toby.

C: 呼…呼…刚才真是…好险呀。幸好史瓦罗先生和{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}反应快……
E: Phew... that was close. Fortunately, Mr. Svarog and {NICKNAME} acted fast...

C: 帕斯卡？这是它的名字吗？
E: Pascal? Is that his name?

C: 但该个体仍然存在故障可能，概率约为<unbreak>44.7%</unbreak>。重复建议：将机械单元帕斯卡格式化后纳入基地网络统一管理。
E: However, the robot still has a <unbreak>44.7%</unbreak> chance of malfunctioning. It's recommended that Pascal's data be formatted and integrated into the base network.

C: 还有办法继续排除错误选项吗？
E: Is it possible to narrow down the search results further?

C: 克拉拉在想…是不是因为它们共享了来自帕斯卡的情感？
E: I was wondering... is it because they share Pascal's emotions?

C: 追随克里珀的筑城者也信地狱？
E: The Architects follow Qlipoth. Do they believe in hell?

C: 就算你不相信这些外来的朋友，也该相信我——呃，可能姐姐我确实把你的信任都消磨光了——那就至少，相信布洛妮娅吧。
E: Even if you don't believe my outsider friends, you should believe me... Ugh, maybe I've wasted your trust... in which case, believe Bronya.

C: 区别在于，我们在为了自己的自由抗争，而他们…他们只是在执行命令。
E: The difference is we're making a stand for freedom... while they're just carrying out orders.

C: 一旦你们突破了前线…我们就再帮不上什么忙了。北方的裂界里究竟是怎样的景象，只能由各位自己一探究竟。
E: Once you've broken through the front line... there's nothing more we can do for you. You'll have to find out for yourselves what lies within the northern Fragmentum.

C: 杰帕德是叫我不要为难「外来者」…但这铁卫禁区可不是让你们四处闲晃的地方啊。
E: Gepard did tell me not to make things difficult for the "outsider"... but the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone isn't just somewhere I can let you hang around.

C: 那你和这次事件是脱不了干系了——坦白从宽、抗拒从严，老实交代吧！
E: Then this time you can't just say it's none of your business... Be honest and tell me the truth!

C: 我知道你很清醒，但我需要你尝试一下，看看能否复现梦里的「声音」。
E: I know you're wide awake right now, but I need you to try. See if you can recall the "voice" you heard.

C: 我不会重蹈她们的覆辙，走在绝路上顾影自怜。如果坚持注定徒劳，那就选择崭新的开始。
E: I shall not follow the guardians' misguided steps down that blind alley of narcissism. If persistence is futile, then one must choose a new beginning.

C: 能在雪原里安息…也挺好的。
E: Resting forever in the Snow Plains... that wouldn't be so bad.

C: 布洛妮娅……
E: Bronya...

C: （她似乎没有主动进攻的欲望。也许可以避免一场恶战？）
E: (She doesn't seem to have any desire whatsoever to attack. Perhaps I can avoid a tough fight?)

C: 因为疑惑…对我死因的疑惑。
E: I'm confused... confused about the cause of my death.

C: 我感觉还可以再来一次，多测试几次，我们才能知道效果如何嘛。
E: I think we can try again. The more we try, the better we can see how effective this is.

C: 这就是我的星槎，哎哟喂，你不会是嫉妒我了吧，我就喜欢这样的眼神。
E: Of course it's mine. You're not jealous, are you?

C: 受害人那边…我想起来了，梅姐是没有联系方式对吗？那就麻烦你联系一下她的雇主。
E: As for the victim... We don't have Mei's contact information, right? Please get in touch with her employer.

C: 这边的事情就先交给我吧。
E: Leave this matter to me.

C: 都怪俺嘴笨，俺不是这个意思…芦慧姑娘莫生气。
E: All my stupid words... That's not what I meant... Please don't be mad, Ms. Luhui.

C: 对了，我之前问过您两次，原本希望能够得到您的建议…在雇佣关系里，我到底应该将梅姐看作是一位按时计薪的家政妇，还是一位陪伴许久的家人？
E: By the way, I asked you twice before and was hoping for your advice. In an employer-employee relationship, should I think of Mei as an hourly paid housemaid, or as a family member who has been there with me for a long time?

C: …我只是有些恍惚。
E: ...I'm just a bit confused.

C: 您是我生活里的陌生人，我能很快察觉到您的善意，我也想积极回应您。
E: Even though you are a complete stranger to me, I can already feel how kind you are. And I really want to do my best to return the favor.

C: 您另请高明吧。
E: Please go find someone else.

C: 可是，她就是喜欢诗人呀…算了，我还是先瞧瞧我的诗仙机巧吧……
E: But she only likes poets... Forget it. I'd better take a look at my poet ingenium first...

C: 想来那个诗人也是个薄幸渣男…不过也好，这不，我就有机会了？
E: Feels like that poet is not that great a lover after all. But that's alright, because otherwise I wouldn't be getting this chance, would I?

C: 不行呱！诗是不能将就的。
E: No way, croak! Poetry shan't ever just "make do."

C: 灵感玉兆已经收集完成了。
E: We've collected all the Inspo Jade Abaci.

C: …就算是孤屿在这里，也只能写成这样了。
E: ...Even if Guyu were here, the poem would still be written this way.

C: 对小聪来说，现在他又第一次认识了我，萌生了新的感情…但对我来说，这已经是第四次和他重逢了。
E: For Cong, it's his first time meeting me, and the feelings he has for me are new. But for me, this has been my fourth reunion with him.

C: 我想，这么可笑的情感轮回该结束了。
E: I think it's time to end this absurd love cycle.

C: 黛青小姐姐，嘿嘿，我的黛青小姐姐～
E: Ms. Daiqing, heheh, my Ms. Daiqing~

C: 狐人和化外民，唔…应该说，长生种和短生种之间的爱情和友情都很难有好的结果。
E: Foxians and Outworlders, hmm... Or rather, between long-life and short-life species, rarely can either romance or friendship work out well for either party.

C: 临时寄件。
E: Deliver a parcel now.

C: 我们是来找人的。
E: We're here to meet someone.

C: 没错，我们只是和网友线下见面而已，不是什么亏心事，哈哈哈。
E: That's right, we're just meeting someone we know online here. It's not something to feel guilty about, haha haha...

C: 正面回答我们的问题！
E: Answer the question!

C: 记住喽，是用我的钱，所以别客气。
E: Remember, it's on my dime, so don't be coy about it.

C: （看了看他，什么也不说）
E: (You glance at him without making a comment.)

C: 十王司勾摄人犯，旁人不得干扰。
E: The Ten Lords are responsible for trying criminals, and bystanders cannot interfere.

C: 总感觉没有这么简单。
E: I have a feeling this is more complicated than it sounds...

C: 我什么都不知道，别问我。
E: You came to the wrong person — I don't know anything.

C: 那边没有你要找的人。
E: You won't find the person you're looking for there.

C: 「药王慈怀，建木生发……」
E: "Mercy of Sanctus Medicus, the Arbor's new growth..."

C: 那些人都是崇拜魔阴身还有「寿瘟祸祖」的狂热信徒？可半夏不是这样的人。她…她还让我来治疗魔阴身呢。
E: Aren't they those crazy followers that worship the mara-struck and the Plagues Author? But Banxia's nothing like them... She... wanted me to treat the mara-struck.

C: 我还有一些问题想要问你…
E: I still have some questions for you...

C: …悼念愚行。
E: ...Mourning for folly.

C: {NICKNAME}，我感到很满足。
E: {NICKNAME}, I feel happy.

C: 人呢，怎么还不动手啊！
E: Where is everyone? Seize them!

C: 多谢搭救，丹恒大人。
E: Thank you for rescuing me, Master Dan Heng.

C: 浣溪，就劳你在这儿等一会儿。我去去就回，有他们俩保护我，放心吧。
E: Huanxi, please wait here for me. I'll come back as soon as I can. I've got these two to look after me — don't worry.

C: 我想，丹枫应该没有告诉他们有关「化龙妙法」的秘密吧……
E: I guess Dan Feng probably never told them the secret of the Transmutation Arcanum...

C: 我这里现在随时可以调用资料。您准备好了吗？
E: I can bring up the data anytime from here. Are you ready?

C: 辛苦你啦！我们会耐心等待的。
E: Thanks so much! We'll be waiting — patiently.

C: 看侦探小说看傻了？
E: That novel's gone to your head...

C: 嗯嗯，我以后一定不会擅离职守了。
E: Mm-hmm, I won't be so quick to leave my post in the future.

C: 他肚子不舒服？
E: Diarrhea?

C: 他耳朵怎么这么灵！
E: How does he always hear us!?

C: 杨叔你也玩得很开心啊…
E: You're clearly enjoying this, Mr. Yang...

C: 他说得好有道理…
E: He has a point...

C: （我印象里的「他」，应该是从来不会求人的。）
E: (Doesn't sound like any of the "Luochas" I came across...)

C: 此人救了我们一命。
E: He saved our life.

C: 我寻思我也没做什么…
E: I didn't really do anything...

C: 说来可笑。丰饶联军也好，活化的星球也罢，什么样的绝境我都曾目睹过，本以为自己是个不知害怕为何物的人。
E: Hehe, it's funny, isn't it? I've seen every disaster imaginable, from the Abundance Axis to a living planet. I thought I'd forgotten what fear was.

C: 战友？
E: Comrade?

C: 是啊，每次吵完架，我们都会跑出去散心。只不过，我去星槎海的一边，她去星槎海的另一边…这样可以避免吵完架后立刻见面。
E: Well, we do both like to take a walk after a fight. The only difference is that I come to this side of Starskiff Haven, and she heads to the other... That way we don't bump into each other.

C: 嗯…问点别的吧，问点我能回答的。
E: Yes... Just ask some other questions. Ones I can answer.

C: 驭空不会知道的。
E: Yukong won't know.

C: 你是天舶司保安？
E: So much for Sky-Faring Commission security.

C: 我曾和你一样，对天空怀有憧憬。我知道那是什么感受…在宇宙中航行，四周皆是辽阔的空无，远方尽是难以想象的奇观。
E: Just like you, I once longed for the sky. I know what it feels like... to fly through infinite space, to be surrounded by the vast expanse of nothingness, with unimaginable splendors looming in the distance.

C: 因为那是我和采翼的最后一次闲谈。
E: It was the last time I spoke to Caiyi.

C: 我粗暴地干涉了你人生的选择。对不起，这是我身为母亲的失职。
E: I brazenly interfered with your choices. I am sorry. That is my failure as a mother.

C: 只有她自己知道真相是什么。
E: Only she knew the truth.

C: （就在这附近了……）
E: (She should be around here somewhere...)

C: 我不会留下。
E: No, I'm leaving.

C: 附近有些游荡的怪物，留着会很麻烦。去解决它们吧，你一定会获胜。
E: There are wandering monsters nearby — they'll spell trouble if we let them hang around. Go take care of them — your victory is certain.

C: 「真心话游戏」继续，轮到你了，{NICKNAME}。
E: The game continues. Your turn, {NICKNAME}.

C: （只有两个问题，其中一个卡芙卡会如实回答，另一个则会说谎；可是，我不知道她会选择在哪个问题上说谎…）
E: (So I get two questions, only one of which Kafka will answer truthfully... but I won't know which answer is which...)

C: 他们一起做了件很坏、非常坏的事情，招致了极其恐怖的结果。
E: Together, they did something bad — something terrible. It led to horrific consequences.

C: 据说他们曾经是很好的朋友——不对，损友。阿刃忘了很多事情，这些他也记不太清楚了。
E: Apparently, they used to be good friends... Well, good friends who were bad for each other. Bladie forgot nearly everything, so he doesn't remember it well.

C: 不过，就跟对付魔阴身一样，只要让你们没法动弹就好了。
E: ...But I can deal with you like the mara-struck — I just need to immobilize you.

C: 谢谢你们英雄救美啦～
E: Thanks for saving beauty from the beast~

C: 以她的能耐，本无人能将其捉拿归案。但不知为何，她竟与某位伪装成行商的嫌犯一同来到罗浮，并宣称要自首伏罪……
E: With her powers, you'd think there would be no one capable of bringing her in. For some reason, she arrived on the Luofu with a suspect disguised as a traveling merchant and said she wanted to turn herself in...

C: 但不知为何，耳畔却传来一阵声音，在呼啸的风声中惊慌失形。
E: Yet, there's a voice, inexplicably echoing in your ears, becoming agitated in the midst of the howling wind.

C: 为你打造这杆「击云」枪的人曾这么对你说，还记得吗？
E: Those are the words of the one who made Cloud-Piercer for you. Do you remember?

C: 你瞧，星槎已经长成了。
E: See? The starskiff is complete.

C: 幽囚狱中关押的麻烦太多，不宜再添一桩。安全起见，请你在这受审吧。
E: Holding you in The Shackling Prison would be more trouble than it's worth. For security purposes, we will be performing your trial here.

C: 将军操心犯难的事儿太多了，身为侍卫，来这儿当然是要为将军分忧的……
E: The general already has a lot on his plate. As his retainer, it's my duty to share the burden...

C: 你？可我没接到景元将军的饬令……
E: Is that so? I didn't receive any orders from the general.

C: 看来得往码头走一遭了。
E: Guess it's back to the docks again.

C: 但对方似乎也起了疑心…卧底失联了。我疑心他是被人认了出来……
E: Unfortunately, it seems suspicions were aroused... We lost contact with the agent — I suspect he was discovered...

C: 别抄了！别抄了！你还抄上瘾了是吧！我来替你抄完吧，你来帮我望风！
E: Stop writing — you wanna fall under their spell? I'll finish it for you — go keep a lookout!

C: 趁着那些看守你们的莳者不注意，这位云骑奋笔疾书，很快就将经文抄好了。
E: The Cloud Knight swiftly scribbles away and finishes copying the sacred text while the disciples watching over you aren't looking.

C: 别啊…你下手轻点…唉，算了，这本来也是我自己捅的篓子，生死由命吧。你尽量别打死我啊！
E: Just... Ugh, whatever, I got myself into this — let fate decide. Just try and hold back a little, okay!?

C: 可以了。
E: Let's do it.

C: 唉，只是没想到…执信竟然走上了那条邪路……
E: *sigh* ...I never imagined that Zhixin would choose the path of evil.

C: （去神策府和青镞说说这件事吧…也不知道这次任务算是成功还是失败。）
E: (I should go to the Seat of Divine Foresight and tell Qingzu... I don't know if this mission was a success or a failure.)

C: 帝弓司命当真正义吗？
E: Is the Reignbow Arbiter truly just?

C: 药王慈怀，赐我刀枪不入之躯、千军难敌之勇、万夫莫开之力！
E: O, mercy of Sanctus Medicus. Grant me a body impervious to steel, the courage of a thousand armies, a strength that ten thousand foes cannot suppress!

C: 这是你的房间？房间中间的那块…冰？也是你房间原本就有的摆设吗？
E: This is your room? That block of ice in the centre... has it always been there?

C: 这就是你的起点。自那开始，你展开了自己仅此一次的人生，开始经历那些独一无二的冒险。
E: There it is — your origin. Your life unfolds from this point on, full of unique experiences and adventure.

C: 唉…我就知道，事情哪有这么容易。
E: *sigh* I knew it. Things are never simple are they...

C: 地底下那么大一块，我只是带走一小颗唉。
E: They've got loads of it down there. I just chipped off a tiny piece.

C: 吓我一跳…你怎么突然醒了？
E: Ah!!! You scared me... Why'd you wake up so suddenly?

C: 来吧太卜，本小姐带你足不出户见识见识贝洛伯格的风景。
E: Come on, Master Diviner — I'll give you a whirlwind tour of Belobog.

C: 桑博宾馆曾名为歌德宾馆。后来老歌德年老体衰，桑博利用巧取豪夺的方式霸占了这里，并更名为桑博宾馆。
E: The Sampo Hotel used to be called the Goethe Hotel. After Old Goethe retired, Sampo managed to trick his way into acquiring this place, and renamed it after himself.

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 你没事吧？
E: Are you okay?

C: 嘿嘿，因为本姑娘就是实诚。
E: Hee-hee, just telling it like I see it.

C: 我也认为这段美梦相当有趣。您在其中收获了快乐，黑天鹅女士也一定会感到欣慰吧。
E: I also found this dream suitably fascinating. You've gained joy from it. And Miss Black Swan surely also feels gratified, yes?

C: 既然来都来了，我请你去吃点好吃的吧。
E: Since you're here, let me treat you to some tasty food.

C: 夕葵小姐，说是「归还」，不如说「送回」更恰当。虽然它属于仙舟，但咱们毕竟千里迢迢，费了不少周折才把礼物送到。
E: Miss Xikui, the word "gift" is perhaps more fitting than "return." While it did once belong to the Xianzhou, we faced many tribulations to be able to deliver it here, so it should be considered a gift.

C: 看来，你遇到过不少只把话说一半的人。
E: It seems like you've met a lot of people who don't tell you the whole story.

C: …没错。
E: ...That's true.

C: 他们已经死绝了，孩子。他们已经被你们尽数铲除了……
E: They won't, my child. You've wiped out the last of them...

C: 在赠剑仪式上，我得知自己会被赠给最好的剑士重新陷阵杀敌时，我感到了痛苦。
E: During the sword-gifting ceremony, I felt anguish when I learned that I would be handed over to the most skilled swordmaster and once again become a tool for killing.

C: 这千百年的时光，在一瞬之间成为了我理所当然的回忆。
E: These thousands of years have naturally turned into memories of mine.

C: 世界的命运掌握在他们自己手中。
E: The destiny of this world rests in their own hands.

C: 请允许我真诚称赞你，这位女士，你的美丽如同纯真洁白的鸢尾花。
E: Please allow me to offer a sincere compliment, my fair lady. Your beauty is as pure as a snow-white iris.

C: 啊，云璃，来了啊。你的消息倒是灵通…罢了，眼下这般场合，你可千万记得不可无礼。
E: Oh, you're here, Yunli. Didn't expect you to be so well-informed... Well, now that you're here, don't forget your manners.

C: 刚听着还像个古代背景的故事，怎么突然冒出个人脸识别系统？
E: That sounded like a story from ancient times... and why did the facial recognition system suddenly go out?

C: 哦！乐子神在上！没想到黑天鹅警探这么快就回来了！怎么样？你找到凶手了吗？
E: Oh, for The Laughter! Didn't think I'd be seeing Detective Black Swan so soon! What's that? You've found out who the killer is?

C: 我看你熟门熟路的，平时偷闲，没少从这扇边门走吧。
E: You seem familiar — is this where you come to avoid doing work?

C: 真不好意思啊，让你看见我这么狼狈的模样。
E: I'm sorry you have to see me in such a sorry state.

C: 至于第三个事实，恐怕仙舟联盟做梦也想不到…哈哈。第三个事实是：如果星核猎手不是这一切的始作俑者，那么我和阿刃出现在这里是为什么呢？
E: As for number three, even in their wildest dreams, the Xianzhou Alliance could never have guessed it, haha... If the Stellaron Hunters aren't the cause of all this, then why are Bladie and I even here?

C: 无需费心寻找了，那是「星核」。叛徒将它投入了建木所在的洞天，使建木重新生长——瞧，「药王秘传」终于忍不住动手了。
E: It's the Stellaron. No need to search high and low — the traitors have planted it in the Ambrosial Arbor's delve, thereby causing the tree to grow once again. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus couldn't hold off any longer.

C: 有感而发，有感而发。
E: Just speaking from the heart, that's all.

C: 我也纳闷，工造司只研究机巧匠艺，和无土栽培、快壮高之类的种植技术不搭边啊。这玩意是哪来的？
E: I don't get it, the Artisanship Commission focuses on the mechanical — we've got nothing to do with hydroponics or accelerated growth... Where did that thing come from?

C: 你们几个就没架住他？
E: Did none of you try to stop him?

C: 千真万确，受将军委托而来。
E: <unbreak>100%</unbreak>. The general sent us.

C: 大门紧闭，一如铸成它的金铁，满是拒人千里之外的冷漠。
E: The gate is closed. Just like the metals from which it was forged, it emanates a cold indifference.

C: 仔细一看，根须都从地底下钻出来了呀。恩公，咱们少不得要当一回免费的园丁啦。
E: *sigh* Look, the roots are coming up through the ground. I'm afraid we've got some gardening work to do.

C: 「浓云金蟾」！「灯昼龙鱼」！…你们怎么了！快快站起来啊！老夫像对待亲生骨肉一样教你养你……
E: Golden Cloud Toad! Illumination Dragonfish! ...Are you alright? Wake up! I raised you like my own flesh and blood...

C: 咱们工造司有和造化同功之力。哼哼，区区木精，不在话下！来，给你们瞧个大宝贝。
E: The Commission is more than a match for mother nature. Hmph! O piteous tree, who think thyself so strong, your match and more in strength to meet ere long...

C: 这到底……是什么怪物啊？
E: ...Wh—What kind of monster is this?

C: 未必。玄鹿看似能在转眼间愈合伤口，真相未必如此，也许它是从某个地方汲取补给……
E: I wonder... The Ebon Deer seems to heal itself instantly, but perhaps it's drawing that power from elsewhere...

C: （不如去不夜侯那边听西衍先生来段评书吧。这似乎是个消磨时间的好办法。）
E: (Might as well listen to Mr. Xiyan's analytical performance at the Sleepless Earl. This seems to be a good way to kill some time.)

C: 这太客气了。
E: You're being too polite.

C: 让开点，别在这儿耽误哥儿几个的正事儿！
E: Yeah, get lost! Stop meddling in our business!

C: 你知道去哪儿见她？
E: Do you know where you might find her?

C: 你失控的样子和那些堕入魔阴身的同胞…一模一样。
E: It looked like you'd lost control, as if you'd been stricken with mara...

C: 虽说早就料到丹鼎司内有内鬼，但没想到是如此身居高位者……
E: I had a suspicion that there might be a spy in the Alchemy Commission, but I never expected it to be someone so high up in the organization...

C: 为什么？你的体质与常人不同吗？
E: Why is that? Is your constitution somehow different from the average person?

C: 就算这是真的。以短生种的躯壳寄宿星核，恐怕只是凶多吉少。看来你注定与长生无缘。
E: Even if what you say is true, to host a Stellaron as a short-life species would only spell an early demise. It looks like you are not fated to live a long life.

C: （这是…骨头？更准确地说，应该是骨头渣子…嚼得真碎啊。不知道凶手究竟是什么猛兽。不管是什么，这玩意儿牙口肯定不错。）
E: (Is this... a bone? To be more precise, it's the scraps of a bone... It's been chewed to such fine pieces. Whatever beast is the culprit, I'm sure it's got strong teeth.)

C: 住口罢！矿泉水人！哼，我同意{F#她}{M#他}入伙，但我对这家伙的要求会特别严格。
E: Enough, mineral water guy! Hmph, I can let {F#her}{M#him} join us, but I'll be especially strict with them.

C: （唉，不管这些家伙，先瞧瞧谁发来了消息…）
E: (Tsk, I'll ignore them and check the message first...)

C: 再这么下去，我们还积攒什么功德啊！全都内耗掉了！
E: If this goes on, all the merits we have accumulated will be in vain!

C: 正是！堪称濒危中的濒危啊！不可再生，我们费尽力气才将它们修好…我是说，治好他们的致命伤势。这些小家伙还为了保护自己的人类主人勇敢地参战呢。
E: Exactly! They are an out-and-out endangered species! As new machines couldn't be made, we went all out to fix, I mean, to treat their lethal wounds. These little guys even fought valiantly to protect their human masters.

C: 唉…看来不让你见识一下，你是不会相信了。机兵，立刻攻击{NICKNAME}！
E: Alas... I guess we have to show you some proof for you to believe us. Automatons, attack {NICKNAME} now!

C: 让我来告诉你，这是由折叠太阳能板供电的超控模块。你眼前的这只机械生命，靠太阳能，也就是「光合作用」来活动——就像你最喜欢的植物那样。
E: Well, it's an override module powered by a folded solar panel. This mechanical lifeform before you relies on solar energy, which is photosynthesis, to move around - just like the plants you love.

C: 不、不能让尾巴的努力白费了！
E: I—I won't let Mr. Tail sacrifice himself in vain!

C: 我有点怕，让我再考虑一下…
E: I'm a little scared. Let me think it over...

C: 哇，没想到{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}你这么强。但这些人毕竟是公职人员，要是咱俩被盘问起来，得有个说辞……
E: Wow, I didn't know you were so strong, bro! But these are Luofu officials... if we're interrogated, we need to get our story straight...

C: 好凶的幽灵！
E: What a rude ghost!

C: 二位想必听说过工造司「造化洪炉」破损一事。其中封锁的「岁阳」妖物走脱，盘踞此处，十王司正受命抓捕。劝你们速速离开，也是为了安全着想。
E: I assume the two of you heard about the damage done to the Artisanship Commission's Creation Furnace? The "heliobi" sealed within escaped and have been haunting this place. The Ten-Lords Commission has orders to capture them. I am strongly advising you to leave — for your own safety.

C: 咱们走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 放心吧，我对霸占你的肉体没那么大的兴趣，我在里面呆不了多久。所以咱们暂时好好合作，可以吗？
E: Worry not, I have no interest in making you my home — I'll be gone before you know it. Let's get along while it lasts, shall we?

C: 你知道我根本不是当判官的料啊。以前我以为在十王司当差久了，会培养出勇气，现在发现…不行就是不行啊。
E: You know I'm not cut out to be a judge. I thought maybe if I worked long enough in the Ten-Lords Commission, I'd get braver. But now... I know it's impossible.

C: 不过，咱们岁阳各自沾染着附身宿主时获得的情绪和欲望，彼此互相嫌弃，没有谁愿意和谁融在一起——就像一个人脑袋里有「多重人格」，时不时得打架。
E: ...but heliobi are gradually tainted by the emotions and desires of those we possess. We tend to spite each other and don't like to fuse together — it's like having multiple personalities inside a single head. It leads to "infighting..."

C: 那么，接下来有劳各位狠狠下定决心，迎战恚炎的傀儡——也就是各位的同僚啦。
E: Make the decision. Furynox's pawns — your companions — must be destroyed.

C: 想不想回{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}怀里？
E: Wanna hug, sweety?

C: 她的谨慎乃是十王司判官应有的素养。
E: Her caution is a skill all judges of the Ten-Lords Commission should possess.

C: 你拿起了《美梦华服》翻看。琳琅的商品在你面前流动着，直到一张便条掉了下来。
E: You pick up Dream Couture and flip through it, your eyes perusing the stream of its dazzling catalog, until a note falls out from between its pages.

C: 我很高兴能想起之前发生的事…即便都是些不那么愉快的回忆。
E: I'm very happy to remember the events that happened in the past... Even if they brought back unhappy memories.

C: 真的很让人担心她在想什么。
E: I'm really worried about what she's thinking.

C: 别害羞嘛。这样，我先告诉你我想做什么，然后我们交换好不好？
E: Don't be shy. How about I tell you what I want to do first, then you tell me?

C: 行了，别在一边大呼小叫了。娜娜，和我们说说吧——你以后是怎么打算的？
E: All right. Stop it! Stop screaming! Cocona, tell us. What are your plans for the future?

C: 恭喜你啊柯柯娜。我听说格尔温太太和那个里尔克先生都是出了名的难缠，挑剔又刻薄。
E: Congrats, Cocona. I've heard that Mrs. Gerwin and Mr. Rilke are both infamously tough customers, picky and rude.

C: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
E: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

C: 你松开了手。
E: You release her.

C: 哪怕无意义，我也必须挑战它。
E: Even if it's pointless, I still have to challenge it.

C: 罗伯特静静地待在这里，一言不发。
E: Robert remains in place, silent.

C: …我没事，感谢您的关心。
E: ...I'm fine. Thank you for your concern.

C: …我想和芙洛拉对话，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。这次我不想再错过了。
E: ...I wish to speak with Flora, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I will not miss out again this time.

C: 莱斯利•迪恩——「宇宙情人」。
E: Lesley Dean — "Universal Lover."

C: 这位就是您聘用的新任大副，岗前培训也已完成，空艇上还有些交接杂项需要处理，我先行一步，就不打扰二位了。
E: Here's your newly appointed first mate. The onboarding training has been completed, but there are still some miscellaneous handover issues that need to be handled on the airship. I'll leave you two to it.

C: 结果怎么样？
E: How are the results?

C: 那<color=#dbc291ff>空艇就可以命名为：「飞翔时针号」</color>，由钟表小子领航的空艇，足以配上空艇住客的身份。
E: Then <color=#dbc291ff>the airship's new name shall henceforth be the Soaring Clock Hand</color> — only with an airship helmed by Clockie is worthy of its guests.

C: 相信我！以您的硬件条件，只要站在这里、保持笑容就万事俱备了——剩下的只要「顺其自然」就好！没错，顺其自然！
E: Trust me! With your overqualified traits, all you have to do is stand here and keep that smile on your face. As for what comes along, just play it by ear! Yep, by ear!

C: …奇怪，您不是应该也看到了吗？
E: ...Strange. Didn't you see it, too?

C: 你颤抖着抽回了那只情不自禁的手。你这一生如履薄冰…绝对不能因为一瓶小小的碳酸饮料导致自己走不到对岸。
E: Trembling, you retract the hand that almost betrays your self-discipline. You have been cautious all your life... and now you must not let a bottle of carbonated drink ruin your hard-earned reputation.

C: （随便说一个房间号）
E: (Say any random room number)

C: 呜…不、不好意思，{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我从来没来过这么奢侈的地方，不知道原来有这么多规矩……
E: Ooh... s—sorry, {F#madam}{M#sir}. I ain't never been to such a high-class place before in my life. I didn't know you had all these rules...

C: 不管从哪个角度看都很可疑…
E: It's dodgy, no matter how you look at it...

C: 模仿桂乃芬倒立。
E: Do a handstand like Guinaifen.

C: …很显然，她完全没能理解你想要传达的意思。试试别的法子吧……
E: ...Obviously, you two have got your wires crossed. Let's try another way...

C: 一群信仰不坚定的假信徒！跑吧，尽管跑，你们休想从我这儿拿回一分钱的会费——休想！
