E: A bunch of weak-willed fake followers! Run all you want, you will never get a dime from me. Never!

C: 为了防止被洗脑，你最好还是离他远点……
E: To avoid being influenced, it would be wise to keep your distance from him...

C: 难道我的新手光环真的已经失效了？我、我不能接受啊……
E: Has my beginner's luck truly abandoned me? I... I can't accept this...

C: 云璃姑娘说笑了，这是彦卿守擂赢来的。想到你们要分别了，很长时间见不到了，我心说得拿过来给你摸摸，聊慰遗憾。
E: You're such the humorist, Yunli. This was the sword I won as the ringmaster. I was just thinking that as you were leaving, you would not see it for a while. I brought it so you could touch it one last time and ease your regrets.

C: 等等，我还有两句话要和彦卿小弟说。
E: Wait, I would like to say a final word to young Yanqing.

C: 所以是什么条件呢？
E: What condition?

C: 它们活像是被猫咪把玩后兴味索然地踢进沙发底下的玩具，一辈子也没个见天日的机会。
E: They're like toys that have been kicked under the sofa by some uninterested cat, with no chance of seeing the light of day.

C: 帮我给这个培养舱拍个照吧。拍好了，我们就去雏形阶段。
E: Help me take a photo of this incubator. Then we can go check out the embryonic phase.

C: 在雏形阶段，是星槎塑形最重要的阶段。如果不注意温度、培养液的配置、或者是设计信息有所缺漏，那么星槎种子便不会按照设计意图生长。
E: The embryonic phase is the most important stage in shaping the starskiff. If you don't regulate the temperature and culture medium properly, or if the design data has any errors, then the starskiff seed will fail to grow as designed.

C: 应该不是，这就是换了一个更大的培养舱而已吧。
E: I don't think so. This is just a bigger incubator.

C: 我真的能做出星槎的设计吗？我真的能完成师傅的梦想吗？还是说，我来这里只是想寻找一个新的逃避方式？
E: Can I really design starskiffs? Can I really fulfill my master's dream? Or am I just looking for some kind of escape from reality?

C: 你们看，这迴星港每天有这么多的星槎出港。总有一天，我也要将我师傅的梦想之船造出来，轻轻将它推出去，让它在星槎海最繁荣的航道里飞行！
E: Just look: Every day, there are so many starskiffs leaving Stargazer Navalia. One day, I'll build my master's dreamship, push it out gently, and set it sailing in the busiest lane of Starskiff Haven!

C: 只是个比方而已，别紧张。仙舟上没什么怪力乱神的东西。
E: Relax. It's just a figure of speech. There's nothing supernatural on Xianzhou.

C: 想过。这两百年来一直都有想过。
E: I have. It's been on my mind for the past <unbreak>200</unbreak> years.

C: （钟型机动）
E: (Bell maneuver)

C: 公输师傅戏好足啊！
E: Master Gongshu is so dramatic!

C: 对呀，我俩对工造的事情一窍不通，公输师傅你这么说肯定是有原因的吧？
E: Both of us know next to nothing about artifex or artificium, but I believe you must have a valid reason behind your opinion, Master Gongshu.

C: 走吧，接下来就该请莱恩师傅「还阳」了。
E: Let's go and invite Master Ryan back to the world of the living.

C: 我什么也帮不了你啦，既不能指点你技术，也不能说些什么好听的话继续骗你浪费时间。
E: There's nothing I can do to help you. I can neither guide you nor say pleasant things to trick you into wasting more of your time.

C: 换个行当吧，和我不一样，身为仙舟人，你还有很多很多的时间……
E: Why don't you try another career? Unlike me, you're a Xianzhou citizen with plenty of time ahead of you...

C: 十王司便有把握追根溯源
E: The Ten-Lords Commission will be able to trace his roots.

C: 本座这可是念在{NICKNAME}是仙舟贵客，才出借穷观阵的。相对的，今后若是有需要{NICKNAME}的时候……
E: I'm only willing to lend the Matrix of Prescience because {NICKNAME} is our honored guest. And, if I need {NICKNAME}'s help in the future...

C: …看来已经结束了。
E: ...Looks like it's over already.

C: 嗯…我也是。但还是再等一段时间吧。
E: Mm... Me too... but maybe we should give him some time.

C: 怎么了，帕姆？
E: What's up, Pom-Pom?

C: 罗浮仙舟才度过了危机，举办演武仪典也是在对外彰显自己和平安全的状态。
E: The Xianzhou Luofu has recently overcome a crisis. By holding the Wardance, they're demonstrating to everyone that they've returned to a state of peace and safety.

C: 姬子姐真是懂人心啊。嘻嘻，在古兽化石和演武仪典之间，还是后者听起来比较有意思。
E: Himeko really knows how to convince people. Hehe, between Leviathan fossils and the Wardance, the latter definitely sounds more fun.

C: 我当然知道演武仪典的。但这仪典的擂台不是还没开放吗？
E: Yeah, we know about that ceremony, but isn't the fighting ring still closed?

C: 「放心不下」？莫非是追捕步离人…需要咱们帮忙吗？
E: Hmm? Is it a serious matter? Maybe you'll... need our help in hunting down the borisin?

C: 彦卿，安顿了客人后，替我再跑一趟工造司。我听闻公司舰船遇袭被扣押一事。青镞送来了消息，说公司的人正在抗议，想取回船上的货物。
E: Yanqing, once you've helped our guests get settled, go to the Artisanship Commission for me. I've heard about the attack and the detainment of the IPC ship. Qingzu sent word that the IPC members are protesting and wish to have their cargo back.

C: 这…不妥吧。三位愿意帮忙，我很感激，但公司职员格外难缠…我担心反倒让列车惹上麻烦……
E: This... is too much trouble. While I appreciate your kindness, dealing with the IPC workers could be tricky... I'm afraid this will cause trouble for the Express...

C: 只要不违犯法律，公司的人当然可以自由来去。
E: Well, IPC staff are free to come and go, as long as they don't break any laws.

C: 那…那确实可以接受。你们这位「贵客」倒是个讲道理的好人，我也就不计较了。
E: Well... I guess that's acceptable. Your "esteemed guest" seems reasonable, so I'll just pretend nothing happened.

C: 你，这回你该把偷走的剑还我了吧！
E: You...! You stole my sword! Give it back!

C: 瞧见没有？是我赢了。
E: See? I won.

C: 说起来，老朽这次抵达罗浮，为演武仪典带来了一份礼物。
E: Oh, by the way, I've prepared a gift for the Wardance.

C: 可惜对长生种而言，只要活得够久，就总会迎来摧毁往日累积一切的失败——敌人等待的就是那一刻。
E: Unfortunately, for long-life species, enduring through the ages always culminates in a failure that undoes all previous achievements — a moment that our adversaries relish.

C: 三月七，翘首期盼回信。
E: Looking forward to your reply. Yours, March 7th.

C: 没想到短短几周的光景，三月七竟然练得有模有样。我算是体会到爷爷当年教我剑法时，总是露出欣慰笑容的心情了。
E: Can you believe it? March 7th has actually become a pretty decent swordmaster in such a short time. Now I understand why grandpa always had a grin on his face while training me.

C: 来得好！
E: That's the spirit!

C: 我时不时会问自己，我究竟为何而挥剑？如果注定要面对下一场失败，我又为何要继续挥剑？是为了找回胜利的快乐？为了回应将军的期待？还是为了留下云骑功勋？
E: I often ask myself, why do I wield my sword? If defeat is inevitable, why do I continue to fight? Is it to reclaim the joy of victory, to meet the general's expectations, or to secure my honor among the Cloud Knights?

C: 拍摄可疑人士密谋现场
E: Take a photo of the suspects plotting at the scene

C: 可疑的狐人乙
E: Suspicious Foxian B

C: 坚持住…
E: Just hang in there...

C: 出来！是谁，快出来啊！
E: Who's there? Show yourself!

C: 除罗浮外，宇宙中还有不少遭受星核侵蚀的世界。列车之前停靠的雅利洛-VI就是其中之一。
E: Apart from the Luofu, there are many other worlds suffering from Stellaron corrosion. For example, Jarilo-VI, the world that the Express stopped at before reaching the Luofu, was one of them.

C: …药王秘传的势力盘根错节，潜谋已久。景元失察，确有疏失。
E: ...The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus were deeply rooted and had been plotting for a long time. I admit it was my negligence for not noticing it earlier.

C: 是幻胧。
E: That's Phantylia.

C: 丹恒……
E: Dan Heng...

C: 若两位已经准备好了，可随我前往幽囚狱。
E: If both of you are ready, please follow me to The Shackling Prison.

C: 只消能为他们逃离此处多增添一份困难，这些艰难道路对咱们十王司的人来说算得了什么。
E: So, as long as the treacherous terrain here makes it harder for them to escape, the Ten-Lords Commission doesn't have any complaints.

C: 多谢你替我们打开了囚牢，判官。剩下的事情，交给我们就好。
E: Thank you for opening up the prison for us, your honor. We'll take it from here.

C: 原本我打算在明日执行营救您的计划，不过他们打算将您送往曜青仙舟关押，我必须趁此良机，将您解放出来。
E: Originally, I intended to carry out the plan tomorrow, but they're planning to transfer you to the Xianzhou Yaoqing now, so I seized this opportunity to set you free.

C: 也就是说，劫狱者和呼雷挟持了曜青使者。
E: So, the intruders and Hoolay are holding the Yaoqing messengers hostage.

C: 好，若是路上能发现那位逃脱的曜青使者……
E: Alright. If we happen to come across that Yaoqing messenger who got away...

C: 我说过了…只需一顿饭的时间。
E: Like I said... it's only one meal away.

C: 我刚才已说过了，鄙人的职业是医士。只是我所擅长的医术需要佐以药膳烹饪才能发挥功效。
E: As I said, I'm a healer, but my art of healing requires the culinary arts to be truly effective.

C: 你说「镜流回到了罗浮」，她确实回来了…可惜我也探听到了更多情报，她身犯重罪，被送往了其他仙舟。
E: You said that Jingliu recently returned to the Luofu, right? Well, she did come back... but unfortunately, I also found out that she committed serious crimes and was escorted to another Xianzhou ship.

C: 等等…我认得你，你是那个失联的曜青使节。你怎么在这儿？
E: Wait... I recognize you... You're the lost Yaoqing messenger. How are you here?

C: 不错。我的部下正在时刻寻找线索。貊泽，目前情况如何。
E: That's right. My people are busy collecting clues now. What's the situation, Moze?

C: 他走不了，你也一样。曜青的猴子，你来的正是时候。告诉你们的将军……
E: No, he can't run, and neither can you. You've come at the right time, monkey of the Yaoqing. Tell your general...

C: 难道是…星槎的交通事故？真是危险！
E: You mean... a starskiff crash!? Why, how terrible!

C: 练习受伤。
E: He was injured in training.

C: 三月七选手无视了在场所有人，扬言要挑战曜青仙舟的「天击将军」。
E: So March 7th is ignoring everyone around her and is declaring her will to challenge the Merlin's Claw of the Xianzhou Yaoqing.

C: 离开尸体。
E: Leave the body.

C: 尽力压制住他们，缩小包围圈！
E: Do all you can to suppress them and fence them in!

C: 云骑…都在这里。
E: The Cloud Knights... They're over here.

C: 跟我走！我带你去擂台。
E: Come with me! To the ring!

C: 呼雷！看仔细了，云骑天威，尽在此剑！
E: Hoolay! Take a good look. The power of the Cloud Knights is in my blade!

C: 让我再喘口气。
E: Let me rest for a bit first.

C: 而此时此刻，「呼雷越狱」一事，仍有最后一笔账等待清算……
E: And this time, there's one more business that must be settled with the affair around Hoolay's jailbreak...

C: …将军，你竟然没把竞锋舰上的计划告诉我！
E: ...General, I can't believe you didn't tell me about the plan for the Skysplitter!

C: 你想学吗？我可以教你啊。不过得等我养好这一身伤才行……
E: Do you want to learn it? I can teach you! But, I'll need some time to heal up first...

C: 没办法嘛～这次猎狼行动，飞霄将军没给我什么发挥的空间。
E: Well, there's not much I could do. General Feixiao didn't really give me any chance to shine during this Wolf Hunt operation.

C: 你的话倒是和彦卿师父说得一毛一样。不过嘛，眼下他和云璃全都被送进了丹鼎司好好强制休养了。
E: You sound exactly like Master Yanqing. But for now, both he and Yunli have been forced to go to the Alchemy Commission for some well-needed rest.

C: 云璃，你给我好好躺着去！
E: Yunli, go and lie down!

C: 可惜这一次，他们惹错了人。待返回曜青后，我将亲自率领青丘军出征……
E: Unfortunately, they picked the wrong fight this time. Once we return to the Yaoqing, I'll personally lead the Verdant Knights into battle.

C: 见到了见到了，有个老哥在路上放声歌唱，唱得还挺好。我刚去喊哥们一起看热闹，一转眼这醉鬼就不见了。
E: Oh, oh, I did, a man singing loudly on the road, and it wasn't all that bad either. I shouted for my friend to listen, but he was already gone when I turned around.

C: 「家族」尚且如此，就更别提你们这些逐梦客了——没有贬低你的意思，别见怪——思考任何事只从自己的立场出发，总也顾及不到、或者刻意漠视他人的利益。
E: If it is so for The Family, it is even truer for Dreamchasers like yourself — not meant as a slight, no offense — who would consider everything from their own perspectives and can't put themselves in others' shoes or would consciously ignore the interest of others.

C: 你出生在哪里？
E: Where were you born?

C: 灰骑士？怎么回事，睡着了？
E: Gray Knight? What's going on? Are you asleep?

C: 既然您不肯随我回去…那就莫怪我行事粗野了。
E: Since you won't return with me... forgive me for being brusque.

C: 放肆！
E: Such insolence!

C: 灰骑士…灰骑士…对不起，朕对不起你…朕不该杀你，朕也不想杀你…为什么朕会做那样的事……
E: Gray Knight... Gray Knight... I'm sorry. I'm truly sorry... I should not have killed you. I did not want to... Why would I have done those things...

C: 这不重要，亲爱的臣民。重要的是，朕是怎样的皇帝！
E: That's not important, my dear subject. What matters most is what kind of Emperor I am!

C: 我明白了…驱动你的是发自内心的正义感。
E: I see... You're driven by your sense of justice.

C: 我可能…我大概不需要知道其中细节。我听说过一些和无名客有关的故事，我猜你也一定和传闻中那些人一样本领滔天。
E: I... I probably don't need to know the details. I've heard stories about the Nameless, and I believe you must be as talented as those in the stories.

C: 没想到有一天能和那位「天才」共事……
E: I never thought I'd end up working alongside that genius...

C: 「武器」被制造出来就是为了打击敌人，这道理很难理解吗？十余支军团的先遣队正在准备袭击联合商路，他们的存在可能直接威胁到庇尔波因特。
E: Weapons are made to eliminate enemies. Is it that hard to understand? Over a dozen vanguard units of the Legion are preparing to attack the joint trade routes. Their presence can directly threaten Pier Point's safety.

C: 不用担心。按下那个钮的不是你，也不是我；后人的史书上根本不会提到我们两个的名字。
E: Fret not. The one who presses the button is neither you nor I. We won't even be mentioned if this incident is later reported.

C: 动作快！把敢反抗的人都抓起来！
E: Hurry it up! Round up anyone who dares to resist!

C: （查德威克博士，是被软禁在了这里吗？）
E: (Professor Chadwick has been placed under house arrest here?)

C: 愿你能在那片树海中找到永恒的安宁，博士。
E: May you find eternal peace among that sea of trees, doctor.

C: 请过来看看。
E: Please come and take a look.

C: 我也看到了。
E: I saw that too.

C: …咳、咳咳…多亏了你，总算赶跑他们了……
E: *cough* ...Thanks, you got rid of them...

C: 他应该是跑去里面躲着了…臭小子，怎么还给门上锁啊！
E: He probably ran in there and hid... That brat, he locked the door!

C: 呵呵~顺着这孩子出的谜题玩玩如何？说不定会有意想之外的收获呢？
E: Heh-heh... How about we play along with this child's riddles? We might get a pleasant surprise out of it?

C: 如你所见，外邦人在这里正逐渐变得不受欢迎。
E: As you can see, outlanders are gradually becoming less welcome here.

C: 谁说不是呢？
E: Who said it isn't?

C: 看来工作还是不够饱和。
E: Looks like there's not enough work to go around.

C: 给你一个忠告吧：学会独立思考是很重要的——就像我一样。
E: A word of advice: Learning to think for yourself is essential — just like me.

C: 听上去的确不公平。
E: Sounds hardly fair.

C: 我一直认为，眼见胜过耳闻。想要了解外邦人的处境，没什么比亲自去看看更客观了。
E: I have always thought that seeing is believing. There's nothing more convincing than personally witnessing the outlanders' circumstances to learn about them.

C: 记得别让卫兵看见箱子，不然可能会有麻烦——那就不关我的事了。
E: Don't let the guards see the crate, or there'll be trouble — I won't be liable for any of that.

C: 食物不就是给人吃的？
E: Isn't food for people to eat?

C: 我再看看。
E: I'll take another look around here.

C: 还记得当初我和你们一起去重渊，你老师让我给外邦人买粮食的事吗？他可没说这要我自掏腰包！
E: Do you remember when I went with you two to the abyss, and your teacher asked me to buy food for the outlanders? He never mentioned I had to pay for it myself!

C: 是谁？这里很危险，快点离开！
E: Who are you? This place is dangerous. Get out of here at once!

C: 是…帕里斯……
E: It's... Paris...

C: 直接动手抢走不行吗？
E: Can't we just steal it from her now?

C: 给个导航地址！
E: Drop the GPS location!

C: 也不能妄下定论，寿限在此世总是难以预测，毕竟或许存在逃避塞纳托斯抚摸的方法，也或许存在死亡无法触及的地方。
E: I cannot say for certain. The duration of a life is hard to predict in this world. Perhaps there exists some method to escape Thanatos' touch, or perhaps there is a land that death itself cannot reach.

C: 小嘴儿还挺甜。
E: You're a real charmer.

C: 是你的朋友在呼唤你吧？告辞，愿金丝不会绊住你的脚步。
E: Is that your friend calling you? Farewell. I pray that the golden thread will not hinder your footsteps.

C: 那真是一种光荣的职务，可是如今全白费了。
E: Oh, the glory you gained, all of it now in vain.

C: 是啊，要是这些外来者可以随意绕开我们圣城的律法，那还像话吗？
E: He's right! You think an outsider being above the laws of our holy city is justifiable?

C: 我用无敌的泰坦之力想想办法。
E: I will use the unmatched power of the Titans to find a way.

C: 我的权力可以让你远离战场，远离这些纷争的噩梦。我们一起躲在黎明云崖上，在刻法勒的膝下安然度日。
E: With my influence, you can be spared from the battlefield and kept far away from the nightmares of strife. Let us escape to Dawncloud and spend our days in peace under the protection of Kephale.

C: ——直到我又看到了这枚绑着断线的指环，才在黑潮下的荒原中醒来。
E: ...Until I see the ring with the broken thread around it once more, and I come to my senses in the wastelands under the black tide.

C: 此事，便是如此结局。
E: This is how it ends.

C: 砸碎它！
E: Smash it!

C: 你决定给大脑做一点热身运动，消磨这无趣的时间。{NICKNAME}，还记得我们要找谁吗？
E: You decide to give your brain some exercise and pass the time. You remember who we're looking for, {NICKNAME}?

C: 帕西提亚的脸上带着一丝平和的微笑，但你知道，这正是麻木的象征。
E: Pasithea wears a serene smile on her face, but you know it's just a sign of numbness.

C: 虽然它们非常模糊，可有两个词却比任何话语都要清晰。
E: Although it's very muffled, two words are clearer than anything else.

C: 你不说，我不说，谁又能知道，在神殿深处宣告神谕的圣女，和以前的是不是同一个人？
E: If you and I both keep quiet, who will know whether the Holy Maiden living at the depths of the temple is the same person as before?

C: 少女的牙齿紧紧贴合，摩擦出铁锈味。这番话语，无疑是对她和母亲莫大的羞辱。
E: The girl's jaws are tightly clenched, tasting iron through gritted teeth. Such words are nothing less than sheer insults to her and her mother.

C: 在离开前，恕我冒昧地问一句——我们真的没法逃脱这命运吗？我们可以说服那些固执的祭司，向奥赫玛请求支援。
E: Before I leave, forgive me for asking — can we truly not escape this fate? We can persuade those stubborn priests to plead for aid from Okhema.

C: 无能为力，自身难保，恐惧与疲惫接踵而来。只要闭上眼，让灵魂沉入永夜，便再也不用为之苦恼。
E: Helpless and unprotected, fear and fatigue assault you. As long as you close your eyes and let your soul sink into the ever-night, then all these woes will fade away.

C: 我可能会成为工匠。
E: I might have become a craftsman.

C: 我不想变成骗子！
E: I don't want to become a liar!

C: 需要再歇一会吗？
E: Do you need a break?

C: 既然你都这么说了……
E: Since you've said so...

C: 愿我们于星海重逢。
E: May we meet again among the stars.

C: 你还有时间和我们抢书？听小道消息，铁墓感染了几个旧自动机兵，是你们后勤部门负责处理吧？
E: You still have time to compete with us for books? Word on the street is that Irontomb infected a few old automatons... Isn't your Logistics Department supposed to handle that?

C: 今后，各仙舟间的联系将愈发紧密，我会委托商船借机将《如我所书》出口到友舰。凭借鸣火商会的便利，这件事肯定能办得更加妥当吧。
E: From now on, the connections between Xianzhou ships will grow even closer, and I'll have merchant vessels export As I've Written to our allied fleets. With the convenience of the Whistling Flames guild, this matter should be handled quite smoothly.

C: 记得还是飞行士的时候，我也常和伙伴们开着星槎，四处冒险。即便每次都能化险为夷，回来后总是免不了一顿检讨。
E: Back when I was a pilot, I used to go on adventures everywhere with my companions in our starskiff. Even though we always managed to get out of sticky situations, we'd inevitably get a stern talking-to when we returned.

C: 这可真是：怒狮百战踞高座，悬锋威名永流芳。
E: Now this is epic: Like a battle-hardened lion on its throne, Kremnos's mighty name shall echo through the ages.

C: 唉，你说这……
E: *sigh* This is so...

C: 记得我送你的那艘歼星舰吗？好消息是，我从一位太空海盗手里收到了现货……
E: Remember that starnought I gave you? The good news is that I got one from a space pirate...

C: 这次{F#她}{M#他}拯救了宇宙。
E: {F#She}{M#He} saved the universe this time.

C: 嘻，虽然很难猜出{NICKNAME}的想法……
E: Heh, even though it's hard to guess what you are thinking, {NICKNAME}...

C: 或许，还可以做点什么。
E: Perhaps there's still something I can do.

C: 是迈向新一站的起点。
E: The starting point for our next destination.

C: 求救…呜呜…呜——帮助，呜呜……
E: Help... Wooo... Help... Wooo...

C: 嚯，这算啥？有机会领你去月台的隐蔽角落看看我攒的星系大奔，那才叫开眼哪！
E: Pff, that's nothing. Next time I should take you to see the galaxy-class Rose Roydz I hid in the corner of the railway platform. Now that's an eye-opener!

C: 不怕，我对你有信心，况且我只是让你教她些人类生活上的事情，娱乐消遣、兴趣爱好这些，想来也不会出什么大问题。
E: No, I have confidence in you. Besides, I am just asking you to show her what our daily life is like. Things like entertainment and hobbies. I don't think there will be any big problems.

C: 老师，请问到底要怎么做，才能从大家平时的话语里分辨出大家内心真实的想法呢？
E: {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, how can I understand the true meaning behind what people say?

C: 有话就直说，我就是这样——说吧，你找我到底想干嘛？
E: If you've got something to say, just say it. What do you want me for?

C: 我想不到更好的了。
E: I can't think of anything better.

C: 嘿嘿，总之拜托你了。
E: Hehehe. Thank you so much in advance.

C: 感觉事有蹊跷。
E: Sounds odd.

C: 废话，以前天天在我们科室里摆着呢，喏，现在你面前的这玩意儿就是。
E: I used to see it in our department every day. There, the thing in front of you is the Curio.

C: 对了，你是哪位？也是来找「这个奇物」的吗？
E: By the way, who are you? Are you here for this Curio too?

C: 哈哈，你真有眼光，这可算是问对人了。你看我现在戴着的就是时下最流行的爆款！
E: Haha, you've got good taste! I'm the right person to ask that question. See, the ones I'm wearing right now are the hottest and most popular lenses!

C: …什么？她看过照片了吗？她有说什么吗？
E: What...? Has she seen the photo? Did she say anything?

C: ——怪不得当今社会成年人的精神健康状况普遍堪忧呢，拼死拼活赚的那几个子全都被这群吸金小鬼给吞进肚了！
E: No wonder the mental health of adults in today's society is poor. All the money we've worked so hard for has been invested in these kids!

C: 你对「真诚」的定义很特别…
E: Your understanding of "sincerity" is pretty unusual...

C: 感谢你的帮助，年轻人。这是你的报酬——下次我再需要帮忙的时候，希望你还在。
E: Thank you for your help. This is the payment I promised. I hope you can still help me the next time I need your help.

C: …真的吗？终于有人愿意和我交朋友了？
E: Really? Finally someone wants to be friends with me...

C: 原来「让信鸽带向天空」就是「把信揉成团扔到天上去」的意思啊，真是的，至少折个纸飞机嘛。
E: So "let a pigeon carry it to the sky" just means "crumple up a paper ball and throw it into the air." Come on, can't they at least fold a paper airplane?

C: 这样，大家就不会被娜塔莎姐姐骂啦。谢谢{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}，你对阿丽娜最好了~
E: This way, no one will get in trouble with Natasha. Thank you, you are the best!

C: 你问这些纸团怎么办？嘻嘻，交给阿丽娜吧，大家的心意…当然是要好好珍藏呀。
E: You mean how am I going to deal with all these paper balls? Hehe, just leave them to me... Of course I'm going to treasure their wishes.

C: 我有拒绝的权利吗？
E: Can I say no?

C: 大矿区…伊蕾恩…哦，原来是伊蕾恩姐姐需要的物资！太好了，这下我就能拜托她帮忙宣传鼹鼠党的事迹啦。
E: The Great Mine... Elaine... Oh, these are the supplies Elaine needs! Great, now I can ask her to help spread word about The Moles' good deeds.

C: 哼，那帮家伙，欺负女孩子的时候那么嚣张，其实根本不经打嘛。
E: Hmph, those shameless thugs only acted tough when they were bullying a girl.

C: 就这么决定了，下一步的行动计划，就起名叫「鼹鼠党极速扩张作战」吧！
E: So that's it, the next action plan — The Moles Rapid Expansion Operation!

C: 哇，睡得也太沉了吧！换作是我，肯定没法在这么硬的地上睡着……
E: Oh, he's sound asleep! If I were him, I definitely can't sleep on such a hard floor...

C: …也谢谢你，年轻人。要是没有你，我恐怕就要沦为笑柄了……
E: ...And thank you as well, youngster. If not for you, I would've been doomed to be a laughingstock...

C: 我带来了你爸爸的信。
E: Your dad wrote you a letter. Here.

C: 你的修辞好诡异…
E: You're being really weird.

C: 你也被拦下了？没事，这不怪你。是那群官僚太不尊重科学了。
E: You've been blocked, too? That's alright, and it's not your fault. Those bureaucrats have so little respect for the sciences.

C: 把教育部官员出的题目复述给了雷金……
E: Describe to Regin the question posed by the Ministry of Education official...

C: 你好啊，年轻人。你已经通过了前面两道考验，现在有机会将你的论文亲自交给我。
E: Greetings, {M#young man}{F#young lady}. You've already passed two rounds of testing. Now you have the chance to personally hand me your thesis.

C: 你这么聪明，只要稍加训练，一定就可以答出这些题目，将论文交到我手上了吧。
E: You're so smart. With a little training, you'll definitely be able to answer these questions and then turn in that paper to me.

C: <unbreak>365</unbreak>
E: <unbreak>365</unbreak>

C: 教育部的领导说…
E: The leaders at the Ministry of Education said...

C: 再给我一次机会！
E: Give me one more chance!

C: 哈哈，您别太心急了，我可没保证这次的题目会和之前一样啊。
E: Haha, don't be so impatient. I can't guarantee that the questions this time are exactly the same.

C: 咳咳…您运气真好，居然能通过这次测验。不过论文申请还有很多后续流程要走，请您耐心等消息吧。
E: Ahem... You're lucky indeed to pass this quiz. In any case, there are still a lot of follow-up procedures to go through with your paper. Please be patient and await our notification.

C: 我？最近？哈，还能忙什么——当然是在进一步巩固、论证我的「大宇宙时间隧道」理论了！
E: Me? Up to? Ha, well what else — naturally I've been consolidating and fine-tuning my big universe time tunnel theory.

C: 咦？您是从哪里得到的消息？我完全没听说……
E: Hmm? Where'd you hear that? I haven't heard anything...

C: 能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。什么时候您又想活动活动脑筋了，欢迎再来找我。
E: It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. When you want to exercise your brain, please come again.

C: 嗯…很遗憾，回答错误。
E: Hmm... I'm afraid that's incorrect.

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 当然没问题！您尽管看，慢慢来。
E: No problem at all! Just take your time and think things over.

C: 我想再看一次题面…
E: Let me see the question again...

C: （这样就算刺探成功了吧…该回去找雷金了。）
E: (Mission accomplished... let's report back to Regin.)

C: 原来这才是塔米拉小姐的「灵魂」…小女子逐渐理解了一切……
E: So that's what Tamila's soul is like... I'm gradually coming to comprehensively understand everything about her...

C: 每次站在这个地方都觉得不可思议，人真是顽强的动物。
E: I find it incredible every time I come here. Humans are such resilient animals.

C: 首先，如果你感到自己需要一些休闲时间却脱不开身，你就可以求助社友，拜托他们替你打掩护；其次，你也可以在有空时协助配合其他成员。
E: Firstly, if you ever feel you need some time to relax but can't get away from your duties, you can ask other Society members to help cover for you. Secondly, you can also cover for other members whenever you can.

C: 但你也知道，我们这种工作单位就爱抓考勤…早上一次，中午一次，晚上走的时候还得来一次——连个逃离办公室换换脑子的机会都没有，我真是受够了！
E: But companies like ours love to check for attendance... They check once in the morning, once at noon, and once at night! I can't even step outside the office to relax my brain! I've had enough!

C: 拍完了？多谢！那就来让我看看……
E: You're done? Thank you! Let me have a look...

C: …是不是该聊点什么？
E: ...Should we chat about something?

C: 我想多问一句…你每天的这个时间，都会来到商业街上吗？
E: I want to ask... Are you going to be here every day at this time?

C: 怎么，想来比划比划？
E: What is this? Are you trying to start a fight?

C: 是的。
E: Yes.

C: 一名虚弱的铁卫倚在墙边，似乎大限已至。如果裂界也能复制现实中的气味，那么在刚才那阵凄惨的呕吐声后，你应当闻到了浓郁的铁锈味。
E: A guard leans against the wall, looking as if his time had come. If the Fragmentum can replicate scents, then you should have smelled the thick tang of iron after that wretched barf.

C: 放心，护珠人是不会亏待你的，就拜托你了。
E: Don't worry. I, as a Pearlkeeper, will reward you handsomely. I'll count on you then!

C: 但不能因此放弃调查，对吧？
E: But we cannot give up on our investigation because of that, can we?

C: 总之，麻烦你去海滩上走一遭了。
E: Either way, please do another patrol across the beach for me.

C: 你是谁，你知道这个漂流瓶？
E: Who are you? Do you know about these drift bottles?

C: （看来海滩也没有其他情况了，巡逻就到此结束吧。）
E: (It seems there is nothing else out of the ordinary happening along the beach. I'll end my patrol here.)

C: 说真的，很少有书会在「重量感」这个维度上给人留下如此深刻的印象。既然如此，勉为其难看看它的书名吧。它的书名叫作《前世》。
E: Honestly, it is rare that a book leaves such striking impression in its weight. That being the case, you feel you should inspect the title. It is called Previous Reincarnation.

C: 通常来说，我应该相信你吗？我可不敢。
E: You think I should take your word for that? I'm not that naive.

C: 我怎么劝你都不好使，只听见你一直在念叨什么…什么「宇宙的终极」「数字的真理」之类的，反正都是我听不懂的词儿！
E: I tried to calm you down, but all you muttered was something about the "ultimate truth of the universe" and "the unified theory of maths." At any rate, I didn't understand a word!

C: 「本店只提供最新鲜的果蔬。」
E: "We only provide the freshest of fruits and greens."

C: 你鼓起勇气试了试水温，将一部分身体浸入其中——
E: You muster your courage and test the temperature, soaking part of your body into it...

C: 而那看似盆栽的特色美食，你也是直到入口才发现……
E: And that trademark dish that looks like a potted plant, it isn't until you have a mouthful that you realize...

C: 作为「毁灭」最应手的先锋军，星啸恶名远扬，寰宇众生深受其害。
E: As the vanguard of the Destruction, Celenova is notorious throughout the universe for bringing disaster to all living beings.

C: 此外，新一届「天满辰月祭」的筹备工作亦在有序进行。作为「欢愉」星神留下的传统，该庆典吸引了各方势力关注。
E: Meanwhile, preparations for the new "Lunament Festival" are well underway. Established by the Aeon of Elation, this time-honored event continues to attract interest from all corners.

C: 赋予英雄们姓名的利刃，无畏狂妄，战无不胜。
E: A fearless and reckless blade that won every battle for its wielder, and bestowed its name upon many heroes.

C: 抬头已是黎明。
E: When they look up, dawn has already arrived.

C: 从此往后，你中有我，我中有你。
E: From that day forward, there was you in me, and I in you.

C: 预言书库
E: Archive of Prophecies

C: 枯败的花园里，踱步的旅人在一次呼吸间怆然老去，
E: In the withered garden, the traveler's steps grow slower, each breath aging them in sorrow,

C: 因为我们的培育失误，它有着无从修补的缺陷。目前看来，它至多拥有十五日的生命。而这短暂的生命，也要一刻不停地被笼罩在痛苦当中……
E: Due to an error in the way that we have nurtured it, it has a defect that cannot be repaired. As things stand, it has at most fifteen days left to live. What's more, it will be in endless agony for the entirety of its short existence.

C: 但倘若手上的纺线唯余其一，无论多么出类拔萃的衣匠，即便是我……
E: However, if there is only one weaving thread remaining in my hands, it does not matter how talented a garmentmaker I am...

C: 是的，最近城里总是需要这东西…实在不是好事。
E: Indeed, there is constant need for it in the city at the moment... Things are truly dire.

C: 收殓她尸身之时，我却在她身上发现了中毒的症状……
E: But when I examined her body, I found symptoms of poisoning...

C: 但绝不是现在。
E: But that moment is not now.

C: 你记住了「预言、谎言与一对母女的故事」
E: You remembered the "tale of Prophecy, Lies, and a Mother-Daughter Story."

C: 很难界定这种类似路灯的物品究竟算是动物还是植物——它甚至还在这里承担了重要的交通功能。有些人称呼它为「狄沃努索」…不知道是否哪位贤者在喝醉时取出来的名字。
E: It's hard to define whether this lamp-like entity is animal or plant — Here, it even plays a vital role in traffic management. Some refer to it as "Dionyso"... perhaps a name conjured by a drunken sage.

C: 剑锋向处，誓言以血色浮现。
E: Where the blade points, a crimson oath is revealed.

C: 我有好好吃饭的！也有好好识字！至于读故事…嘿嘿，好多东西还看不懂嘛……
E: I have eaten plenty! And I've practiced my reading lots! But, the stories... Hehe, there are still lots that I can't read yet...

C: 圣女，注意你的言辞…这里是供奉雅努斯火种的圣地，不是扎格列斯的贼窝！
E: Holy Maiden, watch your tongue... This is the holy land of the Coreflame of Janus, not Zagreus' den of thieves!

C: 呵…也许连我自己，都做不到吧……
E: Hah... Perhaps that is something that would be beyond even me...

C: 你们也知道，我与远在他邦的挚友失联很久，前几日才知道那座城邦毁于黑潮了。
E: As you all know, I lost contact with my dear friends in other cities long ago and only recently learned of their cities being devoured by the black tide.

C: 呵…你不也不打算逃走么，那刻夏？
E: Hah... But you're planning to stand your ground as well, Anaxa.

C: 我虽是一介学者，但也略懂些拳脚，平常的黑潮怪物奈何不了我，无需替我担心。
E: I may be a scholar, but I know a bit about fighting. Any normal black tide monster is no match for me, so you need not worry.

C: 啊这，泰坦，这…不对吧？
E: Ah, Titan, this... doesn't seem quite right, does it?

C: 不要再破坏翁法罗斯世界观了。
E: Don't ruin the lore of Amphoreus.

C: 不知下次见面会是什么时候……
E: I wonder when we'll meet again...

C: 当然是您呀。您就是整个翁法罗斯最为强大的人，这点确凿无疑吼！
E: It's you, of course. You are, without a doubt, the strongest person in all of Amphoreus!

C: 再见……
E: Goodbye...

C: 笑对批评的厚实脸皮。
E: Thick skin against criticism.

C: 你的头怎么尖尖的？
E: Why is your head so pointy?

C: 你说谁来谁是小奇美拉…
E: ...You said whoever shows up is a Little Chimera.

C: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}在上，愿你的旅程兼具启迪与沉淀。
E: By {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, may your journey bring both enlightenment and reflection.

C: 金色的流体徐徐升起，在装置顶部形成光球。
E: The golden liquid rises steadily, forming a glowing sphere at the top of the device.

C: 将门板降下，你向未知的未来迈出了第一步。
E: With a click, the door falls open, and you step forward, ready to face the unknown future.

C: 咦，我刚刚不是在家里的仓库吗？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，这是哪啊？
E: Huh, wasn't I just in my home's warehouse, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}? Where is this?

C: 到了下辈子，我一定把你丢冥河里喂鱼！
E: I'll feed you to the fish in the River of Souls in our next life!

C: 并非战士，我向来。但是现在，我亦应抗争。
E: I am no warrior. I never was. But now, I too must resist.

C: 明明说好去天外之界看看的，没想到最后要死在地上，真是辱没了探险家的名号……
E: I was going to see the worlds beyond the sky... but now I'm going to die on the ground. What a disgrace to the title of adventurer...

C: 没有，我只是担心…你也知道的，那个黑衣服的家伙强得可怕——
E: No, I'm just worried... You know, that fellow in black is ridiculously strong—

C: 真讽刺呀，扎格列斯。
E: How exhilarating, Zagreus.

C: 启目集里还残存着艾格勒和塞涅俄丝的意志，但愿风堇能抵抗住这股力量的扰乱……
E: There are remnants of Aquila and Seliose's will left in the enlightenment. I hope Hyacine can resist this power's disruption...

C: 蓦然回首，已无来时路。
E: Turning back suddenly, you realize, the path you came from is no longer there.

C: 黄金裔身体里流着这样的血液？你真为他们感到担心。
E: The descendants of Chrysos Heir have such blood flowing in their veins? You truly feel concerned for them.

C: 悬锋人何时懦弱到为他人做默默无闻的后盾？你与我分明都将纷争与恐惧当作食粮……
E: Since when did the Kremnoans grow so weak as to become someone else's quiet support? After all, you and I both thrive on strife and fear...

C: 你想说，那只是「逃避」？
E: So you're saying it's just "running away"?

C: 你已经做了很多了，我的老友。我来这里只是想借助学者的投影装置，再看看旧日的星空。
E: You've done more than enough, my old friend. I'm just here to use the scholar's projection device to gaze upon the starry skies of days past.

C: 怕怕怕怕怕——水——谢谢谢谢——你——喀喀喀喀喀——
E: D—D—Don't like... water... th—th—thank... thank you... C—C—C—Crrk—

C: 哈哈！此局对弈，精妙绝伦…看来我的棋艺大成，已经独步天下！
E: Haha! What a brilliant game... It seems my chess skills have reached the peak, a peerless step above all others!

C: 你突然想起少女曾说过的话，言犹在耳——
E: You suddenly remember what the girl had said, and the words begin ringing in your ears—

C: 嗯，你说吧。
E: Mhm, go ahead.

C: 也向你致敬。
E: Hats off to you too, my guy.

C: 哦，对了…技术部之前告诉我，他们捣鼓出了些新玩意，说不定能在扫荡行动里派上大用场。
E: Oh yeah... the Technology Division told me that they came up with a few new gadgets, which might just be useful for wiping out all those monsters.

C: 残响回廊后来怎么样了？
E: What happened at the Corridor of Fading Echoes?

C: 还能说什么呢？简直精神焕发。
E: What can I say? Simply splendid.

C: 我虽然没法像您一样驰骋沙场，但还是可以从一些小事做起的。您看，我只是稍微逼了自己一把，就把口齿不清的毛病改掉了。
E: I can't rush headlong into the fray as you can, but I can start with the small things. Check it out. I've just gotten rid of my stutter by pushing myself a little.

C: 在激活信标后，你意识到，这或许就是艾丝妲所说的「惊喜」。
E: After activating the beacon, you realize that this could be the "surprise" that Asta mentioned.

C: 我不是人…你也不是……
E: I'm not human... and neither are you...

C: 我看到过它拿那个「罐头」把玩，它很凶，连看都不让我看。
E: I saw it playing with that "can." It was fiercely protective with it too, and it wouldn't let me even glance at it.

C: （走吧。）
E: (Let's go.)

C: 让佩佩钻到马桶里。
E: Let Peppy go into the toilet bowl.

C: 你想起那个名为「新世界大门」的奇物，你说服了佩佩。
E: You remember the "Door to A New World" Curio and convince Peppy.

C: 一碟散发着淡淡香气的糕点，看上去没有被吃过的痕迹，放在桌子上太浪费了。
E: A plate of delectable pastries. It looks like it hasn't been eaten. It is too wasteful to leave on the table.

C: 吃起来有种被爱的感觉，让我想起了伟大的阮•梅女士……
E: It tastes like the feeling of being loved — this reminds me of the great Miss Ruan Mei...

C: 一码归一码，好奇害死猫这种事很常见，我并没有否认过我在为人处世上偶有失误。但这并不是「欺骗」，我也从来没骗过大家。
E: That's a separate issue. Curiosity kills the cat. These things are common, and I've never denied that I make mistakes dealing with people. But this is not a lie, I have never lied to everyone.

C: 出示。
E: Present evidence.

C: （这家伙态度很强硬啊，我嘴笨，沟通这种事，还得指望你了！）
E: (This guy's attitude is pretty stubborn. I'm not good at communicating. Can you do the talking instead!)

C: 这是哪个地区的正常作息呀…这可不行。虽然你长得好看，但也要注意保养。
E: Whose normal routine is this anyway? This won't do. Sure, you look great, but you've got to look after yourself too.

C: 据说很久以前，他们俩打过一场，花了十天十夜，结果是不分胜负。
E: I heard that long ago, they fought each other for ten days and ten nights, and it ended in a draw.

C: 什么体质都不行，要认真吃饭！你不会在偷偷减肥吧，人家觉得完全不需要哦？
E: No matter your constitution, you still need to eat properly! You're not secretly dieting, are you? I really don't think you need to!

C: 但你怎么把人家的名字都改了！回去仔细看一眼选项呀！
E: But how could you change my name like that!? C'mon, go back and read the options carefully!!

C: 人家很好奇…大家都是这样的吗？有着别人不知道的另一面？{NICKNAME}也是一样？
E: I'm really curious... is everyone like this? Having a side that no one else sees? Is {NICKNAME} the same?

C: 对了！{NICKNAME}，你在旅行中经历过的其他故事，也是一样吗？总会变得越来越严肃，让人一直不能放心…
E: Oh, right! {NICKNAME}, are all the other stories you've experienced on your journey the same? Always growing more serious, never feeling at ease...

C: 我从不这么认为。
E: I never saw it that way.

C: 查看时刻表。
E: Check timetable.

C: 准备完毕！
E: Preparations complete!

C: 好心的宾客，快来玩拼图呀…
E: Dear guest, please be kind and play the jigsaw puzzle...

C: 老夫以为今天的测试会难住你，没想到被你三下五除二地解决了。
E: I thought that today's test would be difficult for you. Didn't expect you to solve it so quickly.

C: 下回还会有占算的活计，您可别忘了。
E: Next time there'll be more routine divinations. Don't forget.

C: 运动比赛的结果而已，不重要不重要。
E: It's just the results of a sports match. It's not important.

C: 很好，接下来还有一个阵法要算，走吧。
E: Great, there's another matrix to operate. Let's get moving.

C: 你已经猜到一二了……
E: You've pretty much already guessed it...

C: 咳，看来咱们得消停上一段时间了。总之，这些报酬先拿着吧，一直以来多谢{NICKNAME}了，咱们可是…好搭档啊。
E: Ahem, it looks like we'll have to stop here for a while. Anyway, take your reward, please. I've been so grateful for you, {NICKNAME}. I feel like we're... a good team.

C: 不错不错，这才是学习的态度。
E: Hm. Good, good, good. This is the attitude one should take when learning.

C: 哼哼，这次我倒要看看你如何解开。
E: Haha. I want to see how you figure this one out.

C: 是吗？真的吗？天啊——！
E: Really? Truly? Oh, my Aeons!

C: 对我有什么好处。
E: What's in it for me?

C: 正是在下。
E: That's me.

C: 三百年，就这？
E: Three hundred years, and that's the best you could do?

C: 就是不知道它们都藏在哪儿了…以我的能力，完全没有头绪。如果您手头有这种积木的话，可以交给我，把它们销毁掉是我的职责！
E: There's just a small problem: I don't know where they are anymore. With my limited abilities, I'm completely at a loss. If you happen to have any of these building blocks, please hand them over to me. It's my duty to destroy them!

C: 假设，只是假设…你接下来要玩个游戏，一个使用视差错觉来设置难题的解谜游戏。
E: Hypothetically, just hypothetically... if you were playing a game straight after this, a puzzle game designed using parallax illusions.

C: 伴随着一阵悦耳的咬合音，面前的迷钟不再冒出黑烟与火花。
E: With a series of pleasant clicks, the Ticker in front of you stops emitting smoke and sparks.

C: 好啦好啦，来，欢迎光临「心静空间」——
E: All right, all right. Come, welcome to the Calmscape...

C: 不是，别用这种眼神看我！释义手册上就是这么写的！
E: Wait, don't look at me with those eyes! That's what's written in the manual!

C: 游客！这里好热闹啊！我都看不到自己的脚了！
E: Guest! It's so crowded here! I can't even see my own feet!

C: 搜集若虫…继续…必须……
E: Collect nymphs... Continue... Must...

C: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
E: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

C: 嗯…有位织者跃跃欲试、渴望证明自己的速度。金丝带来消息，它正停在<color=#dbc291ff>一张桌子上</color>，等待着挑战者上门呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who jumps at the chance and is eager to prove its speed. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>on a table</color>, waiting for new challengers.

C: 看来织者们是受到了预言的指引…这异样应该就是解开预言的关键。
E: It appears the weavers are guided by the prophecies... This unusual phenomenon may well hold the key to unlocking their secrets.

C: 嗯…有位织者气高胆壮，横冲直撞。金丝带来消息，它埋头在<color=#dbc291ff>墙壁上的凹槽中</color>钻出道路，请从咫尺之外的走廊带它回来吧。
E: Hmm... There is a daring weaver running amok. The golden thread brings tidings: They now bury themselves <color=#dbc291ff>within a groove in the wall</color>, carving out a trail. Please retrieve them from the nearby corridor.

C: 嗯…有位织者勇于直面自己的恐惧，潜入英雄与众神纷争的最前线。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铸魂区门前</color>探听消息，去那里找找看吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who confronts their fears head-on, venturing into the front lines of the heroes' struggle against the gods. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gather information <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the Soul-Forging Zone's doors</color>. Go there and look for them.

C: 事成之后我七你三。
E: I'm taking <unbreak>70%</unbreak>.

C: 孩子，我知道你不相信我。好在时间还很充裕，有什么问题，你大可以问个明白。
E: Child, you do not believe me. I can understand that. Fortunately, we have plenty of time. If you have any questions, please feel free to ask.

C: 要勇敢地面对困难。
E: You can't let challenges get you down!

C: 你以前也没偷成过…
E: But you didn't manage to steal it before, either...

C: 我于是变成一只飞鸟，一连歇息了十枝枝桠，终于飞到树顶。说实话，味道很一般。
E: So I turned into a bird and flew, resting my feet on ten branches, my journey ending at the treetop. Honestly, it didn't taste like much.

C: 但其实，扎格列斯把星星系到了一块石头上，当它想要恶作剧的时候，就会把石头扔出去！桀桀桀，让泰坦们为了找贼星而错过<color=#dbc291ff>眼皮子底下</color>的诡计……
E: But here's the trick — Zagreus attached the star to a stone. So whenever they wanted to do mischief, they'd simply toss the rock! Hehehe! Sending the Titans on a wild chase after the Thief Star while missing what's <color=#dbc291ff>right under their noses</color>...

C: 又来，我的东西你少惦记。
E: Not again. Stop eyeing my stuff.

C: 怎么，难道您对「艾格勒的启目集」也感兴趣？
E: What, are you also interested in "Aquila's Enlightenment" or something?

C: 啊？突然这么肉麻做什么，巴特鲁斯难道和你有什么特殊的伙伴关系吗？
E: Huh? Why get all mushy now. Do we have some kind of special connection?

C: 总之，既然我们在这里见面了，巴特鲁斯就送你一句金玉良言……
E: Well, since our paths have crossed here, allow me to offer some pearls of wisdom...

C: 不知道。
E: No idea.

C: 我也不想打…但巴特鲁斯给我设定的命运就是要和你进行试炼。没办法，快点来吧，早点结束早点下班！
E: I don't want to fight either... but Bartholos assigned me to test you. Can't be helped — let's get this over with quickly so I can call it a day!

C: 啊啊，巴特鲁斯说得没错，你果然很强。也许已经超过当年制霸此地的阳雷骑士了吧！
E: Ah, Bartholos wasn't exaggerating — you're incredibly strong! You might even outclass the Daythunder Knight who once reigned supreme here!

C: 别闹了，这只是一个普通的调查事件。从这里发现天才俱乐部秘辛的概率…不能说没有，只能说无限趋近于零。
E: Don't be ridiculous. This is just an ordinary investigation. The odds of uncovering any secret from the Genius Society here... Well, let's just say they're infinitely close to zero.

C: 「脑控巴特鲁斯」？
E: "Mind-control Bartholos"?

C: 他们无法继续进军，因为那将是与整个奥赫玛为敌；他们也无法自行回乡，因为轻信了元老的许诺，这些人根本没有携带足够回乡的盘缠。
E: They couldn't march ahead, because doing so would make them enemies of all Okhema. They couldn't return home either. They had trusted the elders too easily and brought no money for the journey back.

C: 没错没错！包括你的背包！
E: That's right! Your backpack included!

C: 答案就在这里。因为我们忘记了人类也是泰坦，忘记了这种语言不是通过耳朵和眼睛，而是通过心灵去理解的。
E: The answer lies in my hypothesis. It's because we have forgotten that humans are Titans too. We forgot that the language must be understood by the soul, instead of ears and eyes.

C: 恩维尔少见地长叹一声。
E: Avilius sighed deeply, an unusual gesture for him.

C: 我没懂…
E: I don't quite get it...

C: 预示出现了变化，但这究竟……？
E: The omen has changed, but what does it mean...?

C: 瞧，我没骗你吧？这还只是一小部分，那位欧洛尼斯的老祭司还留下了两道谜题——
E: See? I wasn't lying. This is just a small part. The old priest of Oronyx left two more puzzles behind—

C: 这是之前挂在神殿亭廊里的黄金世古画「欢宴之盟」。它记录了诸多城邦签订盟约时，云石天宫初次奠基的场景，曾被拍出千万利衡币的高价！
E: This is Feast of the Covenant, an ancient mural of the Era Chrysea that once hung in the temple pavilion. It depicts the foundation of Marmoreal Palace during the signing of a great city-state alliance. It was once auctioned for millions of Balance Coins!

C: 这个…是考卷？不…经卷…不对……
E: Wait, this is... an exam paper? No... a scripture? No, that can't be right...

C: 对不起，阿普列尤斯老师…我太害怕了。害怕面对黑潮，害怕直面死亡…可现在，就像你们一样，这一天还是来到了我的头上。
E: I'm sorry, Mr. Apuleius... I was scared. Scared of the black tide. Scared of death. But now, just like you... my time has come.

C: 时间宝贵，别自怨自艾了。
E: We don't have time for this. Focus.

C: 时间紧迫，仪式并不完全，破碎的记忆像潮汐，要把沙滩上的一切抹去…好在最后，它也将那个答案送到了我的面前。
E: The ritual was rushed, incomplete. My memories are breaking apart, like waves washing over the shore, erasing everything in their path... But in the end, at least it gave me the answer.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，请您原谅，这可能只是一个胆小鬼将死前的胡话——
E: {NICKNAME}, forgive me. These are just the ramblings of a coward at death's door—

C: 将吊坠放下。
E: Place the pendant down.

C: 愿她了却遗憾。
E: May she find peace with her regrets.

C: 当然知道啦！唔，知道一点儿。我整天被我娘监督练剑，没怎么上过学……
E: Of course, I know! Well, I know a little. My mum made me practice with swords all day — I didn't really go to school...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「要记得：你在模拟宇宙中的身份是『开拓』的阿基维利，如果你不知道怎么扮演祂，那就尽量少说话，多提问。我希望你首先认识这群星神，接着和祂们搞好关系，最后从祂们嘴里把我们关心的那点秘密全掏出来。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Remember, your identity in the Simulated Universe is Akivili of Trailblaze. If you don't know how to act like THEM, then talk less and ask more questions. I hope you can get to know these Aeons first, get on well with THEM, and ultimately drag all THEIR secrets out of THEM."</color>

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 结束。
E: Finish.

C: 关于「模拟宇宙」项目…
E: About the Simulated Universe project...

C: 行于相同命途的星神就会被吸引过来。
E: Aeons who follow the same Path will be drawn in.

C: 别忘了测试我的「模拟宇宙」！
E: Don't forget to test my Simulated Universe!

C: 先去找几个怪物打打，看看哪位模拟星神会先注意到你。
E: Find some monsters to fight. Let's see which simulated Aeon will notice you first.

C: 黑塔叹了口气：「再往前走一点有个<color=#dbc291ff>下载装置</color>，记得用它扩充队伍。你的大脑正在逐渐适应『模拟宇宙』，可用的内存会慢慢释放给你，这样就可以让更多的人参战。好了，别愣着啦，去选祝福吧。」
E: Herta sighs. "There's a <color=#dbc291ff>Downloader</color> just a little further ahead. Remember to use it to expand your team. Your brain is gradually adapting to the Simulated Universe, and the available RAM will gradually become accessible for you so you can play with more people. Alright, snap out of it. Go and choose your Blessing."

C: 你还真不客气…
E: You have zero manners...

C: 不好意思，我没看见。
E: Sorry, I didn't see it.

C: 位面饰品？
E: Planar Ornament?

C: 他是中年人吗？
E: Is he a middle-aged guy?

C: 后来，在虫潮开始的第二十四夜，她将一只从破漏的窗里钻进来的虫子当作自己的小孩抚养；她会用尽所有心血教它走路、穿鞋，甚至教它说话；七天后，她的家里遍布子嗣…却没有一只能为自己穿鞋。
E: Later, on the twenty-fourth night of the Swarm Invasion, she discovers an insect crawling through a slit in her window and raises it as her own child. She teaches it to walk, to put on shoes, and even to speak with all her heart. Seven days later, her house becomes flooded with her new offspring... although none of them can put on shoes for themselves.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了虚空。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the void itself.

C: 祂的气息扑在你的脸上，祂的声音变成了虚空。
E: THEIR scent wafts over your face, and THEIR voice turns into the void itself.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，刚刚提醒过你了，第二位面的虫子是最多的。」黑塔的声音出现，她把你的思绪拉回，「赶紧走，当心被虫潮困住了，难以脱身。你还得跑完三个位面呢。」
E: "{NICKNAME}, I reminded you earlier that the second plane had the most insects." Herta's voice pulls your mind back to reality. "Go now. Be careful not to be caught by the Swarm and get stuck here. Don't forget you have to visit all three planes."

C: 认知拓宽：「宇宙王座」•其二
E: Broadened Cognition: Universe's Throne (II)

C: 「终末」的预言下，一切归于终结。
E: Everything will end, according to Finality's prediction.

C: 帝国的暴行。
E: Violence from the Empire.

C: 回到，哪里？还有——你是谁？
E: Back... where? And also... who are you?

C: 你愉悦地看着那游刃有余的表情，在瞬间转变为恐惧。
E: You watch on in glee as the smug and satisfied expression suddenly turns to dread.

C: 阿尔比拉德语调略有摇摆。「没有。但这一定不是我的理念漏洞，只是在实操过程中产生了错误，比如……」她向你投来求助的眼神。
E: Arblad's tone contained a hint of hesitation. "No. But there is no way that this is an oversight in my theory! There must have just been an error in the creation process, for instance..." She looks to you as if asking for your help.

C: 一枚好果子也胜过空手而归。
E: A nice bit of fruit beats going home with nothing.

C: 最后一架巨帆坠入富斯顿星，它的帆面在大气层中徐徐燃烧。与此同时，上万艘登陆舰开始向这颗星球发动最后的总攻。
E: The final sail crashes down into Planet Fuston, its surface slowly combusting in the atmosphere. At this very moment, tens of thousands of landing ships begin their final joint attack on the planet.

C: 寻找那道气息。
E: Search for that scent.

C: 分解认知，逆转衰变，拉伸空间，创造行星，有关「权杖」的故事里混杂了太多戏说和妄想，但事实证明，绝大多数的看客的杜撰，甚至无法企及天才造物的皮毛。如此的技术，此前却一直被用于单纯的屠戮。
E: Dissecting our comprehension, reversing decay, stretching space, creating stars — stories about Scepters have been tainted by much fiction and delusion. But the truth has proven that many of the observers' embellishments don't even scratch the surface of this genius creation. Such technology has inevitably only been used in sheer slaughter.

C: 我想念帕提维娅。
E: I miss Patavia.

C: 一道无法实现的科学谜题。
E: A scientific riddle that cannot be achieved.

C: 「看吧，这就是我说的，『运气』。」黑塔若有所思地看向帕提维娅，尽管博识学会的妥协已指日可待，现在的你们，仍是两位滞留于伊斯梅尔的落魄学士。
E: "Look. That's what I mean by 'Luck.'" Herta looks thoughtfully at Patavia. Though the Intelligentsia Guild's compromise is imminent, you two are presently still disheveled scholars stranded in Izmael.

C: 「……」她在思考黑塔的提问吗？还是说，仅是在思考，怎样富有趣味地杀死你们？
E: "..." Is she contemplating Herta's question? Or is she merely thinking about how to kill you all in the most entertaining way?

C: 「问得好，你比其他的受害者更敏锐。」面目模糊的女人声音听来如此悲伤，「人的思考仅限于方寸头颅之内，而神明的思考，以星光明灭为神经元放电…以我等天才对垒的胜负为思考结论。」
E: "Good question. You're sharper than the rest of the victims." The murky-faced woman's voice sounds sorrowful. "Human thoughts are processed within our tiny brains, while divine thoughts are on a scale where the birth and implosion of stars are mere sparks on THEIR neurons... And the conclusion of THEIR thoughts is nothing less than the outcome of us geniuses' battles to the death."

C: 我没有这样的思考能力。
E: I have no mental capacity to question this.

C: 「希望我的帮助令你满意。」纯美骑士虔诚地说。
E: "I hope you're satisfied with my help," the Knight of Beauty says reverently.

C: 你来到了一个古怪的太空餐厅。在红砖制的房子里，驻足许多巴维鲁族人、狐人，以及一些人类…你发现甚至有只谛听坐在长桌前。
E: You arrive at a strange restaurant in outer space. In the building built with red bricks, there are some Bavirus, foxians, and humans. There is even a Diting sitting at a long table.

C: 你靠近了那些孢夹。正当你想触碰之时，一位被浸泡在液囊里的无名客发出了哀嚎！他似乎示意你别碰！他断断续续地向你吐露可帮助他们逃脱的解药名称…「代谢酶」……
E: You approach the Sporangium. Just as you want to reach out for the sacs, one of the Nameless submerged in them lets out a wail to stop you from touching them! After much struggle, he utters the name of the antidote that can help them escape — Metabolase...

C: 金属巨构并未回应你的期待，但它并不焦急，总有一天，帝国的后继者会抵达它的面前。
E: The colossal metal behemoth has not responded to your expectations. However, there is no need to rush because one day, the successor to the Empire will come here.

C: 积极的态度终会得到积极的结果，经过了诸多的努力，你的生活很快就会迎来一次令人振奋的转折。
E: Life will eventually reward you if you maintain a positive attitude. After a painstaking effort, your life will soon welcome an exciting turning point.

C: 冗长的泊停登记磨灭了你的耐心，外星细菌消杀更是令你陷入了长达二十个标准时的空腹时间。
E: The long and drawn-out docking registration process has destroyed your patience and the alien bacteria extermination process has sent you into a long, <unbreak>20</unbreak>-hour period of fasting.

C: 你掏出兜里的橡皮擦，打算让他见识见识，什么叫一物降一物。
E: You pull out the eraser from your pocket, fully prepared to teach him that everything has a weakness.

C: 一艘残破的愚人船出现在你面前，它的骨架是简陋的冷笑话，船帆是老套的星际段子，假面愚者高举俚语的酒杯，邀你登船共饮。
E: A ragged Ship of Fools appears before you. Its hull is a dingy dry joke, its sails out-of-fashion stellar memes. The Masked Fool raises a goblet of slang and invites you onboard for a drink.

C: 你对男人聘请后援的行为视若无睹，谁说吉奥里亚的赐福不能是「人多势众」？
E: You pay no heed to the man's request for reinforcements — who says that Georios' blessing can't be "strength in numbers"?

C: 偷儿的报复。
E: The thief's retribution.

C: 它为世间带来的机运就像是一枚硬币，落在正面就走运，落在反面就只能认命，正如变化莫测的扎格列斯。它乐于见到好运连连的人被妒忌，也喜于目睹陡然的厄运令人家破人亡。
E: The fortune they bring to the world is like a coin — heads for luck, tails for resignation, reflecting the capricious nature of Zagreus. They delight in seeing the fortunate envied and revel in watching sudden misfortune bring others to ruin.

C: 晚风是欧洛尼斯的呼吸。
E: The evening breeze is the breath of Oronyx.

C: 可世界依然静止，事物本应如律法约定的那般变化，但「永恒的下一刻」却永远不会到来，直到第三位泰坦自朦胧中苏醒。
E: Yet the world stands still, as things should morph according to the laws, but the "next moment in eternity" never comes until the third Titan stirs from obscurity.

C: 它也曾剪断道路，把它们缠绕成团，替众神监禁扎格列斯。纵使是诡计之泰坦，也无法从门径中逃离。
E: They have cut off paths, entangling them into knots to confine Zagreus for the gods. Even the Trickery Titan cannot escape these maze-like doors.

C: 但盛世也会凋敝。
E: Yet, eras of abundance can wither.

C: 这里是悬锋城的竞技场，悬锋子民正在为他们那残暴的主庆祝一场胜利。而你，便是这场狂欢中注定要被牺牲的战利品。
E: This is the arena of Castrum Kremnos, where the citizens of Castrum Kremnos exalt in slaughter, celebrating yet another triumph for their bloodthirsty king. And you? You are nothing more than the loot, a doomed offering in this twisted carnival of death.

C: 飞行器全身上下都是可燃物，只需一个火星子，这片伪装的云彩就会化成真正的火烧云。
E: Your machine is a flying tinderbox. One stray spark, and your cloud-like disguise will ignite into a fiery inferno.

C: 由于你博学多才兴趣广泛，科研成果也是五花八门，但是成果的学术价值只是一方面，能不能投评委的所好也是关键。
E: Your scholarly pursuits span a dizzying array of fields, but in academia, raw merit isn't everything — Submitting something the panel likes is just as crucial.

C: 也正是有了这些规则的支撑，才有了大地、海洋、天空的诞生。
E: It is with the support of these laws that the land, the sea, and the sky came to be.

C: 泰坦的思维非人能理解。
E: The mind of a Titan is beyond human comprehension.

C: 吉奥里亚罕见地发了脾气，它把这坨烂泥堆积到河口以示不满，却意外地给人们带来肥沃的河口土地。
E: It was rare for Georios to lose their temper. They piled the lump of mud at the river mouth in protest, but unexpectedly, it brought fertile land to the people.

C: 祝我们的磐岩之脊永远安详沉睡，祝我们脚下的土地永远稳固坚定。
E: May our Pillar of Stone know eternal slumber, and may the soil beneath our feet remain ever firm.

C: 人们要为自己的行为付出代价。
E: People have to pay for their actions.

C: 于是瑟希斯降下了它的试炼。它从自己的祭祀中，选了一位最为虔诚的年轻人，并给了他一把形状奇异、颗粒饱满的种子。
E: So Cerces imposed their trial. From among their devotees, they selected the most devout young man and gave him a handful of strangely shaped, plump seeds.

C: 直到最后，婴孩成为一个比艾格勒还要庞大的巨人。它生出双手以触摸天空，生出双腿以脚踏大地。它的头发被云朵染上雪白，它的眼睛被天空染上苍蓝。
E: Until, at last, the infant became a giant, greater than even Aquila. They sprouted hands to touch the sky and legs to stride across the earth. Their hair turned snow-white, dyed by the clouds, and their eyes became deep blue, painted by the skies.

C: 你得救救我呀医生。
E: You have to save me, doctor.

C: 你下意识伸出手拍了拍它，不知是否错觉，你感觉奇物发出的光比先前耀眼。
E: You subconsciously reach out to tap the Curio. Not knowing whether it is an illusion, you feel that the light emitted by the strange object is more dazzling than before.

C: 黯淡的奇物突然大放光芒，你连忙捂住了眼睛。数息后，你重新睁开眼，裂痕却消失殆尽……
E: The previously dim Curio suddenly shines brightly, and you throw your hands up to shield your eyes. Several seconds later, you open your eyes — but the cracks have disappeared...

C: 不过…「八心八箭镶嵌珠宝的光锥」俗不可耐，配不上你出众的气质。
E: But this Jeweled-Studded Arrowheart Light Cone is too mundane an object for such a high-quality individual as yourself.

C: 为它打榜<unbreak>10</unbreak>次
E: Why not give it ten upvotes?

C: 虽然自己的手指关节或许要歇上三两天才会恢复，但这短暂的疼痛却成就了一名真正的艺术家！
E: Your knuckles may need two or three days of rest to recover, but this temporary pain has brought a true artist to fame!

C: 你想起一些匆匆别过的面孔与名字，他们在同行的旅途中渐渐消逝……
E: You remember faces and names that you passed by, gradually disappearing as you journey together...

C: 还是别喝了。
E: I better not drink it.

C: 咖啡很苦，就像人生一样苦，你决定不再折磨自己。
E: Coffee, like life, is utterly bitter. You decide not to torture yourself anymore.

C: 「虚数」的法则？
E: Law of the Imaginary?

C: 能签个废除保密协议的协议吗？
E: Can I sign another agreement to nullify this non-disclosure agreement?

C: 请～用额头接触它即可。记住闭上眼睛，不然会晕。
E: Sure~ Just touch it with your forehead. Remember to close your eyes, or your head will start spinning.

C: 「得了吧，你也知道我识不得几个字，」你甩了甩尾巴，「我可是只*老鼠*啊！」
E: "Come on, you know I can't even read well." You flick your tail. "I'm just a RAT!"

C: 他的肌肉…我要晕了！
E: His muscles... I'm going to faint!

C: 不愧是冠军，这人气！
E: How popular! As expected of the champ.

C: 你从未想过自己还能坐在这里。富丽堂皇的剧院，豪华包厢，丝滑的红色天鹅绒沙发里填充着轻盈的皮埃尔鸭绒…除了「上流」，你想象不到任何形容词了。
E: You have never imagined yourself to be sitting in the lavish box of a grand theater. The silky red velvet sofa is stuffed with Pierduck down feathers. You can't find a better word to describe the sofa other than "extravagant."

C: 「不喜欢像这样被我控制？」她歪头，对你咯咯笑着，眨眨眼，双手又立食指与中指，举过头顶，好像一对兔耳。不得已，你也如此照做。你觉得实在羞耻。
E: "You don't like being controlled by me in this way?" She snickers at you with her head crooked. Blinking her eyes, she sticks up her index and middle fingers and rests both hands on her head, making them look like a pair of rabbit ears. You are forced to do the same and feel embarrassed about it.

C: 你知道她在故意戏弄你：「能别趁机读取我的想法吗？」你故意皱眉，又很快转过头去，避免与她的目光交汇。你从来不适应这个。
E: You know she is making fun of you. "Could you not read my mind?" You deliberately crease your forehead and quickly spin around to avoid meeting her eyes. This is not something you are used to doing.

C: 亚伯南安号列车上总是如此闷热。你每日下班都与各种机械义体肩挨着肩站在一起，仿佛你冰箱里塞满的台伯鱼罐头，还有罐头里塞满的台伯鱼。
E: It is always stiflingly hot on the Abelane Express. Every day, You are squeezed shoulder to shoulder with various mechanical bodies as you commute home from work, as if you are one of those cans of Tiber fish stuffed in your fridge — or a fish inside the cans itself.

C: 触碰忆泡。
E: Touch the Memory Bubble.

C: 「天啊，」你有点受不了了，「听人才激励部主管的口水话都比听这帮烂泥吐泡泡有意思。」你不禁翻了个白眼，却猛然发现国王正盯着你——
E: "By the stars!" You can't take it anymore. "Listening to the prattling of the Talent Motivation Department's top brass would be more interesting than this muck." You can't resist the urge to roll your eyes, but suddenly notice the king is staring directly at you.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 「细胞癌化，软组织钙化…」你本以为那帮老古董都是一群狗嘴里吐不出象牙的货色，可这份报告确实有点意思…可惜，只是读报告并不能安抚你躁动的心。
E: "Cells become cancerous, and soft tissues calcify..." You initially had assumed these old fogies were only capable of churning out useless garbage, but this report is actually interesting... Unfortunately, reading reports cannot calm your anxious heart.

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 是吧！好似清泉涌流，让人和虫听了都身心愉悦嗡！
E: Isn't it! It's like a torrent, bubbling up to bring joy to people and insects!

C: 「后巷」？
E: The "back alley"?

C: 熟悉的铁艺栅栏门和熟悉的男人。眼前的光景恰如彼时——只是男人眉间的皱纹愈发深重了。
E: The familiar wrought iron gate, and a familiar man — the scene felt almost identical to the other time, if not for the deepened creases across the man's brow.

C: 又是不干净的东西？
E: The ghostly goings-on again?

C: 橙色、黑色和白色的碎片散落在你的脚下。只有橙色的那几片属于你眼前的矿脉。
E: Shards of orange, black, and white scatter around your feet. Only the orange shards belong to the vein that you see before you.

C: ——赢家免单！没错，免单！
E: Winners eat free! That's right. I said, "Free!"

C: 可笑…不，你没理解。
E: You're funny... No, you don't understand.

C: 宝箱内是一方黑暗，衬得角落里闪现的一簇光芒格外惹眼。
E: The inside of the chest is completely black, but in the corner of the chest's lining, you see a flash of light that particularly catches your eye.

C: 「如果可以，请您留下自己的名字，以便我们在推出优惠入住活动时及时提醒您。」
E: "If possible, please leave your name, so we can notify you when we have discounts."

C: 喔…希露瓦听到你这么说可是会很伤心的。
E: Oh... Serval will be hurt if she hears you say that.

C: 天啊，你真是个善良的人！
E: My goodness! You really are a good person!

C: （是时候给希露瓦拍照了……）
E: (It's time to take Serval's picture...)

C: 友人兼恋人。
E: Friends and lovers.

C: 喀，你见过泰坦们的面孔吗？很久以前曾有贤者说，不可直视神的容貌，但……
E: Crrk, have you seen the face of the Titans? A long time ago, a sage once said not to stare directly into the face of god, yet...

C: 我必须背负这座天平，不然它就会缓缓倒下，就像曾经的太阳那样喀……
E: I must shoulder the balance of these scales, otherwise it will gradually fall, just like the sun did...

C: 什么，你连我也不打算放过？…我们的灰发勇士坚定地走向了墙边，喜提纪念品+1喀。
E: What's this? You're not even letting me go, either? ...Our gray-haired warrior strides resolutely up to the wall, and get +1 Souvenir.

C: 虫可忍，但虫不可再忍。现在和解已经太晚了喀！
E: A bug may tolerate much, but even a bug has limits. Too late for making peace now, crrrk!

C: 感官所带来的体验已足够丰盈我们的灵魂，冰冷的理性思维只会将其扼杀，就像镰刀摧毁纯洁而脆弱的嫩芽。
E: Our senses alone can fulfill our souls, while cold reason only kills them, like a blade destroying pure, tender buds.

C: 但你现在这样，搞得虎克非常担心你的游戏体验！
E: But how you're acting now has me worried about your gameplay experience!

C: 没有什么能拦住我！
E: Nothing can stop me!

C: 宝贝们都去哪儿了…
E: Where did all my precious go...

C: 没事了，玩儿去吧你。
E: Alright then. Go play somewhere else.

C: 介绍伟大的天父刻法勒…
E: Let me introduce the mighty Sky Father Kephale...

C: 不过我一点也不怕！衣匠姐姐手里的剑，会保护蝶和其他若虫们的…对吧？
E: But I'm not afraid at all! Miss Garmentmaker's sword will protect me and the other little nymphs... right?

C: 自从我获得了共情能力，知晓了爱人和被爱的感受，我就决定要忠诚于自己的欲望！
E: Since I gained the ability to empathize, I've come to understand what loving others and being loved feel like. I decide to be loyal to my own desires!

C: 「只要他三天卖不出一只机巧鸟周边，货全老哥就得再去进货<unbreak>100</unbreak>只。」
E: "Three days to sell a cycrane merchandise, otherwise Salesby has to buy another <unbreak>100</unbreak>."

C: 你仿佛能看见从它那不存在的利齿与鼻孔中冒出了一缕缕黑烟，此时它正陷入酣眠，腹中的火焰隐隐待发，还不太旺盛。
E: You can almost see wisps of black smoke rising from its non-existent draconic nostrils. At the moment, it is in deep sleep, the flames in its belly rumbling in anticipation.

C: 你听懂了警告，唐突的到访就应该到此结束，你确信它在假眠，只是等待着你疏忽大意的瞬间一跃而起，挥动它那如同雷霆一般的尾巴，将你彻底湮灭。
E: You understand the warning and your sudden visit should end here. You are convinced it's only feigning asleep and lying in wait for that moment to pounce on you and annihilate you with a rapid sweep of its fulminous tail.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 呵，你现在才找到我呀。
E: Ha, you've finally found me.

C: 大哥，你看{F#她}{M#他}还什么都不知道，这里根本不欢迎{F#她}{M#他}，哈哈哈哈。
E: Boss, {F#She}{M#He} doesn't know anything. {F#She}{M#He} is not welcome here at all. Hahahaha!

C: 那我走掉不就好了吗？
E: Well, I'll just leave then.

C: …你们两个，见识浅了。没错，我就像是螺丝咕姆一样！
E: ...You two are so shallow. That's right! I'm just like Screwllum!

C: 假如那帮狂热的家伙还在， 一定会这么说喀。
E: If those fanatics were still around, they'd surely be saying that right now.

C: 我看不到你的诚意，到此为止吧。
E: I don't think that's in good faith. That's enough.

C: 我会在比赛中击败你的，到此为止吧。
E: I'll just have to beat you in the next phase then. Let's end it here then.

C: 我来告诉你，你输定了！
E: Sorry to say, but you're gonna lose!

C: 呃，不过，星槎飞在天上，真的会堵吗？这个比喻似乎并不是那么恰当……
E: Uh, but starskiffs fly up in the air. Do they really get congested? This metaphor isn't really the best...

C: 但这小小的一口水实在于事无补。你两眼一黑，晕了过去。
E: But that little sip of water doesn't really help at all. Your vision goes black and you faint.

C: 嗯，当时有很多同事没见过机巧鸟说话，一直去找它说话，给它聊抑郁了。
E: Yes, but back then many of us had never even seen a cycrane speak before. We kept chatting with it until it became depressed.

C: 早说过了，错峰搭乘，特定楼层限停，不要每层楼都按按钮喀！
E: I told you — off-peak rides only, limited stops for designated floors! Stop pressing every single button, crrk!

C: 此处的谜团已经揭开，不知这最后的真相，诸位是否满意呢？
E: The mysteries of this place have been unraveled... but tell me, does the final truth bring you peace?

C: 阳雷！我都说了，阳雷啊！你这家伙，难道不怕死的吗？
E: Daythunder! I've told you, Daythunder! Aren't you afraid of dying?

C: 没错！
E: That's right!

C: 理论是理论，实践是实践。你能保证这片水体能将炸弹爆炸产生的能量全部吸收吗？
E: A theory is just a theory without being put in practice. Can you guarantee that this body of water can absorb all the energy generated by the explosion of the bomb?

C: …好吧，已经没什么好说的了。一诺千金，去做你想做的事吧。
E: ... Alright, there's nothing else I can say. A promise is a promise. Go do what you have to do.

C: 好的好的，我知道了。我去转交告十王司，也感谢你对神策府工作的大力支持。
E: Okay, thanks for letting me know. I will relay the message to the Ten-Lords Commission, and thank you for your support for the Seat of Divine Foresight's cause.

C: 那包裹里真是炸弹吗？
E: Does that parcel really contain a bomb?

C: 真的吗？你把它给我试试。
E: Really? Can you give it to me?

C: 所以我就选在他们最大的货运星槎上咯，往来的匠人那么多，他要是敢来…我就可以当场揭穿他，把经过再发出去，嘿嘿……
E: So I chose to have it at the largest freight starskiff they have. With so many craftsmen coming in and out, if he dares to show his face, I'll expose all of his fake wisdom and post it online. By then, heheh....

C: 为什么你要答应他？
E: Then why do you agree to it?

C: 你这么钓鱼不太好吧？
E: It's not good to instigate flame wars like this...

C: （将持明小孩的事告诉他）
E: (Tell him about the Vidyadhara child)

C: …也就只敢发发帖了！
E: ...They only dare to post online!

C: 很酷。
E: They're very cool.

C: 粗暴的涂鸦将过去的文字覆盖，愤怒与不满从殷红的色彩中溢出。
E: Rude graffiti covers what was written here before. A sense of rage and resentment emanates from the bright red paint.

C: 过一天算一天呗，你看那些偷渡客，没打工不也活得好好的吗？
E: We'll take it a day at a time. You see those stowaways over there? They're not working and they seem to be doing just fine, don't they?

C: 没活下去的偷渡客，也不会让我们看到吧…
E: Well, they're not going to let us see the stowaways that didn't survive, are they...

C: 我向一位美丽的迷因表白…
E: I confessed my love to a beautiful meme...

C: 随着游戏币咕噜噜地滚进站牌的肚子，整个站台也开始发出咔咔咔的声响，有什么东西就此连接了起来，前往下一站的班次也已准备就绪。
E: As your tokens roll into the sign's belly with a rattling, the entire stop also starts to emit clanking sounds. Something sounds like it got connected, and the ride to the next stop is ready and waiting.

C: 你无法在穿衣镜里看清自己现在的模样，这令你倍感失望。
E: Unable to see yourself clearly in the full-length mirror, you feel extra disappointed.

C: 不是吧，扎格列斯？
E: You're kidding. Zagreus?

C: 音乐对吧，我懂。
E: Music, right? I get it.

C: 这趟跟团游，来得真值。
E: This group tour was worth every coin.

C: 我昨天见到了圣女！
E: I saw the Holy Maiden yesterday!

C: 威严神圣的刻法勒…
E: The mighty and divine Kephale...

C: 找不到我就要你好看。
E: If you don't find me, you're dead meat.

C: 我将投入火种的怀抱！
E: I shall embrace the Coreflame!

C: 哎…瞧我这准头儿，怎么又没扔进去……
E: Darn it... how did I miss that shot?

C: 那位我们已经抓起来，念在您是初犯，还是仙舟的贵客…给您两条路吧，要么交一万信用点罚款，要么去参加社区服务。您怎么选？
E: We've already apprehended the other one, and seeing as you're a first-time offender, as well as a guest of the Xianzhou... We'll give you a choice. Either pay a <unbreak>10,000</unbreak>-credit fine, or complete community service. Which one is it going to be?

C: （略微透露丹恒的小秘密）
E: (You ever-so-slightly let on a tiny bit about Dan Heng's secret)

C: 呜哇！原来你们是这么看待帕姆的？！列车长怎么会是干这种事的人帕！
E: Wow! So that's what you think of Pom-Pom!? Would a conductor behave this way?

C: 冒险必备品
E: Adventuring Essentials

C: 后果是什么
E: What is the consequence?

C: 呜哇！你到底想干什么哇！
E: Oh, no! What on earth are you planning to do?

C: 看来车厢的地板需要保养了，可能是我眼花帕。
E: Seems like the coach's floor is in need of some maintenance. Maybe my eyesight is failing me.

C: 那就这么说定了帕！有空的话你可以跟他们说一声，让他们来车上逛逛。
E: It's a deal! Please invite them over if you have time.

C: 我挺喜欢。
E: I like them.

C: 关于丹恒：睡觉
E: About Dan Heng: Sleep

C: 不过后来帕姆发现，服务器机组散发的热量还是挺暖和的。而且丹恒乘客对此完全不在意，让帕姆不要担心他。
E: But then Pom-Pom made a discovery: The heat emanating from the server unit provides plenty of warmth. And since Dan Heng himself insists on sleeping there, Pom-Pom decided to stop worrying about him so much.

C: （逃开杰帕德的搜索，一鼓作气完成演练吧。）
E: (Escape Gepard's search and finish the drill.)

C: 这行动已经很不容易啦，都怪您太厉害了。
E: This operation is far from simple. Maybe it's just because you're too skilled.

C: 小事，包我身上了。
E: No sweat. I'll handle it.

C: 给钱就行。
E: All you need to do is give me some money.

C: 啊，当然可以！我们「正当权益会社」是许多贝洛伯格人自发组建的组织——专注于帮助所有会员暂时逃离家庭和责任的束缚！
E: Why, of course! We are a volunteer group consisting of Belobogians that help all members temporarily escape the bond of families and responsibilities!

C: 哦，我的天哪…！
E: Oh my! How impressive!

C: 浅浅试探了几轮对方的话术，你便对这场比试失去了兴趣。对方谈及的内容确实并不能引起你的太多关注，还是别把宝贵的时间浪费在这种无益的谈话上了。
E: You lose interest in the competition after a few rounds of banter. The spiel you get isn't scintillating enough to waste your time on.

C: 我不懂。
E: I don't know.

C: 此处贴着一幅艳美绝俗的画像…或者说，通缉令。画中的男性神情真挚，口衔红花，热烈如炽焰。
E: There's an otherworldly, sensuous portrait here... or rather, a Wanted poster. The guy in the poster appears sincere, gripping a rose in his teeth as he blazes with enthusiasm.

C: 总之…我之后会再去向他确认下状况。要是还有没回收的通缉令就糟了……
E: Anyway... I'll check in with him later to confirm everything's okay. It'd be terrible if there were any outstanding warrants that weren't revoked...

C: 看来这就是最后一张通缉令了。贝洛伯格的市容市貌因你焕然一新，恭喜你！
E: This looks like the last one. Belobog's cityscape has been completely revitalized thanks to you. Congratulations!

C: 你花了一段时间在球型的表面仔细搜索，终于找到了贝洛伯格的位置。
E: You eventually pinpoint Belobog's location on the globe's surface after diligent inspection.

C: 西南方有什么？
E: What's in the southwest?

C: 好好拿着我的礼物吧，拜拜！
E: You enjoy that gift, okay. Bye!

C: 是嘛…不对，你肯定是蒙的！有本事就再比试一场。
E: Oh really... No, you must have cheated somehow! Let's try again if you think you've got the skills!

C: 啧啧，这场面…也多亏智械皮糙肉厚，要是换成一般人啊，已经无了。
E: Tsk tsk, what a sight... Thank goodness Intellitrons are thick-skinned and meaty. They'd be a goner if it were a normal person.

C: 不然呢？我和他什么仇什么怨，犯得着用这么贵的车故意撞他？
E: How else? What kind of grudge would I have against him to deliberately crash a car this pricey into him?

C: …之前。看着她那时的状态，我又自责又心痛。我恨自己无能，恨自己没法让她过上想要的生活，更别提支持她去追逐梦想了。
E: ...It was before. Seeing her in that state, I blamed myself and I felt so sorry for her. I hated that I was so powerless. I hated that there was no way for me to give her the life that she wanted, let alone support her in chasing her dreams.

C: 所以我要留在这里——我要时不时回到梦境里去，试着去融化一颗冰冷的心。总有一天…我们一家人会真正团圆。
E: That is why I must stay here — I have to keep coming back to the Dreamscape and try to melt her frozen heart. One day... Our family will be reunited properly.

C: 赌局的期限快到了，即使拖着这副破烂的身体，我也必须参加。在此之前……
E: The betting deadline is coming up, and even with this battered-up body, I have to take part. Before that...

C: …奥洛看人的眼光不会有错。还好你始终带着这块零件，并如约前往了现场——否则他就要输掉那场赌局了。
E: ...Oro is a great judge of character. It is fortunate that you held on to this fragment and went to watch the gamble as promised... Otherwise, he would have lost.

C: 遇到什么困难了吗？
E: Are you in some kind of trouble?

C: 您无需自责，是我不该提出如此无礼的请求。就当小女子没说过吧。
E: You must not blame yourself. It was me that should not have made such a rude request. Pretend I never said anything.

C: 哼。人已经到手了，就到此为止吧。兄弟们，把这个逃走的女人带回去！
E: Hah, we've secured her, we can leave it here. Men, take this fugitive back where she belongs!

C: 怎叹…唉。
E: Ahh...

C: 淡影离群叹惜怜。
E: Faded shades depart, sighing with pity.

C: 我打出生起的唯一使命，就是被倒入一只完美、精致的酒杯中，供全银河最雍容富贵的名流品鉴。
E: Right from my birth, I've had only one mission — to be poured into a perfect and well-made glass for the enjoyment of the wealthiest elites across the entire cosmos.

C: 据说，这朝露小屋珍藏的陈酿，喝了比星星的歌声还要美。那润泽的琼浆，那醇美的清香，哪怕是见到它那耀眼的光泽，都让我心旷神怡。
E: It is said that drinkin' the ol' beverages of Dawndew Hut is more beautiful than the songs of the stars. The glossy flow of the liquid, the sweet aroma, even just the dazzling luster can bring my heart calm.

C: 就在不远处，一只广告牌正在冥思苦想着什么。
E: Not far away, you see a billboard seemingly in deep thought about something.

C: 这是一块无生命的广告牌——整个匹诺康尼恐怕只有你知道，他曾经以「广告牌侦探」的身份在这梦中活过。
E: This is a lifeless billboard... You are likely the only person in Penacony who knows that it once lived in the Dreamscape under the identity of "Billboard Detective."

C: 痕迹被抹除了。
E: The traces were wiped clean.

C: 第一个孔位！你应该有不少符合这个身高要求的朋友。他们是谁？
E: The first slot! You probably have a fair number of friends that match this height, right?

C: 冰冷的仙舟机巧少女会接到你的电话吗？
E: Do you think the cold Xianzhou ingenium girl will accept your call?

C: 跟我一起说——
E: Everyone, together...

C: （大家都回去了…和朋友们偶尔这样聚一聚也不错嘛。）
E: (Everyone has gone back... It's nice to get together with friends like this now and then, isn't it?)

C: 每个人其实都是桶，只是套上了人类的躯壳。当你走上铁桶命途的道路，就会褪去伪装，呈现出真实的姿态。
E: Every person is just a can wearing the shell of a human. The moment you embark onto the iron can's Path, your disguise will fade away, revealing your true self.

C: 你自己也信了？
E: Are you convinced too?

C: 我回去也捏个球棒神。
E: I should go home and make a Baseballer God too.

C: 我上次交过了。
E: I paid the last time.

C: 你知道的，我们苏乐达的情绪都比较容易激动。所以，无论中途我出了什么问题，都不要停下来，愤怒到什么程度才能取胜，我心里有数。
E: As you know, us SoulGlads' emotions are quite easily stimulated. So, no matter what happens to me, you must not stop! I know how mad I have to be to take victory!

C: 话音未落，一张略微褪色的卡片便从笔记本的夹层中跌落。
E: Just before the last words drop, a faded card falls out from between the journal's folds.

C: 咳咳。我们还没走远呢。
E: Ahem. We haven't left yet.

C: 就见你消极怠工了。
E: All I see is someone not doing their job.

C: 算了，还是别乱碰了。
E: Never mind. I'll stop fiddling with it.

C: 您刚刚不就在大谈特谈幽囚狱的防越狱工作不够严谨……
E: Weren't you just rattling on about the lack of rigorous control over escape prevention in The Shackling Prison?

C: 你们不给我好吃好喝的招待着也就算了，怎么我要离开这破地方还这么多事？
E: You don't give me a grand welcome, fine, but why do I still have to go through so many hoops just to leave this wretched place?

C: 好吧，由「简单性原理」来看，这不无可能！他们为此还准备了一点简单的小补偿，收下吧，希望你能心领神会闭口不提。
E: All right, based on the "principle of parsimony," this is not impossible! As such, they have prepared a small gift for you as compensation. Please accept it and never mention this incident again.

C: 你放心，我们并不是来报复你的。一来，这里是监狱，幽府武弁都在盯着我们呢；二来，很明显，我们应该是打不过你的。
E: Don't worry, we're not here to take revenge. After all, this is a prison, and the Wraith Wardens are all watching us. Also, we're obviously not a match for you.

C: 我会按照你的说顺序前进哦！
E: I'll move according to your instructions!

C: 别的我不问了，报酬快交给我。
E: I won't say anymore, then. Now give me my reward!

C: 说到底还是做坏事是吧？
E: Let's be honest. You're up to no good, aren't you?

C: 太看得起我了！我哪拦得住！
E: I think you overestimate me! How am I supposed to stop them?

C: 放弃吧，羸弱的劫匪。你的一切招数都会被我看破。我眼观六路，看穿隐身法；耳听八方，能够收集远处的声波！
E: Give up now, pathetic kidnapper! I can see through any technique you may have! My eyes see in all directions and expose all stealth techniques. My ears hear all sound waves, no matter the distance!

C: 这节课在你们的窃窃私语中结束，充实而欢乐。你想，你或许已经爱上上课了。
E: This class ends amidst your whispering, a class that's both fulfilling and joyful. You think that maybe you've fallen in love with attending classes.

C: 哦，你知道这个，课上悄悄话的必备项目！你的课堂体验愈发圆满了——
E: Oh, you know this move — an essential tool for clandestine comms in class! Your classroom experience is becoming much more fruitful now...

C: 行吧，反正已经被学校发现，是谁都无所谓了。时运不济，发财的路多灾多难啊。
E: Fine, since the school already discovered this, the ninja initiate's identity doesn't matter anymore. When times are bad, the road to wealth is full of potholes.

C: 什么情况？
E: What's the issue?

C: 我们在隔壁开宴会呢，正准备举杯欢庆，忽然一下子饮料就变味了——这味道还是和以前一样，我顺着味道就过来了。
E: We're hosting a banquet next door. We were about to raise our glasses in celebration, but the drink's flavor suddenly went bad. The smell here is the same as before, so I followed it over.

C: 几番比对后，对方确认是面前顾客所丢，你站起身，装作什么也没发生地走了出去。
E: After a few comparisons, the pouch turns out to be the one lost by the client earlier. Meanwhile, you stand up and walk away like nothing happened.

C: 哈哈，请恕我今天都无法提供，它们带来的欢乐会影响测试的准确度，掩盖一些本就难以察觉的问题。
E: Haha, sorry, but I can't offer any of those today. The joy they bring will affect the accuracy of the assessment results and conceal issues that are already hard to detect.

C: 您准备好听题了吗？
E: Are you ready to listen to the following questions?

C: 顺其自然…
E: Go with the flow...

C: 求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
E: My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

C: 虽然被狮口狠狠咬到了，但万敌却没有丝毫改色，颤抖的反而是石铸的狮口。
E: Though the lion's jaw clamps down hard, Mydei's expression does not change at all. Instead, it is the stone-forged mouth that is quivering.

C: 虽然在黎明机器的光芒下，这里很难见到完整星空。但*我们*知道，更远更远的年代，昼和夜还会更替的时候，天空中会有尾巴好长好长的流星划过！
E: It is hard to see a sky of stars under the shine of the Dawn Device. But we know that in a very distant past when night and day still took turns, there were meteors with long trails streaking across the sky!

C: 还需要解释吗？仔细想想，流言没有腿脚，却传得比什么都快吼！
E: You still need an explanation? Just think about it: Rumors have no legs, but can travel faster than anything else!

C: 错了错了，吼吼，异乡的勇士，不过如此。不接受惩罚，哪能长点见识？
E: Dead wrong! Ho-ho, the ability of a brave outsider exceeds {F#her}{M#his} repute. How would one learn without suffering the consequences?

C: 抱歉！你没事吧，需要治疗吗？！
E: I'm sorry! Are you all right? Do you need treatment?!

C: （无视它）
E: (Ignore it)

C: 同时，你非常确信，「烂泥」是绝对扶不上墙的。
E: At the same time, you're very sure that sloppy mud can't stick to walls.

C: 哦吼？异乡的勇士，难道也向奥赫玛的哲学家学来了辩论的思维？可惜可惜，至少你还拥有一口袋的妙论，这不是正确答案。
E: Oh-ho? Brave outsider, could you have picked the brains of Okhema's philosophers? Alas, though you have a pocketful of clever rhetoric, this is a wrong answer.

C: 好痛！这狮子居然搞体罚，真是个坏老师……
E: Ouch! This lion's dishing out physical punishment. What a bad teacher...

C: 求知若渴的本狮可不会轻易放走送到嘴边的「猎物」，你已经别无选择了吼！
E: My thirst for knowledge will not easily let go of prey that presents itself on a silver platter! You have no other choice!

C: 这狮子出了个怪题目…难道是脑筋急转弯吗？
E: This lion's asked a weird question... Could it be some brain-teasing trickery?

C: 好痛！你敢肯定这头狮子从小就很不可爱……
E: Painful! You're sure this lion was never cute in its youth...

C: …你快离去吧。本狮要认真想想遗言了吼。
E: ...You should leave now. I wish to properly compose my last words.

C: 它对敌人从未心慈手软。
E: It never showed mercy to its enemies.

C: 一杯插着筷子的糊糊。半碗盖着保鲜膜的列车锅。一块翠缥色的布…等等，一块布？？？
E: A cup of goo with chopsticks sticking out of it. Half a bowl of Express Special covered in cling film. A piece of emerald green fabric... Wait, a piece of fabric???

C: 你打开冰箱，看到里面放着一个冰淇淋。这应该就是三月七的谢礼了。
E: As you open the refrigerator, you see an ice cream inside. This must be a thank-you gift from March 7th.

C: 呼呼。瞧这蒸腾的水汽，湿漉漉的，我是怎么流落到这种荒凉地方来的呢？
E: *crackle* Look at the bubbling vapor... Everything is damp. How did I end up in this deserted place?

C: 反正不等于2。
E: Anyway, it's definitely not 2.

C: 而欣然接受这一切——我的桶生已经圆满。如今我将彻底堕入那片领域，再无所求……
E: As for me, I will accept it... My life has achieved its peak, and now I will embrace a realm where desires no longer hold sway...

C: 有品位。我感觉我们有不少共同话题。
E: Tasteful. I think we have a lot in common.

C: 通风口。
E: Vents.

C: 那么，如果某个逐梦客因无心之举搞砸了谐乐大典，你又会怎么做呢？
E: If a Dreamchaser messed up the Charmony Festival due to an unintentional mistake, what would you do?

C: 妄谈大业，藐视铁桶，破坏秩序，当受天罚！
E: Speaking arrogantly about the cause, defying the steel can, disregarding Order! Judgment be upon you!

C: 不知你是否见过这位高手？我定要拜入{F#她}{M#他}门下，求得绝世武技！
E: Perhaps you've seen this incredible master? I must become {F#her}{M#his} disciple and learn some skills from {F#her}{M#him}!

C: 一年学费够建一所新的学院，根据家系影响力来算分！来吧，第一课的课题——如何进行制裁！
E: Annual fees are enough to build a new school. You'll be graded according to your family's prestige! Come, the first lesson has begun — how to impose sanctions!

C: 来，和我学。塔塔洛夫教导我们，若是出现了不公，直接回敬！
E: Come, learn with me. Tatalov taught us, when faced with injustice, respond directly!

C: 写完了。也没什么难的嘛。
E: All done. Well, wasn't so hard after all.

C: 回忆第一封来信。
E: Recall the first letter received.

C: （这位…莫非是一直给白厄写信的小妖精？）
E: (Is this... the little fairy who's been writing to Phainon all along?)

C: 迷！可以吗？那就多谢你了迷，好心的过路人！
E: Memi! Really? Thank you, thank you, kind passerby!
Ding—

C: 风铃发出了悦耳的声音。但这次出现的不是大地兽，而是一匹雅努斯之驹。
E: The chime makes a pleasant sound again. Instead of a dromas, it summons a Janus' Steed this time.

C: 螺丝，你想说，我所到的世界…只是一道防火墙？
E: Screwy, are you saying the world I entered... was just a firewall?

C: 只是很可惜，这台留影石机确实装不下更多回忆啦……
E: It's just a shame the photostone really can't save any more memories...

C: 嗯，这也是人家想说的话呢。
E: Mm, that's exactly what I was going to say.

C: 但我相信，{NICKNAME}一定也在受欢迎的名单中，要试试看吗？
E: But I trust that {NICKNAME} will be welcome. How about giving it a try?

C: 只是…抱歉，这次可能不太行哦。我好像丢了一件很重要的东西。
E: It's just... Sorry, this is a bad time. I think I've lost something very important.

C: 你是哪个城邦的士兵，来这儿做什么？！
E: What city do you fight for, soldier!? Why are you here!?

C: （给它换一个绰号）
E: (Give it another nickname)

C: 汪汪…汪汪？
E: Woof woof... Woof woof?

C: 汪呜？汪？
E: Woof oo? Woof?

C: 除开基础建设方面的维护，最主要的方面还是科员的心理健康。
E: Apart from infrastructure maintenance, the most important aspect is the staff's mental health.

C: 哦！你吓了我一跳！我还以为是隔壁科室的混蛋又来找麻烦了！
E: Hey! You scared me! I thought it was the scoundrels from the department next door looking for trouble here!

C: 但如果你是想通过我，得知什么小道消息，或者是打一些歪主意…我可警告你，最好把那些心思收一收！
E: But if you're thinking of getting any insider information or playing some weird games through me... I'm warning you, it's best you drop those thoughts right now!

C: 我虽然看上去此时此刻无所事事，但其实我的内心非常关注军团来袭之后，咱们空间站的后续复兴工作！
E: Although I may seem pretty leisurely, deep down I do care a lot about the space station's restoration after the Legion invasion!

C: 哎，物是人非咯！
E: *sigh* How things have changed!

C: 我没有想过去往小姐不在的地方。更何况在空间站，我可以发挥自己的作用和价值。维护这里的安宁，看到科员安心地完成自己的研究…我就心满意足了。
E: I don't see myself choosing otherwise. Besides, I think my work here is meaningful. I'm happy to see our researchers conducting their work in a safe environment.

C: 密钥的事情有后续吗？
E: Any follow-ups on the encryption key incident?

C: 还行吧，虽然最近的工作有点多，不过我还算应付得来，问题不大！
E: The workload is alright. Been having some crunch time lately, but nothing I can't handle!

C: 我想说…
E: Actually...

C: 也许阮•梅看不到你的工作。
E: Maybe Ruan Mei can't even see your effort.

C: 这…这有点眼色的应该都感觉得到吧？
E: Well... Anyone with enough sense would know it, I guess.

C: 你身手还挺好的。
E: You're quite a good fighter.

C: 你不要再说了，我承认你也很厉害。你一定跟我一样，身体里有很多「勇气」的添加剂。
E: Say no more, and I recognize that you're pretty amazing too. You must have a generous dose of courage in your system, just like me.

C: 无坚不摧的矛对阵坚不可摧的盾…悬念丛生啊！您要来下点赌注吗？
E: The unstoppable lance versus the immovable shield... That's a cliffhanger right there! You want to make a bet?

C: 这点小事，就不用劳烦大工匠了吧！
E: A paltry matter like this doesn't deserve the attention of the Grand Craftsman!

C: 两位小贩忙不迭搬来一个最常见的小号盾牌。
E: Two merchants hurriedly rush to bring over a common small shield.

C: 很好的论题。我得说，这个疑问困惑过我很长的时间。被黑潮摧毁后的阿卡索斯城看不见，摸不着，即使去到原先的地点，也只能找到一堆断壁残垣。
E: A very fine topic. I must say, this question has troubled me for a long time. Having been devoured by the black tide, one can no longer see nor touch Icatus. Even if you go to its location, all you will see is a pile of ruined remains.

C: 好吧，现在你明白他们俩的主要工作是什么了。
E: Alright, now you know what their main jobs are.

C: 听好了。「阿卡索斯」无法借由感官认知，我们也缺少观察它的方式，无非是人们通过想象编造出的谎言。没有任何实际证据，你该如何证明它的存在？
E: Listen. Icatus cannot be known through our senses, and we lack any method of observing it. It is no more than a lie created by the imagination of mankind. If there is no real existing evidence, how can you prove its existence?

C: 我觉得无论是波瑟芬妮，还是哈德斯，都被拉达曼算计了。
E: I think Rhadaman plotted against both Possephone and Hadez.

C: 或许这就叫知人知面不知心吧……
E: Maybe that's what people mean when they say "You think you know someone"...

C: 万一她父母不在乎呢…
E: What if her parents don't even care...

C: 他们离去的时候并没有提到，我也无从猜起。
E: They didn't say anything when they left, so I wouldn't know where to begin.

C: 我便问了他一嘴，他只说是城中的贵族赏给他的。我拿给你看看……
E: When I hit him up about it, he just said some aristocrat in the city gifted it to him. Here, let me show you...
Alright!

C: 女孩小声啜泣起来。阿卡索斯——这听名字就知道凶多吉少的城邦已经从大地上消失了，与一个孩子的期盼一同埋葬。
E: The girl begins to sob quietly. Icatus — Just from the name the city, you guess it is a place of ill omens. That place has been wiped from the face of the earth and buried alongside a child's hopes.
