C: 去学一门手艺吧，比方说织布。就算不擅长这个，只要肯用功，至少自食其力没什么问题。
E: Go and learn a craft such as weaving. Even if you're no good at it, you'll still be able to support yourself so long as you work hard at it.

C: 虽然我基础差，总是把字写得歪歪扭扭，但克帖西芬姐姐说我很聪明，只要几个光历年就能比得上大人了。
E: I've got a really poor foundation and I'm always mucking up my handwriting, but Miss Ctesiphona tells me I'm very clever, and I'll catch up to an adult's level in a couple of Light Calendar years.

C: 是你啊，{F#女士}{M#先生}！我现在正在跟阿芙罗姐姐学习缝纫。
E: Oh it's you, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}! I'm learning how to sew from Miss Aphrea.

C: 没事，有我罩着你。
E: It's alright. I've got your back.

C: 我就在这里等着…您要是找不到线索也没关系，本来就是非分之请，我不会怪您的！
E: I'll wait here... It's all right. Even if you don't find any clues, this is an unexpected favor, and I won't blame you for it!

C: 这个波动值似乎不太对。
E: This fluctuation here doesn't seem quite right.

C: 第一，叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯。第二，什么叫「也」？你的意思…你想死在树庭？当真老糊涂了？
E: First, call me Anaxagoras. Second, what do you mean "as well"? Do you mean... you want to die here in the Grove? Have you gone senile?

C: 这最后的时间里，我倒要看看这些学术渣滓到底有什么魅力。
E: In my final moments, I'd like to see just what is so special about this brain rotting nonsense.

C: 芋波香芒啡也超好喝！
E: Taro bubble mango coffee is very nice too!

C: 想起来的时候，还有点害臊嘛，你看我这一事无成的……
E: It's still a little bit shameful to think about, especially when you consider how I never amounted to much...

C: 我看您身体健康，精神抖擞，还有心情和我聊天，肯定没问题！但…哎，这可怎么办啊？
E: I see you're in good health, full of energy, and even in the mood to chat with me, so you must be fine! But... oh dear, what am I going to do?

C: 再大点声！
E: Louder!

C: 不管有多少人愿意跟上来，我已经决意要回家了。走，科可波阁下。
E: No matter how many choose to follow, I've made up my mind — I'm going home.

C: 蕾莉亚！快回应我！
E: Lelia! Say something, please!

C: 呵呵，我更喜欢这种创造者与造物和谐共存的故事。
E: Heh, I just prefer tales where creators and creations live in harmony.

C: {F#女士}{M#先生}，你是改变心意了吗？
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, did you change your mind?

C: 不是，你真会啊？
E: No way... Are you for real?

C: 我也要报仇…可恶的怪物，我还没赢得掷铁饼项目的第四枚个人金牌！
E: I want to get my revenge too... those bloody monsters, I still haven't won my fourth individual gold medal in the discus event!

C: 啊，啊，啊——
E: Ah, oh, mm—

C: 他身上没有任何铭牌和遗物，无从辨认生前的身份。你叹了口气，为他阖上了眼皮。
E: No nameplates or relics. Nothing to even identify him with. You sigh, closing his eyelids.

C: 你抱着最坏的预感试探了他的鼻息，果然已无生命迹象。他胸口的铭牌上刻着几个模糊的字：斐…第…斯？
E: You check his breathing with the worst case scenario in mind and confirm the absence of life in his body. His nameplate on his chest has a few blurred words inscribed there: Phe...d...es?

C: 第二天，门扉时分，你事先清扫了云崖上徘徊的怪物，来到了刻法勒的神像前……
E: The next day, after clearing the monsters roaming Dawncloud at Entry Hour, you stand before Kephale's statue...

C: 要是闲着，不如来和我们…嗯，你手里拿着的是什么？
E: If you're free, why don't you join us... hmm, what's that you're holding?

C: 看看别的。
E: Look at another one.

C: 这是当然，您不会失望。
E: Naturally. I'll make it worth your while.

C: 新人半神，也没办法。
E: Can't blame her. She's still new to being a demigod.

C: 好了各位，多亏司祭求来海瑟音大人的赐福，我们重新开业啦。
E: Ladies and gentlemen! Our doors are officially reopened, all thanks to our priest who prayed for Lady Hysilens's blessing!

C: 虽然之前也来过列车，不过有{NICKNAME}在的列车，我还是第一次来呢。
E: I've been on the Express before, but this is my first visit with {NICKNAME} on board.

C: 万能合成机？
E: Omni-Synthesizer?

C: 或许它有自己的一套选择机制，只有被这个奇物认可的人才被允许坐在上面。
E: Perhaps it has its own set of authorization mechanisms, and only those it recognizes are permitted to sit on it.

C: {NICKNAME}，你要是有空，可以坐在这儿，关上灯，仔细看看窗外的景色。
E: When you find a moment, sit here and turn off the lights. You'll be amazed by what you can see.

C: 「列车有很多列车朋友，它要去找它们玩儿。」
E: "The Express has lots of Express friends, and it wants to find them and play together."

C: 我恐怕无法与他共情。
E: I'm afraid I can't empathize with him.

C: …你一定要照顾好荣誉队员帕姆！不然我就拿你问事…不对，拿你是问！
E: ...you have to take good care of honorary member Pom-Pom! Otherwise, I'll hold you "accountantable"! Wait... accountable!

C: 下次克拉拉一定要说服史瓦罗先生一起来。
E: Next time, I'll have to convince Mr. Svarog to come along.

C: 我刚刚从姬子大姐姐那听说，原来列车曾经搁浅过……
E: Himeko just told me that the Express has been stranded before...

C: 没关系，我可以陪你。
E: No problem, it'd be nice to hang out.

C: 太难实现了吧……
E: Sounds like it'll require a whole lot of engineering...

C: 那我就不跟你客气了。
E: Well, then, I'll gladly take whatever you've got.

C: 你。
E: You did.

C: 入侵者。
E: Intruder.

C: 嘿嘿，前些日子也算是受到{NICKNAME}的照顾，这是我的心意～
E: Hehe. You've been a good host the last few days, {NICKNAME}. Just a token of my gratitude.

C: 那就暂时不打扰你了。
E: I will leave you to your work for now.

C: 那就是黑塔大人最忠实的追随者！
E: I am a die-hard fan of Madam Herta!

C: 刚开始还有些不适应的。毕竟从那样繁琐的工作中一下子脱身，多少有点难以找到自我的定位。
E: I did have some difficulties at first. After all, it was kind of hard to re-position myself when such a busy work schedule just suddenly stopped.

C: 之后我就要着手准备项目研究的前期工作了，希望有机会可以再和你聊聊天。
E: I'm going to start preparing for the preliminary work of the research project now. Hope we get the chance to chat again in the future.

C: 不过我看你最近气色不是很好哦，是不是太忙碌了呢？要记得好好休息才行，日常营养摄入也不能掉以轻心。
E: But you're the one who seems a bit out of it. Are you doing too much work? Do remember to rest, and keep up a nutritious diet.

C: 虚伪之人，罪不可恕，千刀万剐，死不足惜！
E: Liars are unforgivable! Even death cannot redeem them!

C: 那些你给卡波特的奇物…
E: Those Curios you gave Capote...

C: 我觉得还挺好喝的。不过，听姬子小姐说，列车上的其他人似乎都不大喜欢这种饮料……
E: I think it's pretty tasty. But according to Himeko, everyone on the Express doesn't really appreciate that drink...

C: 雪原里总能发现让人意外的东西…这就是极地探险的魅力所在。
E: You can always find something surprising in the Snow Plains... That's the charm of outdoor exploration.

C: 我往后，大概会常来列车上下棋的……
E: Perhaps I should start making regular chess visits to the Express...

C: 下次见了——你还会再邀请我上车的，对吧？
E: I'll see you next time — you'll invite me back, right?

C: …嗯，就这么定了。
E: Mm-hmm, it's settled then.

C: 唔，想试试看…不过三月的房间可能…过于粉嫩了点。
E: Mm, I'd like to give it a try... March's room, on the other hand... a little too pink and cute for my liking.

C: 既是私人身份，还叫什么「将军」，叫我景元就好。
E: Haha, this is a personal visit — no need for formalities. Call me Jing Yuan.

C: …真、真的吗？！
E: ...R—Really!?

C: 那里肯定有问题，呜呜呜啊啊啊啊啊——！
E: Wait. I—I can feel it again! Ahhhhhhhh!

C: 哈？！不准说老子可爱！
E: Cuter!? I'll show you cuter!

C: 原来如此。
E: Oh. Really?

C: 哦，对了。听说现在也很流行为之拍照，发布在通讯工具上，以此来与各个星球埠口的门店换取更多点心试吃。
E: Speaking of which, I heard it's become quite common to photograph these delicacies and upload them to social media... and that doing so can even earn you sample treats from different purveyors.

C: 可以比一个剪刀手。
E: Just strike a pose with a peace sign.

C: 天才俱乐部就是这样一群人吧。
E: Sounds a lot like the Genius Society to me.

C: 你自己？
E: You?

C: 做出选择，然后去背负、思考、接纳，这样便好，不需要自证什么，也不需要得到认可。
E: Make a choice, bear it, reflect on it, and accept it. There's no need to prove anything or seek validation.

C: 你有什么想要的？
E: Is there something you desire?

C: 「开拓」的故事，总是这么令人动容……
E: The "Trailblazing" stories are just so moving...

C: 米沙也要开开心心的。
E: Keep on smiling!

C: 如你所见，它「脱臼」了。要是不赶紧上螺丝，一会儿整只手掉下来可能会有点惊悚。
E: As you can see, it "dislocated." I gotta screw it back on quick, before the whole hand falls off and gives you a scare.

C: 或者直接让那小宝贝入土为安之类的！
E: Or just put them lil' fudgeheads in the ground directly, you know!

C: 小孩子的世界比较纯净。
E: The world of a child is so pure.

C: 智库还挺有意思的嘛，尤其是关于「悲悼伶人」的描述，太形象了。
E: The data bank is very interesting. I love the entry for the Mourning Actors — it's so vivid and full of details.

C: 我记不住自己的梦。
E: I don't remember my dreams.

C: 推荐恐怖属性。
E: I recommend horror.

C: 我的表现有六十分么？
E: Did my performance get at least sixty points?

C: 手心中残留的一丝毛绒，我打算将它保存起来，作为它在这美丽宇宙存在过的证明。
E: I intend to save this remaining bit of fluff in my hand — proof that it once existed in this beautiful universe.

C: 喝点姬子的咖啡吧！
E: Drink some of Himeko's coffee!

C: 你也是被选中的孩子吗？
E: Are you a chosen child, too?

C: 「独家发售，稳定更新！」广告机无声地展示着黑塔手稿即将发售的消息。
E: "Exclusive release with regular updates!" Information about the upcoming sale of Herta's manuscripts is silently displayed on the advertising bot.

C: 你想太多了。
E: You're thinking too much.

C: 列车长也是需要休息的，帕姆可不是机器人。
E: Pom-Pom isn't a robot! Train conductor needs breaks too!

C: 这位乘客麻烦让一让， 你的列车长还要去干活呢！
E: Move along, passenger! Your conductor has to get to work!

C: 我就搞不懂了——哎，你说说，这钱到底有啥用啊？怎么大家成天就想着这点东西…庸俗，实在是庸俗……
E: I just can't even fathom the point. Can you try to explain to me what's the use of money? How can people spend all day longing after something like this? It's so unrefined, down right vulgar even...

C: 对了，和你聊了这么多，你应该没看过《地底动物百科》吧？
E: Oh, yes, I've just been rambling on. You probably haven't read the Underground Encyclopedia of Zoology, right?

C: 市政厅已经安排了合适的人员，我们政务官员当然要依照规章制度来行事。
E: The Town Hall has already allocated suitable personnel for that. Our administrative officials naturally want to do things by the book.

C: 哎，别客气。有空的话可以看看我的美食专栏，提点意见。
E: No worries. If you'd like, do have a look at my column on food. Comments are always welcome.

C: 让我再想想吧。
E: I need some time to process all that information.

C: 没别的想问的了。
E: That's all from me.

C: 那你赚了多少？
E: So, how much money did you make?

C: （万能的文学评价）
E: (Make up a generic literary critique)

C: 妙啊，妙啊！您真的对文学有很深的研究。
E: Amazing! Words of wisdom from a true master.

C: 一看你就不懂当今的科学界…大家都忙着争权夺势，拿腔作调，从那群人身上又能学到什么呢？
E: That just goes to show how ill-informed you are about the science community today. What can you learn from a bunch of self-righteous nerds who fight tooth and nail for money and power?

C: 谁想到那作者居然跑路了，直接人间蒸发，连个影都没留下！编辑迫于压力，就联系了我，问我能不能代笔。
E: But they did not expect the author to simply vanish into thin air! The editors had to contact me instead, asking if I can help with the project.

C: 才不是呢。我还这么年轻，正处在事业的上升期，怎么可能这么早就隐退…虽说我们这行条条框框挺多，但我并不打算就这么轻易放弃。
E: No way. I'm still young. My career is on the rise. How could I step out of the spotlight so early? Although there are a lot of hoops to jump through in this industry, I don't plan on throwing in the towel so easily.

C: 咳咳，欢迎光临花店！瓦丝卡为您服务！
E: *cough* Welcome! What can the florist Vaska do for you?

C: 那部小说…要解禁了？
E: Is that book's ban... going to get lifted?

C: 至于生活中嘛，塔米拉小姐毕竟是大明星，小女子和她接触不多，也称不上有什么「恩怨」。
E: As for outside of the theater... well, Tamila is a star, after all, so I really don't have much contact with her. I don't know what she could be mad about.

C: …抱歉，我不该突然对你发脾气。但你出现得不是时候，我现在心情很差……
E: Sorry, I shouldn't have lost my temper. You showed up at a bad time...

C: 这报纸上写什么了？
E: What's the paper say?

C: 「莱姆士汀家家主谈家族企业文化：『发扬冰原狼精神——团结一致，超越极限』」……
E: "Head of the Limesteins shares the family's corporate culture, 'Cultivating a direwolf spirit to come together and transcend limitations.'"...

C: 这就对了！千万别上了他的当！
E: That's right! Don't fall for his tricks!

C: 我想读奇幻小说。
E: I'd like to read some fantasy.

C: 哟，竟然来了个生面孔！要买份报吗？
E: Hah! A new face! Interested in a newspaper?

C: 怎么样，还有别的什么事吗？没有的话，我就要开始忙了。
E: Is there anything else you want to know? If not, I'll get back to my work.

C: 他们自己也清楚这点，所以每次闹事都还算有分寸，稍微尝到点甜头就打道回府了。只是没想到这次居然惊动了史瓦罗……
E: They are well aware of this, which is why they have never crossed the line. A small reward goes a long way with them. I just didn't expect the news to get all the way to Svarog this time...

C: 因为确实是这样嘛…有很多小朋友都会送阿丽娜礼物，然后对阿丽娜说「喜欢」……
E: They just want to... A lot of kids want to give me things and tell me they like me...

C: 但是，其实诊所里还是有些孩子不愿意和阿丽娜一起玩的……
E: Actually, some kids in the clinic don't want to play with me...

C: 阿丽娜喜欢上层区吗？
E: Alina, you must love the Overworld, right?

C: 没、真没有！我哪里敢！
E: No, I am not! I wouldn't dare!

C: 完了完了…
E: Uh-oh...

C: 好吧，那我走了。
E: Okay, see you.

C: 总之啊，过不了多久我就能和下层区的亲戚朋友们见面了。这么多年过去了，也不知道他们过得好不好……
E: Anyway, soon I'll be able to see friends and relatives from down in the Underworld. After all these years, I hope they've been doing well...

C: 哈哈哈，那都是过去的事了，不值一提。
E: Hahaha, that's all in the past. It's not worth mentioning.

C: 不错，看来你多少了解过这里的历史。
E: Good. You seem to know some of the history here.

C: 歌德大饭店应该算一个吧？然后好像就剩搏击俱乐部了。
E: The Goethe Grand Hotel probably. And then it's the Fight Club.

C: 歌德大饭店就在那边，喏。怎么样，很气派吧？毕竟这是歌德家族在下层区的头家店铺呢，而且还是贝洛伯格的总店哦！
E: The Goethe Grand Hotel is right there. It's fancy, isn't it? After all, this is the Goethe family's first shop in the Underworld. It's the main store in Belobog!

C: 啊…一想到那香酥的面包皮和多汁鲜嫩的洞螈肉，我的口水都要流下来啦。真不愧是歌蒂师傅啊……
E: Ahhh... it makes me drool whenever I think of the crispy puff and the juicy olm meat. Master Gertie is such a wonderful cook...

C: 有时间聊聊吗，布洛妮娅？
E: Do you have time to chat, Bronya?

C: 当然，如果她需要我的话…我立马就会赶回去。即使站在她的位置，很多事情也必须借我之手解决…分工明确，没什么可抱怨的。
E: Of course, if she needs me... I'll be back in a snap. Even she needs somebody like me to help solve certain matters... We know our roles, and there's nothing to complain about.

C: 我明白了。
E: I understand.

C: 欢迎光临机械屋「永动」……
E: Welcome to the Neverwinter Workshop...

C: 不过最近我们这前线的压力小了很多，估计大家都想偷个闲回家看看吧。只是不知道几时能排到我啊……
E: But pressure on the front line has receded a lot these days, so everyone just wants to take a break and reunite with their families. I just have no idea how long it's gonna take until my turn...

C: 平时下班后我也经常到她的机械屋里玩，如果玲可在的话我也会留下过夜。独居生活就是这样，一个人闷在家里总会无聊的。
E: I often visit her workshop after work. If Lynx is there, I'd stay the night. As I live alone, there are times I find it boring to stay at home.

C: 唔…不是这样的哦。
E: Um... that's not true.

C: 先聊到这里。
E: Let's end the chat here.

C: 「地火」的未来…
E: Wildfire's future...

C: 在发酵，她知道，孩子的肚子需要被面包填饱
E: Like a fire burning, she knows it's bread her kids' desire

C: 好，也祝你旅途平安。
E: Great, have a safe journey!

C: 贵安，{NICKNAME}，我是凡迪雅，大守护者的钦差特使。
E: Greetings, {NICKNAME}. I'm Fedora, the envoy of the Supreme Guardian.

C: 哼，哼哼~
E: Oink, oink oink~

C: 扑满被你的直球打动，表现得亲密又顺从。
E: The Trotter seems touched by your affection. It seems very affectionate and obedient.

C: 唱首摇篮曲。
E: Sing a lullaby.

C: 奶奶，快看喷泉！
E: Grandma, look at the fountain!

C: 你哪来那么多朋友？
E: How did you manage to make so many friends?

C: 这天气喝茶，就该坐屋里……
E: Drinking tea in this weather should be done indoors...

C: 克里珀大人啊……
E: Lord Qlipoth...

C: 如果您能听到我的呼唤……
E: If you can hear me calling...

C: 大姐头说的对！
E: You're right!

C: 二百八。
E: Two hundred and eighty.

C: 五十。
E: Fifty.

C: 哈…六十七…六十八……
E: Ha... Sixty-seven, sixty-eight...

C: 打爆它，别手下留情！
E: Beat it up! Show no mercy!

C: 前面有危险，当心。
E: Careful. It's dangerous up ahead.

C: 还是以太战线更重要。
E: The game, Aetherium Wars itself, is what I care more about.

C: 大机器人的构造…
E: The structure of the giant robot...

C: ...和机兵完全不一样呢。
E: ...It's nothing like that of an automaton.

C: 我就说酸汤味道最好。
E: Personally, I think the sour soup tastes the best.

C: 又累，又不体面......
E: It's exhausting and does nothing to elevate my status...

C: 呵呵，那你走错了。这里是博物馆的仓库，出门向右，经过前台便是展厅。
E: Oh hoho, you're at the wrong place. This is the museum's warehouse. Head out then turn right, the exhibition hall is past the reception counter.

C: 我先去参观了。
E: I'll go ahead and tour now.

C: {NICKNAME}，欢迎来到贝洛伯格历史文化……
E: {NICKNAME}, welcome to the Belobog History and Cul—

C: 而我，到底是哪一种垃圾呢……
E: And which type of trash am I...

C: 幽囚狱正常运行上百年，却遭贼人攻破，其中必然是有人泄露幽囚狱相关结构与路线，导致了大量冥差因公殉职，大人应该知道泄密的严重性。
E: The Shackling Prison has been operating securely for centuries. If intruders were to infiltrate out of nowhere, it would mean that someone has divulged details of the structural floor plan and routes of the Shackling Prison. Many spiritfarers will end up losing their lives during such an infiltration. I trust you are aware of the grave consequences that come with leaking secrets.

C: 好的，还有问题可以随时来找我。
E: Sure, come look for me anytime if you have more questions.

C: 哪有人会为了未发生之事有着如此笃定的决断呢？就结果而言，我确实离开了太卜司，不过这过程实在是可笑。
E: How could someone make a decision based off something that hadn't happened yet? Anyway, I did leave the Commission, but the entire situation was a farce.

C: 说来惭愧，虽然咱是开饭馆儿的，但其实比较挑食。有一些东西我是不吃的…比方说……
E: I'm ashamed to admit that though I run a restaurant, I'm actually quite picky about my food. There are some things I don't eat... such as...

C: 建木又长起来了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...

C: 有可能。
E: Possible.

C: 哎…武赫，消停点吧。别让人看热闹了。
E: *sigh* Wu He, calm down. Let's not put on a show for people.

C: 托蝶幻境是一种仙舟特有的艺术形式，使用流传数千年狐族幻术与当代工造技术相结合，可以创造出以假乱真的幻境，让观众全方位沉浸在情景之中。
E: Butterfly Immersia is a unique art form found in Xianzhou. It combines ancient foxian illusions with modern artifex tech to create an incredibly real dreamland that completely immerses the audience right in the middle of the scene.

C: 可是谁掌握了创造艺术的资源，谁就掌握了对艺术的话语权…嗯？先停一下…你又是有什么事要找我们吗？
E: But whoever has the resources to create art also has the right to create art... Uh... Hold on a minute... Are you looking for us? What's up?

C: 好呀，我正好得空看看今天的新闻，你去忙吧。
E: Alright, it's time for me to watch the news anyway. See you later.

C: 在下是长乐天形虎拳馆的教练——殊妙。我们形虎拳馆啊，专门针对化外民开设，师资力量罗浮第一，延年益寿经验丰富。学员们个个长命百岁、效果显著。
E: I'm the coach at Exalting Sanctum's Tiger Boxing Gym, Shumiao. We're a custom boxing gym set up for Outworlders, and our coaches are the best on the Luofu with rich experience in immortality training. All our boxers are living out long lives and achieving incredible results.

C: 你们不会收了钱之后跑路吧？
E: Are you just planning on running away with my money?

C: 只是…我与那人已有许久未见，心中难免有些落寞。没了他，我的职业生涯、我的未来仿佛都变得灰暗了。
E: It's just... I haven't had a chance to see him for a long time, and I can't help but feel a little bit lonely. Without him, my career, my entire future feels... empty.

C: 请注意，你冒犯到我了。
E: That sounds offensive.

C: 你难道要靠父母一辈子吗？
E: So you plan on relying on your parents for the rest of your life?

C: 可别提这破建木了，一提我就烦。自从这个破玩意儿长出来，爹娘天天就拿这个跟我说事儿。
E: Enough already about this darn tree. It's triggering. Ever since this thing started growing again, my parents have been nagging me about it every single day.

C: 抱歉，别怪我这人说话直，我是一名医士，我看出了您的症状。经过我的初步判断，您的时日已经不多了。
E: Sorry, don't blame me for being so blunt. I'm a healer and your symptoms are clear as day. My initial diagnosis is that your time is quickly running out.

C: 但是，我必须要告诉您一个好消息——你认识了我，就还不算晚！你还能活很久，一百年、两百年、不对，一千年！你还可以活很久！
E: However, I've also got some good news to tell you — you're lucky to have met me, because it's not too late! You can still have a long life: One hundred, two hundred — even a thousand years! There is hope for you!

C: 那你的刀呢？
E: Where's your weapon, then?

C: 对、对不住！是…是我有眼不识泰山！刚才说什么将军贤弟，那都是我昏了头说疯话…还请大人不见小人怪啊！
E: P—Pardon me! I'm the one who didn't realize how famous YOU are! All that stuff I was saying about generals and brothers... I've been feeling dizzy and was just spouting nonsense. Please {F#ma'am}{M#sir}, have mercy on my soul!

C: 你要是不讲，就没有意思了。
E: It's no fun if you aren't going to talk a little.

C: 其实老夫也想通了。至少在工造领域，仙舟人成也在长生，败也在长生。
E: I think I've figured this out now, though. At least as far as the field of artifex is concerned, being long-lived is both an advantage and a downfall of the Xianzhou people.

C: 哦哟～我不能答的问题可太多了——要犯的关押位置、武弁的换岗时间、食堂的供货渠道、寒鸦大人的实际年龄…这些都是幽囚狱的最高机密。
E: Oh, way too many. I can't tell you where major criminals are held, when the guards get relieved, the supply channels to the cafeteria, Madam Hanya's actual age... All these are the Shackling Prison's most highly classified secrets.

C: 确实。
E: Affirmative.

C: 那就聊一会儿吧。
E: Fine, let's chat for a while.

C: 若不是您协助罗浮解决了星核危机，这些在流云渡讨生活的人…仙舟人也好异邦人也罢，有一个算一个都要饿死的。
E: If it weren't for you helping the Luofu with the Stellaron Crisis, all the people coming to Cloudford to seek a living... be they Xianzhou people or travelers, they'd have all starved to death.

C: 你是做什么的？
E: What do you do?

C: 关于辛克莱和麦尔彦…
E: About Sinclair and Maryam...

C: 她降价，我也降价，我总得卖出去，不能让她占了便宜。
E: She cut her price, then so did I. I had to make this sale and couldn't let her seize the advantage from me.

C: 哈哈，「主簿」这职称是不是听起来很厉害？其实呢，我就是幽囚狱的「笔杆子」。
E: Haha. Doesn't the title of "secretary" sound impressive? In actuality, I am the Shackling Prison's "penholder."

C: 你好像和青雀很熟的样子？
E: You seem pretty close to Qingque.

C: 太卜大人好清静，您也别在这里到处打听了。再见，不送。
E: The master diviner likes her peace and quiet, and you should stop asking so many questions around here. So long for now. Please let yourself out.

C: 您说的倒也没错，说不定持明族也在羡慕我呢。
E: You're right. Maybe the Vidyadhara envy me, too?

C: 蛰伏许久，为祸如此剧烈…当然棘手！
E: They lay dormant for so long, only to inflict such vicious damage... Of course they're problematic!

C: 前些日子我收到了军务厅的来信，让我接受测试，检查是否有陷入魔阴身的苗头。不过这又如何呢？我决心还是在这里站好最后一班岗。
E: A few days back, I got a letter from the military affairs office asking me to undergo a test to check if I have any signs of mara. But even if I do, so what? I'm determined to keep on standing here to the bitter end.

C: 族规中，染同胞血者当同受入灭永罚。我不知道我自己该受罚，还是我做对了？
E: Our people's creed states that those stained with the blood of a fellow Vidyadhara are punished for all eternity. I don't know whether I should be punished, or whether I was right?

C: 其实社会上一直有一些不和谐的声音，说护珠人工作轻松，是持明族的「养老闲职」…但现在你也亲身体会过了，天底下没有这么累的闲职。
E: In fact, many in society regard the Pearlkeepers contemptuously, assuming they're the Vidyadhara equivalent of an easy job you can retire in... Now that you've experienced it yourself, I bet you know the job is not the least bit easy.

C: 当时我是真不想继续干这个鬼差事了，真不想干了。难过，心里恨得慌。可是恨又能怎么样呢？我日哭夜哭，能哭死寿瘟祸祖吗？
E: At that time, I lost all my desire to stick with this lousy job. I was upset and overwhelmed by resentment. But what could I do? Could I destroy the Plagues Author by crying day and night?

C: 你和那些鼠目寸光的囚犯一样，只会说风凉话。等着瞧吧，我准备了无数个日夜，这次万无一失。
E: You're just like those narrow-minded prisoners, brushing me off and being sarcastic. Just you wait. I have been preparing for this for countless days and nights. Nothing can go wrong.

C: 至于阵法的细节，涉及太卜司机密的事…恕我无可奉告。
E: I'm afraid I can't disclose the details of the matrix as it involves confidential information about the Divination Commission.

C: 人嘛总得有点兴趣爱好，有人贪财有人好吃，我这人喜欢的东西有点奇特——越狱上瘾。
E: Well, everyone needs hobbies and interests. Some go in search of money, others like fine food, but I'm a little unique... I am addicted to breaking out of prisons.

C: 不过我还得适当地批评一下他们，他们那些匠人老在外面传「太卜司工作清闲、喝喝茶水一天就过了」……
E: Still, I must criticize them for telling everyone that working in the Divination Commission is a breeze, and we spend most of the time enjoying snacks...

C: 别这么客气，想问什么就问吧。
E: Please, don't be a stranger. Ask whatever you want.

C: 现在就开始规划吧。
E: Let's get the planning started.

C: 你好像对我有什么误解，我先申明，我并不是对罗浮有什么偏见。
E: You've misunderstood me, it seems. Let me be clear: I have nothing against the Luofu.

C: 生活嘛，无非是衣食住行，仙舟上都大差不差。水质不如我们方壶就不说了，这种客观因素就不怪他们了。
E: The general quality of life is pretty similar across all the Xianzhou ships. The water quality here is not as good as the Fanghu, where I'm from, but that's to be expected.

C: 但当年五龙远徙，还得数咱们方壶冱渊君一脉最为尊贵，是她代表持明与联盟签署了共治盟约。
E: But when the Five Dragons undertook their exodus it was our Glaciator Marum, the high elder of the Fanghu, who was the most venerable of them all. She was the one who signed the covenant with the Alliance on behalf of the Vidyadhara.

C: 我原本不想说得太直白。
E: Fine, I didn't want to be so blunt at first...

C: 是的，您可以向我提出任何问题，只要它们符合社会准则和道德标准，并且不违反任何法律规定。
E: Yes, you are free to ask me any questions you want as long as they are in line with social norms, ethical standards, and legal regulations.

C: 我没什么事了。
E: I have nothing else.

C: 怎么样，您有什么感兴趣的吗？
E: Has anything piqued your interest?

C: 大人不必客气，请尽管发问。
E: Please, ask away.

C: 你认识桂乃芬吗？
E: Do you know Guinaifen?

C: 这鬼地方怎么人人都认识我？
E: Why does everybody in this hellhole seem to know who I am?

C: {NICKNAME}老师，请问今天来神策府是有什么要事相商吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, is there something important you want to discuss with me?

C: 嘻嘻~你在群里直接说声就好了啊，干嘛还专门跑一趟。我知道了，你一定是想我了！
E: Heehee, you could've just said something in the group chat. Why go the extra mile? I bet you missed me!

C: 至于再往前什么时候她被掉包，而真正的停云又在哪里，又或者说停云早已不在了…只能说信息太少，本座也未能知道更多。
E: As for when the real Tingyun was replaced, where she might be right now, and whether she had already passed away... I don't have any more information than you do.

C: 在罗浮彻底安稳之前，我暂时是告别牌桌了。要是一直不安稳，我可能考虑换一个能够摸鱼的工作…可惜家里应该不太会同意，真是麻烦呀。
E: I'll be staying away from the game table until the peace has been fully restored on the Luofu. If things refuse to settle down, I might consider getting an easier job that I can slack off in. However, my family might not be pleased with that... what a bother.

C: 我已经是太卜司最最低职级的卜者了，不知道她老人家为什么突然开始关注我的工作了…害得我现在摸鱼都摸不利索，三天两头就得写汇报。
E: As a diviner, I'm already at the lowest rank at the Divination Commission. I have no clue what I did to catch her attention. Now I can hardly slack off at work, and I'm often asked to submit reports to her.

C: 如此下去，有违我「快乐工作」的原则，不妙不妙……
E: This doesn't bode well. It's against my principle of happiness at work...

C: 你们是谁制造的？
E: Who created you?

C: 自打上回出逃以后，不知怎么，侍女和医士们都不把我看得像过去一样紧了。我试着往外溜达了几次，虽然有人不紧不慢跟着，但再也不像过去那般紧追不舍像逮逃犯一般撵着了。
E: Since my last escape, the maids and healers have stopped watching over me as closely as before. I tried sneaking out a few times. There was still someone following me, but they no longer ran after me like I was a fugitive.

C: 我和前任龙尊有些不太一样，可能主要是因为我还没有长高？
E: I'm slightly different from my predecessors, probably because I haven't grown tall enough yet?

C: 此事远没有看起来有趣。汝可知吾外勤时为何不附身于强悍的金人，而屈身于这脆弱的偃偶假身？
E: Transformation is far less interesting than it looks. Have you any idea why I choose to possess this fragile vessel of a puppet over a powerful aurumaton when I'm dispatched on an expedition?

C: 我问过尾巴，岁阳这样的生物即便被关在「方寸天地」之间也不会觉得束手束脚，它们和我们这样的有形之物不同。
E: I asked Tail before, he said that even if heliobi were trapped in a confined space, they would not be bound. They differ from material creatures in this way.

C: 「有欲望而不得实现」懂吗？这才是岁阳的「拘束」。
E: You understand the idea of a "desire that you can never fulfill," right? This is "imprisonment" for a heliobus.

C: 不过{NICKNAME}大人这种说法也有一定道理，毕竟十王司里怪人很多嘛。俗话说「近朱者赤近墨者黑」，说不定是我被影响了。
E: You may have a point, {NICKNAME}. After all, there are a lot of strange people in the Ten-Lords Commission. As the saying goes: "You are the company you keep." Maybe I got influenced by them as well.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I won't bother you.

C: 站岗还能聊天？
E: You have time to chat while standing guard?

C: 你为什么来十王司工作？
E: Why are you working at the Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 稍等，我吩咐其他同事去取一下，等送到了就给您试试。现在您要不要先看点别的？
E: Hold on while I get a colleague to bring it out for you to try on. Would you like to take a look at anything else in the meantime?

C: 但对仙舟人而言，化外民所认知的古玩不过是些过时的破烂罢了。谁又会将自己出生时代的旧物当成珍宝呢？
E: But to a Xianzhou native, what Outworlders deem ancient artifacts are but expired rubbish. Who would treat items made during their life as treasures?

C: 狐人商家的本事大多是这样历练出来的。在下受小老板娘父母之托，来这里帮衬帮衬她的生意，暗中指导一二。
E: Most foxian traders learn their skills this way. I was asked by her parents to help her run the business from behind the scenes, offering a little guidance or two.

C: 那我推荐您试试「丹鼎素针」，用盖碗泡着喝，沸水冲泡，快速出汤，这茶汤不浓不苦，鲜香醇厚正正好。
E: Then I recommend you try our Vegetations in the Alchemy Cauldron variety. Brew it quickly in a covered cup with boiling water and you'll soon enjoy some tea that's neither thick nor bitter. The flavor is just right.

C: 俗话说，清水出芙蓉，天然去雕饰。好喝的淡茶呢，并非寡淡无味，而是淡而不薄，客人来两壶品品就明白了。
E: As the saying goes, the freshwater hibiscus is Nature's perfect sculpture. A good mild tea is not bland and tasteless, but mild and not thin. Try a couple of pots and you'll know what I mean.

C: 没什么事，我先走了。
E: Nothing. Sorry, I have to go.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}，很高兴认识你。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}, and the pleasure is all mine.

C: 爽快呀！不过，在我们两个确定关系之前，我想提前说清楚一件事。
E: Yippee! But before we make things official, I want to make something clear first.

C: …好像因为前世的我总是热烈地去追求别人，所以我经常遇到一些擅自说着「永远爱我」的人。虽然不好意思，但他们是谁我都记不得了。
E: ...It seems that since I was so passionate about romance in my previous lives, I am always meeting people who claim to love me "forever." I'm truly sorry, but I just can't remember who they were.

C: 我对每一段感情肯定都是真挚而热烈的，这就已经足够了。如果缘分是真实的，那么就来再次相爱呗，我始终张开怀抱。
E: I'm definitely sincere and passionate about every relationship. That's enough for me. If destiny is a thing, then let's fall in love once more — my arms are always open.

C: 你俩来这里练习说相声？
E: Are you guys practicing your crosstalk here?

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 神仙姐姐大摇大摆地走出了监狱，回到了家。从此以后，再也没人敢找她的麻烦了。
E: The celestial lady casually walked out of jail and went home. No one dared to trouble her again.

C: 没别的事了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 原来如此。
E: I see.

C: 姐姐我也喜欢你呀。
E: I like you too.

C: 嗐！我和你说这些干什么，你肯定没什么兴趣吧。别见怪，不管是你们短生种还是我们长生种，年纪大了都有点好为人师之嫌。
E: I'm boring you with all this rambling. However long-lived your species, when you get older, you tend to lecture on like a teacher.

C: 哎，我刚和那帮仙舟的老东西交涉了一番，非常不顺利。
E: My negotiation with Xianzhou fogeys didn't go well at all.

C: 别生气，消消气。
E: Just take it easy.

C: 目前我已经累积服务了数百位客户，观赛成功率和客户好评度高达百分之百。
E: As of today, I have served hundreds of satisfied clients and have <unbreak>100%</unbreak> success rate and positive reviews.

C: 可惜如果我能跑得再快一点就好了，说不定还能让彦卿大人给我签个名。
E: If only I ran a little faster, perhaps I could have even gotten Master Yanqing's autograph.

C: 想喝苏乐达的话，可以来这里找我。
E: Well, if you ever feel like a bottle of SoulGlad, you know where to find me.

C: 这玩意儿怎么坏了啊…
E: This thing is broken...

C: 这下寄了！这下寄了！
E: Mail it now! Mail it now!

C: 头好疼，好想下班…
E: My head hurts. I want to knock off work...

C: 你刚来的时候不是这样的。
E: It wasn't like this when you first came.

C: 好茶啊，好茶！
E: Good tea. This is good tea!

C: …我还是不太能确定一定以及肯定。
E: ...I can't absolutely definitely one hundred percent confirm that.

C: 不至于吧，我今天是「清洁模式」。咱是做服务业的，干净卫生的规矩都懂。
E: It's not that bad, I'm in clean mode today. Those of us in the service industry are all about hygiene and cleanliness.

C: 今天出门没有带钱，下次吧。
E: I haven't got cash on me today, another time.

C: 演武仪典听说邀请了不少外宾…
E: I heard that they invited a good number of outworlder guests to the Wardance...

C: 我明白，你可能还对无限制格斗没有什么认知，毕竟很少有人愿意发自内心承认我的武学造诣为一种「功夫流派」，说实话，我根本不在乎。
E: I understand, you might not be familiar with "Lawless Brawl." After all, not many are willing to acknowledge my martial arts as a form of "style." Honestly, I don't really care.

C: 可你们人类都是一群骗子，不是吗？
E: But you humans are all just a bunch of liars, you know?

C: 难听吗，难听就对了，看到你捂着耳朵我就高兴！
E: Was it bad? So it should be! It's good to see you covering those ears!

C: 这不就等于放了你吗？
E: Doesn't that equal to releasing you?

C: …不行了，我的意识开始模糊，再继续回想下去我可能会裂开变成分灵了。
E: ...No. That's too much. My consciousness is flagging. If I keep thinking about it, I might split up into smaller heliobi.

C: 毕竟人家用身体真真切切地感受到他们的招数，就能用数据化的方式记录下动量、力矩和频次，还能根据数据分析提出招式的改进意见～
E: I mean, I did use my own body to personally experience their skills, allowing me to record the momentum, torque, and frequency of each and every one of their moves with data-driven methods. I can even analyze and provide suggestions to improve their skills.

C: 你可别小看了人家，就这竞锋舰上的选手，还没几个能伤到我的～若没有个好躯体，怎么去切实感受这些火辣辣的力量呢～
E: You shouldn't underestimate me, though — there are few contenders who can even dent me aboard the Skysplitter. How would I be able to profoundly experience spicy, exhilarating strength without a tenacious physique?

C: 最值得注意的选手嘛，不就是经常和你在一起的那位小小的云骑骁卫咯～
E: The fighter most worthy of attention, is obviously that Cloud Knight Lieutenant who's always hanging around you!

C: 没别的事了，告辞
E: I'm all done, farewell.

C: 不过若论起弄权，丹鼎司这几个宵小之辈实在难上得来台面。妾身虽不能直接清理掉他们，但削弱他们的影响力倒还是轻而易举。
E: But, when it comes to a wielding power, these Alchemy Commission knaves have no sway when it comes to the public eye. Though I may not be able to directly remove them, weakening their influence is a piece of cake.

C: 想了解一些事…
E: There are things I want to find out more about...

C: 切，那有什么用。
E: Tsk, useless.

C: 文学的未来属于网文…
E: The future of literature belongs online...

C: 谁也没见过十王司判官…
E: Nobody has ever seen any Judges of the Ten-Lords Commission...

C: 我不看书，别问我。
E: I don't read. Don't ask me.

C: 传说里的故事都是真的？
E: Are the rumors and legends about it all true?

C: 那可不嘛，动静可大了。
E: Well, it's caused quite a stir.

C: 出什么事了，跟我说说嘛，咱俩难得有缘，能在丹鼎司共事。你放心好了，我嘴巴很密的，绝不会给你传出去。
E: Why don't you tell me about it, we are colleagues, aren't we? Don't worry. I'm good at keeping secrets.

C: 仙舟罗浮是要举办葬礼了吗？我还是第一次见到。
E: Is a funeral happening on the Xianzhou Luofu soon? It's my first time seeing it.

C: …其实，我倒觉得塞涅俄丝如今这般…不失为一种反差的美感。
E: ...Actually, I think Seliose's current state has... a certain beauty in its contrast.

C: 没错，正是在下。
E: That's right! That's me!

C: 入口虽然有些酸涩，但只要稍微含一会，就能感受到淡淡的甜味…还有股海风的气息。
E: Though it tastes a little astringent at first, if you let it sit in your mouth for a moment, you can taste a subtle sweetness... and a hint of sea breeze.

C: 诅咒已经解除啦。现在，你可以无忧无虑、自由自在地去实现自己的心愿。
E: The curse has been dispelled. Now, you can freely fulfill your wish without a worry in the world.

C: 缇宁说，希望它能陪你一起入眠，不再害怕做噩梦。
E: Trinnon says she hopes it will keep you company as you sleep, so you won't be afraid of nightmares anymore.

C: 你爱吃不吃。
E: It's up to you whether you want to eat.

C: 未来属于于于于智械。
E: The future belongs to I—Intellitrons...

C: 谢谢你，大师，我悟了！
E: Thank you, master! I understand now!

C: 喂，你说功夫加唱歌跳舞有没有搞头？
E: Hey, you reckon we can get popular if we combine martial arts with singing and dancing?

C: 我相信我能飞，还能触摸天空。
E: I believe I can fly, I believe I can touch the sky.

C: 差不多了，就到这吧。
E: Alright, that's enough for me.

C: 像水一样，我的朋友！
E: My friend, it's to be like water!

C: 年代不明
E: Period unknown

C: 失控的木人桩。
E: An out-of-control wooden dummy.

C: 星历<unbreak>7011</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7011</unbreak>

C: 原始博士。
E: Dr. Primitive.

C: 告诉我，我该怎么做！
E: Please tell me what I should do?

C: 哩哩哩哩……
E: Chiirr-rrrp...

C: 快递箱，备注一栏填写了：「拜托，千万别把货物名称写在上面」。
E: There is a remark written on the label of the courier package: "Please do not put the name of the goods on this."

C: 哎呀，好像有人偷懒，这里就需要你严厉地指导一下了。
E: Oh dear, looks like there is someone slacking off and in dire need of your strict guidance.

C: 再也不信内部消息了。
E: Never trusting insider information again.

C: 你们俩歇会吧，闹一天了。
E: Take a break, you two. You guys have been fooling around for the whole day.

C: 蓝图上绘制着各式各样的金人零件，颇具工业美感。
E: The wide array of aurumaton parts drawn on the blueprint is beautiful in the industrial sense.

C: 「造翼者栖居于被称为『穹桑』的树状人工世界中，以其探出的『枝梢』跃迁至其他星球，夺取其上的资源。」
E: "Wingweavers live in a tree-like artificial world called 'Muldrasil.' From the protruding branches, they can warp to other planets and plunder the resources there."

C: 「绝灭大君，是『烬灭祸祖』纳努克所擢选的令使，「反物质军团」众多部队的领军者。他们受赐毁灭之力，为诸世界带去死亡和破灭。」
E: "The Lord Ravagers are the Emanators chosen by Nanook, the Ruin Author, and are the leaders of the Antimatter Legion troops. They are given the power of Destruction to bring death and havoc to worlds."

C: 「博识学会的报告指出，基于恒星的体积与其天文距离，灭星武器在短时间内不可能造成如此规模的影响。」
E: "The Intelligentsia Guild report pointed out that the star destroyer arsenals could not have caused such a massive impact in such a short time, considering the size of the stars and the distance between them."

C: 你永远不知道租来的飞舸里藏着怎样的惊喜。或许还是驾驶自己的飞舸更省心些——如果你真的有。
E: You never know what to expect from a leased fly ship. Perhaps, it will be easier to use your own fly ship, if you have one.

C: 不得不说，这件事从头到尾都充满了可疑的气息。或许你应该仔细调查一番……
E: It goes without saying that the whole incident is suspicious from start to finish. Perhaps you should look into things more carefully...

C: 下一页。
E: Next page.

C: 这颗晶莹剔透的持明卵中有奇光游移，吸引着你的目光。
E: The glimmer of the crystal-clear Vidyadhara egg catches your eye.

C: 然而，正当你思忖时，它突然爆发出一阵更剧烈的晃动，随后便再也没有任何反应。
E: While you are engrossed in your thoughts, the package starts shaking vigorously before it stops moving.

C: 美馔阁擅长传统德悦菜式——老主顾们对菜品原材料要求较高，主打「食本味」的风格。
E: The Delicacy Pavilion excels at the traditional style of cuisine known as the Deyue Bliss. Regulars are highly critical of the quality of the raw ingredients, with the main selling point being "authentic flavors."

C: 快递箱盖翻开一条缝，一只谛听从里面探出头来。
E: The package's lid opens with a crack, and a Diting pokes its head out.

C: 箱子里面空无一物，只有一张字条——
E: You find that the box is completely empty except for a single note...

C: 说到咱这儿星槎海，就不能不提司辰宫，提到咱这儿司辰宫啊，就不能不提驭空大人。
E: You can't talk about Starskiff Haven without mentioning the Palace of Astrum, and you can't talk about the Palace of Astrum without mentioning Madam Yukong.

C: 你等等，「百步穿杨」？你说我站在离驭空大人一百零一步的地方，可以用手接住飞箭吗？
E: Hang on, "a hundred feet"? Are you saying if I stood <unbreak>101</unbreak> feet away, I could just pluck her arrows out of the air?

C: 嘿嘿……
E: Heh heh...

C: 哎，这家伙是个持明，身上老有一股味道…我是真受不了了。
E: Right, but he's a Vidyadhara. There's always a smell on his body... I can't take it anymore.

C: 乍一看，书籍摆得满满当当，从封面上的灰尘来看，近百年来也没有人翻开过。殊不知，这是十王司带过来的文件…十王司是不是有点跟不上时代了？
E: At first glance, the books are packed neatly on the shelves, and judging from the dust on the covers, no one had touched them for nearly a hundred years. Unbeknownst to the others, these are documents brought by the Ten-Lords Commission... Say, aren't they a little behind times?

C: 一对男女的争吵声从门后传来……
E: You hear the voices of a man and woman arguing coming from the other side of the door...

C: 链接梦境与现实的银行。当口袋里的钞票见底时，你可以拜托他们帮你从现实取些过来……
E: A bank that is both connected to dream and reality. When your pockets run out of money, you can ask them to transfer money from reality...

C: 随手堆砌于此的书籍，也可能是被抛弃了——不知怎地，「抛弃」一词在这个梦中令人格外难受。
E: The books could have either been casually stacked here, or simply discarded — for some reason, the word "discarded" makes one feel particularly sad in this dream.

C: 「浇灌用水，不可直接饮用。」
E: "Irrigation water, not for consumption."

C: 不必怀疑，这玩意虽然叫做「水塔」，里面装的也都是苏乐达。
E: There's no need to inquire: This thing may be called a water tower, but it's all SoulGlad stored in here.

C: 就像每本书都有最后一页，你在匹诺康尼的故事也迎来了落幕。于结尾前的高潮部分，那女孩化作了天上的流星。
E: Just as every book has its final page, your story in Penacony has come to an end. In the climactic moments leading up to the conclusion, the girl became a shooting star in the sky.

C: 快乐的日子？呵，对你们来说或许是，不过……
E: A joyous day? Heh, it might be to you, but...

C: 可…代价是什么呢？
E: But... What is the price?

C: 你继续出杆。哎呀…糟糕，红球跑偏了。你想要一杆清台的愿望就此破灭。
E: You continue to bat. Oh dear... Oh no, the red ball went astray. Your hopes of a clean shot are dashed.

C: 你继续出杆。可这次…黄球仿佛发了疯似的在房间里飞舞起来！它的运动轨迹毫无规律，速度也快得惊人，最后径直砸进了你的上衣口袋里。
E: You continue to bat. But this time... The yellow ball goes nuts and starts dancing around the room! It's moving erratically at shocking speeds, and it ends up in your shirt pocket.

C: 欢迎光临「惊梦酒吧」。店主近期不在，营业时间另行通知。有事请留言。
E: Welcome to Dreamjolt Hostelry. The owner is currently away, and the business hours will be updated later. Please leave a message if you have any inquiries.

C: 我们的方法更加精密，悄无声息。它能有效阻断在梦境世界中犯罪的可能性，同时不会引起宾客的注意。
E: Instead, our method is more targeted and discreet. It can effectively prevent the possibility of crimes in the Dreamscape without drawing the attention of the guests.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，寒冽的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his cold gaze piercing through your face.

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，锐利的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his sharp gaze piercing through your face.

C: 苜蓿草银行慷慨接受了他，他也选择相信我们。现在您看，他拥有了这里的一切！
E: The Alfalfa Bank graciously accepted him, and he chose to trust us. Now, you can see he owns everything here!

C: …当然，被家族明令禁止流通的金表钞除外。
E: ...Of course, apart from Clock Credits, of which The Family has forbidden circulation.

C: 好好听着，前几天营业部来了位大客户。具体有多大…这么跟你说吧，负责接待的那个小子，从他身上捞到了一整年的业绩！啧，明明资历比我浅，真是阳寿换来的运气！
E: Listen up. A major client came by the sales department a few days ago. How major? Let me put it this way — the kid who serviced this client hit his KPI for the entire year! Tsk... I've got years of more experience than that brat! Did he trade in his life for this sort of luck or what?

C: 应该是的吧。
E: I guess so.

C: 呜呜…从来没人爱过我，就算有谁搭话，也只是想骗我……
E: *sob*... No one's ever loved me, and those who talk to me all have ulterior motives...

C: 我只是来喝汽水的。
E: I'm here to drink some soda.

C: 不过…店里的梦泡，我都已经观看过了。
E: But... I've already seen the dream bubbles in the store.

C: 我的直觉…难道出错了吗？我资深调查记者的美名就要葬送在这了吗……
E: Are my instincts... Wrong? Will this prolific investigative reporter meet her demise here...

C: 您就给我讲讲之前都到过哪些地方、见闻过何等趣事吧？
E: Tell me about the places you've been to, the sights you've seen, interesting events like that?

C: （是不是搞错了……）
E: (Was that a mistake...)

C: 现有的那些生物分类法，不过是少数学界精英仗着他们对自然浅薄的认知，私自提出的劣等理论罢了…依我看，都是胡扯！
E: Existing taxonomies are just shoddy theories clutched onto by a few academic elites desperately relying on their shallow understanding of nature... In my opinion, that's all nonsense!

C: 呃…你是要找我吗？抱歉，我还以为你在看我身后的什么东西。
E: Er... Are you looking for me? Sorry, I thought you were looking at the things behind me.

C: 她曾经是个宇宙行商，靠着超凡毅力打出了自己的一片市场。直到有次遇上了海盗……
E: She was a universal traveling merchant, carving out a niche for herself with her extraordinary perseverance. It wasn't until she encountered the pirates...

C: 之前常有人在广场边上做这种动作，邀请恋人一起跳舞——他们看起来可真幸福！
E: There always used to be people in the square that would move like this, inviting their lovers to dance... They looked so happy!

C: ……我该主动去其他时刻找她？
E: ...I should proactively go to the other Moments to find her?

C: 我早就知道原地等待没有结果，其实我就是个胆小鬼…呜呜…宁愿闷头扎在车站门口，等一个虚无缥缈的好结局……
E: I always knew that just standing here waiting in one place would never work. I'm honestly just a coward... *wails*... I'd rather stand here in front of the station entrance and wait for an extremely unlikely happy ending...

C: 家族是梦境的缔造者和管理者，在匹诺康尼有着举足轻重的地位。
E: The Family is both the creator and administrator of the Dreamscape, and they are of decisive importance in Penacony.

C: 你脸色看起来不太好？
E: You look a bit under the weather?

C: …那帮人整天惦记着从我这儿打听出个「生意经」来，可实际上哪有那玩意啊。
E: ...All that bunch of people are obsessed about is getting some business insights out of me. It's all nothing but nonsense if you ask me.

C: 我自小颇受家族器重，家中无论平辈长辈，待我总是恭恭敬敬的。
E: Since my youth, I was treated with respect by my family, from my peers to my elders.

C: 如今有多少演奏家失去了听众的尊重，又有多少喜欢音乐的人因为这些歪门邪道而放弃学习乐器！长此以往，音乐将亡！
E: Countless musicians have lost the respect of their fans, and many aficionados have given up on learning their instruments because of these crooked practices! Over time, music will wither and die!

C: 据我所知，本车行售卖的车辆，在梦境里还没有发生过任何事故，刚才的好评记录您也看到了，都是真实评价，不会有假。
E: To the best of my knowledge, the cars sold at this dealership have never been involved in any accidents. All the positive reviews you've seen are genuine!

C: 你感到一股由衷的喜悦从身旁传来，仿佛寒冷的夜已经过去，最灿烂的梦即将实现，你不由得翘首以盼，沉陷在这份对明天的纯粹希望中。
E: You feel a wave of joy emanating from your side, as if the chilling night has passed, revealing a most splendid dream about to come true. You can't help but look forward to it, sinking into a pure hope for tomorrow.

C: …心情好得就像是连着喝了十几杯甜味饮料，连身边的风都冒着气泡！
E: ...I feel as if I've drunk a dozen sweet drinks in a row, even the wind is bubbling around me!

C: 在此期间，你先随便玩点其他的什么，之后再来找我谈这个话题吧。
E: In the meantime, go and play something else for a while. We can discuss this topic again later.

C: 不过嘛…梦境终究是个更自由的地方，很多原本只能留在蓝图上的概念性建筑，完全可以在匹诺康尼得以实现。
E: However... The dreamscape is a place of greater freedom. Many conceptual buildings that originally would have never made it further than a blueprint are completely possible in Penacony.

C: 看来您认识这位…波奇先生，那么我是否该将您也纳入监控名单呢？
E: I see you know this... Mr. Bocchi. Should I then add you to my list of surveillance targets?

C: 没什么想了解的了。
E: There's nothing else I'd like to ask about.

C: 不知不觉之间，一曲终了——
E: Before you know it, the music reaches its conclusion...

C: {NICKNAME}？好名字，我会牢牢记在心里的。
E: {NICKNAME}? A great name. I'll keep it in mind.

C: 目前受害者已达十余人，猎犬已经介入调查，但嫌疑人尚未被逮捕归案。
E: Over ten individuals have fallen victim to this scam. The Bloodhounds are investigating, but the suspect remains at large.

C: 好的，随时为您服务。
E: Certainly. I'm always here to assist you.

C: 以及，请勿在梦中剽窃他人身份、窥探他人隐私。家族将对此类行为做出精准且严厉的打击。
E: Please do not impersonate others or invade their privacy in the Dreamscape. The Family takes strict actions against such violations.

C: 如果您与其他宾客或是酒店工作人员发生纠纷，可以随时呼叫我。
E: If you have any disputes with other guests or hotel staff, please feel free to contact me at any time.

C: 非常感谢。
E: Much obliged.

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 叮！您目前已经睡眠1小时<unbreak>25</unbreak>分钟，剩余睡眠时间3小时<unbreak>05</unbreak>分钟。
E: Ding! You have slept for 1 hour and <unbreak>25</unbreak> minutes, with 3 hours and 5 minutes remaining.

C: 据说这家服装店的出品非常优秀，再夸张的身材穿上之后都能加分不少。
E: The products of this fashion store are said to be capable of making anyone look good.

C: 嘿，吃了没？
E: Hey, how's it going?

C: 没吃？快来幽鲁士！幽鲁士餐饮连锁，填饱你的每一寸味蕾。
E: You haven't eaten? Come to Yuluxe's Culinary Chain! You'll be full and satisfied.

C: 就不担心会出事故？
E: Aren't you worried about getting into an accident?

C: 别，我还不想死。
E: It's too early for me to die.

C: 我们快出发。
E: Let's hit the road.

C: 如需使用，请您预先进入车内，使劲蹬踩脚下的踏板以驱动发电设备，期间不可停止。经计算，当您的蹬踏速度接近快跑时，飞车即可开始正常行驶。
E: To use the system, please enter the vehicle and vigorously pedal the footboard to drive the engine. Based on our estimation, the vehicle will start moving when your pedaling speed approaches a running pace.

C: 送我去「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」。
E: Bring me to The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand.

C: （还是保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 你们一人一鸟就这么互相盯着对方，时间在沉默中流逝。
E: Time passes in silence as you and the bird stare at each other.

C: 我没有想问的了。
E: I have nothing to ask.

C: 为您服务是我的荣幸——祝您一切顺利！
E: It is my honor to be able to serve you. I wish you well!

C: 毕竟——只有一个人站岗，能和我聊天的人实在太少了！
E: I'm working here alone, after all. There's barely anyone to talk to!

C: 那么，请你详述曾经犯下的错误，以此展现改正的决心。
E: Then, please elaborate on your previous indiscretion, and display your willingness to repent.

C: 我不认为那是个好主意，匹诺康尼的梦中不应存在压迫。倘若一定要用极端手段约束来宾，那我宁愿这里永远混乱下去。
E: I don't think it was a good idea. There should be no suppression in Penacony's dreams. If we had to use extreme methods to regulate guests, I'd rather this place remain forever chaotic.

C: 我原本并不为此感到烦扰。曾经的我一直坚信「艺术」本该如此，天经地义。直到…我主动离开了鸢尾花家系。
E: I didn't think too much of that. I once firmly believed that art should be thus, until... I left the Iris Family of my own accord.

C: 我曾天真地认为，作为一名「艺术家」，我所需要做的就只是投身创作、尽情挥洒我的天赋与才华。
E: I once naively thought that, as an artist, all I need to do was to pour my creativity into my work and flaunt my artistic talent.

C: …没什么，我只是有些羡慕…钟表小子和哈努兄弟之间的友情罢了。
E: ...Nothing much. I'm just a little envious of the... friendship that Clockie and Hanu share.

C: 听说后来事情被妥善解决了，想来一定有你不少功劳吧。
E: I heard that the matter was successfully resolved in the end. You must have played a big role in it.

C: 不，我只是想起了一件糗事。总有些逐梦客让人气到牙痒痒！
E: No, I just recalled something embarrassing that happened to me. There are always some Dreamchaser who never fail to get under my skin!

C: 我这身战甲名叫「全领域歼击动力铠」，放眼整个宇宙也是数一数二的上品。
E: It's called "All-area annihilating power armor," one of the best of its kind in the entire universe.

C: 难道是战甲的镇静模块失效了？不应该啊…之后去补充点冷却液吧。
E: Has the calming module of my armor stopped working? It shouldn't be... Let me replenish the coolant later.

C: 最近鸢尾花家系有个小歌手的「纯美之歌」不是有点名气吗，亏我特意带他们去享受一下文化熏陶，结果呢？沃尔普这老小子，听了没一会就睡得和气泡锂犬似的。
E: Recently, the Iris Family has that young singer who sang "Song of Beauty," right? She's pretty popular. Well, I had the great idea of taking them to experience some culture, and what happens? That Wolpe fool falls asleep and is snoring like a bubble hound before she's even sung a few bars!

C: 我还以为汽水先生的「隐身薄荷汽水」是我的独家机密呢！
E: I thought that Mr. Soda's "invisibility mint soda" was a special secret just for me!

C: 不过请放心，朋友！我和我的伙伴们是不会让他的邪恶阴谋得逞的，滴答！
E: But don't you worry, my friend! My friends and I will never let his evil plan succeed, tick-tock!

C: 亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
E: Dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you today, tick-tock!

C: 亲爱的朋友，钟表小子为你服务，滴答！
E: Dear friend, Clockie is here to serve you today, tick-tock!

C: 钟表小子为你服务，滴答！你想听我介绍一下我的朋友们吗，滴答！
E: Clockie is here to serve you, tick-tock! Would you like to hear me introduce my friends, tick-tock?

C: 又为什么…我明明背得那么出色，最后还是没能挽救我的家庭呢？
E: And why... Even though I learned them so well, was I not able to save my family?

C: 嗯？客人想聊什么？您问，我必定知无不言！
E: Hm? What would you like to talk about, dear customer? Ask me anything and I'll tell you everything I know!

C: 但您猜怎么着，他退役之后竟然不远万里跑来这里当了皮套演员！您知道他有多喜欢钟表小子吗？这系列每一集动画他都看过，厉害吧！
E: But, guess what? After he retired, he immediately came running here from far away to start work as a costumed performer! Do you know how much he loves Clockie? He's seen every single episode — Isn't that amazing?

C: 既然不能像他们那样出生在赛道终点，那就怎么也得想办法比身边的人跑得更快点……
E: As there's no way for me to be born at the finish line like they were, I just have to find a way to run faster than everyone else around me...

C: 要说勤勤恳恳工作有什么用呢？你再怎么累死累活，能比得了人家含金汤匙出生的大少爷吗？
E: What use is there to working hard? It doesn't matter how hard you push yourself, you'll never compare to that rich kid who was born with everything, will you?

C: 一幅挂在墙上的装饰性绘画，其中的形象酷似折纸小鸟——不过是偏写实风格的。
E: A decorative painting is hung on the wall, the image on it is a precise rendering of an origami bird... But in a realistic style.

C: 悄咪咪吃掉一块，应该不会有人发现吧咔咔咔！
E: No one will notice if I sneak a little slice, will they? Gahaha!

C: 人家也想喝饮料啾！
E: I want a drink, too, tweet!

C: 所以我会回答：「匹诺康尼有那么多家酒吧，酒吧里有那么多客人，可你在搭讪时偏偏选中了我」…怎么样！够深情，够动人心弦吧？！
E: So, I would respond: "There are so many lounges in Penacony, with so many guests in each lounge, yet you chose to talk with me..." Well? What do you think? That would blow you away, right?

C: 咳咳。嗯，不好意思，但我必须拒绝你。你是个远高于皮皮西标准线的人类，而我是个恪尽职守的门卫，我们之间是根本不可能的。除非你……
E: Ahem. Umm, I'm sorry, but I must turn you down. You are a human, far taller than the height standards of the Pepeshi people, and I am a dutiful door attendant, it would never work between us. Unless...

C: 「惊梦剧团」居然能与人类正常相处，甚至提供表演服务，看来那位传说中的调饮师确实挺厉害，下次请她来我们节目做特邀访谈嘉宾好了。
E: Not only can the Dreamjolt Troupe interact with humans, they even offer performances! It seems that the legendary drinksmith is indeed an impressive woman. I should invite her for a special feature interview on my program.

C: 一局结束，你意犹未尽地抬起头，发现竟已过去了三个系统时。
E: You finish a round, and when you raise your head, you are flabbergasted: Three system hours have passed.

C: 但我心中尚存希望…或许终有一日，我将泅渡那方混沌、潜入那片虚无，寻得那永恒的乐土……
E: But hope persists in my heart... Perhaps one day, I will traverse that chaos, dive into that void, and find that eternal paradise...

C: 「石剑」伸手在你的眼前虚晃了下，忽然你的视野闪过了几缕华丽光彩。
E: Stoneblade lifts his hand up and does a flick. Suddenly, a glorious brilliance flashes before your eyes.

C: 我喜欢你制造的彩虹。
E: I loved the rainbow that you made.

C: 算你识相。记住，我最讨厌别人打扰我工作！
E: If you know what's good for you. Remember, I hate people interfering with my job!

C: 你可以在「黄金的时刻」生活。
E: You could live in the Golden Hour?

C: 那个挤满人的地方？不行不行，我最受不了这种虚荣浮夸的地方，明明都是普通人，非得装成高贵的模样，做给谁看呢！
E: Where it's crowded with people? Absolutely not. I can't stand fake and conceited places like that. They're all just normal people, yet they pretend like they're all rich and elegant nobles... Who are they trying to impress?

C: 这…真的是我想要的人生吗？
E: Is this... really the life I want?

C: 流梦城寨真是个好地方啊…嘿嘿。
E: Dreamflux Fortress is truly wonderful... Hehe.

C: 那么，你要听什么样的故事呢？
E: So, what kind of story would you like to hear?

C: …呃，抱歉，我知道错了。为表歉意，这个送你当赔罪礼吧。
E: ...Ah, I'm sorry. I know it was wrong. Please accept this gift as an apology.

C: 实话告诉你吧，这会儿我刚种完田回来，就想找个清静的地方喘口气……
E: Honestly, I just finished planting in my fields and was searching for a quiet place to take a breather...

C: 直到不知道多少年以后，我们来到刻满了故事的行星环。在最大的一块石头上，他们对我说「陌生人，感谢你的到来」。
E: It wasn't until many years later that we arrived at the ring system carved with stories, and on the largest stone, were the engraved words: "Thank you for coming, stranger."

C: 而直到前些天我才发现…原来它竟一直在私下里偷偷练习，日以继夜地演奏、演奏到活塞都出现了轻微的磨损。而这一切只因为…它觉得「只有能够完美地演出，才不会再次被抛弃」。
E: And I didn't realize until just the other day that... he had been rehearsing in secrecy the whole time, day and night, until his pistons started to get worn down from overuse. And he was doing this because... he had this thought that he could only avoid abandonment through perfect musical performances.

C: 哈哈…那个小家伙似乎挺失望，但对于现在的我来说，美梦太喧闹，这里却正好。
E: Haha... that poor kid seemed pretty disappointed, but at this age I find the sweet dreams too noisy. Things are perfect where I am now.

C: 他是个伟大的筑梦师，也是个伟大的老师…只可惜现在除了那条吵闹的大街，没什么地方能看到他的名字。
E: He is both a great Dreamweaver and a teacher... It's a pity that his name has been buried in obscurity — you won't find it mentioned anywhere.

C: 嘿呀——让我想想，哈努兄弟和猫头鹰老师是多年的老朋友，就连他的据点外面也有老师的痕迹，<color=#dbc291ff>是小鸟看了就会亲近的雕像啾</color>。
E: Hi-yah!!! Let me recall: Brother Hanu and Professor Owl are longtime friends. There are even vestiges of the Professor outside his usual hangout: <color=#dbc291ff>It's a statue that birds are reflexively drawn to, tweet</color>.

C: 没问题。老人别的没有，多的是闲暇时间，你想聊什么？
E: No problem. The old don't have much else besides time. What do you want to talk about?

C: 呵呵，没想到现在的年轻人还对这个感兴趣，不枉费我们的大力宣传。那让我讲给你吧——
E: Heh-heh, never thought the young'uns now would be interested in such a thing. Our huge advertising push certainly didn't go to waste. I'll tell you about it then...

C: 哦~顾客，你喜欢玩具吗？
E: Ohh, do you like toys?

C: 亲爱的顾客，你觉得呢——我能完全理解你的快乐，并为你带来快乐吗？
E: My dear customer, what do you think? Did I completely understand your joy, and evoke joy in you?

C: 能。
E: You did.

C: 呃…游戏是克劳克影业做的，我只负责写故事书。
E: Err... The game was made by Clock Studios, and I was only in charge of writing the narrative.

C: 我想要哈努兄弟的纪念品。
E: I want a Brother Hanu souvenir.

C: 我觉得我并没有背叛同谐，反倒是同谐让我接纳了这一切…我认为无论是「钟表匠」还是哈努努，他们渴望的都是一个安宁无忧的乐园，这也是家族所期望的。
E: I don't think I betrayed Harmony. In fact, it is Harmony that made me to accept all this... Whether it be the Watchmaker or Hanunue, they all simply desired a peaceful haven free of troubles, which is also what The Family hopes for.

C: 这种私人恩怨劳驾不要伤及无辜。这位小姐的失礼可真让人困扰…不如这样，莱斯特先生，我请您去安静的地方喝一杯？
E: Let's not involve others in our personal squabbles, shall we? This lady's impropriety is troubling indeed... How about a drink somewhere quieter, Mr. Lester?

C: 抱歉我方才稍有些出神，但您瞧，这里的风景着实美丽宜人——
E: Sorry, I was lost in thought just now... but look! The view here is simply stunning.

C: 而是他们「从未见过」的壮丽海滩，和满天的繁星。
E: Instead, they gazed upon something that they'd never seen before — magnificent beaches and a sky full of stars.

C: 我不是他们当中的任何一位，只是个普通人。
E: I'm not like any of them. I'm just a normal person.

C: 方案众多，随时恭候。
E: I'll tell you about my other proposals the next time we meet.

C: 或许这种病毒曾经肆虐过某个星球，甚至星系，而一些感染者理所当然地因此展开了逃亡。
E: Maybe this virus devastated a planet or star system once upon a time, and those infected fled from there.

C: 人生大多数时候都在积累，真正的爆发点不多。如果碰上，一定要果断出击！
E: Life is all about waiting for the rare moment to strike, and you have to strike it hard while it's hot!

C: 他买通所有进购过这动物的餐厅，让二十多家餐厅统一口径，声称这种甲虫根本不存在…我是说…这种保护动物！
E: They managed to bribe all the restaurants that previously purchased this animal, convincing more than twenty restaurants to unanimously deny the existence of these beetles... I mean, this protected animal!

C: 是啊，与其继续这样自怨自艾，倒不如放下负担，享受旅行本身……
E: Alright, instead of beating myself up over it, I might as lighten up and enjoy the trip...

C: 没事了。
E: That's all.

C: 呼…没事就好……
E: Phew, good to hear...

C: 当然啦，外人看我，就只能看到我在社交活动上光彩照人的模样，还有我在娱乐新闻上的各种劲爆头条…他们哪里知道我为了上头条，事先要排演多久那些傻事。
E: Of course, people only notice my glamorous appearances at social events and the mad buzz I create in the news... They're clueless about the rehearsals I have to do for these absurd moments, just so I can get on the headlines.

C: 那自我介绍一下吧：我叫托马斯，是星际和平公司的员工，也是女明星艾丽卡的老公兼经纪人。公司派我出差，我就带着她来顺便度个蜜月。
E: Allow me to introduce myself then. I'm Thomas, an IPC employee and manager of my celebrity wife, Erica. The IPC sent me here on a business trip, and I saw it as the perfect opportunity to double it as our honeymoon trip.

C: 好心的客官，您要是在船上看到了乱跑的小鸟，就请让它们来*船头*找人家啾！
E: Kind guest, if you happen to see any birds flying about on the ship, please tell them to find me at the ship's bow, tweet!

C: 你对它的反应十分无语，这个广告牌该不会只有复读功能吧？怎么一直在复读你的话？真不知道该说什么好了。
E: Its reaction leaves you speechless. Is this billboard only capable of repeating what others say? Why does it keep copying what you say? You really have no idea what else to say.

C: 所以我就给自己起了这个名字，以免再有意外发生，汪。
E: I chose this name to prevent such accidents from occurring again, woof.

C: 啊？不会吧？我记得苜蓿草那边是有和星穹列车交接的啊。我们这边是确认拿到了星穹列车方的同意才启动的。
E: Huh? Really? I know the Alfalfa was in liaison with the Astral Express. We even waited for the Astral Express to green-light it before going into production.

C: 这样的生活也挺好的，包吃包住有工资还有小费，这样的工作上哪里找？
E: I quite enjoy this life now. I get a place to stay, free meals, a salary, and even tips to boot. Where else can I find such a good job?

C: 谢谢夸奖，非常感谢大副您对我的栽培！
E: Thank you for the compliment! I am grateful for all the training you've given me!

C: 这儿有什么服务？
E: What services do you provide here?

C: 再见。愿美好的记忆能填满您的梦境。
E: Goodbye. May your Dreamscape be filled with sweet memories.

C: 你变得可真快。
E: You've changed your mind rather quickly.

C: 这座学校是我的象牙塔，也是囚禁我的牢笼。
E: This school is both my ivory tower and the cage that imprisons me.

C: 呃…你让我有点尴尬，但钱包都掏出来了，再放回去也挺不好意思。或许我的慷慨能打动你。
E: Eh... Now you're really putting me on the spot. Since I already got my wallet out, it'd be awkward to put it away. Maybe my generosity can sway you.

C: 不行，难度太大。垃圾分类的标准就和宇宙里的种族一样繁杂，很难统一。
E: Hardly feasible. There are as many ways to categorize trash as we have species in the universe. It's not going to be easy to come up with a common standard.

C: 他们阴阳怪气你。
E: They are being sarcastic about you.

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 但相比于往届，展品形式有了一定程度的拓展，比如受关注的动物体验梦泡，迷因表演等等。当然，展馆本身也是一件精妙的作品。
E: Although, the forms of exhibitions will be expanded somewhat compared with previous years. There will be trending animal-experience dream bubbles, meme performances, and other things... Of course, the exhibition hall itself is an outstanding work.

C: 哈…其实他课讲得也没那么烂——不过是半个系统时内读错了五个音、误用了三次典故、还把两篇文献的作者完全混淆了而已。
E: Ah... If I'm honest, his lectures weren't really that bad... It's just that in half a system hour, he mispronounced five words, used three incorrect quotes, and completely confused the authors of two separate documents.

C: 我从一位「当事人」那里听说，其实是有位公司的高管得罪了巡海游侠，被人追杀到匹诺康尼来了。为了自保，这位高管在克劳克影院设下陷阱，想解决掉游侠，但结果嘛……
E: I heard from a witness that there was an IPC official who had gotten on the wrong side of the Galaxy Rangers, and they chased him down to Penacony. To protect himself, this official had laid a trap in Clock Studios, thinking he could take down the Ranger, but it turns out...

C: 我想问…
E: I want to ask...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 其实这样也挺好！
E: Actually, this is pretty good!

C: 虽然大家的想法各不相同，但关系却相当亲密。就像乱破忍首所说的——「缭乱」并非是暂时组成的乐队，更是我们共同的信念与归属。
E: Everyone's got different ideas, but we're all pretty close. Just like Head Ninja Rappa said — The Dazzling isn't just a temporarily formed band, but a belief and sense of belonging that we share.

C: 音乐派对能取得如此成功，在银河间引起广泛关注，你和那位乐队核心的确功不可没。
E: The music party's success and amassed following across the cosmos are all thanks to you and the core members of your band.

C: 不买就算了，捣什么乱？！
E: It's fine if you don't want to buy, but why cause trouble?

C: 最近多亏了同学们的支持，生意还不错，我就说嘛，睡蕉小猴那玩意过时不说，市场也早就饱和了，得另辟蹊径才行。
E: Recently, thanks to the support of my classmates, business has been good. Like I said, the Slumbernana Monkey is not only outdated, but the market is already saturated. We need to explore new opportunities.

C: 哇！居然收到粉丝的礼物了！
E: Woah! A gift from a fan!

C: 唔…现在是校庆期间，所以…不要聊那些沉重的话题了……
E: Mmm... It's the school anniversary festival, so... let's not talk about anything too heavy...

C: 你为什么喜欢做甜品？
E: Why do you like making desserts?

C: 当然记得…当时大家都特别喜欢小猴，就连老师也扮成了猴子。但现在大家都不聊小猴了，就连香蕉甜品都没那么受欢迎了……
E: Of course I do... Everyone loved monkeys then, even the teachers dressed up like one. But now no one talks about it. Even the banana desserts aren't that popular anymore...

C: 欢迎回家，亲爱的无名客。您需要些什么？要喝点饮料吗？或是吃些点心？还是…来点妙趣横生的笑话？
E: Welcome home, dear Nameless. Is there anything you need? Would you like a drink? Or maybe some snacks? Or... a delightful joke?

C: 譬如一个人不理解大气的运动，便能操纵风。一个人不理解潮汐的起落，就能操纵海。
E: For example, if someone didn't understand atmospheric movement, they could control the wind. If someone didn't understand the rise and fall of tides, they could control the sea.

C: 哦，我知道这并不是一个很好笑的笑话。因为正如我所说的那样，这个笑话非常古老。但它很有启发性，不是吗？
E: Yes, it's true that it might not be the funniest joke, but it is quite thought-provoking. The idea of someone who is both ignorant and influential in controlling fate is a fascinating concept, and it certainly offers a lot of food for thought.

C: 任何时间，任何地点，哈努兄弟都会为你排忧解难。
E: Brother Hanu will help when you're in a pinch. Anytime, anywhere.

C: 这大概就是那种——音乐喷泉只会在周末喷水，海选的装置也只会在比赛时启动。
E: This is the kind of musical fountain that only sprays on weekends. The installation will likewise only come into activation during the qualifiers.

C: 色彩斑斓的包装纸在微光下是如此诱人，你试图解开它们的内里——只可惜赠送者似乎忘记附上大名。
E: The colorful packaging paper shimmers mesmerizingly beneath the faint light. You attempt to unwrap their contents — it's unfortunate that the sender did not leave their name.

C: 要入梦了，真期待啊…
E: I'm about to start dreaming. I can't wait...

C: 你在梦里特别受欢迎。
E: You're really popular in the dream.

C: 我好喜欢她在舞台上的样子，简直会发光。
E: I love the way she looks up on stage. She positively glows.

C: 爷爷奶奶都喝它…
E: Grandpa and grandma both love it...

C: 大家进入美梦，本就是为了享受生活，何必给他们添堵呢？
E: Everyone enters the dream to enjoy life, so why deliberately give them trouble?

C: 如果宾客受到的情感冲击太过强烈，搞不好就直接从梦中醒来了。
E: If the guests become too agitated or emotional, they might even wake up from the dream.

C: …再看一眼。
E: ...I'll take another look.

C: 这可是在梦里…
E: We're in a dream. Come on...

C: 好吧…实话就是，我感兴趣的其实并不是恐怖片，而是你每次看恐怖片时候的反应……
E: Well... the truth is, it's not really the horror movies I'm into. It's the way you react every time you watch one...

C: 好慢啊…
E: What's taking so long...?

C: 我明白，这大概就像高能物理学界失去了小亚当。
E: I do. It would be like if the high-energy physics world lost Little Adam.

C: 等了多久了…他人呢！
E: How long has it been, where is he?

C: 太闪耀了，我也要参加下届海选！
E: This is awesome, I want to participate in the next audition too!

C: 五连中！您运气真好。
E: Five in a row! You're so lucky!

C: 匹诺康尼出大事了，今晚小心点吧！
E: Something big happened in Penacony. Be careful tonight!

C: 特别是最后，科诺达和里昂互相飙戏，里昂在被长剑刺中后倒地而死，我打算回去把这段的录播再看个七次八次的。
E: Especially that last part where Kenoda and Leon had an acting showdown — the scene where Leon fell to the ground and died after being stabbed by the longsword... I intend to rewatch that recording at least a dozen times.

C: …还是空的啊，这展品……
E: ...It's empty. The exhibits...

C: 我一定能交到朋友…
E: I have to make some friends...

C: 我怎么什么都不知道？
E: Why do I not know about this?

C: 谐乐大典竟然延期了…
E: The Charmony Festival actually got delayed...

C: 听说这里有个怪厨师…
E: I hear there's a strange cook here...

C: 菜都有点吃腻了…
E: I'm a little tired of the same dishes...

C: 我明明有预约的……
E: I made a prior reservation...

C: ——可喜可贺，可喜可贺。
E: ...Sincere congratulations.

C: 「窥梦电话」是什么？
E: What is a "Dreampeek Call"?

C: 「咔哒」，「咔哒」，「咔哒」。你反复按动开关，灯泡却置若不闻。
E: "Click," "Click," "Click." You repeatedly press the switch, but the lightbulb remains unresponsive.

C: 希望它以后能够吸取教训。
E: Hopefully, it will learn from this experience.

C: （摸摸它的屁股）
E: (Pat its butt)

C: 说到这个，就不得不给客人你讲个故事啦：据说曾有位逐火的黄金裔只身狩猎神祇，战斗时泰坦的金血染在她的手上。后来她回到家乡，发现自己纺出的丝线都是华丽的金丝。
E: Let me share this tale with you! Legend has it that a Flame-Chase Chrysos Heir once battled the gods alone, and her hands were stained with the golden ichor of the Titans. When she returned home, she discovered that all the silk she spun turned a dazzling golden hue.

C: 算了，我突然不想吃了。
E: I suddenly lost my appetite.

C: 你好奇地尝了一口所谓的粗制葡萄秘酿——呸呸呸！这分明是草席子泡水的味道！！！
E: You take a sip of the crude grape brew... EWW! It tastes like a soggy straw mat!!!

C: 吉奥里亚告诉我们，饿着肚子打不赢。等我职歇，可以来找我，给你做点。
E: Georios says you shouldn't fight while hungry. When I'm done with work, come find me. I'll make you something to eat.

C: {RUBY_B#适者登神假说}演化神秘学{RUBY_E#}告诉我们——毁灭，然后新生！
E: {RUBY_B#The Apotheosis of the Fittest Hypothesis}Evoccultism{RUBY_E#} tells us that — We will be destroyed, then reborn!

C: 阿格莱雅姐姐不是那位泰坦的一个注脚，黄金裔们，也应该都有自己的理想和追求。
E: Sister Aglaea isn't just a side note for that Titan, and the same goes for the other Chrysos Heirs. I believe each of them treads their unique path with their own inspirations.

C: 这位可爱的{F#女士}{M#先生}，利波向您问好~
E: Greetings, adorable {F#lady}{M#mister}. Lipos is here, sending you warm regards!

C: 唔…利波在您身上嗅到了广袤天空的味道：浅淡又遥远，但是如此的令人心驰神往。
E: Hmhm... Lipos senses the vast sky's aroma around you: So close, yet distant, and utterly enchanting.

C: 「信徒赠与诗歌、鲜花与昂贵的金绸；使者奉献美酒、石榴与守护之誓言。」
E: "Verses, blooms, treasures untold by the disciple laid. Wine, pomegranates, vows of protection by the messenger displayed."

C: 「黄金裔们逐火而去，日复一日、年复一年；远行者尚未归来，而黑潮近在眼前。」
E: "Chrysos Heirs departed on the quest's call. Years pass, none returned, as the black tide did fall."

C: 呵呵…若这些温馨的日常能够稍微冲淡她们所负的沉重命运，我便再欣慰不过了。
E: Hah... If only such happiness within their daily life could slightly ease the great weight of destiny that they bear... That would bring me true relief.

C: 她只是听命于我，愿为自己所追逐的事物奉上一切，也愿为此敞开那夺去生命的怀抱——即便那是最令她迷惘之事。
E: She merely heeds my orders and is willing to give everything to obtain what she seeks. Even if that means extending her life-stealing embrace... This can create a confusing paradox for her.

C: 缇宁在*我们*之中最为冷静，想问题的时候能考虑得面面俱到，大家都说她身上有一股学者的气质。
E: Trinnon is the most cool-headed among us. When she thinks about a problem, she considers every possible angle. Everyone says that she has the makings of a scholar.

C: 决定谁去承载纷争火种的不只有武力的高低。白厄他…是无缺的「救世主」，由他接纳尼卡多利的神性再合适不过。
E: It is not merely martial strength that decides who will bear the Coreflame of Strife. Phainon... he is the flawless "Deliverer," and there is no greater candidate to inherit the divinity of Nikador.

C: 你知道吗，有时候我会和塞纳托斯说话——都是我单方面提问。我总是一边祈祷，一边在心里问，我家人在那边过得好吗？有没有吃的？冷不冷？可惜，它从不回答。
E: You know, sometimes I talk to Thanatos — I ask a lot of questions. When I pray, I always wonder if my family is doing well over there, and if they have enough food and clothes to keep themselves warm. Unfortunately, I never got the answers.

C: 哼，我也有想过…我好吃好喝地供奉着它，肯定不是我不够心诚，想来想去……
E: Hmph. I have also considered... I have offered Thanatos fine food and drink. There's no way that I have not been loyal enough. I keep thinking and...

C: 塞纳托斯在上，它平等地眷顾每一个逝者，它的神力至高无上…那个马尔库斯，他是怎么敢的？！
E: The Great Thanatos above! Thanatos has equal mercy for the deceased and supreme powers above all... That Marcus, how dare he utter such nonsense!?

C: 「人气」？你是说这些听众朋友吗？哈哈，我只不过是个普通的演说家，都是大家赏脸捧场。
E: "Popular"? You mean my listeners? Haha, I am just a mere orator. It is the people that honor me with their praise.

C: 喂——{F#小姑娘}{M#小兄弟}，你怎么回事？你这样搞，我待会儿的演讲要取消了…没有「祝福」，我、我…这可怎么办呐……
E: Hey... {F#Girl}{M#Boy}, what have you done? I'm going to have to cancel my speech now... Without my "blessing," I, I... What am I going to do...

C: 这好像只是普通的水。
E: It just seems like normal water?

C: 怎么还提前收费？！你真不是骗子吗……
E: You're charging me beforehand!? Are you sure you're not a scammer...?

C: 啧，不识货的乡下佬，这可是经米隆大师之手铸造的「翻飞之币」，别说支付占卜费用了，把你买下来都绰绰有余！
E: Tsk. You ignorant bumpkin! This is the "Coin of Whimsy" crafted by Master Milon! Forget a measly divination... I could buy you with this!

C: 卖东西前先讲个故事。我熟。
E: Tell me a story before selling me something. The oldest trick in the book.

C: …嗯？之前街上乱起来的时候，我好像看见过你。打架可厉害了。
E: ...Hmm? I think I saw you back during the street riots. That was a pretty insane fight.

C: 既然你叫醒了我，那就来回答一个问题吧——就像冷水澡和热水澡，清醒和做梦你更喜欢哪个？
E: As you have woken me, let me ask you a question... If one is like a cold shower and the other a warm bath, do you prefer waking life or dreaming?

C: 说起来，我还有个邻居，她可比我厉害多了…同样是有家不住，那家伙直接在云石市集找了一只不知道该叫桶还是筐的东西搬了进去！
E: Come to think of it, I have a neighbor that is even worse than I am... Not only does she never return home, she found a — I don't know whether to call it a bucket or a basket — in Marmoreal Market, and started living in it!

C: 你的出手实在太过仁慈。就比如刚才，我被路边的石头绊倒，你为什么不趁机刺我的后背？
E: You are too merciful with your attacks. When I tripped over a stone in the road just now, why did you not take your chance to stab me in the back?

C: 技巧胜过蛮力，年轻人。要随时保持头脑清醒。
E: Technique is superior to brute strength, youngster. You must always keep your mind sharp.

C: 有什么能教给我的技巧？
E: What skills can you teach me?

C: 不过现在，大多数年轻人的盾牌都来自父母——出征之前，战士们会举行名为授盾礼的告别仪式，希望后代能将盾牌和荣誉一并传承下去。
E: However, the majority of shields youngsters use nowadays come from their parents... Before they go out on expeditions, warriors take part in a farewell ceremony known as the Rite of the Shield. The hope is that the descendants will continue to pass down honor alongside their shield as a legacy.

C: 你的盾牌去哪了？
E: Where is your shield?

C: 我要怎样成为一名战士？
E: How can I become a warrior?

C: 山之民，想得少，做得多。享誉多年，我们的锻造手艺，我们的砌石手艺。
E: Think little, work plenty, Mountain Dwellers do. Renowned for years, our forging skills and masonry have been.

C: …等待的漫长像不见月光的黑夜，熟悉的声音才从听筒传来……
E: ...The prolonged wait feels like a night with no moonlight in sight, and a familiar voice comes through the receiver...

C: 你捧起瓶身，一饮而尽……
E: You raise the bottle, and down it in one go...

C: 喂！
E: Hey!

C: 现在你愿意聊聊缇宝了吗？
E: Are you ready to talk about Tribbie now?

C: 刻法勒造人，智慧和顽强，各加一半。瑟希斯造东西，只加了智慧。轮到吉奥里亚，还有剩，但不多。
E: Kephale gave, humans wisdom and resilience. Cerces gave, creations only wisdom. By Georios' time, little left.

C: 覆灭前的阿卡索斯停留在你的记忆中，被黑潮吞没的阿卡索斯却可以随时前往。早已不存在的东西，如何与现今仍存在的东西是同一物？
E: The Icatus that existed before its destruction remains in your memory, yet you can go to the Icatus that has been devoured by the black tide at any time. How could something long since gone be the same as something that exists currently?

C: 但这个逻辑并非无懈可击。异乡的智者啊，不知你有没有看到其中的疏漏？
E: However, this logic is not infallible. Wise one from outlands, I wonder if you have seen the flaw in this?

C: 那番话如同当头棒喝。我突然意识到，我的眼睛不是缺陷，而是一种独特的视角。从那时起，我开始尝试大型壁画，用我的方式诉说奥赫玛的历史，也描绘它的未来。
E: It was a bolt from the blue. I realized my eyes weren't a defect, but a unique perspective. From then on, I started crafting large murals, channeling my distinct vision to bring Okhema's history to life and shape its future.

C: 倒也不是什么大事，我和家人在城外运货时被锋狼袭击，它扑上来的时候，被路过的野生大地兽一尾巴甩晕了。
E: It wasn't anything serious. My family and I were transporting goods outside the city when a direwolf attacked us. Just as it lunged, a passing wild dromas knocked it out cold with a swing of its tail.

C: 这两个家伙为了调查，就跑来浴场打探消息，结果得知了「那个探险队的队长前些时候与老店主达成了某项秘密交易」——这不，就吵起来了嘛~
E: These two guys, in order to investigate, came to the bath to gather information. They found out that "the captain of that expedition made some secret deal with the old shopkeeper some time ago" — and that's when the argument started~

C: 你在质疑我提供的消息？
E: Are you questioning the information I provided?

C: 要上吗？要不…还是等明天吧……
E: Should I go in? Or maybe... maybe I'll wait until tomorrow...

C: 我决定了，数到1我就冲进那金血！开始——
E: I've decided. When I count to 1, I'll charge into that golden blood! Starting —

C: 要是脑子里全是那些条条框框，还怎么当好一个画家？老师你说是吧？
E: If your mind is full of those rules and restrictions, how can you be a good painter? Don't you think so, master?

C: 要是有这个闲工夫，还不如让我多泡会澡，指不定真能想出点什么来呢！
E: If I had this free time, I'd rather soak in the bath longer — who knows, maybe I'd come up with something!

C: 可惜，最近来听的人并不多，可能是大家都听过十几遍了。倒是你，我看你面生得很，是新来的吧，想不想听听我的惊世理论？
E: Alas, not many are willing to listen these days. Maybe because they've heard it dozens of times. But you, you're an unfamiliar face. You're new, aren't you? Care to listen to my mind-blowing theories?

C: 种子是什么？
E: What are seeds?

C: 我可不是那种倒卖树庭资源的混蛋，我这都是定期捞取「沉没树种」，看看适不适合应用到我们生活中，有合适的才好放到市场来叫卖。
E: I'm not one of those scoundrels reselling Grove assets. These are Sunken Tree Seeds that I regularly procure to see if they help with our daily lives. Only successful product tests are sold on the market.

C: 能给我介绍下「种子」吗？
E: Can you tell me about the "seeds"?

C: 曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「兵马未动，粮草先行。」何况战争又是最马虎不得的，一点纰漏都会导致一场大败。
E: There was once a sage who said this: "The grain moves before the army does." You can't afford any mistakes in war. The slightest misstep will cause a crushing defeat.

C: 自雅努斯为天地划定界限起，我们便侍奉在左右，打开通道，传达神谕。神驹身负使命，奔走在翁法罗斯的各处，难道你就从来没遇见过？
E: Ever since Janus carved the boundary between heaven and earth, we have been there serving, opening passages, and delivering prophesies. Have you never seen a divine foal cantering about Amphoreus on their missions?

C: 你的同伴呢？
E: Your companions?

C: 坚硬稳固的木箱，但是经不住「扎格列斯之手」<color=#f29e38ff>冲拳</color>的冲击。
E: A sturdy wooden box, but still not sturdy enough to endure a <color=#f29e38ff>Punch</color> from the Hand of Zagreus.

C: 感觉你和之前不太一样了…
E: You've changed a bit, haven't you?

C: 收听仙舟留言。
E: Checking messages from the Xianzhou.

C: 据说在千年前的黄金世，三位灾厄泰坦尚未降临，那时的人们可以不太费力地抵达世界边界，在无尽之海中亲身体验{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}的奇迹。
E: Legend has it that during the Era Chrysea a thousand years ago, the three Calamity Titans had not yet descended on this world. Back then, people could travel to the ends of the earth with ease and personally witness the miracles of the {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#} within the endless ocean.

C: 我…我打算继续请人为我解读神谕，毕竟我就是为此而来的……
E: I... I plan to keep searching for someone to interpret my prophecy. That was my whole reason for coming, after all...

C: 不如刻法勒全知全能。
E: They are not all-knowing and all-powerful like Kephale.

C: 你还挺热心的。
E: You're quite hospitable.

C: ——密底斯泰歇的图章，放凉的贡果派，全都可卖，全都好价！
E: — Mythemis' seals and chilled pies make from offering fruits! Everything's for sale, all at great prices!

C: 你很会照顾人们的心情。
E: You're good at taking care of people's emotions.

C: 言归正传。缇安是*我们*中最勇敢的一个，最早出发的时候，她手里拿着一把小木剑，哼哧哼哧地想亲自去降伏泰坦呢！
E: Back to the topic. Trianne was the bravest among us. When she first set out, she held a small wooden sword, huffing and puffing as she dreamed of taking down a Titan herself!

C: 小灰，好有志气！可普通人怎么想都不可能学会「百界门」的啦。
E: Ambitious, Little Gray! But it is impossible for ordinary folks to understand how to use the "Century Gate."

C: 可太久不回想的记忆，等到真的想重温的时候，才会发现它们已然模糊不清，仅在零星几个夜晚，以梦境的方式送给*我们*一个久别重逢的轻吻……
E: But memories left untouched for too long become blurred when one finally tries to recall them. They return only fleetingly on rare nights, like a gentle kiss of reunion in our dreams...

C: 他们被塞涅俄丝挑战苍穹、支撑天空的牺牲壮举所感动，决心弥合曾经种群之间的分歧，构建出大家都能和谐相处的居所。
E: They were so moved by Seliose's heroic act of challenging the Titan and holding up the sky that they decided to bridge the divides between their tribes and create a place where all could live in harmony.

C: 哈…我看上去有那么脆弱吗？好像每位与我相处了一段时间的战友都会觉得我有段沉重到难以放下的过去。
E: Haha... do I look that fragile? It seems that every companion I've spent time with assumes I have a past so heavy it's hard to let go of.

C: 当然不是啊！咱单位一部分人的立场，不代表我本人的立场。
E: Of course not! A handful of people don't represent the entire Council — or me, for that matter.

C: …工作内容我就不奢求有所改变了，只求能多来点年轻同事。
E: ...I've given up hoping for changes in my job, but I do wish for more young colleagues around here.

C: 细说，我竖起耳朵听！
E: All right, spill it — I'm all ears.

C: …{NICKNAME}？也欠我钱吗？你这家伙别打扰我核对账单啊……
E: ...{NICKNAME}? Do you owe me money too? Hey, don't distract me while I'm checking my accounts!

C: 这是勒索名单吗？
E: Is this some kind of extortion list?

C: 感谢你，就聊到这里吧。
E: Thank you. That's all for now.

C: 现在想还有点太早了吧？
E: Isn't it a bit too early for that?

C: 那就交给别人想吧。
E: Then leave that work to others.

C: 我应该不需要墓志铭。
E: I probably won't need one.

C: 你有得到过刻法勒的回应吗？
E: Have you ever received a response from Kephale?

C: 没错，这值得费心去记。但要实在想不起来，有人问起时，只要说是尤里萨帮了你便好。
E: Yes, it is worth doing so. But if you have trouble recalling and someone asks, mentioning that Ulysse helped you is enough.

C: 将供奉放在祭坛，双手合十，诚心诵念三遍祷词。别学那些狂妄的学者，在神像前大放厥词。
E: Place your offering on the altar, put your palms together, and recite the prayers three times with sincerity. Do not follow the examples of those arrogant scholars, spouting nonsense in the presence of divinity.

C: 嗯…对哦，接下来该我发力了。我看看……
E: Hmm... Right, now it's my turn to act. Let me see...

C: 多亏贵客你先前搜集的石板，金丝得以为我指出更加明确的方向。
E: Thanks to the stone slates you collected earlier, the golden threads have pointed me in a clearer direction.

C: 哦哦，和我们相比，大地兽还是冷静多了！
E: Oh, the dromas are much more composed, compared to us!

C: 不相信也没办法吧？
E: Well, you kinda have to, right?

C: 许多资料都散落在地，来不及一一整理。请你收集自己觉得重要的数据吧，我来将它们整合起来。
E: Many records are scattered on the ground, too many to sort through individually. Please collect what you think is important, and I'll organize them together.

C: 他是个好人，只是精神…恐怕不太正常。他总觉得自己辜负了战友，总说看到队长的脸出现在黑潮里，听到同伴呼唤他。
E: He's a good man, though perhaps... not right in the mind. He always believed he failed his comrades, claimed he saw the captain's face in the black tide, and heard comrades calling him.

C: 要是有马尔库斯的消息，请第一时间告诉我。
E: Contact me immediately if you hear anything about Marcus.

C: 这不算撒谎，对吗？拉个勾，我们一起保护大家心中希望的小火苗吧。
E: That's not lying, is it? Pinky promise – we'll protect the tiny spark of hope in everyone's heart.

C: 奥赫玛是我们最后要守护、也最终会庇护我们的家园，一定是的。
E: Okhema is the last home we'll protect... and will ultimately shelter us. It must be.

C: 我也见过。
E: I've seen them too.

C: 黑潮造物冲垮了防线。我和探险队赶来支援时，此处的惨状难以言喻。
E: Black tide creations breached defenses. When our expedition came to aid... the carnage defied description.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: Maybe I should leave you now.

C: 呵呵…一定……
E: Hehe... of course...

C: 又或者，我们变成大地兽，大地兽变成我们？那听上去也不错就是了…唉，吉奥里亚在上，一定要有大地兽的容身之处啊！
E: Or maybe we'll turn into dromas, and they'll turn into us? That doesn't sound too bad, actually... Ahh, by Georios above, may there always be a place for the dromas!

C: 为什么要道歉？
E: What are you apologizing for?

C: 如果世界能够重生，那一定是因为有人可以走到道路的尽头。
E: If the world is to be reborn, it will be because someone could walk all the way to the end of the road.

C: 好耶，我也想去找老朋友。
E: Yay, I also want to meet some old friends.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 嗯…有位织者重视情谊，不愿与旧友们分离。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽站点的铃铛上</color>，目送奔赴战场的人们呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who values connections deeply and cannot bear to say goodbye to friends. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the bell of Dromas Station</color>, watching the people heading to the battlefield.

C: 嗯…有位织者想要把自己锤炼得像山之民一样坚韧。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铁匠的火炉上</color>锻炼耐性呢。快让它知难而退吧。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to be as resilient as the Mountain Dwellers. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the blacksmith's forge</color>, honing their endurance and patience. Hurry and retrieve them before they hurt themselves.

C: 嗯…有位织者向往高处、希望像纷争世的帝王那样手握权力。金丝带来消息，它正站在<color=#dbc291ff>俯瞰浴场的高处</color>，发表豪言壮语呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to great heights, longing to wield power like an emperor of Era Bellica. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>at the peak overlooking the baths</color>, making grand speeches.

C: 不给~
E: Nope~

C: 贵客什么时候到…
E: When's our special guest arriving...

C: 决定好什么时候出发了吗？我之前顺手逮了几只肥兔子，已经腌好晾上了，走之前记得来拿。
E: You guys set a date to head out yet? I caught some fat rabbits the other day, and they're all cured and ready. Make sure you swing by to grab them before you leave.

C: 最近的农作很忙吗？
E: Have you been busy with the fields?

C: 劳动是件快乐的事啊。
E: Hard work's a kind of joy, isn't it?

C: 别担心，老妈，等学成我就回来了。而且，悬锋城搞不好走着走着，哪天还能路过咱们这儿呢。
E: Don't worry, mom. Once I finish my studies, I'll come straight home. Who knows? Maybe one day that city will wander right past our village.

C: 那是什么迷？完全理解不了，但是听起来好可怕迷！
E: What's that, memi? I don't get it at all, but it sounds terrifying, memi!

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 叫醒她。
E: Wake her up.

C: 必须开启新的故事。
E: We need to start a new chapter.

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 怒涛的平息，只在剑花盛放的一瞬。
E: The raging tide calms in the instant the sword-bloom blossoms.

C: 啊，抱、抱歉，你一定不会想听这些琐事，还是从我被逐出悬锋城说起吧。
E: Ah, s—sorry, you probably don't want to hear such trivial things. Let me start from when I was expelled from Castrum Kremnos.

C: 离开悬锋城后，我做了一段时间的吟游诗人。偶然间，我写的英雄颂歌被凯撒大人看到了，便被接引入军、为逐火作传。
E: After leaving Castrum Kremnos, I spent some time as a bard. By chance, the Great Imperator saw my heroic ode and brought me into the army to serve as a chronicler for the Flame-Chase Army.

C: 下次见面可别这么紧张。
