E: Don't be so nervous next time.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，欢迎你也来参加凯撒的宴会！怎么样，对这宴会可还满意？
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. Welcome to the Imperator's feast! How do you feel? Are you satisfied?

C: 为了踩酒活动能顺利进行，我们还特意聘请了法吉娜的祭司，那可都是些老手…脚艺人！
E: To ensure the wine-stomping can proceed smoothly, we also hired a priest of Phagousa. They're all... veteran stompers...

C: 最近…应该没啥烦心事吧？
E: You haven't had anything on your mind lately, have you?

C: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
E: Golden threads gather around the mannequin, forming a cocoon that envelops its body.

C: 远远眺望餐馆的招牌，听着热火朝天的喧闹，看着原本漫无目的的妖精们找到了热衷之事…就像迷路迷境从悠长的熟睡中醒转过来了哪。
E: I can see the restaurant's plaque from a distance, hear the cheerful noise, and watch fairies who used to drift about aimlessly now find their passion... It's as if the Membrance Maze has finally awakened from a long slumber.

C: 最近工作还顺利吗？
E: Has work been going well lately?

C: 但把香喷喷的菜肴端到顾客面前，看着它们露出笑容，不知为什么，就脸也不酸了，肚子也不饿了，辛苦也都不算数了迷！
E: But when I bring a delicious dish to a customer and see them smile, somehow my face doesn't feel sore anymore, my stomach stops growling, and all the exhaustion just fades away, mem!

C: 我真的错了…下次一定记得带…
E: Really, I'm sorry... I won't forget things next time...

C: 尼莎，你不能在浴池里丢钱币，这么做是很不尊重法吉娜的行为！
E: Nyssa, you can't toss coins into the baths. That's disrespecting Phagousa!

C: 是吗…哎，还要锻炼多久，才能成为像白厄大人那样的英雄呢？
E: Really...? Ah, how much longer do I have to train to become a hero like Lord Phainon?

C: 这位大姐，年轻人如果为了我们这些老家伙省吃俭用，那不是反而亏待他们了？
E: Excuse me, madam. If the youngsters are being frugal for the sake of us old folks, aren't we being unfair to them?

C: 阿米库斯，别再乱摸了！
E: Amycus, stop touching!

C: 嗷呜嗷，嗷呜嗷呜！
E: Awoo aw, awoo awoo!

C: 咕咕，真是乐于助人的同学！那么，替老鸟去找找顽皮的孩子们吧，也帮我捎句话——等考试结束，老鸟会带它们去镇上买好吃的美梦脆筒，决不食言咕！
E: Hoot hoot, such a helpful student! Well then, look for those mischievous children in my stead, and pass along a message: When exams are over, this old bird will take them to the town and buy tasty Dreamy Cones! Pinky promise, hoot!

C: 我还有一些事情想要问你…
E: I've got something to ask you.

C: 这正是对应了星神密卷里的痴缠与灾影啊！因此，我得出结论……
E: It echos the infatuation and disaster in the Mystic Scroll of Aeons! As a result, I've come to this conclusion...

C: 小友若是还有任何想了解的事情，都可以问我。
E: Feel free to ask me if you have any questions.

C: 何等荒谬？生命岂能因为外显的形式不同，就出现高低贵贱之分呢？
E: How ridiculous? How can anyone segregate life into different levels just because of their external forms?

C: 你喜欢莱斯莉吗？
E: Do you like Lesley?

C: 哎哟，不说了不说了，都是过去的事儿咯！
E: Well, I think I'm done talking. These stories are all water under the bridge.

C: 不，我不认识你。但是！现在我们认识了彼此，请支持安提西尼！
E: No, I don't know you. But hey! Now that we've met, please support Antisthenes!
Uhh...

C: 但如果我能完成自己的学术报告，我能毕业，至少我会不一样。
E: But if I can finish my academic report, I can graduate, and at least that'll make me different.

C: 所以，它将一切托付给了丹恒。
E: So, they entrusted everything to Dan Heng.

C: 「将泰坦的还给泰坦，却不必物归原主。」
E: "Render unto the Titans what is the Titans,' yet not necessarily to their original owners."

C: 衣匠接过记忆残晶，优雅地炼化。
E: The Garmentmaker receives the Memory Crystal Shards and elegantly refines them.

C: 瑟希斯…欧洛尼斯…
E: Cerces... Oronyx...

C: 啊…此处安乐无忧、美景恒常，然我仍有疑虑长伴：正如已被替换全部零件的船只，再创之世是否仍保有其本原？我等置身其中，灵魂又是否还一如从前……
E: Ah... Though peace and beauty reign eternal here, a doubt still lingers: Like a ship whose parts have all been replaced, does this world, reassembled, still retain its essence? And we who dwell within it, are our souls still the same as before...?

C: 你还没有理解我的意思，我的老朋友。瞧，这世界早已不同以往，人间乱象俱成云烟，而此处唯余永恒静谧、凝滞默然……
E: You still haven't grasped my meaning, old friend. Look, this world is no longer what it used to be. All the chaos of human existence has turned to mist, and all that remains here is eternal tranquility, frozen in stillness...

C: 好啦好啦，你们俩也别争了，年轻人的事就让他们去操心吧。咱们做父母的，总该相信自己的孩子不是？
E: Alright, alright, you two stop arguing. Let the young ones worry about their own business. As parents, shouldn't we trust our kids?

C: 呵呵…吟游诗人总爱添油加醋。放过我吧，孩子们，我的身手早不如那时矫健了。
E: Heh... Bards always love to embellish their tales. Give me a break, kids. I'm not as spry as I used to be.

C: 呵呵…哈托努斯阁下，这小子恐怕得麻烦你代为教导了。
E: Hehe... Lord Chartonus, I'm afraid I'll have to trouble you to mentor this kid.

C: 这种事不自己吃过没法证明…
E: You can't prove it until you've tried it yourself...

C: 有空的话，来我家给我女儿讲讲？她可愿意听这些传奇故事了……
E: If you have the time, could you come to my place and tell those stories to my daughter? She really loves hearing tales like that...

C: 村长，你在记什么迷？
E: Chief, what's got you so lost in thought?

C: 那就来个后空翻！
E: Let's do a backflip!

C: 那只黑化海豹是怎么回事？
E: What's with that Dark Seal?

C: 你可能有所不知迷，外面的世界有名为「奇美拉」和「小海豹」的模样奇特的妖精，还有叫做「大地兽」的大怪兽…都深受欢迎！
E: You might not know this, but out there in the world, there are peculiar-looking creatures like chimeras and baby seals, and huge creatures called dromases... They're all super popular!

C: 虽然它已不再具备墨涅塔的神力，但它依然是最纯粹的「浪漫」象征。希望高洁的灵魂能够永远守护你的旅程。
E: Though it no longer possesses Mnestia's divine power, it remains the purest symbol of "Romance." May the spirit of nobility forever guard your journey.

C: 哦！我猜得没错，比起主动接近其他人，凯撒大人在等待被我们主动接近！
E: Oh! So I was right! The Great Imperator doesn't initiate contact. She prefers us to take the lead!

C: 可是，我还想见你。
E: But I still want to see you.

C: 呼…呼……
E: Zzz... Zzz...

C: 正巧哈托努斯在铸造它时，曾打造过一批仿件，这把就给你留作纪念吧，伙伴。
E: As luck would have it, Chartonus made a batch of replicas while forging it. I'll let you keep this one as a memento, partner.

C: 嗯…有位织者预备了小小的惊喜。金丝带来消息，它正隐在<color=#dbc291ff>一块易碎物之后</color>，等待说出她准备已久的开场白呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who has prepared a little surprise. The golden thread brings tidings: They're hiding <color=#dbc291ff>behind something fragile</color>, waiting to deliver their long-prepared opening line.

C: 翁法罗斯的七月名为自由月。它既是属于刻法勒的月份，亦是每名囚徒心底最渴望、却无法触及的东西。
E: July in Amphoreus is called the Month of Freedom. It belongs to Kephale and represents what every prisoner yearns for deep in their hearts, yet can never grasp.

C: 关于丹恒…
E: About Dan Heng...

C: 好在至少有一条法则确凿无疑：星神能且只能依照其「原动力」的内核行动，我们永远也不用担心「同谐」掀起颠覆银河的风暴。
E: At least one rule is certain: Aeons can only operate according to their Primum Mobile. For example, we won't ever have to worry about the Harmony stirring up a storm.

C: 派系的概念也许大了些。按照「为了共同的目的聚集在一起」的标准，我们星穹列车也可以说是一个派系啊。
E: The concept of factions might be too big. If a faction is all about "coming together for a common purpose," then even the Astral Express can be considered as one.

C: 加油吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Keep up the good work, {NICKNAME}.

C: 从来没听起你提过这些…
E: You've never mentioned these things before...

C: 但是出于人类基本的好奇心，我们打算过去瞧一眼，就立刻发车前往萨尔索图办正事。
E: But out of basic human curiosity, we decided to take a look and immediately set out for Salsotto to do our business.

C: 我没见过脸皮这么厚的大人。你还是去看看《冒险鼹鼠队》吧。
E: Hmph, you are such a cheeky grownup. You should do better and read The Adventurous Moles.

C: （应该不是这里，这里和周围也没有什么区别。）
E: (It shouldn't be here. It's no different from anywhere else.)

C: 这些，拿着吧，就当是我的谢礼了。哦对，也帮我跟安东尼娜打声招呼。
E: Here, take this as your reward. Oh yeah, and remember to say hello to Antonia for me.

C: …哦，是你啊。师傅还在准备新题目呢，我稍微偷会儿懒……
E: ... Oh, it's you. My master is still preparing his new puzzle, so I'm taking the chance to relax for a while...

C: 我只是做了助教应该做的。
E: I was just doing my job.

C: 哼，等我出师了，老头子你就回家好好歇着去吧。
E: Hmph, when I finish my training, you can just go home and lie down, old man!

C: 哎，不对…怎么搞的来着？
E: *sigh* That's not right... How does it go again?

C: 幸好我可以帮球棒补充体力，以后要多注意石块的高度与热量不能超过洛希极限，不然匹诺康尼可能会出现很多厕所。不要再翻垃圾桶了，因为我也爱你。
E: Good thing I can help your baseball bat recharge its stamina. In the future, be careful with the stone's height and the calories should not exceed the Roche limit, or plenty of toilets will show up in Penacony. And stop rummaging through trashcans, because I love you too.

C: …哟，一位贵客…唔，没有挂号。
E: ...Woah, an esteemed guest... Ooh, with no booking.

C: 不过对于您这样身经百战的「开拓者」来说，这种程度的模拟应该都是小菜一碟吧？「星芒战幕」就被我安装在旁边那台终端上…桌面上就能看到。
E: But for an experienced Trailblazer like yourself, this kind of simulation should be a walk in the park, right? I installed Stellar Flare in the terminal right over there... It should be on the desk.

C: 还没有…
E: Not yet...

C: 多亏了您的测试数据，我终于能向世玲姐交差了…您可能不了解，但这对我来说真的很重要…我可不希望试用期没过就被踢出应物科啊。
E: Thanks to the test data from you, I can finally submit my report to Miss Shiling... You might not realize this, but it's really important to me... I don't want to get kicked out of the Department of Implement Arts before my probation ends.

C: 是个戴墨镜的女人？
E: Was it a lady in sunglasses?

C: 下层区机兵的机体数据想来是不涉密的…那么，这件事就拜托你了。
E: Automaton data from the Underworld presumably is not classified... And so, I leave this task in your capable hands.

C: ——就像历史里的很多事一样，我们这些后人是无法了解真相的。
E: Just like so many other things in history, we modern humans can scarcely perceive the truth.

C: 没问题，该怎么做？
E: Alright. What should I do?

C: 尽管我们已将可可利亚大人定性为在战争中牺牲，但我们仍想进一步听取你——拯救了贝洛伯格的英雄——的意见。
E: Although we have already put out the narrative that Madam Cocolia has sacrificed herself in the war, we still want to hear your opinion — the Hero of Belobog who saved the city.

C: 当然可以——我们还有很多时间。
E: Of course. We have plenty of time.

C: 非常合适。
E: Very much so.

C: …晴霓小姐别紧张，我、我是十王司的判官，我会帮忙处理的。不过在此之前，你还听说了怎样的传言？
E: ...Stay calm, Miss Qingni. I—I am a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. I will handle this for you. But before that, what other rumors have you heard?

C: 总不能放着不管吧！
E: We can't ignore this!

C: {NICKNAME}再见。
E: Goodbye, {NICKNAME}.

C: （照片里的黑影应该是列车上常常会见到的东西……）
E: (The shadow in the photo should be something commonly seen on the Express...)

C: 小秘书也在想办法嘛。要我说，现在发送订单的效率有些低，要是能在这花些心思，肯定能节约成本。
E: Miss Secretary is just helping us think of ideas. If you ask me, I think our ordering system is rather inefficient. I'm sure we could reduce our costs if we found a way to improve it.

C: 现在能告诉我们金人巷到底发生了什么吗？
E: Now can you tell us what really happened to Aurum Alley?

C: 看来你这人信心满满呢。
E: Well, seems like you have plenty of confidence.

C: 会长相信小秘书的判断，不过还是准备了考验——请将「陈机铺」纳入到物流规划之中。
E: Okay, the president trusts Miss Secretary's judgment, but the applicant still needs to pass a test... You must integrate Oldies Depot into the logistics plan.

C: 现在证据确凿，你还要抵赖？
E: You still deny it when faced with conclusive evidence?

C: 追问
E: (Continue questioning)

C: 码头工人的证言？
E: The dock worker's testimony?

C: 没有拒绝？那我问问你们，现在有几家商铺加入到你们的物流网络里了？
E: Never refused? Then let me ask you — how many shops are currently in your logistics network?

C: 真的吗？我只是有感而发而已。
E: Really? I was just speaking from the heart.

C: 驭空大人有事找我们，走吧。
E: Madam Yukong is looking for us. Let's be on our way.

C: 家父面子薄，要是有水平的学徒相求，他看到你们的诚意，会改变态度的。
E: My father is stern on the surface, but if he sees a capable apprentice and a sincere heart, he'll change his attitude.

C: 你和会长很熟？
E: You and the president — you know each other well?

C: 会长常常讲起，他想要重现那段繁荣的旧时光。
E: He always says the Alley deserves another chance.

C: 驭空用眼神锐利，似乎是在提醒你会议就要开始了，她不会偏袒你们其中任何一方。
E: Yukong's gaze is penetrating, as if she is reminding you that the meeting is about to begin. She will not be biased toward either side.

C: 没错，这又如何？
E: We did. So what?

C: 你怎么可以断定我们没有从历史中学会经验呢？
E: What makes you think we didn't draw any wisdom from history?

C: 你看看这个。
E: Take a look at this.

C: 我其实挺不好意思的，毕竟金人巷的敌人不是会长，应该是星际和平公司。
E: I almost feel bad for him. Aurum Alley's enemy should be the IPC, not the president.

C: 我原本仅仅是想帮各位扳倒现任会长，后来我发现，我们是志同道合的朋友。
E: My original plan only involved helping you overthrow the current president... but as we progressed, I saw there was more common ground than I'd anticipated.

C: 走吧，我们开始去拍吧。
E: Let's go, folks.

C: 再给我一句宣传口号。
E: Come on, need another slogan.

C: 欢迎常来金人巷！
E: Welcome to Aurum Alley!

C: 我不是怕你误会嘛，就好像是我故意放进去的一样。
E: I just want to avoid any misunderstanding, in case someone has it in their head that I intentionally misplaced an item...

C: 别啊！我霍三哥虽然不算什么好东西，但绝对算是个说话算话的生意人！
E: No! They may not call me "Good Guy Mr. Huo," but I'm absolutely a trader who keeps his word!

C: 你为什么知道我有货呢？
E: How do you know I have the goods?

C: 「可不就得有人买吗」。
E: You'd need a better reputation.

C: 中杯古藤百草饮。
E: A medium cup of herbal tea.

C: 对，就是这个。
E: Yeah, that's it.

C: 我是你的牌友，又收了你的好处，我才不得不给你开出病假证明的！
E: It's because I'm your game mate and have also "benefited" from our friendship that I had to give you this sick leave note!

C: 出示
E: (Present evidence)

C: 看来会议至此已经得出了结论，散会吧。
E: It seems we have reached an agreement. The hearing concludes here.

C: 素裳姑娘讲得好。
E: Well said, Sushang.

C: 你是想随便丢出一件材料，然后等待我的反应吗？
E: You can't just present something irrelevant and expect me to respond.

C: 有人抱怨说「机巧鸟取代了很多人的工作」
E: People are grumbling about cycranes making our jobs obsolete.

C: 这是南是北，我是谁我在哪儿……
E: Is this north or south? Who am I? Where am I...

C: 其实我也不太确定…
E: Actually, I'm not so sure myself...

C: 发生什么事了？
E: What happened?

C: 你也不怎么聪明嘛，哎，我这鸟生向来善良，看你可怜，算了算了，我这里也散场了，我跟你回去，免得你没办法交差。
E: I thought you'd be smarter, but I guess I was wrong. Lucky for you, this kind-hearted cycrane won't leave you empty-handed. I'll come back with you so Yuanfeng won't give you a hard time.

C: 咱辛辛苦苦做的菜啊…怎么会这样啊…
E: Agh, I spent so much time on this... How could this happen...?

C: 这么简单的事情你们也能做吧？
E: Can't you even do something as simple as this?

C: 你以最快的速度，狠狠打出了两记上勾拳。
E: You throw out two brutal uppercuts as fast as you can.

C: 还有别的事。
E: Nah, I've got better stuff to do.

C: 当然没问题，您想问什么问题呢？
E: Of course. What would you like to know more about?

C: 实验助手的工作…
E: Lab assistant work...

C: （用脚底猛踹它）
E: (Kick it)

C: 我，我可是有很多工作要忙的！再说，我请你来就是为了省事，我要是都自己去了，那就不用给你支付酬劳了！
E: I, I have a lot of things to do! Besides, the whole reason I hired you was to save my effort. If I have to go there myself anyway, I might as well do it on my own and save on the fee!

C: 你只是拍打了一下柜子，就感受里面的「那个东西」正在疯狂地颤抖。
E: The moment you start thumping it, you can feel "that thing" tremoring wildly from the inside.

C: 这次的地方已经给你标注好了，你多上点心，可别漏了什么关键线索！
E: I've marked the location for you this time. Pay attention and don't miss anything!

C: 又是吃这个……
E: This again?

C: 报上暗号来！
E: What's the passphrase?
Hmm...

C: 哈——欠！困死了，我们走吧！
E: *yaaawn* So boring, let's go!

C: 关于美食庆典…
E: About the food fest...

C: 啾，迷途的人啊，是你将我从危难中拯救。但是谁又能拯救你的灵魂呢？
E: Tweet, you have rescued me from danger, wanderer. However, who's there to rescue your soul?

C: 你怎么了？
E: What's wrong?

C: 滴答，我们是鸢尾花家系的「美梦剧团」，是根据卡通明星「钟表小子」的形象制造的服务生，用可爱的外表为宾客们带来快乐！
E: Tick-tock, we're the Sweet Dreams Troupe of the Iris Family, outfitted as attendants in the image of the cartoon star Clockie, and are used to bring joy to our guests via our adorable aesthetics!

C: 滴答…没想到他买来的全是问题产品，真是可恶，这家伙肯定是吃回扣了！
E: Tick-tock... Who knew he bought a bunch of faulty goods. Dang it, that fellow must've been getting kickbacks from this deal!

C: 我猜他是个假面愚者。
E: I'm guessing he's a Masked Fool.

C: 皮皮西人被那张纸条气得七窍生烟——绝非修辞，而是字面意义上的「冒烟」——然后仰面朝天撅了过去。
E: The Pepeshi person is fuming with rage at the note — not a figure of speech, but literally steaming with smoke — and then she turns her face skywards and falls over.

C: 怎么样，不说话就当你答应了哦？
E: What do you say? I'll take your silence as a yes.

C: 去看看，去看看就知道了。走咯！追上来，不然我就跑咯！
E: You'll find out if you go take a look. I'm off! Better keep up, or you'll be eating my dust!

C: 你悲伤的样子也很可爱。遇到了什么烦心事，跟我讲讲呗。
E: You look pretty cute when you're sad. What problems did you encounter? I'm all ears.

C: 普普通通的你，却是我的超人！我太感动了！呜呜…呜哇哇哇哇哇！！
E: You, an ordinary person... You're my superhero! It's so touching! Waa... Waaaaahhhh!!!

C: 所以你找来了代替的调饮师，你早就想好了要离开哇！！
E: That's why you hired a new drinksmith! You've been thinking about leaving a while now!!

C: 「惊梦酒吧」恢复了平静，但并非所有事都得到了解决，譬如……
E: The Dreamjolt Hostelry may have returned to its peace and quiet, but not all matters were resolved. Such as...

C: ——真是太棒了，不愧是列车长亲自推荐的无名客•{NICKNAME}。
E: Fantastic. Just what I'd expect from Nameless {NICKNAME}, someone highly recommended by the conductor.

C: 既然他都在这儿，画里绝对还有更大的收获，咱们再回去一趟吧。
E: If even someone like him is here, then there will definitely be more rewarding items inside the painting. Let's go back again.

C: 以筑梦师的工作效率来估算，他们在逃亡时匆忙改造的房间，最多只会出现三个空间叠层。
E: Going by the efficiency of the Dreamweavers, there can only be a max of three spacial overlays in a room that they modified while on the run.

C: 剧组把近期的工作重心放到了构建更有趣的外传拍摄体验工程上，为你们这些有爱又有才华的游客提供更多发挥空间！
E: The crew has been putting their focus on filming more interesting extra stories, with hopes of giving devoted and talented guests like yourself more room for expression!

C: 导演，请先去拍摄赞助企业的<color=#dbc291ff>广告短片</color>吧，一定能学到许多「导演技巧」。
E: Director, please go shoot the sponsoring company's <color=#dbc291ff>commercial short</color> first, and you'll be sure to learn plenty of Directorial Skills.

C: 导演，听说来客说您是家族的贵客，不知能否由您出面，让家族给个面子？
E: Director, since you're an important guest of The Family, do you mind stepping in to convince them to take it easy on us?

C: 片名：《闹钟小崽子》
E: Title: Alarm Clockie

C: 家族很讨厌钟表小子吗？
E: Does The Family hate Clockie?

C: 你为什么要回来！
E: Why did you come back!?

C: 你这个流梦礁的叛徒，居然还敢回来！
E: How dare you come back, you traitor to Dreamflux Reef!

C: 好多敌人！哈努兄弟，看来我们必须再次合作了。
E: So many enemies! Brother Hanu, looks like we have to work together again.

C: 没错，就是那里，沿着这座桥前进吧！
E: That's right. Over there, cross the bridge and advance!

C: 请把魔法给我的伙伴们吧。我愿意接受自己分裂的内心，我更希望我的朋友们能获得安宁。
E: Please give the magic to my companions. I'm willing to accept my splintered heart, for I hope even more that my friends gain peace.

C: 「魔法随着话语一起生效了。于是，一条能够在小镇与美梦仙境间穿梭的大门立了起来。钟表小子得以回家，也不用再与朋友们分离。」
E: "The magic starts to take effect as the spell is chanted. Just then, a gate that can traverse between the town and the dream sanctuary rises up. Clockie can go home, and not be separated from his friends."

C: 看来我扮鸟的功力不足，还得多多锻炼才行~啾~
E: Looks like I'm still not good enough to play a bird. I have to work harder, tweet!

C: （离开）
E: (Leave)

C: ——锵锵！竟然是这样焦灼的局面呢！啾！好不容易迈向圆满结局，却发现只有一个人能够获得幸福？
E: ...Tadaa! What an intense twist! Tweet! All this effort for a happy ending, only to be faced with a tough choice — only one person will get their wish!

C: 非常棒——导演您辛苦啦！
E: Very nice! Good job, Director!

C: 目标：找回所有苏乐达，滴答！
E: Objective: Retrieve all the SoulGlad, tick-tock!

C: 先去拍广告。
E: Shoot the Commercial first.

C: ——导演，我们这就算定稿了吗？
E: ...Director, is that a wrap here?

C: 美丽的垃圾。
E: Beautiful trash.

C: 有兴趣聊聊吗？
E: Wanna chat?

C: 感觉都不太对…
E: None of them feels super accurate...

C: 完成了啾！这就是折纸小鸟们的故事啾！
E: All done, tweet! Here's the script about the Origami Birds!

C: 不过最神秘的是湛蓝爵士，动画里从来没提到过它建造的作品…不知道《美梦往事》里有没有关于他的故事呢？
E: But most enigmatic of all is Dr. Blues, who is never shown building anything at all in the animation... I wonder if there's any stories about him in Dreamjoy Memoir?

C: 没办法，还在修嘛。
E: Too bad. It's still getting fixed.

C: 祝你游玩愉快！
E: Happy gaming!

C: 参与测试有报酬吗？
E: Is there any remuneration for helping out with testing?

C: 请走上舞台，用你真挚的表演打动评委！匹诺康尼下一位银河之星——就是你！
E: Step onto the stage and move the judges with your heartfelt performance! The next Cosmic Star of Penacony — could be you!

C: 不对吧…这句台词听上去也不是很「惊喜」。
E: That's not right... That line doesn't sound very "surprised".

C: 前进吧，朋友们——等那个时刻到来，我和所有谜钟都会为你们加油的！
E: Go forth, my friends — when the moment comes, all the Dream Tickers and I will cheer for you!

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 你是悲悼伶人？
E: Are you a Mourning Actor?

C: 你闭上双眼，耳边响起送葬的哀歌。即使是联觉新标，也无法告诉你那些歌词的真实含义。你感到自己逐渐下沉，远离真实世界，但过去擦肩而过的死亡，却逐渐迫近。
E: You close your eyes and hear an elegy. Even the Synesthesia Beacon can't fathom the meaning of the lyrics. You can feel yourself sinking, getting further away from the real world. However, you find the deaths you once narrowly escaped drawing closer.

C: 不了不了，现在我一心只想回去抓紧学剑！二位小师父，我们改日再敬茶吧。
E: Thanks for the invitation, but right now, I just want to focus on practicing swordplay. Masters, let's save the tea for later.

C: 我怎么可能会输嘛。
E: Come on, how could I possibly lose?

C: 三月小姐，幻戏和现实是不一样的。
E: That's not how it works in real life, Miss March.

C: 我有自己的原则，我不想一辈子都陷在金人巷的阴影里！你以为我是公司臭要饭的？
E: Look, I have my principles. I refuse to spend my life haunted by what happened in Aurum Alley! Do you think I'm just some sort of IPC small fry?

C: 事、事情我大概明白了，想要在短时间内掌握一门剑术并不容易，三月七小姐有压力也不奇怪。我、我会一些驱邪的剑术，如果你有需要的话……
E: I—I think I get the gist of it. It's not easy trying to master a school's swordplay in such a short time, no wonder Miss March 7th is stressed out. I know some evil-warding swordplay, so if you need some help...

C: 看起来这就是斯科特的内心世界了，老子得找找他最扭曲的欲望是哪里。
E: Looks like this is Skott's mind. I'd better find where his most twisted desires are lurking.

C: 踩着我爬到更高的地方吧！斯科特，你是斯科特家的骄傲，是一匹合格的「孤狼」，爸爸以你为傲。
E: Use me as a stepping stone to reach greater heights! Lyndon Skott, you are the pride of the Skott family, a true lone wolf, and your dad is so proud of you.

C: 不仅如此，他还送了我和兄弟们一大锅药膳汤，让我们喝完药膳，再精神百倍地对付你。
E: And you know what else? He gave me and the guys a big pot of this special medicinal soup to drink so we can come at you with triple the energy.

C: 我认可你了。
E: You've earned my respect.

C: 然后…你们等我酝酿一下…那破歌怎么唱的来着？想起来了。
E: And then... Just wait a second... How did that stupid song go? Oh, right.

C: 你自己听听，像话吗？你的名字就只是公司的后缀吗？
E: Listen to yourself! That's how you want to be known? Is your name just an appendix to the IPC?

C: 再见！
E: Catch you later!

C: 这道菜谱…我是说药方传承历史可有千年之久。当不得「千年」二字吗？
E: This recipe... I mean, this prescription's been passed down for a thousand years. Is "millennial" not appropriate?

C: 灵砂大人的鼻子太灵了。
E: Master Lingsha has such a strong sense of smell.

C: …那我岂不是什么都没有得到？
E: ...Then, did I not obtain anything?

C: 营养均衡的膳食和锻炼，可比来路不明的灵丹妙药有用多了。
E: A well-balanced diet and exercise are more effective than some unknown miracle elixir.

C: 三月七，你呢，相信世界上有机械灵魂吗？
E: March 7th, what about you? Do you believe in the existence of Mechanical Souls?

C: 阿…休？
E: ...A-Xiu?

C: 「阿休」是老夫没有完成的玩具，它从来就没在这世界上出现过…所以，老夫也不知道它具体长什么样子，换句话说，老夫甚至不知道它究竟是什么……
E: A-Xiu is a toy that I did not complete, thus it never came into existence in this world... That's why its form remains a mystery even to me. In fact, I'm uncertain of what it even is...

C: 等等，今天就到此为止吧，我要准时下班了。
E: Wait, let's leave it here for now, it's time for me to finish work.

C: 忙碌一番后，时间悄然流逝，丹鼎司禁书的整理工作也接近了尾声。
E: As the group busied themselves and time passed silently, the job of organizing the Alchemy Commission forbidden texts neared its end.

C: 还不至于啦？！
E: It's not that serious, is it!?

C: 看得出来，你也很有品味。
E: I could tell that you were a man of fine taste.

C: 可别小瞧这些微不足道的忆质，就像垃圾桶里的内容反映着城市生活的质量。离散忆质也反映了人类精神状态的种种迹象，拥有极佳的医学研究价值。
E: You mustn't underestimate the importance of such trace amounts of memoria. Much as the contents of a trashcan reflect the quality of life in a city, scattered memoria reflects various indicators of mental states in people. It has outstanding value for medical research.

C: {NICKNAME}，多谢你了。有了这些照片，我去收容那些忆质就方便多了。
E: Thank you so much, {NICKNAME}. These pictures will make collecting and containing the memoria much easier.

C: 不少居民反映，他们在被神秘的黑影追逐，甚至有些还被抓伤了。光是昨天一天，我这里就收治了十多个被袭击者，手臂上净是大大小小的血痕。
E: Many residents have said that they were being pursued by a dark shadow. Some were even scratched and clawed by it. Yesterday alone I treated about a dozen victims with scratches all over their arms.

C: 不过，那就只是我们世界的童话而已…应该没人会把童话当真吧？
E: Although, this is all just a fairy tale from my world... Fairy tales aren't something to be believed, though, are they?

C: 我说不上来……
E: I'm not too sure...

C: 看，那几位就是我第一场比赛的对手。
E: Look, those are my opponents for my first match.

C: 咱们擂台上见！
E: See you in the ring!

C: （卢卡，你是最棒的！你不会输！加油！）
E: (Luka, you're the best! You're not gonna lose! Go get 'em!)

C: 我好多了…很抱歉刚才说了些不得体的话。但我确实觉得几位云骑朋友的水平非同一般。
E: I feel much better... I'm very sorry if I said anything rude just now. I really think those Cloud Knights are a cut above the rest.

C: 接下来对阵的两方，可谓是早有积怨！还未开战，擂台上就已经火药味十足了！
E: Next in the ring, two competitors with a deep-seated rivalry! The atmosphere is already charged with tension before the first punch has even been thrown! You can feel the fireworks about to explode!

C: 我的家乡和贝洛伯格并无不同。我们都是在这个残酷的宇宙中挣扎着，渴望活下去获得幸福的人。而琥珀王的使者们向我展示了机会，正如我代表公司给了你们同样的机会。
E: My home and Belobog aren't so different. We are all struggling to eke out an existence in this merciless universe, hell-bent on living long enough to touch happiness. And the messengers of the Amber Lord gave me that chance. Just as I, on behalf of the IPC, am giving you that exact same chance.
Hmm...

C: 呃…喂猪呢？
E: Uh... Are we feeding livestock here?

C: 当然可以啦，素裳小姐。你也可以随时来找它玩～
E: That's fine by me, Miss Sushang. You can also come play with it anytime you want~

C: （唉…又迷路了。这大城市的每条街都长得一模一样，我想喝杯茶都那么困难……）
E: (*sigh* ...I'm lost again. The streets in this big city all look the same. I just want to enjoy a cup of tea. Why is it so difficult...)

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈。
E: Yeah! Hahahahahahaha.

C: 人气复活？也许大家只是想看我的笑话罢了…想看我怎么再次被人教训一顿，灰溜溜逃走。
E: Popularity revival? Maybe they all just want to turn me into a laughingstock... They just want to see me get beat up again and escape with my tail between my legs.

C: 卢卡，那些扰乱你内心的杂音已经被我清除干净了，你给老子振作点！
E: Luka, I've cleared out that noise messing with your head. You better get it together!

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 波提欧只是想吓你，但当时的你并不知晓这一点。你以为自己会死，但为了你的尊严、为了你的荣誉、为了你的家园，你依然向他挥出了一拳。
E: Boothill was only trying to scare you, but you weren't aware of that at that time. You thought you were dying, but for the sake of your dignity, honor, and home, you stood firm and threw a punch.

C: 在我看来，这便是战斗美学的最好体现。
E: In my view, that's combat aesthetics at its finest.

C: 我是一台过时的机器人，就算做再多次引体向上，也只会磨损关节，不会变得更强。但你不同——随着经验的积累，你会变得越来越强。
E: I am an outdated robot, no matter how many pull-ups I do, it only wears down my joints. I will not grow stronger. However, you are different — with each experience, you will continue to grow stronger.

C: 卢卡，听到欢呼声了吗——是你赢了。
E: Luka, do you hear the cheers? You won.

C: 和波提欧先生的那场比赛让我成长了很多，我还想感谢你呢。
E: I learned a lot from that match against you, Mr. Boothill. Actually, I should be thanking you for that.

C: 哈哈哈哈，也可以。到时候就让卢卡选手做你的教练！
E: Hahahaha, that works too. Luka can be your coach then!

C: {NICKNAME}…你能陪我走一趟吗？我总觉得这件事里充满了古怪？
E: {NICKNAME}... Can you go with me? I can't help but feel that there's something odd about this.

C: 逻辑：「更伟大的力量」可用于反有机方程的迭代升级，建议纳入数据库。我们可以向有机生命学习。我们终将胜利。
E: Affirmation: "Greater power" can be implemented to iterate upgrades of the Anti-Organic Equation. It can be suggested to be incorporated into database. We can learn from organic life. We will be victorious at the end.

C: 确认：本机签署同意协议。
E: Confirmation: This unit has signed the consent agreement.

C: 我研读丹轮寺的经书，我将触及「杀戮之上的力量」，确定无疑。
E: I will study Claretwheel Temple's scriptures, and I am convinced that by doing so, I will come into contact with the "power beyond slaughter" — I have absolute faith in this.

C: 不用我提醒，你们也应该明白，人们无法相信步离人可以改变自己残暴的本性。
E: I need not remind you, as you probably understand too — people do not simply believe that the borisin can disengage from their brutal nature just like that.

C: 当生存压力超过一定阈值，有机生命的身体会选择错误的策略，他们封闭自我，失去声音，放弃知觉，甚至不再思考。
E: Once the pressure for survival exceeds a certain threshold, organic bodies may adopt incorrect strategies. They may isolate themselves, lose their voice, relinquish awareness, and even cease to think.

C: 准备好了，就开始你们的比赛吧。
E: You can start your match when you're ready.

C: 我会让景元将军与奢摩对谈一次。同时我也会在六御议事时为丹轮寺尽力陈情。对于丹轮寺的请愿，我无法做出肯定或否定的答复。
E: I will let General Jing Yuan have a conversation with Samatha. Also, I will try my best to give a full account and support the Claretwheel Temple during the Six Charioteers' meeting. Regarding Claretwheel Temple's petition, I cannot give a definite answer.

C: 选手休息室里都安放了这样的战术板。卢卡选手是资深运动员了，应该已经很了解了吧？
E: All the contestants' lounges have been outfitted with such Tactics Board. Luka, you're an experienced athlete. I'm sure you're very familiar with this?

C: 到场的各位记者朋友请在会场中找到合适位置，保持距离，并请按照流程准备好提问。
E: To the journalists who have arrived at the site, please situate yourselves appropriately, maintain your distance, and get your questions ready according to procedure.

C: 现在开始由{NICKNAME}教练选择记者提问，请注意控制发言时长。
E: We're now ready for Coach {NICKNAME} to answer some questions from journalists. Please keep your responses brief.

C: 我其实什么也没做…
E: I actually didn't do anything...

C: 人家给我发记者证，你就别问那么细了。
E: Someone gave me a journalist pass, so just take it and run, alright?

C: 嘁，没劲。
E: Tsk, boring.

C: 稍作准备。
E: Make some preparations.

C: 「扑满战线」突然开始煽情了！这剧情展开我怎么看不懂？是我错过了哪一集吗？
E: The Trotter Battlefront is suddenly trying to get everyone to catch some feels! How did the plot suddenly take a twist like this? Did I miss an episode?

C: 《水晶日报》雇佣儿童记者？
E: The Crystal Daily employs child journalists?

C: 你这么感兴趣，直接去问银枝啊。
E: If you're so interested, go ask Argenti yourself.

C: 你说的十王司工作人员是我朋友，来探探班而已。请你不要过度解读。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission staff that you speak of are my friends who were just visiting. Please do not over-analyze everything.

C: 你不该与他对阵的，卢卡！他会杀了你！
E: You shouldn't be fighting him, Luka! He'll kill you!

C: 「庙会」？那庙呢？
E: Temple fair? Where's the temple?

C: 太冷了，我尬住了。
E: Wow. That was really cringe.

C: 真是突兀的退场……
E: Such an abrupt exit...

C: 小红恐惧地问道：「刚才到底发生什么了？」
E: Terrified, Scarlett asked: "What happened back there?"

C: 别这么说。你们的游戏虽然不是大制作，但玩起来也挺有意思的。
E: Don't say that. Even if your game isn't some Triple-A production, it's still pretty fun to play.

C: 就要上台了，好紧张…
E: Almost our turn to go on. I'm so nervous...

C: 我想在这个人画的涂鸦前演奏！
E: I want to play a piece in front of this artist's graffiti!

C: 届时，校园的中央舞台会有一支由学生组成的乐队进行演奏，但始终没找到合适的筹办人选。不知道你有没有兴趣，<color=#dbc291ff>担任这支乐队的经理呢</color>？
E: When the time comes, there will be a student band playing on the school's central stage, but we haven't found any suitable candidates. I wonder if you're interested in <color=#dbc291ff>becoming this band's manager?</color>

C: 这次音乐派对会持续很长时间，按现在的规划，在中央舞台进行三场演出，正好能维持校园的欢庆气氛，也不至于给乐队过分的压力。
E: The music party this round will last for quite some time. According to current plans, the central stage will have three performances — aptly so to maintain the mirth of the school celebration, while also not overly stressing the band out.

C: 在下在折纸村中潜伏已有些许时日，得知此番「音律•祭典」乃是诸位忍徒翘首以盼的盛会，而对将要登台的「音律•忍徒」而言更是极为重要的忍道试炼……
E: I have been lurking within the Paperfold Town for some time, and learned that this music festival is a highly anticipated event among you. For the Sound Ninja poised to perform, this should be of utmost importance for one that seeks to further the way of the ninja.

C: 是不是…难度有点太高了？
E: Isn't that... a little over our heads?

C: 我…我！…我喊不出来……
E: I... I! ...I can't do it...

C: 且慢！在下认为不妥。音忍要以钻研音律•忍法为己任，如此方可超越自身，不落凡俗。
E: Hold it! I don't think this is appropriate. A sound ninja must fervently observe the duty of studying the Sound Release ninjutsu, to transcend the self and rise above the mundane.

C: 这就是我最想看的！
E: This is what I most wanted to see!

C: 铲除邪恶，行侠仗义，银河忍法！我就知道，乱破小姐果然是真正的忍者！
E: Eradicating evil, and upholding justice, and enacting the ways of the cosmic ninja! I knew it, Ms. Rappa is indeed a true ninja!

C: 我是吉他手。
E: I'm the guitarist.

C: 音乐是世界的宝物，要用音乐让整个世界都变得热闹起来啾！
E: Music is the world's treasure. We must use music to turn the world into one huge concert, tweet!

C: 先给你讲讲究竟发生了什么事吧。从前段时间开始，我发现空间站的科员们经常围坐在一起，窃窃私语，不知道在讨论什么。只要我靠近，他们马上就安静了。
E: I'll tell you what exactly happened first. It started some time ago — I noticed the station researchers would usually gather around and whisper to one another, but I don't know what they are discussing. As soon as I get close, they shut their gabs right away.

C: 我就是随口说说的…
E: I was just spitballing...

C: 嘶嘶。我去，把他带来。
E: Zztzzt. I will, bring him here.

C: （等收集完了灵感，就回排练室看看吧。）
E: (I'll head back to the rehearsal room for a gander when I'm done collecting inspiration.)

C: ——拜托了，炒冷饭机器人！
E: ...Please, Fried Cold Rice Robot!

C: 我…希望结束这个乐队。
E: I... I want to disband the band.

C: 这句话可不能随便说啊。
E: You can't just say that so casually.

C: 其实她也不想这样…
E: That's not what she wants...

C: 重申：筑梦学院的选拔，仅以绩点为衡量标准。
E: Allow me to reiterate: The selection for Dreamweaver Academy students is based solely on performance and achievements.

C: 在下只有一件事想要确认——阁下对音律•忍法是否仍心怀渴望，希望随在下继续修行？
E: There is only one thing that I wish to confirm... Do you still long for Sound Release ninjutsu? Do you still wish to train with me?

C: 「忍•法则」！
E: "The Ninja Code"!

C: 诸位！战火未熄，音浪再起。让所有观众好好见识，我等「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」的华丽忍法吧！
E: Fellow ninja! The flames of war still rage, and the waves of sound rise once more! Let's show this audience the brilliant ninjutsu of Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party!

C: …这也在乱破的计划之中吧。
E: ...I imagine that was her plan.

C: 冲冲冲！
E: Chaaaarge!

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 咦咦，不对啊。记得上次乐队里有四个人来着，那个吉他手是退队了吗？
E: Huh? No, something's not right. Weren't there four of them before? Did the guitarist quit?

C: 别拦着，我就要进入战斗了！
E: Don't hold me back. I'm itching for a fight!

C: 在下使用的忍术、践行的忍道或许有缺陷，需要指正，然这并非能成为随意贬低我等努力的理由。
E: My ninjutsu and ninja tenets that I practice may be lacking and require guidance, but that does not give anyone the right to undermine the reason for my efforts.

C: 哟，让我看看，挡在前面的人是谁啊，不就是那个违规演出的乐队的经理嘛？
E: Oh? And who's blocking our way? If it isn't the manager of the band that's performing without permission.

C: <size=36>不要脸！！！</size>
E: <size=36>Shameless!</size>

C: 闯荡忍界至今，在下从未有过食言。请阁下尽管放心。
E: I have never reneged on my word in all my ninja travels. Worry not, my lord.

C: 喂，这些不会是你没卖完的存货吧，现在谁还粉这种傻傻的过气角色啊。
E: Hey, don't tell me these are left over from the stock you didn't manage to sell. Who'd stan such a dopey, outdated character?

C: 虽然不知道…究竟是有什么用意。
E: I don't really know... what's the point.

C: 桶友哟，你们乐队的美名从贝洛伯格的广场到垃圾场，无人不知无人不晓。因此我们专程前来拜访，希望有幸得见演出的盛况。
E: Trashfriend, your band's grand reputation is known from the Belobog plaza all the way to the junkyard. That's why we have specially come all this way to pay a visit, hoping that we'll have the honor of watching your glorious performance.

C: 杀不死的只会变得更强大！
E: What can't be killed only gets stronger!

C: 家人，这你就不懂了。有时不赚钱的事才好玩呢！
E: Oh buddy, you're not in the know then. Sometimes the most fun opportunities are those that won't make money!

C: 查看预售清单。
E: View the pre-sale list.

C: 嘘！小声，别让帕姆发现了…我们正给它挑慰劳礼物呢。
E: Shh, quiet! Pom-Pom can't know that... we're picking a present of appreciation for them.

C: 绝对不行！这可是今天的主菜，我试验了很多次才成功呢。
E: Absolutely not! This is today's main dish. I tried many times before succeeding.

C: 播放《踏上旅途》。
E: Play Take the Journey.

C: 放心吧，我会在冰淇淋化掉之前修好所有设备的。
E: Don't worry. I will fix all the appliances before the ice cream completely melts.

C: 搜索敌对物种「幼蛰虫」，第一页都是「专业团队上门除虫，安全环保服务优质！星际和平家政为您服务」之类的广告……
E: If you search for the hostile organism Juvenile Sting, the first page is all ads like "Professional pest control team at your doorstep, safe and environmentally-friendly service guaranteed! Interastral Peace Housekeeping at your service"...

C: 那你到底帮不帮嘛？
E: So will you help or not?

C: 用「盐」驱逐。
E: Use salt to get rid of them.

C: 呜哇，这些蛞蝓碰到盐就化掉了，好恶心啊…再多倒一点，争取斩草除根，不要复发！
E: Wow, these slugs practically melt in the salt, so icky... I'll pour more in! We have to annihilate them completely, or they'll keep coming back!

C: 你们联系了艾丝妲，并向她说明了情况。
E: You contact Asta and explain the situation to her.

C: 我偷偷从车窗往外看了一眼，整个月台都堆着「实验素材」，贴满了红通通的防爆标识！
E: I sneaked a peek out of the window — the entire railway platform's piled with experiment materials, and they've all got explosion-protection labels in huge red letters!

C: 带我一个！哼哼，本姑娘就是风暴！
E: Bring me along! Heh-heh, I am the storm!

C: 听冷笑话助眠。
E: Dad jokes help with sleep.

C: 万幸，没有。唉，理解丹恒的心情，但还是有点太冲动了。
E: Luckily, he did not. *sigh* I understand how Dan Heng feels, but even that was a little overboard.

C: 它说「好的」。
E: It said "OK."

C: …想吐很多槽，但还是算了帕……
E: ...Pom-Pom has much to rant about, but best to forget it, pom...

C: 送你们一个问题，权当为照片命名做灵感吧：「什么东西外表坚硬，内在柔软；外表光滑，内在粗朴；看似纷繁多样，实则和谐同一；待人冰冷，却能让观者甘之如饴？」
E: I'll bequeath you with a question, as inspiration for your photograph's name: "What is hard on the outside, soft on the inside; smooth on the surface, coarse within; appears legion, but fundamentally united; cold in its welcome, but can be savored by the observer?"

C: 你们家哪来的优势？你们厂长都卷着苜蓿币跑路了！
E: What quality? Your owner embezzled the Alfalfa credits and fled!

C: 我实在看不下去了…{NICKNAME}，咱们去澄清一下吧。
E: I can't take this anymore... {NICKNAME}, we have to clarify the situation.

C: 「全力擒拿」！
E: Mighty Grapple!

C: 又是花火的恶作剧吧？
E: Another one of Sparkle's pranks?

C: 简直毫无瑕疵……
E: Simply flawless...

C: 这么说来…普通机巧鸟做不到的，对你们来说也一定轻易如反掌吧？
E: That means... you guys can do what normal cycranes can't do with ease?

C: ——茄子！
E: ...Cheese!

C: 哎、哎哟！大人的丝线快要将我勒断气了…我从未见您饮用过那秘酿，您不如慷慨施舍给我嘛…才不算浪费嘛。
E: O—Ouch! You're suffocating me with your threads, Your Highness! I have never seen you imbibing the offered ambrosia, so why not grant those to me instead... At least it won't go to waste.

C: 卫兵，放下城门。
E: Guards, lower the city gate.

C: …愿你的理性清晰。愿{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}捍卫你的思想。好啦~可以睁开眼睛了哦。
E: ...May your reason remain clear. May {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} guard your thoughts. All done, you can open your eyes now!

C: 灰宝，别和他急。我来处理。
E: Grayie, don't get riled up by him. I'll handle this.

C: 这、这…我要去向花园投诉。你们滥用权势，欺压奥赫玛的公民！
E: Th—This... I'm lodging a complaint to the Garden. You're abusing your authority and oppressing the citizens of Okhema!

C: 没错，就是我旁边这位。
E: That would be this person beside me.

C: 当领导难道不好吗？
E: Isn't being a squad leader good?

C: 不错。你达到了设立的目标，奇美拉小队暂时不会解散，可以安心了。
E: Not bad, you met your designated milestone. The chimera squad won't disband for now, so you all can rest easy.

C: 还是再想想吧…
E: Best to think it over...

C: 「无名部队」
E: "Nameless Army"

C: 这样。我们管理层内部先讨论好解决方案，再去找出问题的奇美拉谈话。
E: How about this: Let's discuss the solution among management first, then approach the problem chimeras for a chat.

C: 灰宝！这种时候就别开玩笑啦，拿出气势来！
E: Grayie! This is no time for jokes! You've gotta show 'em who's boss!

C: 再差劲的奇美拉，也会有属于它的位置。谢谢。
E: Even the worst chimeras have their own roles to play. Thank you.

C: （奥赫玛一直是白昼，都快忘了现在是休息时间了。还是睡吧…）
E: (With Okhema being in daylight forever, I almost forgot it's now resting time. I should sleep...)

C: 小组赛的晋级选手们依次亮相之后，炙热的淘汰赛正式开始——
E: Now that the contestants advancing from the group stages have been revealed, the exciting Elimination Rounds will now begin—

C: 来了，关键比赛必遇熟人定律…
E: Here we go again — it's that classic "bumping into friends during key matches" trope...

C: 总之，事情复杂，等我们正面对上时，我再向你解释。
E: Look, it's complicated. I'll explain everything when we face each other.

C: 再说了豹越大，刺越多，刺多了，豹的比例就小了。所以豹越大，豹越小。
E: Besides, the bigger the seal, the more thorns it has. And when a seal has more thorns, the seal's actual body is smaller in proportion. So, the bigger the seal, the smaller the seal.

C: 所以，我要叮嘱你的第二件事，便是要你召集伙伴对抗命运。
E: That's why my second reminder is for you to rally companions and stand against fate.

C: 钱，我拿到了；人，我抓住了。
E: I got my money, and here's your baddie.

C: …达利安，不想比赛了。
E: ...Dorian doesn't want to compete anymore.

C: 如果*我们*没猜错…这就是预言中的「巨兽卧沉渊」吧？
E: If we're not mistaken... this is the "giant beast rests in the abyss" mentioned in the prophecy, right?

C: 不过，*我们*无法预料，奥赫玛的公民当中会不会有人顺应预言去行动。而且目前听到的内容，恐怕还并非预言的全貌。
E: However, we cannot foresee whether any Okhema citizens might act on these prophecies. Besides, what we've heard may only be part of the whole prophecy.

C: 谢谢你，阿格莱雅。
E: Thank you, Aglaea.

C: 「于是勇敢的球棒侠决定追寻魔王的足迹，向其发起挑战。」
E: "Thus, the brave Baseballer decides to follow the Demon King's trail and challenge them."

C: 当然，我们可不是那种圈完钱就跑路的无良开发商。
E: Of course, we're not the kind of shady developers who vanish into thin air after getting the money.

C: 接下来的海选赛要求您限时完成赛道，并保持较高名次，才能进入下一轮。
E: The next qualifier requires you to complete the course within a time limit while maintaining a high rank to move on to the next round.

C: 对了，你车技那么好，一定能帮我在后面的比赛里发光发热。就当帮我圆个梦呗。
E: Oh, and with skills like yours, you'll crush the finals. Do it for both of us!

C: 从一开始就知道是你在搞鬼了。
E: I knew it was you causing trouble from the very beginning.

C: 我记得你游戏技术不错，能碰上我这么强的对手，玩得开心吗？
E: I remember your gaming skills are pretty good. Having encountered such a strong opponent like me, did you have fun?

C: 就是字面意义上的——如果我没有继续打游戏，我就会在匹诺康尼立刻暴毙。
E: Literally what it sounds like — stop playing and I die on the spot in Penacony. Simple as that.

C: 先不了。
E: Not right now.

C: 别用这种眼神看我，我可是在机动球大赛上拿了个冠军，还顺便替猎犬家系把噩梦边境的怪物都清剿了个干净。
E: Don't give me that look. I won a championship at the Roboball Contest and helped the Bloodhound Family clear out the monsters on the Nightmare's borders.

C: 更多的消费者，才是名为匹诺康尼的「圣杯」需要的燃料。
E: More consumers — that's the fuel this so-called Holy Grail of Penacony truly runs on.

C: 请慢用。
E: Please enjoy.

C: 这种咄咄怪事，我怎么能不来瞧瞧呢？
E: You think I'd let something that strange slide without coming to check it out?

C: 怎么，你当得将军，我当不得？
E: What, you're allowed to be a general and I'm not?

C: 不如你们比比看，谁更像真正的{NICKNAME}吧？
E: How about a challenge? Let's see who pulls off a better impression of {NICKNAME}.

C: 难道我真是花火？
E: Wait. Am I actually Sparkle?

C: 能被一位天才频频光顾，可不是每家店都这么幸运哦。
E: Not every establishment has the fortune to frequently receive genius, you know.

C: 况且住在这里的那位朋友，一时半刻也不会回来。这不得抓紧机会，让我享受享受他的生活？
E: Besides, that friend who lived here won't be back anytime soon. Why not seize this chance to get a taste of his lifestyle?

C: 嗯，也可以这么理解。那么，{NICKNAME}，你是否愿意参与这个项目呢？
E: Hmm, you could say that. So, {NICKNAME}, would you be willing to take part in this project?

C: 既然你已经可以开始独立工作了，那我和托帕也可以放心离开啦。
E: Now that you can work independently, Topaz and I can leave without any worries.

C: 真的能找到古代遗物吗？
E: Are there really ancient relics to be found there?

C: 哎，真不容易，没想到能一路挖到这么深的地方。
E: Whew, that took it out of me. I never imagined we'd end up so deep in one go.

C: 感觉赚得也不多啊…
E: Doesn't seem like we'll be earning much from this...

C: 让我去寻宝！
E: I wanna go hunt relics!

C: 我当时就直接开打了。
E: I just walked up and started fighting.

C: 实在编不出来就说量子力学。
E: How about we throw in some quantum mechanics stuff? It'll make us sound smart!

C: 终于还是扯到了量子力学…
E: Finally, we're getting down to quantum mechanics!

C: 又在乱写！
E: You're getting sloppy!

C: 呵…现在还不是许愿的时候。等你完成了试炼，我们再来讨论这个话题吧。
E: Heh... Now's not the time for making wishes. We can talk about this again once you complete the trial.

C: 为什么是我来起名…
E: Why do I have to name it...

C: ……咳咳！定是我才疏学浅，未能识得这姓字真意。但龙尊既钟于造化灵气，那必然是块大宝贝！好名字！
E: ...Ummm.... I fail to see how that makes sense. But since you are the one who picked this, it must be a great name!

C: 这是位童星？
E: Is this a child actor?

C: 这正是铸成碎星绝尘剑的剑材，「天火熔金」是也！
E: This is the Ignis Aureliae that would cast the Star-Shattering Blade of Truth!

C: 随心所欲的设定…
E: Some random worldbuilding rules you just made up...

C: 风灵月影剑！
E: Reaper of Nexus Modder!

C: 瞧您说的，我像是稀罕报酬的人吗？咱们可都是有正经工作的。
E: Hah, do we look like we are solely motivated by money? We've got our own jobs to do.

C: 我们好像也不是很熟吧。
E: Wait, have we ever met before?

C: 太好了，我有件小事想麻烦你，不过你放心，托人办事总得有点表示，这点人情世故我还是懂的。
E: To be honest, I was hoping you could do me a small favor. Don't worry. I'll make it worth your while.

C: 我没有古董，拿什么鉴宝？
E: But I don't even have antiques. How am I supposed to appraise them?

C: 这是什么节目？「公司」的真人秀吗？
E: What's with the setup? An IPC reality show?

C: {NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！我就知道你们一定会来！
E: {M#Mr. }{F#Miss. }{NICKNAME}! I knew you'd come!

C: 通过这枚「以太硬币」，玩家可以将自己遇见的生物以「以太」的形式存储下来——还能将其实体化为「以太灵」与其他玩家「对决」。
E: Using an Aether Coin, players can store creatures they've encountered in the form of an Aether — and then manifest them as Aether Spirits to battle against other players.

C: 不过，你说了算～还是说，你想要再考虑考虑？
E: It's up to you... Do you wanna try something different?

C: 哼哼，会夸你就多夸两句～
E: A compliment!? Continue...

C: …哎呀，我就只是客套两句啦。真不愧是你。
E: Taking every chance to pat yourself on the back, I see.

C: 你们要做的就是用<color=#dbc291ff>数量有限的热能核心</color>点亮决胜乐园中<color=#dbc291ff>所有指定的照雪灯炉</color>。
E: The puzzle for you to solve is to use the <color=#dbc291ff>limited number of thermic cores</color> at your disposal to illuminate <color=#dbc291ff>all of the designated Snowshine Lamps</color> scattered around the Victory Zone.

C: 小菜一碟。
E: Piece of cake!

C: 哎——真是的！本来心情还好好的，这下让他们给搅浑了……
E: Ugh, seriously! I was in such a good mood, too, until they came along and spoiled it...

C: 这里竟然有这么多人！早知道把玉兆带来做直播了——
E: Whoa, so many people here! If I'd known, I would've brought my jade abacus with me for a livestream...

C: 哈哈哈哈，甚好～甚好～
E: Haha, marvelous!

C: 你们需要找到空间站的<color=#dbc291ff>服务机器人</color>，领取对应的<color=#dbc291ff>藏宝图</color>——！
E: You need to locate the <color=#dbc291ff>service robots</color> on the space station, and take corresponding <color=#dbc291ff>Treasure Maps</color> from them!

C: 好了，放马过来吧——你们一起上，我赶时间。
E: Fine, let's get this over with. Bring it on, I'm in a hurry.

C: 是啊…好没有仪式感……
E: Yeah... feels like we're missing something...

C: 还能因为什么？给星际和平公司面子呗。
E: To bolster the IPC's reputation — it's a win-win for me.

C: 看，呜呜伯！…它怎么在哭呀？
E: Another Wubbaboo! ...It's crying?

C: 哈哈哈，过奖了。要论《以太战线》的水平，我跟乔瓦尼先生可差得远呢。
E: Hahaha, you're too kind. Compared to Mr. Giovanni, I'm practically a novice.

C: 之后有空再一起玩吧，{NICKNAME}。
E: Let's play again if you have the time, {NICKNAME}.

C: …你没有可以领取的福利啊，等拿到新的资格徽章再来找我吧。
E: ...You aren't qualified to claim any benefits. Come back again when you get a new Mastery Mark.

C: 唉，如果所有玩家都像你这么厉害，我的工作或许还能有意义一点。
E: Ah, if all players were as amazing as you, maybe my work would have some meaning.

C: 不过，这些都要等到锦标赛结束之后再说。眼下你们还是好好备战，别被其它事分了心！
E: Anyway, for now, just stay focused. Don't let yourselves get distracted!

C: 第一次听到诊所的孩子们谈起这个「游戏」，我还以为这又是他们平时的过家家……
E: When I heard the kids at the clinic talking about this "game," I thought they were just making things up again...

C: 时间好快呀，{NICKNAME}。我们就按广播说的，先回趟准备区吧。
E: About time. {NICKNAME}, let's head to the prep zone.

C: 哈哈，承蒙谬赞！就现状而言，无疑是你的实力在我之上！
E: Haha, I am honored by your kind words! But there is no denying that your abilities far outshine mine!

C: 无论如何，既然两位来到这了这里…就意味着我们之间是免不了一战了——当然，是以「以太战线」对决的形式。
E: Anyway, since you're both here it only means one thing... war! An Aetherium War, that is...

C: …现在，是时候让你们面临最后的、也是真正的挑战了。
E: ...The time has come for you to face your final challenge.

C: 嗯？谁找本姑娘？
E: Huh? Wh—What's going on?

C: 没错，你们的选择——这只扑满虽然可爱，但对我来说它到底也不过是一簇数据、一枚藏品……
E: That's right — your choice. This cute little trotter, despite its charm, is essentially just data to me — a collector's piece...

C: 而且岁阳以情绪为食，往往会操纵受害者暴露内心隐藏的一面…
E: Another thing we have to think about is that heliobi feed on the emotions of their hosts. They can even manipulate a host into revealing their deepest secrets...

C: 话说的不错！本着「谁污染，谁治理」的原则确该让当事人出马。但是……
E: Precisely! In principle, the instigator should bear the burden. Still...

C: 好几天没回金人巷了，回到老地盘，感觉还真是亲切呀。
E: Ahh, I haven't been here for a while — it's nice to be back in the old stomping ground.

C: 不过，游荡在外面的岁阳还有很多很多…我们也休息不了多久……
E: But there are still lots of heliobi roaming around out there... we can't rest for too long.

C: 「捉鬼小队」的事情，要劳您多多费心了。若有什么疑问，藿藿可代小女子解答。
E: I leave the matters of the ghost-hunting squad in your hands. If you have further questions, just ask Huohuo.

C: 我们会找到它的。
E: We'll find him.

C: 之前和浮烟有点过节…
E: I have a score to settle with Cirrus...

C: 这又不是打猎，伤到白露小姐该怎么办？
E: Huh? We can't hunt the Dragon Lady like a wild beast...

C: 暴力，只有暴力才是你们这些大人唯一会说也唯一能听懂的语言，对吧！？就像你们每次教训孩子时那样！
E: Yes, violence, the only language you grown-ups know how to speak, right? The one you use when you're telling us off!

C: 到底是谁啊！
E: Who is this, exactly?

C: 你们向浮烟讲述了太卜司的现状。
E: You tell Cirrus what's happening at the Divination Commission

C: 「不劳而获」？
E: Compensation without labor?

C: 如果你理解了关于命运的真相，现在离开还不迟，别再打扰本座的演算了！
E: If you have gained clarity on the true nature of destiny, you may leave... and stop interfering with my divinations!

C: 但宇宙并不是谁的游戏，也没有人为我们设计谜题等待解答，宇宙不存在唯一的解…身在其中的我们可以做任何事。
E: But the universe isn't someone's game, and no one is designing puzzles for us to solve. The universe doesn't have a single answer... we can do anything we want while we're in it.

C: 你不过是在偷换概念。这样的路线我可以为你编织出千条万条，可它们通向的是同一个尽头，这样的选择又有什么意义？
E: You're just playing with semantics. I could weave a thousand routes for you, but they lead to the same destination — so what significance is there in having a choice?

C: 封印「藏月瓠」内岁阳
E: Seal Heliobus in Lunaumbra Gourd

C: 哈哈哈，这个女娃娃的斗志当真滚烫灼人啊！既然她执意要战，少年，你会回应吗？
E: Hahaha, this little wench's fighting spirit is on fire! Young one, since she insists on fighting, will you give her our answer?

C: 将军……
E: General...

C: 可把她给骄傲坏了。
E: A little pleased with yourself, aren't you...?

C: 能在将军高足的手底下有来有回，撑上这么久，换我我也骄傲。
E: She went toe-to-toe with the general's star pupil! I'd be pretty pleased with myself, too.

C: 耶？装可怜吗？我最讨厌装可怜的人了！
E: Huh? Trying to make us feel sorry for you? I can't stand people who do that!

C: 所有人，都会离开的……
E: Everyone will leave... they always do, eventually...

C: …离开就离开吧。我本来也不擅长和人相处，就算没有尾巴，他们也会离开的。
E: You know what? They left, let them be. I'm not a people person anyway. Without you, Tail, they'd have left me just the same...

C: …肯定不是尾巴。那家伙傲气得很，按它的说法，很少有人配让它寄宿。
E: ...No, it can't be him. Tail always said only the most privileged are worthy of being his host.

C: 那就麻烦您了。
E: Thank you for your help.

C: 还是寻找尾巴的事情？
E: Still thinking about Tail?

C: （看来藿藿已经先一步找到了，先去和她汇合吧。）
E: (Looks like Huohuo found them first. Let's go meet up with her.)

C: 现在我承受着这份痛苦，就还能感到她、记住她…这样一来，她就始终在我的身边，没能离去。
E: I bear this pain now, and I can still feel her and remember her... It's how she can always be with me, and never leave me.

C: 请不要这样说，我受之有愧。这只是我的本分，不值得您感谢。
E: Don't say that. I don't deserve it. It's just my job, and doesn't deserve your thanks.

C: {NICKNAME}，准备好的话藿藿就要摇动同心火铃咯？
E: {NICKNAME}, if you are ready, Huohuo will ring the Harmonic Chime?

C: 这队伍要排到什么时候？
E: How long do we have to queue for?

C: 接下来，{NICKNAME}，咱们也该把岁阳收回法阵里去了。
E: Okay, {NICKNAME}, let's get this heliobus back to the matrix.

C: 太卜大人，这只是幻象！
E: Master diviner, this is just a fantasy!

C: 什么事？
E: What is it?

C: 青雀的声线逐渐变得高亢嘶哑，回荡在房间的每个角落。
E: Qingque's voice gradually grows more high-pitched and shrill, echoing across corner of the room.

C: 你这{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}也太狂了。
E: You talk big, {F#girl}{M#boy}.

C: 原来还有这样的事情。
E: Who would have expected this?

C: 这必然是凶宅的线索！
E: This must be a clue about the haunted house!

C: 不可以。
E: No way!

C: 啊？
E: Huh?

C: 但当事人自己不愿意说，我们也不好贸然打探人家隐私。
E: But if the people involved aren't willing to say, then we can't just make rash inquiries into their personal affairs.

C: 十王司肯定有办法的，对吧藿藿？
E: I'm sure the Ten-Lords Commission has a way, right, Huohuo?

C: 从外观上看，它和普通的物流机巧鸟没有任何区别，但快递箱里放着「藏月瓠」！
E: Its appearance may not look different from an ordinary courier cycrane, but there's a Lunaumbra Gourd in the courier package!

C: 总感觉这里面没有尾巴，也没有尾巴的碎片……
E: I don't sense Tail here, and there aren't any Tail fragment...

C: 没有反应啊，看来问题也不在杨叔身上。
E: No reaction. It seems like Mr. Yang doesn't have any problems either.

C: 呵，没想到被你们识破了，既然如此……
E: Ha, I didn't expect you to find me. If that's the case...

C: 不过，他们活的时间久了也会变回这样，必须在蛋里休息一段时间后才能出来。所以我也不知道持明的蛋究竟算年轻呢还是老呢。
E: But if they live for a long time, they will return to this form. Hence, they need to rest in the egg for a period before coming out again. I'm not sure whether to consider a Vidyadhara egg as young or old.

C: 不过…这只岁阳说过自己想要离开仙舟。看在它没做过什么坏事的份上，多少考虑一下？
E: But... the heliobus said it wants to leave the Xianzhou. Seeing that it didn't cause any harm, perhaps we can consider its suggestion?

C: 我懂的，要涨粉嘛！
E: I know. Time to get more fans!

C: 嘿嘿，好说好说！
E: Heehee, no problem!

C: 放心，我早有准备。
E: Don't worry. I've been waiting for just this moment.

C: 总之就是大家的美好回忆嘛，我们也算是「绥园战友」了。
E: Anyway, it's a nice memory for everyone. We're all veterans of Fyxestroll Garden now.

C: 太好了，看到{NICKNAME}你出现在空间站我就放心了。
E: Fantastic. What a relief to see you on the space station, {NICKNAME}.

C: 快进入正题吧！
E: Let's get to it!

C: …你捡垃圾吃？
E: ...Did you just eat a piece of trash?

C: 它们很高兴，彼此之间相处得也很愉快。多亏了你啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: They're happy and are getting on very well with each other. All thanks to you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我怀疑这是受到某种精神层面的影响……
E: I suspect this is all connected on some kind of spiritual level...

C: 要不然怎么会拍合照呢？
E: Why would we take a group photo otherwise?

C: 听我讲故事，你也会得到一些好处。摸摸你的口袋吧。
E: Listen to my story, and you'll get something out of it. Reach into your pockets.

C: 正如之前所言，你牵动着银河的潮汐。
E: As mentioned, you impel the tides of the cosmos.

C: 她选择与父亲战斗…
E: She chooses to fight her father...

C: 你不需要知道。看到它们笑得这么欢快就够了。
E: You don't need to know the details. Seeing them laughing so hard is all you need to know.

C: 滚开！你这傻狗！整天只知道咬你那破汽水瓶，看个家都能丢东西。跑一边去！
E: Scram, you stupid dog! All you do is chew on your stupid soda bottles. You can't even protect the house without causing losses! Get lost, now!

C: 「既然没法享受『美梦』，不如彻底坠入『惊梦』。」
E: "If we can't enjoy the sweet dream, why not embrace the other side?"

C: 比「自由」更重要的东西…是「牵绊」。
E: What's even more important than freedom... is companionship.

C: 出去吧。这场思想实验已经有了结果。
E: It's time to leave. This thought experiment has come to fruition.

C: 愿意来吗？继续留在封锁的酒店里，你会很危险，没有其他人的陪伴…你也会感到孤独。
E: Will you join us? It could be dangerous for you to stay in this sealed hotel all alone, and you'll... feel lonely without any company.

C: 美梦不过是随便借个名字，用幻想吹出的肥皂泡。呵！爱情皆是虚假，激情生于愚昧！
E: Sweet dreams are as fickle as fantasy-filled soap bubbles. Hah! Love stems from lies, and passion arises from ignorance!

C: 尊重！不要嘲笑别人的名字！
E: Show some respect! Don't make fun of people's names!

C: …很遗憾，你输了。
E: ...I'm sorry to say that you lost.

C: 说到这个，又想起了我的伤心事。呜呜，你知道吗，我曾经也是个乖孩子，约好要投大就绝对不会小的那种。直到…直到…我被安排来酒店工作。
E: Speaking of which, I just thought of something very sad again. *sob* I once was a good kid, you know? The kind who literally couldn't have gone small if he said he was going to go big. That was true up until... until... I was assigned to work at the hotel.

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: 呜咕咕咕咕…哈呀！爽到起飞！要是每天都能这么快活就好了！
E: Groooo... Ha! I'm feeling so good that I'm flying! I want to feel this happy every day!

C: 说到这个，又想起了我的伤心事。呜呜，你知道吗，我曾经也是个乖孩子，约好要投大就绝对不会小的那种。直到…直到…我被安排来酒店工作。
E: Speaking of which, I just thought of something very sad again. *sob* I once was a good kid, you know? The kind who literally couldn't have gone small if he said he was going to go big. That was true up until... until... I was assigned to work at the hotel.

C: 在关键时候犯错可是会很掉好感度的，别白白浪费了人家给您的机会呀。
E: Making a mistake at a critical time will lose you my favor. Please don't waste the opportunity presented to you.

C: 在这里遇见外面的客人可是稀罕事，所以人家就多跟了段时间。然后呀，就听见那个女孩子嘴里念念有词，好像是说——
E: It's rare to come across an outsider in this place, so I followed her for a while. Then, I overheard her murmuring something like...

C: 像。
E: Yeah, right.

C: 您的调饮技巧还是一如既往地优秀，我非常喜欢这杯饮料！
E: Your mixing skills are as excellent as ever. I really enjoyed this drink!

C: 你记错了。
E: You've got it all mixed up.

C: 你很关心其他怪物。
E: You really care about the other monsters.

C: 舒翁向你提出的委托，是安抚我们的情绪对吧？
E: The work that Siobhan gave you was to calm us down, right?

C: 就这样吧！嘿嘿，随时有饮料喝，还要什么独轮飞车！我走咯！
E: That's all! Hee-hee, who needs an Unicycler when I get to drink whenever I want! I'm off!

C: 味道很好，接待顾客的水平也不错，你是少有的能让我满意的人。
E: The flavor is great, and so is your service. You are one of the few that can impress me.

C: （开始调制）
E: (Start preparing the drink)

C: 新来的，别被这只狗的外表给骗啦！装出可爱的样子，其实…嘿，嘴里全是难听的话！
E: Newbie, don't let this dog's appearance dupe you! That dog looks cute, but in reality... everything it has to say is unpleasant!

C: 汪！好渴！再给我调杯饮料，要<color=#dbc291ff>甜甜的，清清爽爽</color>的类型！
E: Woof! Delish! Hit me with another. I want something <color=#dbc291ff>sweet, refreshing</color>, something along those lines!

C: 这个忆泡，实际上就是「战意狂潮•童年回忆无污染赤诚燃魂整合版」——简单的定制化战斗游戏，你能和记忆中的仇敌安全畅快地打上一整天！
E: This memory bubble is actually "Tides of War: Untainted Childhood Memories Passionate-Heart Burning-Soul Ultimate Collection" — It's a cool and easy customized fighting game where you can battle all those childhood foes in the memory for a whole day!

C: 汪汪    汪  汪
E: WoofWoof    woof  woof

C: 铛<rhythm>铛<rhythm>铛<rhythm>铛<rhythm>铛
E: Ding <rhythm>Ding <rhythm>Ding <rhythm>Ding <rhythm>Ding

C: 汪    汪
E: Woof    Woof

C: 汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof

C: 汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 空<rhythm>间<rhythm>站<rhythm>是<rhythm>我家
E: The <rhythm>Space <rhythm>Station <rhythm>is <rhythm>my home

C: 准备开始正式说唱吧！
E: Prepare to begin the rapping proper!

C: 现在，更多的扑满将会出现。
E: More Trotters will now appear.

C: 启动调饮模拟器！
E: Activate the drinksmith simulator!

C: 记住了吧，可别说是我告诉你的哦。嘎嘎嘎嘎…好了，做个乖酒保，给我点喝的。
E: Remember, you can't say that I was the one who told you. Hahaha... Okay. Now, be a good drinksmith and put in an order for me.

C: 游戏方式很简单：我们现已将用来对战的*街机*投放到了匹诺康尼的各个角落，您需要根据我们提供的*地图*找到它们。
E: The gameplay is simple: Arcade machines used for battles have been placed all over Penacony, and you'll have to find them with the help of the map we provide.

C: 搞定——让我看看，嗯…「根据街机附带的地图寻找线索」…{NICKNAME}你还等什么呢？快点启动「初号机」啊！
E: Got it — Let's see, hmm... "Find clues according to the map in the arcade machine"... {NICKNAME}, what are you waiting for? Hurry up and launch Unit<unbreak>-01</unbreak>!

C: 唔…倒是比我想象中要好些，权当消遣放松一下也不错…嗯，你怎么了？
E: Uh, it's surprisingly better than I expected it to be. Maybe I can take this as an opportunity to relax and have a break... Hm? What's up with you?

C: 哈，形象还能自定义？玩法本身虽然还有提升空间，周边系统倒是弄得像模像样的嘛。
E: Oh, you can customize the design? The game mode itself could use some work, but I guess the peripheral gameplay systems aren't too shabby.

C: 这么快就恢复精神了？小姑娘还挺有活力。
E: You sure recovered fast. That's some spirit you have.

C: 不过这里吵成这样，也真亏你待得下去。
E: That said, I'm surprised you stuck around in a place this crowded.

C: 明明是我的汪！
E: This is obviously mine, woof!

C: 不然呢？就算是DEMO，做成这样也很难让人有动力继续肝下去吧……
E: Yeah. I know it's just a demo, but the direction they took for the game does nothing to motivate their players to continue the grind.

C: 嗯？怎么了……
E: Hm? What's that?

C: 这是…这只折纸小鸟…是不是和我有点像？
E: Oh, this is... Is it my imagination, or does this Origami Bird look a little like me?

C: 您来了，来来来，我给您介绍下，这位是我们科的新人——
E: You're here! Come, come. Let me introduce to you the latest addition to our department —

C: 他们是在…讨论我？
E: Are they... talking about me?

C: 人家铄金都受伤了！怎么会是人家挑衅的你！
E: Shuojin is the one who got injured! How could it be him taunting you?

C: 别担心，这只是精神压力引发了神经衰弱，进一步加重了你的幻觉。
E: Don't worry. It's just the mental stress causing neurotic exhaustion, further intensifying your hallucinations.

C: 托帕小姐本可以对处于舆论风口的卢卡先生不闻不问，装聋作哑。但她却不避嫌来发出邀请。没道理这样猜疑别人的好心吧？
E: Miss Topaz could have acted oblivious and ignored Mr. Luka, who is at the center of public scrutiny. Instead, she chose not to shy away from suspicion and extended the invitation. Isn't it unfair to question someone's good intentions?

C: 咳咳，但各位也许没听说过，我们这一系武学与星际和平公司机甲有源远流长的关系。
E: Ahem, but you might not know that our martial arts tradition has a long-standing relationship with IPC mechs.

C: 广告代言？你这是什么意思？我可是现在整个罗浮反对公司资本介入仙舟武术的意见领袖。
E: Endorsement? What do you mean? I am currently the leading voice in the Luofu opposing the IPC's capital intervention in the Xianzhou martial arts.

C: 这是商业机密，{F#女士}{M#先生}。
E: That's a business secret, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}.

C: 逻辑：博识学会向来对「神秘」讳莫如深，尤其是这种重要史料，理应不会放任虚构史学家进行篡改。
E: Logic: The Intelligentsia Guild has always been extremely apprehensive regarding the Enigmata, especially concerning such important historical materials. They would not have permitted the History Fictionologists to tamper with it.

C: 答案：另一位天才。鲁珀特一世虽然被寂静领主杀死，但他的知识却借由二世的头脑重生。
E: Answer: Another genius. Rubert I was slain by the Lord of Silence, but his knowledge was reborn with the Second Emperor's brain.

C: 你感觉这阵沉默持续了很久，对天才而言，一秒的思考，或许恰如人们一个琥珀纪的思考那般深远。
E: For you, this momentary silence seems like an eternity — To a genius, however, a second's contemplation may just be as profound as the thoughts of an average person over an Amber Era.

C: 「只有一种让我加入你们的方式：我的手术刀刺入了某位天才的咽喉。」
E: "There is only one way for me to join you all: When my scalpel pierces into the throat of a certain genius."

C: 这太羞耻了，我不要…
E: This is kind of cringey. Can I skip over this part?

C: 你是来给我送早餐的吗？
E: Did you come to bring me breakfast?

C: 需要些饮料吗？或是一些茶点？我的知识库显示，夜宵或许会对健康造成负担，却能带来超乎想象的快乐。
E: Would you like anything to drink? How about some refreshments? My knowledge base indicates that while late night snacks may negatively affect one's health, they can also bring great joy.

C: 那么，衣帽间的位置就决定是这儿啦。{NICKNAME}乘客，来都来了，顺带帮帕姆看看今天穿什么帕！
E: Then, the coatroom placement is decided! Passenger {NICKNAME}, since you're here, help Pom-Pom decide what to wear today!

C: 不过这看起来像是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}的东西…为什么会出现在这里？
E: But this looks like a creation of {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#}... Why is it here?

C: 你们继续向地宫深处走去，耳边划过千百年未变的风声。
E: You progress even further into the depths of the hypogeum, and winds that have continued to blow for thousands of years whistling past your ears.

C: 不错，气氛活跃了一些。我们继续前进吧。
E: Well, it looks like the atmosphere has livened up quite a bit. Let's press on, then.

C: …也是，来都来了，不做成点什么总觉得欠口气。
E: ...You're right. Since I'm already here, I owe it to myself to see this through to the end.

C: 没必要给自己那么大鸭梨。
E: There's no need to put so much pressure on yourself... It might sour your ability to soar.

C: 准确地说，研究如何把这颗蛋孵出来。目前我有三十二种可行的方案，只是需要一些时间验证。
E: I'm researching how to hatch this egg, actually. I have thirty-two promising plans so far, but I need time to test them all.

C: 呜——嗡！（谢谢你！{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}！）
E: Grumphhh! (Thank you, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}!)

C: 好可爱，我要养它。
E: Aww, it's so cute! I'm keeping it.

C: 可以说，这孩子现在相当虚弱。如果没人照料的话，它恐怕没法成长为独当一面的大地兽，更不用说每天都吃到美味的红土了。
E: Honestly, this little one is rather weak. Without special attention, it'll never grow into a proper dromas, or even get to enjoy its daily redsoil meals.

C: 你简直不像个大地兽。
E: Wow, you're way beyond a dromas.

C: 呜~嗡！（嗯？我懂了！这么说，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}简直像个大地兽！）
E: Grumph! (Huh? Got it! That must mean you are a super dromas, right {F#Mama}{M#Papa}?)

C: 呜嗡。（哈哈，其实我还挺有兴趣的。）
E: Grumph. (Haha, I'm actually quite interested.)

C: 你昨天吃什么了？
E: What did you eat yesterday?

C: 呜，呜嗡…（偷偷告诉你，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，其实也不算错…）
E: Grumph... (Just between us, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}, that wasn't exactly wrong...)

C: 咳咳…总之，我很看好它。等几周后大部队回来，我们详细聊聊吧。
E: Ahem... Anyway, I've got a good feeling about this one. Let's talk more about it in detail when the main forces return in a few weeks.

C: 讲点「大道理」
E: Drop some "big truths"

C: 没事，聘不到你是他们亏了。
E: It's fine. If they didn't hire you, that's their loss.
Grumph! (Great—)

C: 浴场，践行时。
E: The baths, Action Hour.

C: 不要小瞧了我的羁绊啊！
E: Don't underestimate the power of my bonds!

C: 你这是石吧？
E: That's stones, not soil.

C: 岂有不吃的道理！
E: How could I refuse to eat this!?

C: 嗯，明天见。
E: See you tomorrow.

C: 但很可惜，我和维德太弱了。只好拜托您来试试，以您的身手，说不定能让人憋笑失败。
E: Unfortunately, Vader and I are too weak. That's why we're asking for your help to try it. With your skills, you might just be able to make them lose.

C: 请给我更多糕点吧！
E: I beg you, give me more pastries!

C: 据说，修理电视机最好的方式是用力敲几下，想必同样的办法对修理机器人也会奏效吧？
E: They say the best way to fix a TV is to give it a few good whacks. I bet the same trick would work on robots, too, right?

C: 强大的力量。
E: Immense power.

E: {NICKNAME} seems excited and wants to play the "New Friend Game" with everyone. Hehe, let's humor {M#him}{F#her}.

E: Shall we use the method of elimination?

C: 你有一票肯定权吗？
E: Do you have the deciding vote?

C: 明天别忘了来上班。
E: Don't forget to come to work tomorrow.

C: 小凯撒，欺负人！*我们*以前可比你高多了！
E: Little Imperator's being mean! We used to be much taller than you!

C: 随时奉陪。不过得先让我熟悉这里。

C: 好呀。*我们*来给小敌引路！
E: Ooh, great! We will lead the way for De!

E: Mem... eating here feels so comfy~ Like coming home, mem!

C: 甜蜜蜜节的顾客反馈都很好哦，全是夸我们的呢。

C: 但妖精们并不懂得烹饪，在各位的餐馆开张前，收录的菜品其实寥寥无几。
E: But back then, fairies didn't know how to cook. Before your restaurants opened, there were hardly any dishes in the book at all.

C: 但餐馆藉此机会打响了在迷境的知名度，确是好事。
E: Still, the restaurant made quite a splash in the Maze. That's worth celebrating.

C: 餐馆…居然真的存在。
E: The restaurant... it actually exists?

C: 那一战……\n他捏碎了所有来敌的兵刃。
E: In that fight...\nHe crushed all invading blades with his fists.

C: 孩童们坚称自己已经长大成人，\n却在不小心撞到城门时，\n一齐诚实地吃痛出声来。
E: The children swore they were already adults,\nyet when they carelessly hit the city gate,\nthey cried out in pain together.

C: 不过，逐火的黄金裔们，\n却让你感到莫名的熟悉，\n仿佛已有人传述过英灵事迹。
E: The Chrysos Heirs of the Flame-Chase\nsomehow feel familiar,\nas though their tales have already been told to you.

C:
人们簇拥在逐火的旗帜下痛饮，
而你终于能以人的姿态，
与那些旧友重识，
将他们录入《如我所书》。
E: People gather under the banner of the Flame-Chase and drink their fill. You are finally able to take on the persona of a human being, reconnecting with those old friends, entering them into As I've Written.

C: 啊，真累啊……\n眼皮快要合上啦。
E: Ah, I'm so tired...\nI can barely keep my eyes open.

C: 只因那大地的试炼，\n便是忍受地上生灵的灾痛。
E: For Earth's trial\nIs to bear the anguish of every living being that walks its surface.

C: 孱弱的生灵背叛漆黑的海潮，\n登上陆地、攀上高枝，\n最终背叛家园、仰望星空。
E: Frail beings betrayed the dark tides,\nClimbing onto land, ascending the branches high,\nFinally betraying their home and gazing upon the stars.

C: 不知从何时起，\n天女总被和岁月一同提及。
E: It is not known since when\nThe celestial maiden was always mentioned together with Time.

C: 毕竟，早在<color=#9e5738>「天外来客」</color>抵达之前，\n粉霞天女的传说就已遍布大地。
E: After all, long before the <color=#9e5738>"guests beyond the sky"</color> arrived,\nThe legend of the Rosy Celestial Maiden had already covered the world.

C: 「能救我们的唯有神迹…」\n怯懦的元老闭门不出，\n瑟缩的公民跪地祈求。
E: "Only a miracle can save us now..."\nThe cowardly elders barred themselves behind closed doors,\nWhile the trembling citizenry knelt and prayed.

C: 每逢伐神战前，\n她常想起童年的怪人，\n仿佛自出生便幽居方寸内。
E: Before every god-slaying campaign,\nShe thought of the stranger from her childhood,\nAs if that woman had always lived in her mind.

C: 「原来，这就是我要反抗的旧世界。」\n少女的容色中不见丝毫悲凄，\n反倒比任何时刻都更肃穆，昂然。
E: "So this is the old world I must fight against."\nThe girl's expression bore no sorrow or tragedy.\nInstead, she looked more solemn and ready than ever.

C: 「以翁法罗斯之名，\n我将赐予毁灭以毁灭。」
E: "In the name of Amphoreus,\nI will grant destruction to the Destruction."

C:
在千年前的深海，
海妖也曾坚定地奔赴岸上。
所经之处群鱼追随，
陪赴公主的葬礼仪仗。
E:
In the deep sea, a thousand years past,
The sea siren once swam to the shore with unwavering will.
Fish gathered in silent procession,
To escort the princess to her final rest.

C: 他要前往远方行医，\n那里末日逼近，\n他不愿让至亲随行。
E: He will heal the ill at a faraway place,\nWhere the end of days approaches,\nAnd no family of his should follow.

C:
远行的医师再未归返。
女孩也再未离去。
而那略显寂寞的庭院，
静谧，一如往昔。
E:
The departed healer never returned,
And the girl never left.
And that rather lonely courtyard,
Stayed silent, as it was before.

C: 寻衅争辩的学者，往往止步门前。
E: The scholars coming to deliver arguments and reproach, often stopped before the door, not coming to fruition.

C:
从此——
最初的<color=#9e5738>「人」</color>行走大地，
蒙恩众神的垂怜，
感悟此世的哀伤。
E:
Thus —
The very first <color=#9e5738>mortals</color> roamed the earth,
Receiving the gods' mercy,
While realizing the sorrows of this world.

C: 「愈是渺小，愈见重量。\n我的名字越愚钝，\n我成就的一切便越辉煌。」
E: "The smaller a thing is, the more it shows its weight.\nThe more foolish my name is,\nThe more glory my achievements will be in comparison."

C: 同为雅努斯的信使，\n她们会捎来鞋子。
E: As messengers of Janus,\nthey will bring him the shoes he hopes for.

C: 在那漫长的战争中，\n金织的世家被剑刃搅碎，\n传世的浪漫成了一场悲剧。
E: In the long, endless war,\nThe Goldweaver family was shattered by the sword,\nAnd the legacy of romance became a tragedy.

C: 雅努斯的圣女，蹑步而来。\n用手捧起池水，像濯洗月桂树的枝条那般，\n为她浇梳头发。
E: Janus' Holy Maiden silently walks over,\nScooping up water to wash the weaver's hair\nAs if cleansing the bough of a laurel tree.

C: 如同她曾触碰自己的面颊——\n自眼中流下的，最后一滴泪水。
E: Just as she had once touched her own face —\nFalls the final tear her eyes will ever produce.

C: 昔涟
E: Cyrene

C: 烦恼的风堇将小伊卡带到山羊学派研究室，请贤人加以诊断。贤人用仪器捣鼓了一番，随后又埋头在研究报告里一通翻找，最后双手交叉，遗憾地向风堇解释道——
E: The troubled Hyacine brought Little Ica to the Caprist research lab, asking the Sage for a diagnosis. The Sage fiddled with some instruments, then buried himself in research reports, frantically searching through them. Finally, crossing his arms, he regretfully explained to Hyacine.

C: 「阿格莱雅女士是真的把这次比赛当作交流会了呀……」
E: "Lady Aglaea really is treating this more like an exchange than a competition..."

C: 三月七：星穹列车的无名客，「记忆」行者，误入死循环的外部变量。 长夜月：有别于「三月七」的高危变量。命途图谱异常，能绕过权杖自检系统，并影响管理员的记忆。 在第33550337次死循环中，接替了空缺的「岁月」路径，暗中操纵泰坦并引导{NICKNAME}一行人推动「再创世」。 推测其目的：干涉「再创世」进程，清除权杖数据，中止实验。 死循环末尾，主动陷入沉睡，促成三月七完成「岁月」的试炼：取回未来。 注释：忘却不意味着背叛…它是最后的保护♭
E: March 7th: A Nameless from the Astral Express, pathstrider of Remembrance, external variable that accidentally entered the recursive loop. Evernight: A high-risk variable distinct from "March 7th." Her Path chart is anomalous, able to bypass the Scepter's self-check system and even affect the memories of the Administrator. In the 33,550,337th recursive loop, she took over the vacant "Time" path, secretly manipulating the Titan and guiding {NICKNAME}'s group to advance Era Nova. Speculated objective: Interfere with Era Nova's progress, clear Scepter data, terminate the experiment. At the end of the loop, she voluntarily entered slumber, enabling March 7th to complete Time's trial: reclaiming the future. Note: Oblivion does not mean betrayal... It is the final protection. ♭

C: 投入十二因子后，以无机生命为初始变量，进行的第1至<unbreak>50121</unbreak>次循环。
E: Records of cycles 1 to <unbreak>50121</unbreak>, conducted using inorganic life as the initial variable after inputting the twelve factors.

C:
修理是这样一件事：手指摩挲着木纹的痕迹时，你感受到它所感受到的。
拆下朽败的木板，为它漆上新的色彩时，你也就赋予了它新的生命。

笔只有百分之九十九的墨水了，先不聊了！
E:
When your fingers trace the grain of the wood, you start to feel what it feels...
And when you disassemble the decaying wooden board to paint it anew, you're giving it another chance at life.

There's only <unbreak>99%</unbreak> ink left in this pen, so I'm gonna stop here for now!

C: <align="center">我按照你的建议，丢掉了很多家具，除了那个瓦罐。</align>\n<align="center">当时我们用它盛摘下的野莓。</align>\n<align="center">莓子吃完了，但里边还留着酸甜的香气。</align>
E: <align="center">I tossed out most of the furniture — except for that clay jar.</align>\n<align="center">We used it back then to hold the wild berries we picked.</align>\n<align="center">The berries are long gone, but it still carries that sweet, tangy scent.</align>

C: 今天星穹列车成功抵抗了亚空间风暴，目前安然无恙。列车长成功阻止了{NICKNAME}笨蛋乘客和三月七笨蛋乘客在风暴中太空漫步的企图。列车长了不起。
E: Today, the Astral Express successfully weathered a subspace storm and is now safe and sound. The conductor heroically prevented Reckless Passenger {NICKNAME} and Reckless Passenger March 7th from attempting a spacewalk during the storm. Truly, an outstanding conductor.

C: 镜中的扑闪目光
E: Mirror's Flicker

C:
原谅我公务繁忙，只能在列车上匆匆逗留一会。

从列车上凝望如今的雅利洛-Ⅵ，有种恍如隔世之感。请容许我再次向诸位表达诚挚的谢意。

我承诺，今后无论诸位旅至何处，贝洛伯格都是诸位永远的港湾。
E:
Forgive me. I've been quite busy with work and can only stay for a while.

Staring at Jarilo-VI as it is from the height of the Express makes me feel... as if everything happened a lifetime ago. Please let me offer my sincerest gratitude to you guys.

I promise that, no matter where your path leads, Belobog will always remain a safe harbor for the Express.

C: 列车的到来，挽救了贝洛伯格的命运。我谨代表银鬃铁卫向你们致以崇高的敬意。\n\n不论将来遇到何种危险，请记得银鬃铁卫永远是你们坚强的后盾。
E: The Express's arrival saved Belobog from a dark fate. I offer my highest respect and thanks on behalf of the Silvermane Guards.\n\nNo matter what dangers you'll face, please remember that the Silvermane Guards will always have your back.

C:
能在列车上短暂停歇，静下心来看看璀璨的群星，真好啊…

片刻的自由不可多得，这次，我拥有了一份难得属于自己的时间。

不知道下次登上列车会是什么时候…但…我已经开始期待了~
E:
It was very pleasant to have a brief repose aboard the Express and behold the brilliant stars...

A moment of freedom is so very rare. This time, I managed to find such a moment all for myself.

I don't know when I'll next be able to board the Express... but I'm already looking forward to it.

C: 谁人的过去
E: A Certain Someone's Past

C: 我热爱概率的游戏
E: I love games of chance

C: 很高兴我们能同享一片风景。
E: I'm glad we can enjoy this scenery together.

C: 梦里，人造的夜空中，群星飘忽。他们说，伟大的灵魂终将成为天星，为地上的人指引方向。\n匹诺康尼的繁星由无数逐梦客织成。当你抬头，你会思考些什么？
E: The stars drift across the dream's artificial sky. They say that great souls will eventually become stars in the sky that guide the way for those on the ground below.\nThe stars in Penacony are woven by countless Dreamchasers. What will you ponder when you raise your head?

C: 「{NICKNAME}，我的大救星，总算是碰到你了！我刚准备收工回家，却被一台大机器人拦住了去路。唉，看来要想出去就必须干掉他了，我一个人肯定做不到——{NICKNAME}，老桑博的生意可就全靠你了！」
E: "{NICKNAME}, my savior, you're finally here! I was going to pack up and go home, but this huge piece of metal is blocking the way. Looks like we have to dispose of it if we want to get out. I can't do it alone... {NICKNAME}, your old pal Sampo's business is all in your hands!"

C: 角色在战斗中受到致命攻击时，<color=#f29e38ff>不会陷入无法战斗状态</color>，将立即回复部分生命。
E: When a character receives a killing blow in combat, they will <color=#f29e38ff>not be knocked down</color> and will immediately recover some HP.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>战技点</color>为<color=#f29e38ff>全队共享</color>，施放<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>需要<color=#f29e38ff>消耗战技点</color>，施放<color=#f29e38ff>普攻</color>可以<color=#f29e38ff>恢复战技点</color>，合理地分配将是制胜的关键。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Skill Points</color> are <color=#f29e38ff>shared among the team</color>. Using a <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> will <color=#f29e38ff>consume Skill Points</color>, while using <color=#f29e38ff>Basic ATK</color> can <color=#f29e38ff>recover Skill Points</color>. To emerge victorious, you need to allocate your resources wisely!

C: 【恐惧萦绕】结束时，若未能对施加者发起攻击解除【恐惧萦绕】，则会陷入【恐惧】状态，无法行动。
E: When Terror Grip ends, if the caster of Terror Grip is not attacked to dispel Terror Grip, then the affected ally will fall into the Terrified state and be unable to perform actions.

C: 使用云吟法术的刺客处于<color=#f29e38ff>隐身状态</color>，很难被发现。被<color=#f29e38ff>隐身状态</color>的敌人主动攻击，进入战斗后敌方全体的行动会大幅提前，并隐藏自身的<color=#f29e38ff>弱点</color>。
E: Assassins using the cloudhymn are in <color=#f29e38ff>stealth mode</color> and are difficult to detect. After being attacked by an enemy in <color=#f29e38ff>stealth mode</color> and entering battle, all enemies' actions are greatly advanced and their <color=#f29e38ff>weaknesses</color> are hidden.

C: 在部分特殊场景玩法中，会出现<color=#f29e38ff>「辅助指引」</color>。跟随<color=#f29e38ff>「辅助指引」</color>并完成相应的操作，即可抵达当前任务目标点。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Support Guide</color> will appear in certain specific overworld gameplay. Follow <color=#f29e38ff>Support Guide</color> and finish the corresponding operations to arrive at the destination for the current mission.

C: 组合操作区域的碎片，使其与左侧图案一致，并与操作区域的底图重叠。碎片与碎片<color=#f29e38ff>重叠的部分会消融不见</color>，再次叠加碎片则又会重新显现
E: Combine the fragments in the operation area to match the pattern on the left and align with the base image in the operation area. The <color=#f29e38ff>overlapping parts of the fragments will disappear</color>, but if you overlay the fragments again, they will reappear

C:
欺瞒、谲诈，世人唾弃此种灾厄，千载一如既往。
而灵动的飞贼只抖抖猫耳、蒙好兜帽，将珍宝揽入私囊。
世界吝惜赠予她所谓英雄的宿命，
她也不屑给予世界黯淡无光的真情。
E:
Deceit and treachery... Such calamities are despised by the world, as they have been for millennia.
Yet the nimble cat-thief merely twitches her feline ears, adjusts her hood, and slips the treasures into her pocket.
The world is stingy in bestowing upon her the so-called destiny of a hero,
and she, in turn, scorns to offer a so dull and lackluster world any genuine affection.

C: 以云吟之术消隐身形的刺客，不知受何人所遣。
E: An assassin who conceals their presence using the Cloudhymn technique. It is unclear by whom they are sent.

C: 被「源究森林」的树荫遮蔽理智的美梦剧团。它们携带着「奇想林」中结出的模因病毒，于梦中蕉横地宣扬睡蕉小猴的蕉旨与原始博士的蕉诲。
E: Sweet Dreams Troupe with their reason clouded by the shade of the AtaviSearch Forest. They carry with them the memetic virus borne into fruit in the Wonder Forest, banaoldly promoting the banacreed of the Slumbernana Monkey and Dr. Primitive's banadvice.

C: 罗浮仙舟云骑军地面巡防部队的成员，手持阵刀，身着轻银打造的铠甲，维护各个洞天的日常秩序。
E: Member of the ground patrol division of the Xianzhou Luofu Cloud Knights. Wearing a light set of silver armor and with a Devastator Glaive in hand, they are in charge of maintaining order in every delve.

C: 「星际和平公司」的基层员工，主要负责维持公司管辖地区的治安秩序。工资不高，只能在公司旗下的企业舰上合租房间。出现于此的是基于你的记忆模拟出的幻影。
E: An Interastral Peace Corporation grunt worker whose job mainly involves maintaining order in locations ruled by the IPC. With a meager salary, the only lodging they can afford is a shared room on one of the IPC's enterprise ships. The version appearing here is a phantom simulated from your memories.
