E: Today feels fighting fit.

C: 史瓦罗：没事吧？\n克拉拉：我没事。
E: Svarog: Are you alright?\nClara: I'm okay!

C: 希儿小姐能用武力对付我就绝不肯动嘴皮子，这到底是我的问题还是她的问题？
E: If she had it her way, Miss Seele would spend less time yelling at me and more time actively trying to hit me. Can someone explain what I did to deserve her?

C: 嚯，还有意外惊喜？
E: Huh, another surprise?

C: 想找地方躺一会儿，放松一下。
E: I wanna find somewhere to put my feet up.

C: 艾丝妲小姐！啊，那可真是位货真价实的大小姐…你绝对猜不到她的家底究竟有多厚，绝对！
E: Lady Asta! Now that's a real lady if I ever saw one. You'll never guess just how wealthy she really is!

C: 免费看小桂子表演的机会，我绝对不能错过~
E: A free performance by Little Gui? There's no way I'm missing that~

C: 挨领导批评，去打几圈「帝垣琼玉」；工作做不完，去打几圈「帝垣琼玉」。啊，我愿将「帝垣琼玉」，称作我的救命恩人！
E: Told off by my manager? Go play some Celestial Jade. Too much work? Go play some Celestial Jade. Ahhhh, Celestial Jade is my savior!

C: 人类的成长固然微不足道，但却比神的不动完满更为可喜。
E: The passage of our lives is a brief affair, but it brings more joy than the immortality of the Aeons.

C: 素裳姑娘，我不谙刀兵，还有劳你多多费心了。
E: I am not well-versed in the art of combat. I leave this to you, Miss Sushang.

C: 小小麻烦，不值一提。
E: Hardly a concern.

C: 青雀经常在长乐天打牌，有时候打累了就来看我杂耍。我现在能从她的脸色里看出她当天的胜负——桃红就是赢了，铁青就是输了，煞白就是领导来抓她了。
E: Qingque likes to play celestial jade in Exalting Sanctum, but sometimes she gets tired and comes to see me juggling. I can tell from her face if she's won or lost that day — red is a win, pale is a loss, and really pale means her boss is out looking for her.

C: 还来劲了啊你！
E: Getting serious, huh!?

C: 性命攸关，小心小心。
E: Careful — this is life or death.

C: 若要斩下天上的星星，还需要很久很久。
E: If I am to cut through the heart of a star, more time is needed.

C: 剑下草芥！
E: Blade fodder!

C: 我以月色为剑。
E: A blade of moonlight.

C: 千虑一失。
E: Inevitable.

C: 不过尔尔。
E: That's it?

C: 时辰已至。
E: It's time.

C: 藿藿也在啊…最近工作如何，顺利吗…尾巴如何，安分吗…运势如何，有好转吗……
E: Huohuo, you're here... How is work? Under control...? And Tail... not causing trouble I hope?

C: 罪加一等……
E: New crimes...

C: 还是动脑省力气。
E: It's better to use your brain and save your strength.

C: 曜青和公司有不少合作，没什么好否认的。这也意味着我们征讨孽物时，公司必须毫无保留地支援我们——孽物可不管这星球姓甚名谁，几兆信用点的产业也给一股脑捣了，公司朋友们可没那么大方。
E: The Yaoqing and the IPC collaborate on many things — there's no denying it. This also means when we fight the abominations, the IPC must support us unreservedly. Abominations don't care about who owns this planet and will happily wreck a multi-trillion-credit industry, and our friends at the IPC are not the charitable type.

C: 朱明仙舟的锻艺享誉星海，宗工大匠也层出不穷，他们大多都是爷爷的弟子。其中就包括那位「如飞逝流星」的应星。
E: The Xianzhou Zhuming is famous across the stars for its forging and metallurgy, and there are countless master craftsmen among its ranks — most of them were Grandpa's apprentices. That includes Yingxing, the "flying comet."

C: 「曜青」是座美丽的仙舟，就是离丰饶民太近了些。
E: The Yaoqing is a beautiful Xianzhou ship. It's just a little too close to the Denizens of Abundance.

C: 放心吧，在你需要时，我会出手。
E: Rest assured, in your time of need, I will be there.

C: 流云易散。
E: Clouds are easily scattered.

C: 前尘旧梦，俱已往矣。
E: Dreams of a past life are now all gone.

C: 你是否听说过不存在「丑恶」的星球？有趣的是，那里的人们眼中同样也不存在「美好」。
E: Did you ever hear tell of a planet where there is no concept of grotesquery? Even more intriguing — the people there have no concept of beauty, either.

C: 如果遇到麻烦，务必让我知晓，我将捍卫你的安全。
E: Should misfortune befall you, do not hesitate to call upon me. I will protect you.

C: 三月七女士，请允许我以绵薄之力，为你驱散阴霾！
E: If I may, Miss March, allow me to use my modest power to get rid of the gloom!

C: 这种难度的谜题…
E: They call this a puzzle?

C: 看来，你又有新的布局了。我会拭目以待的。
E: Looks like you have a new plan. I'll wait to see what happens.

C: 一无所有？或者，赢下所有！
E: Bust? Or maybe I'll take it all!

C: 不能停止思考。
E: Never stop thinking.

C: 她呀，就像个木偶师，仿佛在她眼里，人都不是人…这种家伙最可怕了！但我总是忍不住想和她合作，一次又一次…为什么呢？因为我也是这种人啊。
E: She's like a puppeteer. It's as if people aren't people in her eyes... That kind of person is the most terrifying! But I can't help but want to work with her again and again... Why? Because I am also that kind of person.

C: 切勿回头，来处无路可走。
E: Never turn back — the path behind is gone.

C: 萨姆，等待指示。
E: Sam, awaiting orders.

C: 不可以动手……
E: Hey! That wasn't very nice...

C: 与你同道，护你左右，领你远行。
E: I will walk with you, watch over you, and guide you on your path.

C: 这么说吧，我的联觉信标被改造过。反正他宝贝的你们现在只能听到我和那些欠喵的小可爱这么讲话了…小可爱，小可爱，小可爱！喏，你看。
E: So, here's the thing: Someone went and tinkered with my Synesthesia Beacon, so now every time you muddle-fudgers hear me chinwaggin' with those shirtbags, it's all a bunch of "fudge this" and "fork that"... See what I'm sayin'?

C: 人生一世无非借来之物，何不尽情享用再交还苍天？《银河忍法帖》有云：「借时为五、还时四，本来无一物，休道莫须有。」
E: Life is but borrowing, why not enjoy it to the fullest and return it to the heavens? As the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions read: "Borrow five, return four, there was nothing at first, so speak not of what never existed."

C: 如此娴熟的冰遁•忍法，不愧是琉璃•忍者。
E: Such mastery of the Ice Release ninjutsu, as expected of Ninja Ruri.

C: 无用！
E: Useless!

C: 是《银河忍法帖》中记叙的忍•宝！
E: It is the ninja treasure as foretold in the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions!

C: 这里还有天才？
E: Really? A genius? Here?

C: 你拍一，我拍一。你拍二，我拍二。你拍三，我拍三。你拍四，我拍四。你拍五，我拍五。你拍六，我拍六。你拍七，我拍七。你拍八，我拍八。你拍九，我拍九。你拍十，我拍十。什、什么时候能结束！
E: You clap one, I clap one. You clap two, I clap two. You clap three, I clap three. You clap four, I clap four. You clap five, I clap five. You clap six, I clap six. You clap seven, I clap seven. You clap eight, I clap eight. You clap nine, I clap nine. You clap ten, I clap ten. Wh—When will this end!?

C: 战场的风，不会停息。
E: The winds of battle never cease.

C: 看呐，表演开始了……
E: Look. The show has begun...

C: 确凿无疑的胜利。
E: An undisputed victory.

C: 偶尔在港湾停泊的时光…就像泡沫般令人怀念。
E: Those moments spent anchored in quiet harbors... I miss them as I miss fleeting foams.

C: 棋的艺术，是牺牲的艺术，也是前进的艺术。逐火军从不回头——胜利之后，自有人以蜜酿祭奠我等的灵魂。
E: Chess is the art of sacrifice and of relentless advance. The Flame-Chase army does not look back. When victory is claimed, others will offer honey brew to remember our fallen spirits.

C: 先手优势，不可浪费呐。
E: The first-move advantage must not be wasted.

C: 群龙，依此号令。
E: Dragons, obey this order.

C: 当我握住火种时，三千多万世的灼烧第一次有了具象化。他的忍耐和抗争，值得无名客最崇高的敬意。
E: When I grasped the Coreflame, the conflagration of more than thirty million recurrences felt real for the first time. His endurance and defiance deserve the highest respect from the Nameless.

C: 我会…等你……
E: I'll... wait for you...

C: 旅程…不会结束。
E: Journeys never end.

C: 再坚持一下。
E: Keep at it.

C: 骑枪，备战。
E: Lance at the ready.

C: 角色移动-后
E: Move Character — Backward

C: 当一朵花含苞待放
E: When a Bud Readies to Bloom

E: The Other Boss's Remaining HP

E: Breached Nest (IX)

E: Clone Trick

E: When purchasing exclusive chimeras: Grants the strongest Krenabis in the team and <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> random exclusive chimera(s) <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK.

E: When this unit attacks: Persuade a random number of opponent chimeras to surrender.

C: 卷是没用的啦。
E: Being a workaholic won't get you anywhere.

C: 差不多了吧？
E: Are we good here?

C: 该发起攻势了。
E: Time to go on the offensive.

C: ・为了进入匹诺康尼大剧院追击星核，列车组参加了热砂盛典，几经波折，在最后一次选拔中，从银枝手中夺来了盛会巨星的名号。\n・在此期间，星期日，瓦尔特，知更鸟面见梦主后，星期日使用「同谐」的力量向其发问，其间，瓦尔特看出了问话中的破绽。星期日将瓦尔特与知更鸟禁锢，亮明了自己「秩序」命途行者的身份——他和梦主才是匹诺康尼事件的幕后主使。
E: ・ To pursue the Stellaron at the Penacony Grand Theater, the Express Crew participated in the Scorchsand Festival. After several twists and turns, they won the title of Festive Superstar from Argenti in the final selection.\n・ During this time, Sunday, Welt, and Robin met with the Dreammaster. Using the power of the Harmony, Sunday pressed the Dreammaster with questions. Yet, Welt noticed flaws in his words. Sunday then imprisoned Welt and Robin, revealing his identity as a Pathstrider of the Order. He and the Dreammaster were the true masterminds behind the Penacony incident.

C: 觅宝券
E: Treasure Hunt Ticket

C: 橡木鸣蛀之梦
E: Dream of Gnawing Oak

E: Increases DMG dealt by the Boss Enemy's with every action.

E: Linebreaker

E: The Cremators

C: 说了 看不懂
E: It did, I just don't get it

C: 谢谢你
E: Thank you

E: Too bad no one remembers. Memories has always been so fragile

E: Black Tide's Champion (Bug)

E: Regains <u>"HP Count"</u> for all friendly targets (except this unit).

E: Deals massive Physical DMG to one designated target.

E: When dealing DMG, inflicts "Glacial Erosion" state on the attacked target.

E: Summons "Ichor Memosprite: Pheasant." For every summon defeated, reduces this unit's Toughness.

E: Just War

C: 知更鸟追踪不协和音，找到被猎犬家系围堵的流萤，并目睹你和加拉赫为流萤解围。知更鸟不宜直接露面，得使用其它的调查手段了。
E: Robin tracked down the dissonance and found Firefly being cornered by the Bloodhound Family, witnessing you and Gallagher coming to Firefly's rescue. Robin couldn't appear in person and decided to find other methods to continue her investigation.

C: 与其他命途不同，「虚无」捕获那些不愿盲信，却又无力与其抗争的人。黄泉请你再次走上起点，引领人们归还清醒的世界。
E: Unlike other Paths, the Nihility ensnared those who refused blind faith, yet lack the strength to defy it. Acheron beckoned you back to the starting point, to guide people back to a world of clarity.

C: 其他人比我更需要它。
E: Others need it more than I do.

C: 捡拾冥滩上的甲板残片。
E: Pick up deck fragments from the Nethershore.

C: 或许还不是时候。
E: Perhaps not yet.

C: 刻律德菈当政时期，对塔兰顿的信仰也前所未有地昌盛。许多人自发对违反律法的行为重拳出击，请求塔兰顿为各种鸡毛蒜皮的小事降下审判，但公正之秤鲜少回应。「监督之眼」便是在此时问世。它们可以记录视线与声音，以便法庭做出决断，并且只能由真正的塔兰顿信徒使用。逐火之旅开始前，所有监督之眼都遭到了销毁，因为有太多人发现，自己并不是真正的塔兰顿信徒。
E: During Cerydra's reign, faith in Talanton flourished like never before. Many people took it upon themselves to crack down on law violations, begging Talanton to pass judgment on all sorts of trivial matters, but the Scale of Justice rarely responded. It was then that the "Eye of Overseer" came into being. It could record sights and sounds to help courts reach verdicts, and could only be used by true believers of Talanton. Before the Flame-Chase Journey began, all Eyes of Overseer were destroyed, as too many people discovered they weren't true believers of Talanton after all.

C: 速度提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: SPD increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 受到致命攻击时，对我方全体目标造成大量冰属性伤害并解除【幻身】状态。
E: When receiving a killing blow, deals massive Ice DMG to all allies and dispels the "Phantom Illusion" state.

C: 每层使暴击伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>，最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color>层。
E: Each stack increases CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>, stacking up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> time(s).

C: 暴击伤害提高
E: CRIT DMG Boost

C: 梦主的意图已是昭然若揭…必须阻止他才行——可是，他究竟准备怎样做到那一切？
E: The Dreammaster's intentions are now painfully clear... I have to stop him. But how on earth does he plan to pull all this off?

C: 流萤一直在和某位同伴进行通讯，从她们的交流来看，她们的身份和目的都绝不简单。\n继续追索吧，联想到此前感知到的杂音，她们一定与梦境的异常有关。
E: Firefly has been communicating with a partner. From their conversation, their identities and objectives are clearly not what they seem.\nI need to stay on their trail. Considering the static I sensed before, they must be connected to the anomalies in the dreamscape.

C: 「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔」——不知为何，你又回想起了这句话。
E: "When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret." For some reason, those words come back to you again.

C: 确认左侧道路的性质
E: Check the properties of the path on the left

C: 送别黑天鹅
E: Bid farewell to Black Swan

C: 好的，来了。
E: Alright. Coming!

C: 他想方设法寻求盟友，试着以一人之力，撼动家族的天平。
E: He desperately sought allies, attempting to tip The Family's scales with himself alone.

C: 未必是真正的「繁育」。还记得么？这片星系很久以前，也遇上过虫灾，规模还不小。
E: It's not necessarily the real Propagation. This star system went through the Swarm Disaster long ago, remember? And it was anything but small.

C: 谢谢。
E: Thank you.

C: （恐怕得先走一步了……）
E: (I'm afraid I'll have to take my leave...)

C: 还记得么？某次巡演前，我问过你一个问题。算算时间，也过去很久了，不知道你有没有找到答案——
E: Remember? Before one of your tours, I asked you a question. It's been quite a while since then. I wonder if you found your answer...

C: 接下来呢？{NICKNAME}被黑天鹅带走了，你要去找{M#他}{F#她}么？
E: What's next, then? {NICKNAME}'s been taken by Black Swan. Will you go look for {M#him?}{F#her?}

C: 我已经在这么做了。
E: Already on it.

C: 真狠心啊。
E: How ruthless.

C: 现在，让我们把视线，投向命运的某个交汇之处吧——
E: Now, let's turn our gaze to where the threads of destiny intertwine...

C: …是什么？
E: ...What is it?

C: 告诉你也无妨，<color=#dbc291ff>我在她的记忆中，留下了一簇焚化工的火苗</color>。
E: I might as well tell you. <color=#dbc291ff>I've planted a spark of the Cremators' fire in her memories</color>.

C: 那些爪痕…早已叛离那条命途，你却仍能使用「毁灭」的力量？
E: Those claw marks... You've long since strayed from that Path, yet you can still wield the power of the Destruction?

C: 而「寰宇蝗灾」，也将重现于美梦之中。
E: And the Swarm Disaster shall reappear again in the sweet dream.

C: 一个噩梦…具体是什么？
E: A nightmare... What exactly is in it?

C: 见谅，我得先走一步了。
E: Sorry, but I need to get going.

C: 「在你度过最美好的时光之后，就尽力飞向天空吧，你会在橡木的顶端听见虫鸣。」
E: "After you've lived through the best of times, soar toward the sky with all your might. You'll hear insects chirping at the oak's crown."

C: 不…<color=#dbc291ff>只是他的一句「律令」</color>。
E: No... <color=#dbc291ff>just one of his "divine laws"</color>.

C: 乐园终将造就，不在子夜，而在「正午」。神主日最初，也是唯一的律令，由我亲启——
E: Paradise shall soon be created, not at midnight, but at "noon." I shall initiate the first and only divine law of the Great Septimus...

C: 那是……
E: Is that...

C: 在时间的灰烬中，你要重新点燃「命运」。
E: From within the ashes of time... You must reignite "destiny."

C: 可惜，现在我们更应该醒来，而非睡去。仅仅凭借我们，也还完全没有破除「太一之梦」的能力。
E: Unfortunately, we need to stay awake right now rather than sleep. We're still nowhere near capable of breaking free from Ena's Dream.

C: 还能这样？
E: What? That's possible?

C: 这是计划的第一步。在流光忆庭的帮助下，像各位一样足够坚强的人会逐渐从梦中清醒，苏醒的自由意志会成为撼动太一之梦的「不协和音」。
E: This is the first step of our plan. With the assistance from the Garden of Recollection, those who possess a strong will, like you, will gradually awaken from the dream. These free wills are the "discord" that will sway Ena's Dream.

C: …怎么突然问起这个？
E: ...Why're you asking that all of a sudden?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>不——这段经历只会让我憎恨歌唱。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>No... That experience only made me detest singing.</color>

C: 我渐渐长大，有时会发现，哥哥也会时不时哼唱同一段曲调，那时，我以为他在想念妈妈，却又不好意思直说，想要去安慰他。
E: I grew up, and I realized that my brother would sometimes hum the same tune as my mother did. And I thought maybe he missed her, but I was too embarrassed to point that out. I tried to comfort him instead.

C: 「她一生如鸟，优雅从容，此刻微启唇喙，一声惋叹，轻如羽落」——喜欢吗？
E: "Like a bird, she lived her life, graceful and composed. Now her beak parts slightly with a sigh, as soft as falling feathers." Like it?

C: 我们会醒来吗？
E: Will we wake up?

C: 是最先从美梦中挣脱的人们——沉眠无相者瞥见了他们的愿望。
E: It's the people who first broke free from the sweet dream. The sleeping and shapeless caught a glimpse of their desires.

C: 你的身体怎么样了？
E: How are you feeling?

C: 其实，还有一些关于你的事，我总觉得自己应该告诉你。
E: Actually, there are some things about you I feel I should tell you.

C: 不会的，只要我能做到，就永远不会。
E: I won't. I promise to stay as long as I can.

C: 但相信你会在的…一定会……
E: But I believe you'll be there... You definitely will...

C: 你带着满满一包火漆，行走在无人的乡间小路上。突然，一颗巨大的紫色球状物体跳了出来，像颗葡萄……
E: You're walking down a deserted country road with a bag full of Sealing Wax. Suddenly, a huge purple spherical object, which looks just like a grape, jumps out...

C: 啊，是啊。你的意思，我完全明白了！
E: Ah, yeah. I totally get what you mean!

C: 「律令•其三」
E: "Divine Law (III)"

C: 在好友挑战中，玩家可以挑战对方的<color=#f29e38ff>防守阵容</color>。防守阵容可以在活动主界面进行设置。
E: In Friendly Challenges, players can challenge their opponent's <color=#f29e38ff>Defense Lineup</color>. The Defense Lineup can be set up in the main event interface.

C: 敌方【后排目标】被<color=#f29e38ff>消灭</color>时，敌方首领所受的伤害提高，至多提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2000%</unbreak></color>，该效果将在敌方首领转换阶段时被移除。
E: When an enemy with "Back Row Target" is <color=#f29e38ff>defeated</color>, DMG dealt to the enemy boss increases up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>2000%</unbreak></color>. This effect will be removed when the enemy boss enters a new phase.

C: 哇！队伍里出现了*我们*的<color=#f29e38ff>专属奇美拉</color>，快点击看看吧！
E: Wow! Our exclusive chimera has joined the team, click to check it out!

C: 无法战斗
E: Downed

C: 你还记得「永火官邸」么？在大公的记忆中，我从来都是他最骄傲的孩子。我点燃他的野心，他最终倒在「毁灭」的道途上，却创造了你与「虚无」交汇的时机——这银河间许多「命运」，只需轻轻的拨弄，便能燃起足以将众人焚身的火焰。
E: Do you still remember the Ever-Flame Mansion? In the Duke's memories, I was the child whom he always took the most pride in. I stirred up the flames of his ambition, and he fell on the road of the Destruction, only to create an opportunity for you to cross paths with the Nihility... A mere stoking is all it takes for the many "fates" in this cosmos to erupt into flames powerful enough to incinerate countless souls.
